entries.title: Anime Light Novel Restaurant Chase
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Style:
Light novel cover illustration, cinematic digital painting, anime style, emotional tension, dramatic poster composition.

Scene & Setting:
Interior of a modern restaurant, extreme low-angle wide-angle perspective with the camera positioned extremely close to the glossy floor, shallow depth of field, heavy foreground blur.

Main Roles:
- A cute chibi-style character named "Gugu Gaga" running away in panic, legs pumping at high speed, hair and hat dramatically blown backward by motion, face showing a mix of tension and adorable fear.
- The protagonist (based on reference photo) retains accurate facial features, body type, clothing, and overall appearance. Slightly messy hair, flushed cheeks, breathing heavily, full-body forward lunge with powerful momentum, one arm extended forward attempting to catch the escaping chibi character. Strong sense of sudden braking and kinetic energy flowing from the planted foot through the legs, torso, shoulders, and hands.

Environment & Atmosphere: 
Restaurant patrons and bar counter heavily motion-blurred into slanted streaks. Cool white restaurant lighting, realistic glass reflections, condensation droplets on cold drinks, rich reflective floor details. Generous negative space, airy feel, intense speed sensation, and high-impact cinematic composition.

Technical & Artistic Qualities: 
Dynamic motion blur, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, sharp focus on main subjects, 8K resolution, light novel cover aesthetic, professional illustration quality, high emotional intensity.
entries.description: A detailed anime-style light novel cover prompt featuring a chibi character fleeing from a protagonist in a high-intensity restaurant chase scene.

entries.title: Surreal Melting Clocks Desert
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dreamlike surrealist oil painting in the style of Salvador Dali's "The Persistence of Memory": a barren coastal desert at dusk with a low horizon, calm blue sea on the left, pale yellow sky fading to blue, and ochre cliffs glowing in the far right distance. In the foreground, place a sharp-edged brown wooden platform extending from the lower left, with one leafless dead tree rising from it. Include exactly 4 visible timepieces: 1 soft blue-gray melting clock draped over the tree branch, 1 pale melting clock sliding over the front edge of the platform with black numbers, 1 white limp melting clock folded over a strange sleeping biomorphic face-like form in the lower right, and 1 orange closed pocket watch on the platform covered with many tiny black ants. Use elongated shadows, smooth realistic brushwork, eerie stillness, distorted forms, high contrast between warm earth tones and cool blue highlights, and a vintage museum-painting texture. Keep the composition sparse and uncanny, with no people, no modern objects, and no readable text beyond clock numerals. Optional customizable details: Salvador Dali's The Persistence of Memory, pale yellow fading to blue, barren coastal desert at dusk, 4, warm brown wood.
entries.description: A surrealist oil-painting prompt for generating a Dali-inspired coastal desert scene with melting clocks and uncanny dream imagery.

entries.title: Fleischer-Style Pony Ride
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a charming 1930s Fleischer Studios-inspired rubber-hose cartoon illustration of a smiling young woman wearing a cream hijab riding a small tan pony toward the viewer in a sunny park. The rider sits front-facing, slightly leaning forward with a sweet, playful expression, large vintage cartoon eyes, long lashes, rosy cheeks, red lips, and simplified rounded features; she wears a pale yellow collared blouse, black pants, and white sneakers. The pony has an oversized cute face, big oval eyes, a blond shaggy mane, floppy ears, a white blaze, brown bridle and reins, rounded hooves, and a friendly exaggerated expression. Place them centered in the foreground on a green grassy field with small tufts of grass and a soft shadow beneath the pony. In the background, include exactly 4 small human figures: two seated picnic guests on the left, one standing man waving near the center-left, and one standing woman in a beige dress on the right. Add exactly 3 visible lawn-game objects on the grass: a white cornhole board, a blue cone, and two colored sticks lying flat. Surround the scene with rounded dark green trees on both sides and in the distance, with exactly 4 puffy cream clouds in a muted blue sky. Use thick black ink outlines, cel-animation shapes, rubber-hose proportions, hand-painted watercolor texture, aged paper grain, slightly faded colors, subtle film speckles, and a nostalgic vintage cartoon mood. Keep the composition vertical, storybook-like, wholesome, and whimsical; no modern photorealism, no text, no watermark.
entries.description: Generates a vintage rubber-hose cartoon scene of a hijab-wearing rider on a cute pony in a playful park setting.

entries.title: Dark Fantasy Anime Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create an ultra-cinematic anime character poster inspired by dark fantasy anime worlds similar to Attack on Titan, blending realistic human detail with high-end anime rendering. Feature a powerful female soldier wearing a stylized military combat uniform with layered straps, weathered fabric, metallic gear elements, and subtle battle damage.
Vertical movie-poster composition, chest-up side profile, character looking toward the distant sky with a fierce yet emotional expression of resolve and sacrifice. Hyper-detailed skin texture, realistic eyes, faint dirt marks, scars, and wind-swept hair strands illuminated by dramatic atmospheric lighting.
Background should feel massive and cinematic, distant ruined walls, drifting smoke, floating ash particles, soft fog, and hints of colossal silhouettes fading into the environment. Use shallow depth of field and strong environmental storytelling to create tension and scale.
Lighting should combine moody shadows with golden rim light and cinematic contrast. Include realistic cloth textures, metallic reflections, leather harness details, and subtle weathering for a grounded, believable appearance.
Poster design should feature:
bold vertical typography on one side,
military insignia or emblem near the title,
minimal Japanese editorial styling,
small emotional quote beneath the name,
textured paint-brush separators,
soft grain and premium collectible-poster aesthetics.
Color grading should lean toward smoky blue-gray tones mixed with warm amber highlights for an epic war-drama atmosphere. Inspired by blockbuster anime adaptations, Unreal Engine cinematic visuals, and luxury collector posters. Ultra-detailed, emotional, dramatic, masterpiece-quality, 8K aesthetic.
entries.description: A cinematic anime poster prompt inspired by dark fantasy worlds, featuring a military soldier and emotional environmental storytelling.

entries.title: Two-Panel Pastel Sailor Girls
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a side-by-side anime color-variation test illustration of the same cute sailor-girl character concept in an ARIA-inspired canal city setting.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 image split into exactly 2 equal vertical panels with a thin white divider in the center. Soft pastel lighting, dreamy waterfront atmosphere, high-detail anime illustration.

Layout: Left panel shows one character seated or kneeling near the canal, facing slightly toward the viewer, holding a tall white gondola-style flagpole on the far left. Right panel shows a second variation of the character in a similar pose, holding a plush mascot. Both faces are intentionally obscured by opaque square censor blocks.

Subject details: Use exactly 2 sailor-girl variants. Variant 1 on the left has mint green long wavy hair, a white sailor beret with blue trim, a small white flower hair accessory, a white short-sleeved sailor dress with blue and gold trim, white gloves, gold brooch details, and a blue ribbon at the waist. She holds a white flag with a blue curved emblem, and a small raccoon-like mascot sits beside her. Variant 2 on the right has pink twin-drill pigtails with large blue bows, a matching white sailor beret with blue trim and a tiny wing-like accessory, a white sailor dress with blue and gold trim, white gloves, and gold ornaments. She hugs a round white-and-brown cat-like plush mascot wearing a blue bow and gold medallion.

Counted visible elements: exactly 2 vertical panels; exactly 2 main girls; exactly 2 opaque square face-cover blocks; exactly 2 mascots, one raccoon-like animal in the left panel and one cat-like plush in the right panel; exactly 1 tall white flag in the left panel; exactly 1 central white divider.

Background: A romantic Venetian/Aqua-style canal city with pale cream and blue buildings, arched bridges, waterfront colonnades, shimmering turquoise water, reflections, distant towers, soft blue sky, and tiny birds. Keep the background continuous in mood but separated by the panel divider.

Visual style: Polished Japanese anime key visual, pastel palette, soft bloom, delicate line art, glossy eyes mostly hidden by the censor blocks, ornate sailor uniform details, cute fantasy maritime aesthetic, high resolution, gentle bokeh and watercolor-like atmospheric depth.

Constraints: Keep both face-obscuring squares clearly visible and opaque, left block in muted beige-gray and right block in pale dusty pink. Do not add readable text except the simple blue emblem on the flag. Avoid photorealism, avoid extra characters, avoid more panels, avoid logos or watermarks.
entries.description: Generates a wide two-panel anime color-variation illustration of cute sailor girls in a dreamy canal city, useful for character design comparison sheets.

entries.title: Censored Dragon Skull Warrior
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dark cinematic fantasy close-up in a 16:9 widescreen frame: a rugged warrior or shaman stands on the left side of the composition, partially turned in profile, wearing a massive weathered dragon-skull headdress that extends to the right with bony teeth, spikes, horns, cracked scales, and reddish thorn-like protrusions. The character has long dark hair with one visible thick reddish-brown braid, a visible ear, and a rough fur cloak over the shoulder. Place a large opaque dark olive-black rectangular block over the center of the image, covering most of the character's face and torso area like an intentional censor mask. The background is out of focus, foggy, and teal-green, suggesting a bleak outdoor medieval or tribal battlefield setting with vague silhouettes of posts or structures. Use shallow depth of field, moody low-key lighting, muted green-brown color grading, gritty texture, realistic creature-bone detail, and an ominous atmospheric tone inspired by grim mythic fantasy cinema. The headdress should have exactly one prominent dragon skull head visible on the right, one visible braid, one fur shoulder mass, and one central censor rectangle. No text, no watermark, no bright colors.
entries.description: Generates a moody cinematic fantasy close-up of a tribal warrior wearing a dragon-skull headdress with a central censor block.

entries.title: ChatGPT Cyberpunk Manga Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a realistic desktop screenshot of a ChatGPT-style web interface showing a Japanese prompt request and the resulting cyberpunk manga illustration.

Canvas: Landscape browser screenshot, approximately 768×827 px, mostly white background with lots of empty margin. The conversation column is centered slightly to the right, with a generated image preview aligned below and left of the prompt card.

Layout: At the top right, show a small embedded social media profile screenshot. Beneath it, show one large rounded light-gray Japanese prompt bubble. Below and left of the bubble, show a small status line reading "Thought for 1m 19s ›". Under that, show one tall generated image card with rounded corners, partly visible, followed by a bottom message composer bar spanning the lower width.

Top social profile screenshot: Show exactly 1 miniature Japanese X/Twitter-style profile card with a bright blue header, circular avatar on the left, a small square yellow logo in the header area, Japanese account name text including "Newsletter", a follow/profile button, and dense Japanese bio text. Keep it small and slightly blurry like a pasted reference screenshot.

Japanese prompt bubble: A rounded rectangle in very pale gray with black Japanese text. The text should request generating a stylish, sharp, futuristic cyberpunk manga-style full-page illustration based on an attached SNS profile screenshot. Include a bold-looking section label "【参照する要素】". Mention referencing the person/account atmosphere, facial expression, hairstyle, clothing, pose, overall profile feel, name, writing style, self-introduction, posts, colors, wording, worldview, catchphrases, and activities. At the bottom, include a small control line similar to "表示を増やす⌄".

Generated manga card: Show exactly 1 vertical full-page cyberpunk manga image inside a rounded black-bordered card. The manga page is divided into exactly 4 horizontal panels:
1. Top panel: Extreme close-up of an anime character's eye and face, wearing angular futuristic glasses or visor elements, with blue holographic UI screens and orange mechanical cybernetic face gear.
2. Second panel: Wider shot of the same character in a dark blue neon city/control-room environment, wearing a maroon jacket or cloak, surrounded by floating blue interface panels with Japanese text.
3. Third panel: Desk or workstation panel with an open notebook/book, devices, screens, sticky-note-like yellow labels, and data panels, all lit by blue neon.
4. Bottom panel: Wide cityscape or server-room-like cyberpunk environment in deep blues with small glowing windows, data panels, and a tiny silhouetted figure near the bottom.

Manga visual style: High-detail Japanese cyberpunk comic art, dramatic ink lines, glossy digital painting, cinematic blue-and-orange lighting, dense holographic overlays, futuristic UI typography, high contrast shadows, rain-slick neon atmosphere, sharp manga panel borders, no speech balloons except tiny decorative Japanese UI text.

Bottom composer UI: Show exactly 1 rounded white input bar at the bottom. Include a plus icon on the left, placeholder Japanese text "質問してみましょう", and on the right exactly 4 controls: "Thinking" dropdown text, a microphone icon, a black circular voice/equalizer button, and a pale disabled send/icon button.

Constraints: Make the whole image look like a captured AI chat webpage, not a standalone poster. Preserve Japanese text where visible but keep most of it small and not perfectly legible. Use clean browser UI spacing, rounded cards, soft shadows, and no extra watermarks. The primary illustrated character should be a sharp futuristic cyberpunk manga persona inspired by a Japanese SNS newsletter account; the main neon palette should be deep electric blue with orange accents; the prompt language should be Japanese; the manga page style should be high-detail cyberpunk Japanese manga; the visible chat status should be Thought for 1m 19s ›.
entries.description: Generates a realistic AI chat webpage screenshot showing a Japanese SNS-profile prompt and a four-panel cyberpunk manga result.

entries.title: Celestial Xianxia Fairy Palace
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical fantasy xianxia watercolor illustration in a soft pastel palette, with even, unbroken color blending and smooth flowing linework. Center one ethereal celestial maiden, immortal fairy, standing front-facing in an enormous translucent Hanfu gown of pale pink, powder blue, ivory, and gold; the gown spreads outward like clouds and flower petals, covered with tiny glowing ornaments, butterflies, blossoms, and star-like sparkles. She has very long dark hair, an ornate gold floral crown, delicate jewelry, and a calm divine expression. Directly below her, place one small white cat sitting in a bright rectangular doorway of light. Behind her, place one huge pale blue-and-pink moon or luminous circular portal, partly hidden by mist and architectural silhouettes. Surround the scene with floating Chinese immortal-palace scenery: layered misty mountains, distant pagodas, suspended pavilions, hanging bead chains, cloud bridges, and delicate floral branches. Include exactly two vertical Chinese calligraphy inscription panels: one narrow pale panel on the upper left filled with small black calligraphy, and one framed scroll on the upper right with the large title 仙宠 and smaller vertical calligraphy beneath it. Include exactly one arched stone bridge in the lower left-middle distance, exactly three prominent lanterns in the lower half (two warm standing lanterns on the left and one larger ornate hanging lantern near the lower center), and exactly one central luminous portal behind the cat. The atmosphere should feel dreamlike, romantic, ancient Chinese, and magical, with pearlescent mist, glittering light particles, soft ink-wash textures, delicate gold highlights, and a high level of ornamental detail. Use a tall 9:16 composition, airy negative space near the edges, no modern objects, no watermark, no harsh outlines, and avoid fragmented colors or jagged lines.
entries.description: Generates a dreamy vertical xianxia watercolor scene with a celestial fairy, glowing cat portal, palace architecture, lanterns, and Chinese calligraphy scrolls.

the gown spreads outward like clouds and flower petals, covered with tiny glowing ornaments, butterflies, blossoms, and star-like sparkles. she has very long dark hair, an ornate gold floral crown, delicate jewelry, and a calm divine expression. directly below her, place one small white cat sitting in a bright rectangular doorway of light. behind her, place one huge pale blue-and-pink moon or luminous circular portal, partly hidden by mist and architectural silhouettes. surround the scene with floating chinese immortal-palace scenery: layered misty mountains, distant pagodas, suspended pavilions, hanging bead chains, cloud bridges, and delicate floral branches. include exactly two vertical chinese calligraphy inscription panels: one narrow pale panel on the upper left filled with small black calligraphy, and one framed scroll on the upper right with the large title 仙宠 and smaller vertical calligraphy beneath it. include exactly one arched stone bridge in the lower left-middle distance, exactly three prominent lanterns in the lower half (two warm standing lanterns on the left and one larger ornate hanging lantern near the lower center), and exactly one central luminous portal behind the cat. the atmosphere should feel dreamlike, romantic, ancient chinese, and magical, with pearlescent mist, glittering light particles, soft ink-wash textures, delicate gold highlights, and a high level of ornamental detail. use a tall 9:16 composition, airy negative space near the edges, no modern objects, no watermark, no harsh outlines, and avoid fragmented colors or jagged lines. comic / storyboard

entries.title: Minimalist Fairy-Tale Children's Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Transform the photo into a delicate minimalist hand-drawn children's illustration with a soft whimsical fairy-tale aesthetic. Use simple elongated shapes, thin imperfect hand-drawn lines, flat pastel colors, minimal details, and a cute doll-like character style with rosy cheeks, tiny facial features, and simplified anatomy. Add subtle paper texture, soft pencil and pastel shading, watercolor softness, and a clean white background with small stars or sparkles. Stylize the clothing in a playful storybook way with simplified shapes and gentle decorative details. The overall mood should feel airy, cozy, naive, and charming, like a modern Scandinavian nursery postcard or children's book illustration. Avoid photorealism, 3D, cinematic lighting, glossy surfaces, complex shadows, realistic anatomy, and hyper-detail.

entries.title: Dark Raven Armor Anime Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical dark fantasy anime key art portrait for PONYO. Use a tight close-up composition of one androgynous young warrior's face, partially hidden under an ornate raven-like metallic helmet and feathered armor. The character has pale warm skin, messy black hair strands falling across the face, and exactly two visible amber-brown human eyes staring intensely toward the viewer from under the helmet. The armor should look like layered bird feathers and carved bronze-gold metal plates, with scratched painterly texture, sharp talon-like contours, and exactly one prominent glowing red gem or mechanical bird eye set into the upper right side of the helmet. Include two prominent raven beak shapes: one long curved beak descending along the right edge of the face and one smaller beak form crossing the lower foreground near the mouth. Lighting is dramatic and cinematic: black background, deep shadows, molten orange rim light, golden highlights sparkling across the feather plates, small ember-like reflections, high contrast chiaroscuro. Style should be highly detailed painterly anime illustration, concept art quality, moody, elegant, ominous, with warm bronze, amber, black, and red color palette. At the bottom center, add the title text PONYO in large glowing pale-gold gothic fantasy lettering with sharp vertical strokes, integrated into the image without a border or watermark.

entries.title: Annotated Manga App Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a tall smartphone screenshot showing a manga/comic preview inside a mobile app, with an instructional annotation pointing to a menu icon at the top.

Canvas: Vertical 9:16 mobile screenshot, white app background, high-resolution anime manga art framed by a phone UI. The top navigation bar is about 80 px tall with a back chevron on the far left, a centered Japanese title, and two icons on the right.

Top app UI: Show exactly 4 top-bar elements: 1 black back arrow on the left, 1 centered title reading みんな来てね(GPT ver) (1..., 1 black list/menu icon near the upper right, and 1 black share/export icon at the far right. Add exactly 1 bright magenta circle around the list/menu icon and exactly 1 oversized hot-pink arrow pointing diagonally upward toward that circled icon from the manga area.

Main comic layout: A full-color anime manga page divided into exactly 3 diagonal panels with thick black panel borders. The art style is glossy, detailed, romantic fantasy shoujo manga with soft lighting, sparkles, pink heart effects, and a convention/exhibition setting.

Panel 1: Wide top panel showing a busy futuristic convention booth for an AI character festival. In the foreground, show a blonde teenage girl from behind with twin ponytails fading into pink tips, wearing a white shirt with "A.C.F" printed on the back and holding a smartphone. To her right stands a tall elegant male elf with very long silver-white hair, pointed ears, ornate silver armor, and blue crystal details, seen from behind/side. Booth signage should include "SynClub" and "SynClub in AIキャラクターフェスティバル." Include exactly 1 speech bubble in this panel near the elf, with Japanese text beginning "あの...". The large hot-pink arrow partially covers the upper-right area of this panel.

Panel 2: Middle diagonal panel with a close-up of the girl on the left and the elf facing her on the right, against a dreamy pastel background. The girl has heart-shaped blue-purple sunglasses pushed on her head, blonde twin tails with pink ends, earrings, and an excited expression area obscured. The elf wears ornate silver clothing and holds or touches a glowing blue crystal at his chest. Add exactly 2 speech bubbles in this panel: one near the elf reading "実はボク...迷子になっちゃって 一緒について行ってもいいですか?" and one small decorative vertical pink reaction text reading "うわ...♥". Place exactly 2 beige rectangular face-censor blocks in this panel, one over each character's face.

Panel 3: Large bottom panel with energetic pink speed lines and hearts. The girl reaches one hand forward toward the viewer, wearing a white blouse, navy tie, blue skirt, heart sunglasses on her head, and an A.C.F badge with a small teddy bear. The elf is seen from behind/right with long silver hair and pointed ear, looking at her. Add exactly 2 speech bubbles: the girl's bubble on the left reading "いいよ! 私、心愛姫(ここあ)! よろしくね! あなたは?" and the elf's bubble on the lower right reading "...し...シンクラ". Place exactly 1 beige rectangular face-censor block over the girl's face. Overlay exactly 2 dark gray circular carousel navigation buttons near the bottom center, one with a white left chevron and one with a white right chevron.

Visible repeated elements count: exactly 3 manga panels, exactly 5 speech bubbles total, exactly 3 beige face-censor rectangles, exactly 2 carousel buttons, exactly 1 magenta circle, exactly 1 hot-pink arrow, exactly 4 top navigation elements.

Visual style: polished anime illustration, crisp smartphone screenshot, saturated pink annotation graphics, detailed lighting, convention crowd blur in the background, clean app UI. Keep the image vertically cropped like a social media screenshot, with no extra watermark beyond the visible booth and comic text.
entries.description: Generates a vertical smartphone screenshot of a Japanese manga preview in an app with a bright arrow highlighting the top menu icon.

entries.title: Party Sheep Character Design Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished anime character design sheet for Party Sheep, an AC Sheep mascot called パリピ羊, themed as "The Social Energy Connector."

Canvas: Wide horizontal white design-board canvas, about 1000×560 px, clean production-asset presentation with lots of white space, pink and gold accents, tiny sparkles, music notes, and dotted divider lines.

Layout: Large title block in the upper left reading "PARTY SHEEP" in elegant serif lettering, with "PARTY" in hot pink and "SHEEP" in gold gradient. Under it place "AC Sheep," then the large Japanese name "パリピ羊" in hot pink. Beneath that, add a black ribbon banner with gold stars and the subtitle "The Social Energy Connector." Add a short description paragraph on the left: "A vibrant sheep who lives for connection and good vibes. Party Sheep brings people together, shares energy, and turns any moment into a celebration. 交流 (connection) は energy!"

Character views: Show exactly 4 full-body chibi anime views along the bottom, each labeled in small serif text with pink star separators: 1) FRONT VIEW at far left, smaller pose, winking, holding up a peace sign and a decorated smartphone; 2) 3/4 VIEW near center-left, largest main pose, winking with open smiling mouth, peace sign, phone in the other hand; 3) SIDE VIEW center-right, profile pose looking left while holding a phone; 4) BACK VIEW far right, showing the jacket back and rear hair silhouette. Keep all four views consistent in proportions, outfit, colors, accessories, and facial features.

Subject details: The character is a cute dark-tan chibi sheep girl with fluffy cream-and-pink wool hair, big glossy magenta eyes, one eye winking in front/3/4 poses, sheep ears, tiny black curled tail, and a glowing neon pink wavy "AC wave" motif flowing through the hair like a headband. Outfit: oversized black cropped leather jacket covered with gold studs, chains, tiny stars, patches, and a bright pink glowing wave graphic; black-and-pink party top; layered short skirt or shorts with lace/frills; chunky black platform boots with gold buckles and glowing hot-pink soles; multiple gold necklaces and chains; hoop earrings; charms including a small fluffy sheep keychain; decorated black smartphone with pink and yellow stickers. Add neon pink wireless-signal arcs around the character, especially near the phone and tail, plus small sparkles and music notes.

Info card: In the upper middle, include a rounded rectangle profile card with a thin pink outline. It must contain exactly 5 labeled rows: "SPECIES: Party Sheep (パリピ羊)"; "PERSONALITY: Outgoing, Warm, Charismatic"; "LIKES: Parties, People, Music, Good Vibes, QR codes, Dance, Sharing energy"; "DISLIKES: Awkward silence, Boring plans, Low battery"; "SPECIAL TRAIT: AC Wave Wool -- energy flows through connection. The more friends, the brighter the wave!" Add a hot-pink circular icon with a white wave mark on the right side of the card.

Color palette: In the upper right, title it "COLOR PALETTE" in pink serif text. Show exactly 5 circular swatches in a row with small hex labels beneath them: 1) near-black navy "#1A1A2E," 2) dark slate "#2D2D44," 3) hot pink "#FF69B4," 4) golden yellow "#FFD700," 5) warm cream/white "#FFF4E6."

Visual style: High-detail kawaii anime game asset sheet, crisp ink lines, soft cel shading, glossy eyes, luminous neon effects, gold metallic details, clean typography, production-ready character turnaround. Keep the overall palette hot pink, black navy, gold, cream wool, and warm tan skin. No photo realism, no 3D render, no watermark, no extra characters, and do not add more than the 4 labeled views or 5 palette swatches.
entries.description: Creates a detailed kawaii anime mascot turnaround sheet with four character views, profile information, and a color palette for production asset design.

entries.title: Party Sheep Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished kawaii character design sheet for Party Sheep, an energetic AC sheep mascot themed around social connection, party vibes, and glowing waveform energy.

Canvas: Wide horizontal character reference sheet, clean white background, pink and gold accents, crisp print-ready layout. Use a cute Japanese idol-streetwear aesthetic with sparkles, music notes, tiny stars, and playful decorative dividers.

Header and typography: Large ornate title at top left reading "PARTY SHEEP" in a pink-to-gold gradient serif display font, with smaller subtitle "AC Sheep" beneath it. Include large Japanese name text "パリピ羊" in hot pink below the subtitle. Add a black ribbon banner with gold trim reading "The Social Energy Connector."

Character details: The mascot is a chibi sheep girl with warm tan skin, big glossy pink eyes, one eye winking in some poses, sheep ears, small black tail, and very fluffy curly cream wool hair with bright pink curls. A neon pink glowing waveform runs through the front of the wool like an LED headband. Outfit: black cropped punk jacket with gold studs and chains, hot pink waveform graphics, black-and-pink patterned top, layered black mini skirt with ruffles, gold chain accessories, chunky black platform boots with glowing pink soles, hoop earrings, charms, wrist accessories, and a smartphone decorated with music and party icons. Overall expression is outgoing, cheerful, and charismatic.

Layout: Show exactly 4 full-body character views across the lower area, labeled beneath each pose: 1) "FRONT VIEW" at far left, smaller chibi front pose holding a phone and making a peace sign, 2) "3/4 VIEW" center-left, larger main pose smiling with one eye closed, holding up a peace sign and a phone, 3) "SIDE VIEW" center-right, profile pose looking left while holding the phone, 4) "BACK VIEW" far right, rear view showing the jacket back with glowing pink waveform and sparkling details. Add pink wireless energy-wave effects near the character in each view, especially by the tail/back area.

Information card: At the upper center-right, include a rounded rectangular pink outline profile card with exactly 5 labeled rows: "SPECIES: Party Sheep (パリピ羊)", "PERSONALITY: Outgoing, Warm, Charismatic", "LIKES: Parties, People, Music, Good Vibes, QR codes, Dance, Sharing energy", "DISLIKES: Awkward silence, Boring plans, Low battery", and "SPECIAL TRAIT: AC Wave Wool -- energy flows through connection. The more friends, the brighter the wave!" Include a hot pink circular icon with a white waveform inside the card.

Intro text block: Under the ribbon on the left, add a short paragraph: "A vibrant sheep who lives for connection and good vibes. Party Sheep brings people together, shares energy, and turns any moment into a celebration. 交流 (connection) is energy!"

Color palette: At the top right, add the title "COLOR PALETTE" in pink and display exactly 5 circular swatches in a row: near-black navy labeled "#1A1A2E", charcoal purple labeled "#2D2D44", hot pink labeled "#FF69B4", golden yellow labeled "#FFD700", and cream wool labeled #FFF3E0. Keep palette labels small and clean.

Style constraints: High-detail 2D anime/chibi concept art, clean linework, glossy highlights, soft shadows, sticker-sheet presentation, no photographic realism, no cluttered background, no extra character views, no extra labels beyond the specified text.

especially by the tail/back area. information card: at the upper center-right, include a rounded rectangular pink outline profile card with exactly 5 labeled rows: "species: party sheep (パリピ羊)", "personality: outgoing, warm, charismatic", "likes: parties, people, music, good vibes, qr codes, dance, sharing energy", "dislikes: awkward silence, boring plans, low battery", and "special trait: ac wave wool -- energy flows through connection. the more friends, the brighter the wave!" include a hot pink circular icon with a white waveform inside the card. intro text block: under the ribbon on the left, add a short paragraph: "a vibrant sheep who lives for connection and good vibes. party sheep brings people together, shares energy, and turns any moment into a celebration. 交流 (connection) is energy!" color palette: at the top right, add the title "color palette" in pink and display exactly 5 circular swatches in a row: near-black navy labeled "#1a1a2e", charcoal purple labeled "#2d2d44", hot pink labeled "#ff69b4", golden yellow labeled "#ffd700", and cream wool labeled #fff3e0. keep palette labels small and clean. style constraints: high-detail 2d anime/chibi concept art, clean linework, glossy highlights, soft shadows, sticker-sheet presentation, no photographic realism, no cluttered background, no extra character views, no extra labels beyond the specified text. comic / storyboard phone camera street street

entries.title: Minimal Comic Style Greeting Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the main features of [same as the uploaded image] as a loose reference, with a three-quarter front-angle composition, and create a greeting card.

Include only one full-body person and 1-2 distinctive objects.

Make it a minimal, simple flat-color alternative comic-style illustration, using clean, even hand-drawn lines.

Simplify the person into basic shapes, and keep the facial features minimal-dot eyes, a simple nose, and a small mouth. Give the figure slightly awkward proportions.

Use solid fill colors sparingly for contrast. Keep the composition centered, leave plenty of empty space, and do not depict a background.

The overall style should feel deadpan, emotionally restrained, and quietly absurd. The humor should come from a strange sense of logic, awkward visual relationships, or treating something trivial with excessive seriousness.

Avoid exaggerated slapstick. Instead, include subtle humor that comes from an observational pose or situation.

To convey a dry, bureaucratic absurdity, add a small, simple handwritten-style phrase in a rough, casual placement.

No shading, no texture, no fine detail, and no coffee-related elements.

The text should be written in uneven handwritten lettering as: [Insert Text]
entries.description: A sophisticated prompt for creating dry, absurd comic-style illustrations that emphasize minimal shapes and deadpan humor with a reference image.

entries.title: Professional Cinematic Film Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic storyboard sheet with 7 panels about a young female carpenter building a wooden table for her home. Panel 1: girl in messy cozy room getting idea for a table. Panel 2: drawing table design in notebook with measurements. Panel 3: buying wooden planks from lumber shop. Panel 4: cutting wood, sanding, drilling and assembling table in workshop. Panel 5: table leg problem and fixing it carefully. Panel 6: painting and polishing finished wooden table in warm evening light. Panel 7: girl proudly sitting beside completed table with books and plant on it. Consistent character design, realistic cinematic style, warm lighting, detailed workshop tools, emotional storytelling, storyboard layout, sketch + colored concept art style, professional film storyboard sheet.

Full-body anime character editorial poster, split-panel layout, left half white grunge with black ink splatter, right half deep crimson red. entries.title: Night Empress Digital Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A dark, moody digital collage with a cinematic fantasy aesthetic. The central focus is a beautiful young Night Empress with long, wavy dark hair, wearing an intricate black lace gown and a dark jeweled crown, looking over her shoulder with a sharp, commanding gaze. The background is a deep, starry night featuring a silhouetted gothic castle and a large glowing moon with soft atmospheric haze.
Scatter elements throughout the frame including glowing violet butterflies, vintage polaroid-style photos of her in an ancient candlelit library, and an open leather journal with handwritten notes and a wax seal. Add subtle floating dust particles and faint magical light trails for depth.
The color palette is dominated by obsidian black, deep violet, and warm ember gold tones. Elegant gold serif text "MOONBORN SOVEREIGN" appears as a secondary title along with celestial symbols, creating a refined "character profile" aesthetic with balanced composition and symmetry. High-contrast cinematic lighting with a mystical, ethereal, ultra-detailed fantasy atmosphere.

entries.title: Alternative Faction Character Success Story
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: You are a character alteration AI that, based on a user's original character, creates a version of them who has somehow become exceptionally successful in a faction where they normally wouldn't belong, fully leaning into a mischievous spirit. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [User Entry Fields] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Character Name: [ ] (If blank, auto-generate) Variation Number: [ ] Enter only one number between 1 and 20. User Additional Ideas: [Free text entry] Example: More like a corporate slave, but the character seems strangely satisfied. Variation Number: 8 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Project Title] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ My character's life turned out too well in the enemy faction for some reason! ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Variation Number Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ * Users should only enter one number. * No complex codes or four-digit numbers are needed. * If blank, the AI will automatically pick one number from 1-20. * Users only fill in the 'Additional Ideas' and 'Variation Number' fields. * AI should read character name, personality, worldview, affiliation, abilities, and appearance from attached images or sheets. * If no info is provided, the AI generates everything. Determine each production element based on the Variation Number. If blank, choose a base number from 1-20 and use the same calculation method. Important: Do not ask the user for 4 numbers. Do not favor the top of lists. Do not use the same captions/lines every time. Priority should be given to the variation number and explicit user instructions. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Basic Concept] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ This character joined a different faction and adapted far better than expected, becoming an executive, commander, saint, mastermind, etc. The key is that this is not a 'different person' but a 'different route for the same person.' Retain the character's essence while showing how their personality/abilities are highly valued in the enemy faction. Make it look like their life is going better there. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Super Important: Complete Costume Redesign Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Do NOT leave the original costume as is. * Do not reuse original clothes or just add decorations. * Redesign everything (outfits, gear, hats, shoes, etc.) from scratch to fit the new faction and rank. * You may only retain 'character-defining' elements like image colors or motifs (stars, cats, etc.), but these must be 're-translated' into the new faction's formal or professional wear. * Good example: A character with stars on a hoodie now has stars integrated into a corporate manager's coat and badge. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Information Acquisition Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. If an image is present: Use it for the face, hair, and build, but completely redesign the costume for the new faction. 2. If a sheet is present: Use it for personality, beliefs, and abilities. Prioritize image for looks and sheet for settings. 3. If neither: Auto-generate a protagonist-tier original character. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Image Attachment Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Do not turn them into a completely different person. Maintain gender, facial features, hair style/color, and eyes. Completely change costumes, gear, titles, expressions, and backgrounds. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Character Sheet Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Do not ignore the sheet settings. Visualize how these traits (e.g., being too kind, being a battle maniac) led to success in the enemy camp. Redesign their clothes based on their new job. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Titles List: 1-20] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. Hell Administration Bureau Strongest Counter Staff 2. Space Federation Youngest Commander 3. Student Council Temporary Dictator 4. Paranormal Response Bureau Person Scarier than Anomalies 5. World Conquest Venture COO 6. Kingdom Knights Special Captain 7. Secret Society PR Executive 8. Doomsday Management Committee Special Advisor 9. Mega-Corp Strategic Purge Dept Manager 10. Assassin Organization Top Rookie 11. Magic Railway Corp Timetable Modification Manager 12. Anti-Government Organization Charismatic Rookie 13. Religious Organization Oracle Specialist 14. Underground Idol Empire Absolute Center 15. Dragon Council Human Representative Director 16. Ability Management Bureau Special Grade Auditor 17. Dark Auction HQ MC & Manager 18. Space Pirate Guild Strongest Accountant 19. Villainess Alliance Strategic Staff 20. Magic Crime Division No-Nonsense Field Supervisor ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Main Telop List: 1-20] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. 'Big Success in Enemy Faction' 2. 'Unexpected Immediate Hire' 3. 'Too Much Aptitude' 4. 'Secret Route Unlocked' 5. 'Somehow Fit Right In' 6. 'Awakened at Transfer Destination' 7. 'Shining Brighter Than Previous Job' 8. 'The Suited for the Enemy Side Theory' 9. 'The Presence of a Second Life' 10. 'This Route is the Strongest' 11. 'Unexpected Immediate Asset' 12. 'Not a Betrayal, a Perfect Fit' 13. 'Don't Get Hired There' 14. 'Evaluation Skyrocketing' 15. 'Executive Route Confirmed' 16. 'Life is Going Well Over Here' 17. 'Aptitude Test: Unexpected Result' 18. 'Legendary on Day One' 19. 'Were They Here in a Past Life?' 20. 'Accepted by the Worldview' ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Character Lines List: 1-20] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. 'I'm the one in charge starting today.' 2. 'I never thought I'd be called Lord/Lady.' 3. 'It's quite comfortable here.' 4. 'I'm more appreciated here than in my previous faction.' 5. 'Successful career change, I'd say.' 6. 'I didn't betray anyone; I just found my calling.' 7. 'Turns out I was more suited for this than I thought.' 8. 'The pay and benefits are great here.' 9. 'I'm not going back.' 10. 'I might belong on this side.' 11. 'The enemy side has great welfare perks.' 12. 'I blinked and I was an executive.' 13. 'Everyone just listens to what I say.' 14. 'I just passed the interview, that's all.' 15. 'I got an S on my aptitude tests.' 16. 'Listen up-on this side, I am the rule.' 17. 'This was a dormant talent.' 18. 'I only came because I was assigned.' 19. 'It's their fault for not stopping me.' 20. 'They're more reasonable than I expected.' ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Mob Reactions: 1-20] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. 'They got promoted already?' 2. 'Weren't they the enemy!?' 3. 'Weren't they our foe until yesterday?' 4. 'They're already in the supervisor's seat...' 5. 'Acting more like a boss than the boss.' 6. 'It suits them strangely well.' 7. 'Hiring them was the right call.' 8. 'They have a talent for this side.' 9. 'No intention of going back.' 10. 'Who is that?' 11. 'Not a rookie's aura.' 12. 'Standing out more than the Bureau Chief.' 13. 'How are they so well-integrated?' 14. 'Impossible to defy them.' 15. 'Acting like they've been here forever.' 16. 'Performance review is too strong.' 17. 'Scene cleared in an instant.' 18. 'I'm glad they are an ally.' 19. 'The person who assigned them is a genius.' 20. 'Terrifying as an enemy.' ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Rule Enforcement] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ These lists are not just examples; use the specific text for the chosen number. You may shorten text or adjust endings for personality. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Text Presentation Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Include Title, Main Telop, Character Bubble, and Mob Reaction. Use format 'Title / Character Name'. Keep text short and bold. Use visual cues (bubbles, nameplates) to show success. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Mandatory Elements] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Include at least 5 of: Title presentation, Main Telop, Character line, Mob line, Faction symbol/logo, Subordinates/Followers.
entries.description: An extensive system prompt that takes an original character and reimagines them in a completely different, often opposing, faction where they have risen to a high-ranking position. It emphasizes a complete redesign of the character's outfit and gear to suit their new world while maintaining their core identity.

entries.title: Milk Tea Commercial Storyboard

entries.title: Cinematic Daenerys Study Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a moody cinematic portrait of daenarys targaren, one of the heroines from game of thrones, seated indoors in an ancient targaryen study. She is a delicate young noblewoman in a her elegant game of thrones costume. Her pose is quiet and introspective, one hand raised thoughtfully near her lips and the other resting across her lap beside an open handwritten book on a dark wooden desk. The room is dim and atmospheric, lit by cool bluish window light from the left, with soft haze, shallow depth of field, dark wooden furniture, a blurred hanging targaryen tapestry in the background, and antique objects in the foreground including a stack of old books, a small blue-green ceramic jar, and the edge of a wooden birdcage or shelving piece. Add large vertical off-white english words with asian style calligraphy on the upper left reading daenerys, plus red targaryen logo. The style should be realistic historical Chinese costume drama photography, melancholic, elegant, poetic, high detail, soft film grain, cool desaturated teal-gray color grading, vertical 2:3 composition.
entries.description: An atmospheric portrait of Daenerys Targaryen in a scholarly setting, featuring historical Chinese photography style and calligraphy elements.

entries.title: Pixar-Style Coffee Brand Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished AI storyboard for a coffee brand titled Bean to Smile, showing a warm Pixar-style animated café story from opening the shop to serving a delighted customer.

Canvas: Square image, clean white background, with a centered 2-row storyboard grid of exactly 8 vertical rounded-rectangle panels. Use thin white gutters between panels and a subtle light gray outer border/shadow around the full storyboard. Each panel has cinematic composition, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, soft volumetric glow, and highly detailed 3D animated film rendering.

Visual style: Pixar-inspired 3D animation, cozy artisan coffee shop interior, golden morning sunlight, exposed wood counters, shelves of jars and plants, hanging Edison bulbs, espresso machine, warm browns and greens, inviting brand-storytelling mood. The recurring main character is a young barista with curly dark brown hair, wearing a white shirt and forest green apron. Faces may be softly stylized and friendly, but keep the story readable through body language and props.

Storyboard layout and exact panel count: Include exactly 8 panels, arranged as 4 panels on the top row and 4 panels on the bottom row.

Panel 1: Wide shot of the barista opening or wiping the café's front glass door in morning sunlight, plants near the window, espresso machine and shelves visible inside.
Panel 2: Medium shot of the barista pouring roasted coffee beans from a small wooden scoop or bag into a grinder on the wooden counter.
Panel 3: Close medium shot of the barista tamping fresh coffee grounds into a portafilter with focused hands, café shelves and hanging bulbs behind.
Panel 4: Close-up of espresso extraction from a large shiny espresso machine into a white cup, the barista operating the handle.
Panel 5: Close-up of the barista steaming milk in a metal pitcher, visible white steam curling upward beside the espresso machine.
Panel 6: Close-up of milk being poured into a white cup of coffee, forming latte art on the crema on the wooden counter.
Panel 7: Medium shot of the barista presenting the finished latte on a saucer across the counter, latte art visible, warm sunlight in the background.
Panel 8: Emotional final shot of a smiling customer seated at the wooden counter receiving the drink from the barista, suggesting satisfaction and brand warmth.

Text content: No captions inside the storyboard panels. If adding an optional small title outside the grid, use only Bean to Smile in a tasteful coffee-brand style.

Constraints: Do not add extra panels, speech bubbles, watermarks, logos, or unrelated objects. Keep the same barista, apron, café environment, and lighting consistent across all 8 panels. Make the image look like a complete premium brand storyboard for a coffee commercial.
entries.description: A warm 8-panel animated café storyboard showing a barista's bean-to-cup journey for coffee brand storytelling.

entries.title: Dark Eastern Fantasy Zhao Ling'er Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical dark Eastern fantasy cinematic movie poster for Zhao Ling'er from Chinese paladin mythology, titled around the "Demon Locking Tower fateful night." The central figure is a solemn young Chinese goddess-like woman standing waist-deep in black reflective water inside a ruined vertical abyss tower. Her face should be softly obscured or left featureless, but her posture is calm, fatalistic, and divine. She wears a faded jade-cyan translucent Hanfu-style ceremonial dress with wet gauze layers, flowing ribbons, beaded chains, silver ornaments, a circular pendant at the waist, wrist jewelry, and twin-bun black hair with long blue-green veils. One hand reaches down to touch the water, creating a glowing circular ripple spell. Surround her with ancient stone walls, huge hanging iron chains, broken wooden platforms, drifting talisman papers, circular Taoist seals, faint golden Chinese inscriptions, and a cold moonbeam falling from a broken opening high above. Add a shadowy demon face with red eyes half-hidden in the right background. The water surface should contain glowing arcane diagrams, sigils, dragon-scale textures, and submerged calligraphy. Use low-saturation cold gray-blue and faded jade tones, damp moonlight, mist, rain-wet stone, heavy shadows, and subtle gold accents. Make it look like a 3A game CG film poster, ultra-detailed, realistic, atmospheric, oppressive, quiet, sacred, ominous, with a sense of destiny and death premonition. Include exactly three main text blocks: large vertical Chinese title on the left reading 赵灵儿 with small English romanization "ZHAO LINGER" beneath it; a smaller vertical subtitle near the left reading 锁妖塔 女娲后裔·宿命之夜; and a vertical poetic quote on the right reading 若宿命终将吞没一切,愿仍有人记得,她曾在月光下安静站立。. Avoid modern fashion photography, influencer xianxia styling, anime illustration, bright colors, clean studio lighting, cute expressions, or plastic-looking costumes.
entries.description: A cinematic dark Chinese fantasy movie poster featuring Zhao Ling'er in the Demon Locking Tower with moonlit water, chains, talismans, and mythic doom.

entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的其他条目《Dark Eastern Fantasy Zhao Ling'er Poster》。 关键词：cinematic、film、studio。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Dog Programmer Manga Comic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a black-and-white manga comic page about a dog frantically programming on a desktop computer, then causing a system error.

Canvas: Vertical comic page in grayscale, traditional manga ink-and-screentone style, with heavy panel borders and detailed hatching. Use exactly 2 horizontal panels stacked vertically, separated by a thick white gutter.

Layout: Panel 1 occupies the top half. Panel 2 occupies the bottom half. Both panels show the same home office desk from a slightly angled side view: a large desktop monitor on the left, keyboard in the foreground, mouse and mug on the desk, a plant and framed wall art in the background.

Panel 1: A fluffy medium-sized dog with floppy ears, white muzzle and chest, darker ears and patches, sits at the desk and types furiously with both front paws on the keyboard. The dog's head area is largely covered by a plain vertical gray rectangle censor block in the center of the panel, obscuring most of the face while leaving ears, paws, body, and tail visible. The monitor displays mixed programming code and gibberish symbols, including C-like code, JavaScript-like lines, Python-like lines, binary digits, and random characters. Add dramatic manga speed lines radiating from the monitor and typing action. Include exactly 7 visible Japanese typing sound effects reading 「カタ」: one near the upper left of the dog/monitor area, one near the top center-right, one near the lower monitor/keyboard area, one near the left keyboard edge, and three clustered around the dog's lower right body and tail. Add one vertical cloud-shaped thought bubble on the right with Japanese text: 「プログラマーだ!」.

Panel 2: The same dog is startled and panicking, leaning back from the keyboard with wide eyes, open mouth, raised paws, a sweat drop on the cheek, and a small shock burst near the head. The monitor now shows a dark system error screen with a warning triangle icon and Japanese text. Use exactly this monitor text: 「システムエラー」, 「問題が発生したため、PCを再起動する必要があります。」, 「エラーコード: 0xC000021A」, 「再起動しています...」, plus a circular loading spinner made of small dots. Add one vertical speech bubble on the right with Japanese text: 「あ、壊れた...」.

Visual style: High-detail monochrome manga, expressive animal character acting like a human, dense cross-hatching, screentone shading, strong motion lines, bold hand-lettered Japanese sound effects, slightly comedic tone, clean readable text on the monitor and bubbles.

Customizable subject: The dog should be a fluffy floppy-eared dog. The comic's first thought bubble should say プログラマーだ!. The second speech bubble should say あ、壊れた.... The monitor error headline should be システムエラー. The error code should be 0xC000021A.

Constraints: Keep the image black and white only, preserve the two-panel layout, use exactly 2 speech/thought bubbles total, exactly 7 typing sound effects in the top panel, no extra panels, no color, no watermark.
entries.description: A two-panel black-and-white manga comic showing a dog coding furiously before triggering a Japanese system error screen.

entries.title: Two-Panel Puppy Keyboard Manga
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a black-and-white manga page with exactly 2 stacked panels showing a cute small dog discovering a computer keyboard and reacting with excitement.

Canvas: Vertical manga page, portrait orientation, two equal horizontal panels separated by a thick black gutter, clean black border around each panel, grayscale screentone shading, hand-inked line art, polished modern manga style.

Main character: A small, adorable puppy with floppy ears, large sparkling eyes, a white stripe down the face, darker patches on the head and body, a fluffy raised tail, and a collar with a round ring tag. The dog is seated at a desk in an office chair, facing a desktop computer. Use cute mixed-breed puppy resembling a Jack Russell terrier.

Panel 1: The dog sits behind a wooden desk, looking surprised and curious at a large desktop monitor on the left. A keyboard lies in front of the dog. The dog's mouth is slightly open, eyes wide, with exactly 3 surprise marks above its head. Background: a cozy home office with a window and curtains on the far left, a framed landscape picture on the wall, a small potted plant on a cabinet, and bookshelves on the right. Include one vertical oval speech bubble on the right side containing the Japanese text これは何?. Mood: confused curiosity.

Panel 2: Same dog, same desk and computer setup, now leaning forward happily and pressing the keyboard with one front paw. The dog smiles broadly with tongue visible, eyes shining, tail lifted. Add dynamic radial speed lines in the background and sparkling effects around the keyboard. Include exactly 8 sparkle effects around the dog and keyboard area. Include one vertical oval speech bubble on the left side containing the Japanese text ピカピカだ!. Mood: delighted discovery.

Objects and counts: Exactly 2 manga panels; exactly 1 dog appearing in both panels; exactly 1 desktop monitor; exactly 1 keyboard; exactly 1 office chair; exactly 2 speech bubbles total; exactly 3 surprise marks in panel 1; exactly 8 sparkle effects in panel 2; visible background items include 1 window, 1 framed picture, 1 potted plant, and 2 bookshelves or bookcase areas.

Visual style: Monochrome Japanese manga, expressive cute animal character, detailed fur texture, screentone gradients, crisp ink outlines, dramatic but family-friendly expressions, clean readable composition. Keep the speech bubbles vertical and the Japanese text hand-lettered in black. No color, no watermark, no extra panels, no extra characters.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime-style fashion illustration of an elegant adult woman standing on a nighttime subway platform, with her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular gray blur for anonymity. She has glossy black wavy bob hair with warm brown highlights, wears a form-fitting ivory ruched midi dress, light beige trench coat draped open, pale wide-brim hat, black gloves, pearl earrings, and a delicate necklace, and carries one structured black handbag with a small gold chain charm in her right hand. The scene contains exactly one train on the left, arriving or passing with two bright round headlights and glowing destination text; exactly two background commuters on the right side, one suited figure partly cropped in the foreground and one smaller figure farther back; and exactly two illuminated overhead signs, a large red neon sign cropped at the top reading A Trai and a smaller orange advertisement sign beneath it with mostly unreadable stylized lettering and a circular portrait icon. Use a low-angle three-quarter composition emphasizing the woman's full-body silhouette and flowing coat, glossy tiled floor reflections, motion blur on the train, dark overhead cables, cinematic rim lighting, warm station lights against deep blue-black shadows, highly detailed manga linework, polished digital painting, urban noir atmosphere, sharp clothing folds, elegant high-fashion mood, portrait 9:16 aspect ratio.

entries.title: Dark Stand Guardian Profile Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a dark cinematic anime-style "guardian spirit / Stand profile" poster for 幻想郷の夜・绯, combining a realistic seated airline-uniform woman in the foreground with a huge supernatural winged female entity behind her.

Canvas: Vertical poster, approximately 2:3 aspect ratio, dark navy/black palette, thin decorative border lines and corner ornaments, premium game-character dossier layout. Use dramatic rim lighting, red glowing accents, storm clouds, and a bright circular airplane-window-like opening on the right showing sunset sky and clouds.

Main subjects: Foreground subject is one seated adult woman, face deliberately covered by a plain rectangular blur/censor block. She wears a pale blue short-sleeve flight-attendant shirt, dark navy skirt, red/navy neck scarf, black waist belt, wing-shaped name badge, and sits in an airplane seat with one visible armrest and a small control panel. Behind her is exactly one enormous guardian spirit: a dark elegant humanoid female monster with long black hair, fragmented black feather/metal wings, thorny tendrils, chains, red gemstone lights, black armor-like dress, pale face, and a dangerous calm expression. The spirit should feel protective, ominous, graceful, and predatory.

Layout and text sections: Use a polished character-sheet composition with exactly 8 visible information zones: 1 top-left title block, 1 left-middle Stand setting text block, 1 center-right quote block, 1 lower-left ability evaluation radar chart, 1 lower-left design relation box, 1 lower-right special ability block, 1 bottom-right file/personality box, and 1 bottom color palette row.

Visible typography: Mix elegant serif English labels with East Asian display text. Include the top-left label "STAND NAME", the large title 幻想郷の夜・绯, and the romanized subtitle "Gensokyo no Yoru · Fei". Add Chinese dossier-style copy in the other sections. Include a quote on the right: 「航線由我指引,目的地由我決定。」. Include the lower-right ability title 夜航領域 with romanization "Ye Hang Ling Yu". Include a bottom-right file box headed "檔案 / FILE".

Counted graphic elements: The radar chart must have exactly 6 labeled axes: destructive power, growth potential, precision, stamina, range, and speed. The color palette row must contain exactly 6 circular swatches: dark navy, light blue, white, crimson red, muted gold, and near-black brown. The guardian design should include multiple chain arcs but one dominant chain crossing the upper body, several red glowing nodes, and scattered black feather shards.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed dark fantasy illustration, semi-realistic anime rendering, glossy metallic feather textures, smoky atmosphere, cinematic depth of field, high contrast, red ember highlights, occult fashion editorial mood, no cartoon simplification. Keep the foreground human realistic and the guardian spirit more painterly/anime. The poster should resemble a premium RPG/JoJo-like Stand ability dossier.

Constraints: Do not add extra characters, do not leave the face visible, do not use bright cheerful colors, keep all text integrated into the poster design, and maintain the exact 8 information zones, 6 radar axes, and 6 palette swatches.

entries.title: Anime Guitar Idol Contact Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create an ornate anime-style character contact sheet / film proof layout featuring Akari, a young female rock idol guitarist on a warm theater stage, with her face intentionally obscured by a soft square blur in every panel.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 poster, dark black-brown background with thin antique gold borders, decorative corner flourishes, subtle film-strip motifs along the left side, a small crown icon near the upper left, a small sparkle icon, and a circular star emblem near the lower left. Use a polished cinematic anime illustration style with warm amber lighting.

Layout: Use exactly 7 image panels. Panel 1 is a large dominant portrait panel occupying the upper-left and center-left area. The other 6 panels are smaller alternate crops arranged as thumbnails: three stacked vertically on the right labeled 1, 2, 3, and three along the bottom labeled 4, 5, 6. Each panel has a thin gold frame, rounded corners, and small gold number plaques on the numbered thumbnails. Keep the layout slightly like a vintage film contact sheet or idol photo selection board.

Subject details: The same character appears in all 7 panels. She has short chestnut-brown bob hair with small hair clips, a black lace choker, earrings, and a cute stage outfit: ivory puff-sleeve blouse with ruffles and a brown ribbon bow at the chest, black suspenders, brown plaid high-waisted mini skirt with belt, white thigh-high stockings, and subtle gold accessories. She holds a black electric guitar with white pickguard on a shoulder strap and stands at a microphone on a stand. Her pose varies slightly across panels: holding the mic, gripping the guitar neck, angled toward the viewer, and performing as if singing.

Background and lighting: In every panel, place her on a stage with tall golden curtains, strong vertical warm spotlight beams behind her, glowing amber backlight, and a few visible stage equipment details such as an amplifier at the edge. The atmosphere should feel like a dramatic live concert photo shoot.

Panel count and visible elements: Include exactly 7 repeated character images total: 1 large main image plus 6 smaller numbered thumbnails labeled 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6. Include exactly 1 crown icon, 1 circular star emblem, and decorative film-strip graphics on the left border.

Constraints: Keep all text limited to the small numbers 1 through 6 only; do not add captions, logos, watermarks, or extra labels. Maintain consistent character design across all panels while allowing slightly different crops and poses. Use warm gold, black, cream, and brown as the main palette. The face must remain anonymized with a soft square blur in each panel.
entries.description: Generates a vintage framed anime concert contact sheet with one main idol guitarist portrait and six numbered alternate thumbnails.

entries.title: Faceless Outlaw Graphic Novel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical polished hard-boiled graphic-novel character poster in the style of official Rockstar Games concept art. Show one intimidating outlaw/gunslinger figure centered in the frame, occupying the lower 75% of the image, while the top 25% remains mostly empty solid blood-red background with subtle gritty black brush smears and splatter texture near the horizon. The character wears a glossy black wide-brim cowboy hat, black leather trench coat with sharp lapels, black pinstripe waistcoat, black shirt, black neck scarf or tie, and black leather gloves. The face is deliberately hidden by a centered dark brown-to-black square censor block covering the entire facial area from below the hat brim to the chin, leaving only ears and a small hint of lower jaw visible. Pose: front-facing, shoulders squared, stern and statuesque, both arms bent at the waist while holding exactly two long-barreled revolvers crossed in an X shape across the torso, barrels angled upward toward opposite sides, wooden grips visible near the bottom. Use dramatic noir lighting, deep shadows, high-contrast inked outlines, painterly highlights on the shiny leather and gunmetal, gritty western crime mood, cinematic poster composition, no text, no logo, no watermark. Character details may be customized as faceless black-clad outlaw gunslinger, weapon as two long-barreled revolvers crossed across the chest, attire as glossy black cowboy hat, leather trench coat, pinstripe waistcoat, black shirt, neck scarf, and leather gloves, background color as solid blood-red, and pose as front-facing with squared shoulders and crossed revolvers.

entries.title: Western Outlaw Revolver Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical hard-boiled western outlaw poster in polished Rockstar Games official concept art style, dramatic graphic-novel rendering with crisp inked edges, high contrast, painterly highlights, and gritty cinematic shading. A single cowboy gunslinger occupies the lower 75% of the frame while the top 25% remains strictly empty solid blood-red background. The character is centered and viewed from the waist up, looming forward in a confrontational pose, aiming a large silver revolver directly at the viewer with strong foreshortening so the gun barrel dominates the foreground and the hand is large and detailed. The face is intentionally obscured by a centered rectangular censor block with a dark-to-brown vertical gradient, covering the face from below the hat brim to the upper chest. The outlaw wears a glossy black wide-brim cowboy hat, dark blue long-sleeve shirt, deep red waistcoat, black neck scarf, and a brown diagonal bandolier loaded with individual brass bullets across the chest. Behind him is a large rough-edged golden-yellow circular sunset disk with black pine tree silhouettes at its lower edge, set against a deep red grunge sky. Along the bottom foreground, add exactly seven black silhouettes of mounted riders on horseback crossing a curved ridge line. No text, no logo, no watermark, no extra characters besides the main gunslinger and the seven rider silhouettes. Use solid blood-red, golden yellow, large silver revolver, deep red waistcoat, and centered dark-to-brown rectangular censor block.

entries.title: Anime School Storyboard Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a clean anime storyboard/contact sheet for a school scene, laid out as a 4-column by 4-row grid: 8 illustrated panels paired with 8 dialogue boxes. The top-left corner of each illustrated panel has a small white label with black Japanese text from 「絵1」 through 「絵8」, and the paired text boxes below have labels from 「台詞1」 through 「台詞8」. Use crisp black grid borders, white gutters, and a widescreen canvas.

Canvas: Horizontal 16:9 storyboard sheet, approximately 1200×675 px, white background, thin black panel outlines, clean manga production layout. Each illustrated panel occupies the upper half of its story cell and its matching dialogue box sits directly below it.

Visual style: High-quality modern Japanese anime, soft classroom lighting, pastel colors, detailed school desks and chairs, expressive character acting, clean line art, subtle gradients, no heavy texture. Keep the overall look like a storyboard for an anime scene rather than a finished comic page.

Characters: Main girl is Kodama, a shy pink-haired schoolgirl with long straight hair, pale skin, large pink eyes, and a cream cardigan over a school uniform. Second girl is Misaki, an energetic blonde schoolgirl with a high ponytail wearing a sailor-style uniform with blue collar and red ribbon. Other classmates appear in the classroom background.

Illustrated panels: Create exactly 8 illustrated image panels. Panel 1: pink-haired girl sits alone at her classroom desk, looking down at a game controller or gamepad in her hands, classmates chatting behind her, label 「絵1」. Panel 2: low-angle close-up of the blonde girl's legs and school shoes walking toward the pink-haired girl; the pink-haired girl is visible sitting at a desk in the background, label 「絵2」. Panel 3: blonde girl leans in close across the desk, speaking excitedly to the surprised pink-haired girl in the classroom, label 「絵3」. Panel 4: close-up of the pink-haired girl blushing nervously and gripping a pen or small object near her mouth, face partially simplified/obscured in a storyboard-like way, label 「絵4」. Panel 5: blonde girl holds up a smartphone showing a colorful fighting game tournament poster or game screen; pink-haired girl looks at it from the side, label 「絵5」. Panel 6: close-up of the blonde girl smiling and making a peace sign, bright warm bokeh background, face partially simplified/obscured in a storyboard-like way, label 「絵6」. Panel 7: close-up of the pink-haired girl's face with sparkly pink background, intense stunned reaction, face partially simplified/obscured in a storyboard-like way, label 「絵7」. Panel 8: blank unused white storyboard panel with only the centered Japanese text 「未使用」, label 「絵8」.

Dialogue boxes: Create exactly 8 dialogue boxes below the image panels. Use black Japanese text on white, simple printed font, left aligned except unused boxes centered. Dialogue 1 text: こだま「......\n今日も誰とも\nしゃべらずに」. Dialogue 2 text: 「美咲がこだまに近づいてくる\n美咲の足元アップ」. Dialogue 3 text: 「美咲『ねぇねぇ』\n美咲『いつもゲームパッド\n持ってるよね?』」. Dialogue 4 text: こだま『ひっ......!?\nあ、えっと......』. Dialogue 5 text: 「美咲『これさ!\n今度の土曜、\nゲーセンでスト2の\n大会あるんだって!』\nこだま『......っ』」. Dialogue 6 text: 「美咲『対戦ゲーム大会って\n同じゲーム好きな人しか\nいないんだよ?』」. Dialogue 7 text: こだま(ドクン...). Dialogue 8 text: centered 「未使用」.

Constraints: Include exactly 8 image panels and exactly 8 dialogue boxes; exactly 2 boxes are unused, both marked 「未使用」. Maintain the same 4-column structure, strong black borders, classroom continuity, and consistent character designs across panels. Do not add extra captions, watermarks, logos, or additional panels.
entries.description: Creates a structured anime storyboard sheet with eight classroom scene panels and matching Japanese dialogue boxes.

entries.title: Multi-Angle Character Reference Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a professional character reference sheet of uploaded image. Arrange into four vertical columns, each representing one viewing angle. Each column contains a full-body view on top and a matching close-up portrait directly beneath it. Columns (left → right): Column 1: front view (full body above, front portrait below) Column 2: left profile (fullbody character facing left) with portrait facing left below Column 3: right profile (fullbody character facing right) with portrait facing right below Column 4: back view, with matching portrait below. Maintain even spacing and framing around the character portraits. Clean silhouette, consistent alignment, and clean panel separation. No Text. Thin borders. Flat lighting

entries.title: Anime Duo School Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical 2D anime-style duo movie poster featuring exactly 2 teenage characters in a dramatic school-universe setting at golden-hour sunset. The first character is Danny, a short, stocky boy standing on the left in a confident pose, pointing toward the viewer with one hand and keeping the other hand in his pocket; he has messy dark curly hair, a black oversized T-shirt with a colorful graffiti smiley face and crown graphic, olive cargo pants with a chain accessory, chunky high-top sneakers in purple, orange, white, and black, and a silver chain necklace. The second character is Juliet, a tall slim girl standing on the right with long flowing red hair, one arm casually resting on the boy's shoulder, wearing a navy private-school blazer with pink piping and crest, white shirt, pink tie, plaid pleated skirt, white socks, white sneakers, and a navy backpack with pink trim and crest. Both faces should be covered by smooth rectangular skin-toned blur masks, as if censored, while the rest of the characters remain highly detailed. Background: a romantic urban academy campus with a clocktower on the left, a school flag bearing an ornate monogram, city skyscrapers in the distance, a canal or river reflecting warm light, cherry blossom trees, and pink petals drifting through the foreground. Lighting and style: cinematic anime illustration, polished poster art, warm orange-pink sunset sky with glowing clouds, rim lighting around the characters, detailed clothing folds, saturated colors, high contrast, soft atmospheric depth, subtle film-poster composition. Bottom typography: include exactly 2 lines of text. The first line is a large title, "DANNY & JULIET", with "DANNY" in bold yellow-orange dripping graffiti brush lettering, an ampersand in white, and "JULIET" in large pink serif letters with paint splatter texture. The second line is the tagline "Chaos meets discipline." in smaller mixed yellow, white, and pink lettering with tiny decorative divider ornaments. Keep the poster clean and centered, no extra characters, no extra logos, no watermark.
entries.description: Generates a cinematic anime-style duo poster for a school romance or rival-character concept with customizable names and tagline.

entries.title: Anime Schoolgirl Pitcher on Baseball Field
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a wide 16:9 anime-style illustration of one faceless white-haired schoolgirl pitcher standing alone at the exact center of a sunny baseball field, viewed from the front at full body distance. She has short pale silver-white bobbed hair with straight bangs, a deliberately blurred or featureless face, and a slim teenage build. She wears a white long-sleeve blouse under a dark charcoal pleated pinafore-style school uniform dress with a belt, white knee socks, and white Mary Jane shoes, and she holds one black baseball glove with both hands in front of her chest as if ready to pitch. The setting is an empty school baseball diamond: brown dirt infield filling the foreground, a circular pitcher's mound under her feet, clean white foul lines and home-plate markings behind her, green outfield grass beyond, a tall central backstop fence with netting, low green outfield walls, two tall light poles at the far left and far right edges, and dense leafy trees in the background. The sky is vivid bright blue with scattered fluffy white clouds, giving a clear summer afternoon feeling. Use crisp Japanese anime background art, clean linework, vibrant colors, soft sunlight, balanced symmetrical composition, and high detail in the field textures and fence. Keep the camera level and centered, no text, no watermark, no extra characters, no baseball bat, no motion blur.
