entries.title: 16-Panel Football Dream Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic 4x4 storyboard poster for an emotional sports-anime video about a young yellow-haired girl who struggles to become a professional football player, turning rejection, pain, injuries, and loneliness into determination and success.

Canvas: Vertical poster in a 4:5 ratio, dark cinematic color grade, realistic anime aesthetics, warm golden highlights, deep shadows, dramatic rain and stadium lighting. Divide the canvas into exactly 16 equal panels in a black grid, numbered 1 through 16 in small black square badges at the top-left of each panel. Each panel has a bold yellow uppercase title and short white bullet text on the left side, with an emotional scene illustration filling the panel. Add a full-width bottom banner titled "VIDEO PROMPT (FOR THIS STORY)" with a paragraph prompt and a soccer ball graphic on the right.

Main character: A teenage girl with messy short golden-yellow hair, athletic but small build, expressive emotional body language, usually wearing dark football training clothes or a black football jersey with number 7. Her face may be softly obscured or shadowed for cinematic focus. Show her growing from lonely beginner to celebrated star.

Storyboard panels: Use exactly 16 panels with these visible numbered chapters and scene concepts:
1. "A DREAM BEGINS" - girl at night holding a soccer ball beside an urban fence, watching football on a glowing screen in the distance; bullet points: dreams of becoming a football star, watches matches late at night, practices alone in empty streets, believes football is her destiny.
2. "NOBODY SUPPORTS HER" - girl standing with folded arms while classmates or family silhouettes mock or ignore her; bullet points: people say football is not for girls, friends laugh at her dreams, family worries about her future, but she never gives up.
3. "TRAINING EVERY DAY" - rainy street training scene, girl dribbling intensely through puddles before sunrise; bullet points: wakes up before sunrise, runs in rain and cold mornings, practices dribbling for hours, learns discipline and patience.
4. "FIRST BIG FAILURE" - girl crying alone by a chain-link fence after rejection, soccer ball near her feet and a paper marked "REJECTED"; bullet points: gets rejected from a local academy, cries alone after the trials, feels broken and exhausted, decides to try again stronger.
5. "THE HARDEST PHASE" - exhausted girl studying at a desk under a lamp with books and football notes, showing balance between school and sport; bullet points: balances studies, work and football, shoes become old and torn, trains on rough grounds, keeps chasing her dream silently.
6. "A SMALL OPPORTUNITY" - local coach standing beside her on a muddy practice field, noticing her talent; bullet points: a local coach notices her talent, gets invited to a small girls' team, starts learning real teamwork, slowly gains confidence.
7. "BUILDING HERSELF" - intense gym/training scene with weights or a stationary bike, sweat and dramatic lighting; bullet points: improves speed and stamina, learns powerful shooting techniques, studies professional players, becomes mentally stronger.
8. "FIRST TOURNAMENT" - girl in black number 7 jersey celebrating or kicking during her first match under stadium lights; bullet points: plays her first important match, feels nervous before kickoff, scores her first goal, her team finally believes in her.
9. "INJURED BUT UNBROKEN" - girl seated with bandaged leg or ankle, injured yet determined, watching from sidelines; bullet points: suffers a painful injury, cannot play for weeks, watches others from the sidelines, fights through pain and recovery.
10. "RETURN TO THE FIELD" - sunset practice field, girl in number 7 jersey seen from behind rejoining teammates; bullet points: comes back stronger than before, trains harder every single day, earns respect from teammates, becomes the team's key player.
11. "VIRAL RECOGNITION" - close-up of a smartphone showing her match clip going viral, social media hearts and comments around the screen; bullet points: match clips go viral online, people start noticing her talent, gains followers and supporters, her story inspires young girls.
12. "CHAMPIONSHIP MATCH" - massive stadium under bright lights, girl number 7 scoring or celebrating a winning goal with sparks and cheering crowd; bullet points: plays in the biggest match of her life, stadium lights shine brightly, scores the winning goal, crowd cheers her name loudly.
13. "NATIONAL SELECTION" - girl with backpack at sunset city skyline, leaving for bigger competition; include a subtle "INDIA" marking on clothing or bag if desired; bullet points: gets selected for a national camp, travels to bigger cities, faces stronger competition, pushes beyond her limits.
14. "BECOMING A STAR" - magazine cover or interview scene with her holding a soccer ball, headline like "SPORTS WEEKLY" and inspirational slogan "NO DREAM IS TOO BIG"; bullet points: appears in interviews and magazines, signs with a professional club, inspires millions of girls, proves dreams have no gender.
15. "LIVING HER DREAM" - wide stadium shot from behind, girl number 7 raising both arms triumphantly before a huge crowd; bullet points: plays in massive stadiums, supports her family proudly, smiles remembering her struggles, finally lives the life she imagined.
16. "A PROUD MOMENT" - emotional close-up of the now-successful player holding a ball against stadium light, remembering her younger self; bullet points: looks at her younger self's old football, remembers every failure and sacrifice, realizes the struggle made her stronger, her dream finally became reality.

Bottom banner: Add a dark rectangular banner spanning the full width beneath the 16 panels. Title in bold yellow: "VIDEO PROMPT (FOR THIS STORY)". Body text in small white type: "Create a cinematic and emotional video about a young girl with yellow hair who struggles to become a professional football player. Show her journey from being ignored, facing failures, injuries, and rejections to rising as a star through hard work and determination. Include training, emotions, matches, crowds, celebrations, and real-life struggles. End with her living her dream and inspiring millions. The video should be motivational, emotional, and visually stunning." Place a realistic soccer ball on grass at the far right of the banner.

Visual style: Realistic anime sports-drama storyboard, emotional closeups, dynamic camera angles, gritty textures, rain, mud, glowing stadium lights, warm amber rim light, dark blue night shadows, high contrast cinematic composition, motivational atmosphere.

Constraints: Keep exactly 16 numbered panels plus one bottom prompt banner. Use the same young yellow-haired football girl throughout. Keep text legible but compact. No extra panels, no watermark, no unrelated characters, no comedy tone.
entries.description: A cinematic anime-style storyboard poster showing a young yellow-haired girl's emotional journey from rejection and injury to professional football success.

entries.title: Kawaii Sheep Girl Portal Comic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a cute vertical four-panel manga comic about a sheep girl and her tiny sheep encountering a magical portal and a cat.

Canvas: Portrait comic page, 768 x 1152 style, warm pastel colors, thin dark brown panel borders, soft cel-shaded anime illustration, cozy slice-of-life fantasy mood. Arrange exactly 4 horizontal panels stacked vertically with narrow white gutters.

Main characters: A chibi sheep-horned girl named HITSURO, with cream-white bobbed hair, curled ram horns on both sides, small pointed elf ears, large brown eyes, a white blouse, pale pink apron with pocket and bow, dark pleated skirt, knee socks, and soft shoes. Her face in the first panel is intentionally obscured by a plain beige rectangular censor block. A tiny fluffy white sheep companion with round black eyes, pink cheeks, small floppy ears, and a stubby tail appears in every panel. A calico cat appears in panels 3 and 4, white with orange and dark brown patches, round eyes, and a playful expression.

Layout and story: Use exactly 4 panels.
1. Panel 1: Cozy room interior with wooden floor, bookshelf, bottles, potted plants, framed wall art, curtain, and window. The sheep girl stands on the right facing away/sideways, her face covered by a beige rectangle. The tiny sheep stands on the floor to her left, trembling slightly with motion marks. Add a tall vertical Japanese speech bubble on the right containing ...揺れてる...ね.
2. Panel 2: The wooden floor has cracked open into a glowing jagged hole filled with a purple starry galaxy. The tiny sheep is partly emerging from or leaning over the hole, sparkling. The sheep girl crouches on the right, concerned, reaching toward it. Add a vertical speech bubble on the right containing ひつ郎、近づいちゃだめ.
3. Panel 3: A vertical oval purple portal opens on the left, filled with a starry night sky and a glowing yellow star. A calico cat leaps out of the portal toward the room, with speed lines radiating dramatically. The tiny sheep stands near the center-right, startled and shaking. The sheep girl stands on the far right, surprised. Include exactly 2 speech bubbles: a small bubble near the cat saying ニャッ, and a tall vertical bubble on the right saying ...どこの子?.
4. Panel 4: The portal remains glowing on the left side of the cozy room. The tiny sheep floats or jumps out from the portal while the sheep girl kneels on the right and hugs the calico cat protectively. The cat looks pleased with closed eyes. Small glowing stars sparkle around them, and a few scattered small objects lie on the floor, such as a spool, coin-like circles, a small cloth, and a tiny container. Add a tall vertical speech bubble on the right containing Japanese text meaning "Hey, stop that," using 「こら、やめなさい」.

Visual style: Soft kawaii manga, rounded character proportions, expressive eyes, cream and beige room palette, gentle brown line art, pastel purple magical glow, subtle sparkles, clean readable speech bubbles with vertical Japanese text. Keep the page wholesome and humorous.

Constraints: Include exactly 4 panels, exactly 3 recurring characters total across the story: the sheep girl, the tiny sheep, and the calico cat. Count the major repeated elements as follows: 4 speech bubbles total on the right side, 1 small cat sound bubble, 2 magical portal/hole events before the final panel, and 1 beige face-obscuring rectangle in the first panel only. Do not add extra panels, extra characters, watermarks, logos, or narration boxes.

entries.title: Anime Shrine Maiden Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create an anime character reference sheet featuring a young shrine maiden girl in a consistent red-and-white miko outfit, shown as a collection of full-body poses and expression variations on a clean white background.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, high-resolution, white background with a very faint pale-gray grid and thin rectangular panel divisions like a character design board. Use crisp clean anime line art, soft cel shading, polished digital illustration, and consistent proportions across all versions.

Layout: Arrange exactly 15 full-body character figures in a loose 5-column by 3-row reference-sheet composition. The central figure is the largest and tallest, placed in the middle, front-facing, occupying most of the vertical height. The other 14 figures are smaller surrounding pose variations, each inside its own faint panel. Keep generous white space and avoid any text labels.

Subject details: The character is a petite teenage anime girl with very long straight black hair reaching past the waist, blunt bangs, small side locks, pale skin, and red eyes when visible. She wears a traditional shrine maiden outfit: white kimono-style top with wide sleeves, red trim and red stitch-like sleeve markings, red hakama skirt with deep pleats, a large red waist bow/sash, white tabi socks, and red-and-white sandals. The outfit should remain consistent in every pose.

Pose and expression count: Include exactly 15 discrete figures: 1 large central front-facing neutral full-body pose with a softly blurred/featureless face; 2 top-left jumping pose with clenched fists and blurred face; 3 top-second standing pose with one hand on hip and blurred face; 4 top-center close-up standing pose with blurred face; 5 top-fourth small front-facing neutral pose with visible calm face; 6 top-right shy standing pose with clenched fists and blurred face; 7 middle-left embarrassed side pose with visible blushing face and one raised hand; 8 middle-second smiling bashful pose with visible closed eyes; 9 middle-fourth small front-facing curious pose with visible open eyes; 10 middle-right crying flustered pose with both hands raised and visible tears; 11 bottom-left hand-on-hip standing pose with blurred face; 12 bottom-second side-facing pointing pose with blurred face; 13 bottom-center small hand-on-hip pose with blurred face; 14 bottom-fourth simple standing pose with blurred face; 15 bottom-right dynamic playful pose with visible face, flowing hair, one hand making a peace sign and the other arm extended.

Visual style: Modern Japanese anime character-sheet style, glossy dark hair highlights, soft blush where visible, clean red-and-white color palette, elegant shrine maiden aesthetic, balanced proportions, subtle shadows beneath feet, no background scenery.

Constraints: No words, no logos, no watermark, no extra characters, no props. Keep all 15 figures recognizable as the same character and keep the miko outfit identical across every pose.
entries.description: Generates a square anime reference sheet with 15 pose and expression variations of a red-and-white shrine maiden character.

entries.title: Dark Western Outlaw Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: High-end cinematic Western outlaw poster, vertical 2:3 composition, dark Western game character setting style. A mysterious masked cowboy and a black horse stand at the desert border, full-body frontal view, wide-brimmed cowboy hat pulled low, patterned bandana covering the lower face, dark long hair, black leather gloves, black Western jacket with multi-layer leather gear, bullet belt, revolver holster, metal belt buckle, heavy boots, red-brown geometric pattern poncho over shoulders, edges tattered and fluttering. Calm and dangerous posture, one hand near the holster. Black horse half-body in frame on the right, white forehead blaze, clear bridle details. Background is the Western desert in a storm, lightning, dark clouds, distant canyon walls, dead trees, sand dust, smoke, sparks, mud reflections, oppressive epic atmosphere. Left side of the frame is vintage parchment white space, right side is the dark storm scene, strong light-dark split. Includes large vertical English title, bounty info, character file, coordinates, map grid, fine line boxes, circular compass graphics, small red markers, signature seals, and other high-end poster layout elements. Style: black ink splashes, old paper texture, cinematic realism, dark Western, strong contrast, leather and metal ultra-detail, dust, mud spots, scratches, smoke, sparks, edge rim lighting, high-end collection game poster, Red Dead Redemption vibes, artbook quality, 8K, high detail.

entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_1 as the base object and style reference, create a clean standalone illustration of the open Japanese flip phone, removing the surrounding infographic layout, captions, detail panels, borders, and all printed text. Replace the phone's screen content with the group photo from REFERENCE_0, fitted naturally inside the display as if it is being viewed in the phone gallery. Preserve the old silver-blue clamshell phone's angle, keypad, hinge, translucent worn plastic texture, small scratches, and blue star charm strap from REFERENCE_1. Keep the image in the same soft watercolor/anime concept-art style with a pale white background, faint blue shadows, and a few drifting translucent petals. The screen should show exactly 4 people from the group photo: blue-haired girl, black-haired boy, brown-haired girl, and brown-haired boy. Do not add UI text, labels, borders, page decorations, or extra objects beyond the phone, charm, subtle shadow, and petals. Optional customization: use the four-person summer group photo from REFERENCE_0 on the phone display, with the phone model/color remaining silver-blue translucent flip phone.

entries.title: Windblown Ink Samurai Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a stark black-and-white ink illustration of a wild samurai-like wanderer shown from the chest up against a blank white background, in a dramatic manga brush-pen style with rough crosshatching, heavy black shadows, splattered ink, and expressive scratchy linework. The figure wears a loose, dark, tattered kimono robe with a deep open collar exposing a long sinewy neck and upper chest, with ragged fabric edges and subtle worn floral markings on one side. The head is mostly covered by a large centered flat medium-gray square censor block, but chaotic long black hair bursts outward around it in many thin windblown strands, forming tangled arcs across the upper half of the image. Add exactly 4 black bird silhouettes around the figure: one large crow or raven flying in the upper left with wings spread, one small bird flying at lower left, one tiny feather-like black shape near the left middle, and one smaller crow silhouette at the right edge. Use high contrast, monochrome sumi-e energy, gritty seinen manga mood, no color except grayscale, no text, no frame, portrait composition, intense wind and motion, detailed ink texture on clothing and neck, minimal white negative space background.

entries.title: Goku Anime Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a complete anime character design sheet for Goku in the classic Dragon Ball style, on a bright clean white/light-gray presentation background, like a professional character reference board. Make him highly recognizable with spiky black hair, orange martial arts gi, blue undershirt, blue wristbands, blue belt, blue boots with red accents, and a brown monkey tail. Use crisp cel-shaded anime line art, neat panel borders, small technical annotations, and navy-blue section tabs.

Canvas: Wide horizontal character sheet, approximately 16:9, dense but clean layout, divided into multiple rectangular panels with thin gray borders. Use a white background with pale gray grid/panel divisions and dark blue label ribbons.

Layout and exact visible element counts:
- Left biography column: 1 large title reading GOKU, 1 small orange subtitle/mark beside it, 2 short blocks of tiny descriptive text, and 1 large circular kanji-style emblem.
- Main turnaround panel: exactly 4 full-body standing views of the character, labeled as front, side, back, and three-quarter/front pose. All 4 wear the same orange-and-blue outfit and show the tail where visible.
- Action pose panel: exactly 1 dynamic crouching/fighting pose with fists raised and tail visible.
- Sitting pose panel: exactly 1 cross-legged seated pose.
- Face close-up panel: exactly 1 large head-and-hair close-up.
- Costume and anatomy detail strip: exactly 6 detail items, including 1 hair silhouette, 1 boot detail, 1 pair of open hands, 1 fist/hand detail, 1 torso/gi fabric close-up, and 1 set of red staff/weapon line details.
- Expression row: exactly 5 head/expression busts, showing neutral, serious, determined, shouting, and powered-up battle expression with golden energy hair/aura.
- Scale comparison panel: exactly 6 standing character silhouettes/figures in a lineup, including the main character plus five other Dragon Ball-inspired figures of different heights.
- Color palette panel: exactly 6 labeled swatch groups: skin tones, hair blacks, outfit orange tones, blue clothing tones, belt/boot dark tones, and red accent tones.

Subject details: The character should have large spiky black hair, athletic childlike-to-teen proportions, expressive anime eyes, orange sleeveless gi with dark blue undershirt, blue sash belt, blue wristbands, dark blue boots with red trim, and a brown tail. The back view should show a circular kanji emblem on the gi. The action pose should feel energetic and martial-arts focused. The expression row should include one dramatic Super Saiyan-like powered-up variant with golden hair and fiery yellow aura.

Text style: Use mostly tiny faux-production notes and technical labels that look like a character design bible; keep the main title readable. Use CHARACTER DESIGN SHEET as a recurring dark-blue tab label where appropriate.

Visual style: 1990s shonen anime production sheet, clean cel shading, black ink outlines, warm orange and deep blue color scheme, precise model-sheet presentation, high detail, no photorealism.

Constraints: Keep exactly the element counts listed above. Do not add extra characters outside the scale lineup. Do not use a dark background. No watermark, no logo overlay, no messy collage effects.

entries.title: Warm Anime Vintage Bar Interior
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a richly detailed anime-style illustration of a cozy vintage wooden bar interior at night, viewed in wide landscape composition from the customer side of the counter. The scene features an elegant young barmaid sitting behind the polished L-shaped wooden bar, leaning on one elbow with one hand near her cheek, wearing a loose olive camisole and a pale headband, with long wavy platinum-blonde hair cascading over her shoulders; her face is softly obscured and featureless, as if intentionally blurred. Use warm amber lighting from exactly 4 hanging lanterns suspended from dark ceiling beams, creating cohesive golden highlights and shadows across the character, bottles, shelves, counter, and wood-paneled walls. Include exactly 3 round wooden bar stools in the foreground. Behind the character, show a dense back bar with exactly 3 main horizontal bottle shelves on the left, 1 tall ornate bottle cabinet on the right with 3 shelves, and about 55 visible liquor bottles total, mixing whiskey, sake, ceramic flasks, decanters, and small labeled glass bottles. Add bar accessories on the counter and shelves: 1 brass desk lamp on the far left, 1 small gumball or candy box, 1 bowl of citrus fruit with oranges and limes, cocktail shakers, small jars, straws, bells, and hanging utensils. On the left wall include framed vintage alcohol posters and labels; on the right include a closed wooden door with a small diamond-pattern glass window and brass hinges. Render in a hand-drawn cinematic anime background style with intricate linework, dark brown wood grain, realistic perspective, warm reflections on varnished surfaces, nostalgic speakeasy atmosphere, high detail, integrated character-and-background lighting, no modern objects, no text overlays.

entries.title: Cinematic Character Design Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-end cinematic character design sheet intended for a premium film production. The layout should feel like a curated art direction board rather than a rigid template. Avoid symmetrical grids, uniform spacing, or overly structured presentation. Instead, the composition should feel organic, slightly asymmetrical, and thoughtfully arranged like a real Hollywood concept pitch. Design a grounded, realistic human character with believable body proportions, natural imperfections, and expressive performance-driven presence-like a professional actor captured during emotional and physical performance moments rather than a posed mannequin. Use a bright, clean, and well-lit background that enhances clarity and gives the sheet a fresh, modern studio feel. Include: • Full-body turnaround views (front, 3/4 front, side, back, 3/4 back) • Multiple expressive facial studies from different angles showing emotional range • A cinematic hero portrait with strong character focus • Detailed breakdown of costume, accessories, and key props • Close-up studies of materials such as fabric texture, skin detail, and surface realism • Handwritten-style annotation notes, production markings, and design insights •A clear height reference scale integrated naturally into the composition The character should feel like a real person existing in a film world-authentic, grounded, and emotionally alive rather than stylized or overly idealized. Art direction style: Semi-realistic cinematic design, high-budget film production quality, soft natural studio lighting with a bright tone, subtle depth of field, realistic material rendering, and emotionally readable expressions. Presentation should feel like a professional concept art portfolio used in major film pre-production. Consistency requirement: Maintain perfect continuity in facial identity, body proportions, hairstyle, outfit design, and material details across all angles and studies.
entries.description: Creates a professional Hollywood-style character design board featuring turnarounds, facial expressions, and costume details with organic arrangement.

entries.title: Absolute Cinema Anime Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic anime-style movie-poster illustration of a long blonde-haired schoolgirl seated in a dark cinema theater, centered in a plush deep red theater chair with black armrests. She wears an oversized beige cardigan over a white collared shirt with a large dark red bow tie, and her very long hair spills over her shoulders and down the seat. Her arms are thrown high in a triumphant V shape with both open hands visible, palms facing outward, as if celebrating a masterpiece. Place a bright warm projector or stage light directly above her head, creating a strong golden halo, rim lighting, lens glow, and cinematic backlighting while the surrounding theater remains nearly black. Obscure the character's face with a centered solid tan square censor block, flat and opaque, covering the eyes, nose, and most facial features. Across the lower half of the poster, add glowing serif typography: the smaller word ABSOLUTE above the huge word CINEMA, both in white-gold letters with intense bloom and soft orange outer glow. Use a vertical poster composition, symmetrical framing, high contrast, warm amber highlights, soft film grain, polished anime rendering, and an epic inspirational cinema-ad aesthetic.
entries.description: Generates a dramatic anime theater poster with a triumphant schoolgirl silhouette and glowing cinematic title typography.

entries.title: Whimsical Hand-Painted Girl with Kitten Illustration

entries.prompt: Whimsical hand-painted illustration of a cute red-haired girl with rosy cheeks and blue eyes, wearing a teal sweater decorated with floral and heart patterns, smiling softly while a fluffy cream-colored kitten hangs upside down beside her face with one paw stretched upward. Surrounded by colorful doodle flowers, leaves, hearts, and confetti on a clean white background. Folk art inspired children's book style, gouache texture, playful brush strokes, pastel yet vibrant colors, cozy and cheerful aesthetic, highly detailed, Scandinavian folk illustration vibe, soft lighting, textured paint effect, storybook charm. Adorable hand-painted illustration of two kittens peeking out from a large teal fabric sling bag held by a person wearing a cream outfit. One kitten is striped brown tabby with golden eyes, the other is cream-colored with blue eyes. Surrounded by colorful floral doodles, hearts, leaves, and playful confetti on a white background. Cute folk art children's illustration style, gouache paint texture, vibrant pastel palette, cozy whimsical atmosphere, Scandinavian-inspired design, textured brush strokes, storybook aesthetic, highly detailed, soft and charming composition.

entries.title: Labanotation to 4-Beat Pose Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image as a Labanotation-style dance score, interpret the 4-beat movement phrase and convert it into a pose-control character sheet. Create exactly 4 full-body panels arranged in a clean 2×2 grid on a plain white studio background, showing the same character performing the pose for each beat. Add bold Japanese beat labels in the upper-left of each panel: "1拍目", "2拍目", "3拍目", and "4拍目". Use a photorealistic young female model wearing a white school-uniform blazer, black bow tie, gray plaid skirt, white socks, and black Mary Jane shoes, with black twin tails. Translate the notation into these four poses: beat 1: standing on one leg with one arm raised straight upward and the opposite leg bent back; beat 2: one arm raised upward, body angled slightly, one knee lifted and crossed in front; beat 3: standing front-facing with both arms extended horizontally to the sides; beat 4: standing front-facing with both hands held together near the chest. Keep the character consistent across all four panels, use soft even lighting, minimal shadows, and a simple catalog-like dance reference layout.
entries.description: Generates a four-panel character pose sheet by interpreting a Labanotation dance score as sequential full-body poses.

entries.title: Ice Snow Magical Girl Design
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a full-body front-facing anime magical girl transformation costume design on a clean white background, centered like a character concept sheet. The character is Ryuna, a delicate ice-and-snow themed magical girl with very long flowing silvery white hair, soft translucent strands, and a large crystalline snowflake hair ornament with pale blue ribbons on one side. Her face is covered by a plain pale square placeholder, while the rest of the figure is rendered in elegant, high-detail pastel anime illustration. She wears an ornate white and icy blue snow princess magical girl dress: an off-shoulder sweetheart bodice with lace trim, fitted corset panels, crystal snowflake brooches, dangling blue gems, sheer puff sleeves, long white gloves, a choker made of frost-like lace and jewels, and a layered asymmetrical skirt. The skirt has multiple translucent ruffled layers, a short front hem, long trailing side panels, pale blue inner fabric, sparkling snowflake patterns, crystal chains, star-like charms, and hanging teardrop gems at the edges. Add thigh-high white stockings with delicate snowflake garters and dangling crystals, plus elegant white heels decorated with icy blue snowflake ornaments. The pose is graceful and symmetrical with arms slightly lowered and hands open, legs together, as if floating during a transformation sequence. Use a color palette of white, pearl, pale ice blue, lavender shadows, and clear crystal highlights, with fine line art, watercolor-like translucency, shimmering sparkles, intricate lace, faceted gems, snowflake motifs, and a luminous ethereal finish.
entries.description: Generates a full-body anime magical girl costume concept with an ornate icy snowflake transformation outfit for character design use.

entries.title: Pokemon Trainer Profile Journal Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the uploaded reference image as the exact identity for the main trainer character. Preserve the person's facial structure, hairstyle, skin tone, expression style, body type, and overall likeness while transforming them into a beautifully illustrated anime-inspired Pokémon trainer poster in a nostalgic adventure-journal aesthetic.

Create a full highly detailed vertical composition designed like a handcrafted Pokémon trainer profile scrapbook page mixed with vintage travel journal art and official Pokémon concept artwork. The final image should feel like a premium collector's character profile card from a cozy fantasy Pokémon world.

STYLE & ART DIRECTION:
Soft painterly anime illustration
Pokémon official artwork inspired rendering
Hand-painted watercolor + ink line aesthetic
Warm nostalgic storybook tones
Detailed environmental storytelling
Vintage paper textures, taped notes, stickers, stamps, handwritten annotations
Ghibli-like warmth mixed with modern Pokémon promotional art
Extremely detailed but visually clean composition
Rich adventure atmosphere
Cozy slice-of-life fantasy mood
Soft sunlight and cinematic environmental lighting
Highly expressive but natural posing

MAIN CHARACTER:
Transform the reference person into a Pokémon trainer adventurer/traveler while keeping the exact likeness recognizable.
Casual layered adventure outfit
Stylish jacket over graphic shirt
Backpack with travel accessories
Camera hanging from shoulder or neck
Relaxed friendly pose
Confident warm smile
Anime stylization while preserving identity
Slight windswept hair
Natural anatomy and proportions
Fashionable modern Pokémon trainer aesthetic

COMPOSITION:
The page should be designed like a complete trainer profile sheet.
Include:
Large central full-body illustration of the trainer
Multiple Pokémon surrounding the character naturally
Decorative trainer information panels
Vintage scrapbook borders
Handwritten notes and adventure annotations
Polaroid-style snapshots around the edges
Pokémon team cards on one side
Small travel sketches and doodles
Decorative stamps, clips, tape pieces, map textures
Notebook/journal design language
Soft aged parchment paper background
Tiny environmental storytelling details everywhere

BACKGROUND:
Create a beautiful coastal fantasy Pokémon town inspired by:
Mediterranean harbor scenery
Blue ocean water
Sunny skies
Stone buildings
Adventure-world atmosphere
Peaceful vacation vibe
Pokémon-world architecture
Lush greenery and flowers
Soft clouds and distant mountains

POKÉMON INTERACTION:
The Pokémon should interact naturally with the trainer:
Sitting beside them
Looking at camera
Resting on shoulder
Playing around feet
Dynamic but cozy interaction
Natural emotional chemistry

LAYOUT DETAILS:
Top section:
Large handwritten trainer name
"Trainer Profile" heading
Decorative paper labels

Right-side panel:
Character bio stats
Adventure information
Personality traits
Journey notes
Favorite things
Pokémon seen

entries.title: Moonlit Anime Martial Artist Kick
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dynamic vertical anime action illustration of a pink-haired female martial artist in a dramatic low-angle composition, wearing a glossy deep magenta floral Chinese-inspired qipao mini dress with gold embroidery, black thigh-high stockings, garter details, and black shoes. She is captured mid-spinning high kick, with one leg thrust directly toward the camera so the sole dominates the upper center of the frame, her other knee bent near the ground, long flowing pink hair and ribbons whipping around her, and her face deliberately covered by a flat rose-pink square censor block. Surround her with one sweeping circular ribbon of neon pink magical slash energy, bright sparks, motion trails, shattered stone fragments, and flying pink petals. Include exactly one airborne dark-clothed male ninja opponent in the upper right being knocked backward by the kick. Set the scene in a moonlit ancient East Asian street with tiled rooftops, red lantern glow, wooden architecture, a single large full moon in the cloudy night sky, cracked pavement, cinematic debris, strong foreshortening, intense perspective, ultra-detailed anime rendering, high contrast magenta lighting, dramatic action blur, glossy highlights, and a polished fantasy battle poster aesthetic.
entries.description: Generates a vertical cinematic anime battle scene with a pink-haired martial artist launching a neon energy high kick in a moonlit East Asian street.

entries.title: Blonde Schoolgirl Ice Pop Diptych
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished anime-style illustration arranged as two horizontal stacked panels separated by a thin white divider, showing the same Riona, a blonde schoolgirl in a bright classroom on a sunny day. There are exactly 2 panels: the top panel is a high-angle view from above her right side as she sits on a wooden classroom chair beside a large sunlit window, holding a pale blue popsicle near her mouth; the bottom panel is a closer chest-up portrait from the front with the same popsicle held in one hand, classroom desks and a chalkboard softly blurred behind her, and a vivid blue sky with white clouds visible through the window. She has short, slightly messy wet-looking golden blonde bob hair catching warm sunlight, a fair complexion, and wears a damp-looking white gym shirt with navy collar and sleeve trim plus navy athletic shorts. Add exactly 2 star accessories: one blue-and-gold star necklace pendant and one matching dangling star earring. The scene should feel summery and nostalgic, with warm afternoon light, glossy highlights, parquet classroom floor, wooden desks, a chalkboard in the background, and soft depth of field. Place flat opaque tan censor rectangles over the face area in both panels, matching the skin-tone block style visible in the image, while keeping the hair, ear, jewelry, outfit, hand, popsicle, classroom, and window lighting visible. Use detailed semi-realistic anime rendering, soft painterly shading, high-resolution vertical composition, 3:4 aspect ratio, and a bright clean color palette centered on white, navy blue, gold, and sky blue.
entries.description: Generates a two-panel sunny classroom anime illustration of a blonde girl holding a blue popsicle with star jewelry and face-censor blocks.

entries.title: Bleak Manga Panel with Dead Horse
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a stark black-and-white manga panel in fine pen-and-ink line art with screentone shading, framed by a thin rectangular border on a mostly empty white background. In the center foreground lies a dead, emaciated horse or donkey collapsed on its side, ribs and bones visible, legs bent awkwardly, head down in a dark pool of blood or shadow with scattered dirt and small stones around it; render the animal with gritty crosshatching and realistic anatomical detail. On the left stands a young woman in profile facing right, wearing a dark long-sleeved blouse, long dark skirt, and black ankle boots, with straight long black hair and hands in her pockets; place an opaque soft gray rectangular blur over her face. On the right stands a second young woman in profile facing left, wearing a light blouse with billowy sleeves, a high-waisted long dark skirt, socks, and flat shoes, with short wavy light hair; place an opaque soft gray rectangular blur over her face. Add exactly 2 vertical Japanese speech bubbles: the left bubble beside the dark-haired woman says これは生殺しです, and the right bubble beside the short-haired woman says これは何ですか?. Keep the composition quiet, clinical, and unsettling, like a seinen manga scene, with high contrast, minimal background detail, crisp ink outlines, and subtle halftone textures.
entries.description: Generates a minimalist black-and-white seinen manga panel featuring two women observing a dead horse with Japanese speech bubbles.

entries.title: Comedic Manga Roadside Horse Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a black-and-white manga page panel in detailed seinen line art with halftone shading and a thick black rectangular border. The scene is a rural fantasy roadside under a bright cloudy sky, with distant hills, trees, fence posts, rocks, grass tufts, and a wooden sign pointing right that reads 希望に向かう道(たぶん)→. In the center foreground lies one large dead horse collapsed on its side, eyes closed, legs bent, with a tiny ghost-like soul puff rising from its back showing a dizzy dead expression. On the left stands one elegant blonde noblewoman in a frilled gothic-lolita dress, dark jacket, corseted waist, ribbons, and curled hair tied with a bow; her face is obscured by a soft gray rectangular blur, she folds her arms confidently, and a sparkle mark near her suggests smug certainty. Above her is one oval vertical Japanese speech bubble containing これは生殺しです. On the right stands one long black-haired young woman in a simple blouse and pinafore dress, also with her face obscured by a soft gray rectangular blur; she raises one finger to her chin in confusion, with a small question mark above her head. Above her is one oval vertical Japanese speech bubble containing これは何ですか?. Include exactly 2 human characters, exactly 2 large speech bubbles, exactly 1 question mark symbol, exactly 1 sparkle symbol, exactly 1 wooden sign, exactly 1 dead horse, and exactly 1 ghost puff. Use crisp ink outlines, expressive manga composition, realistic background texture, comedic absurd fantasy tone, and high-resolution monochrome print style.

entries.searchText: comedic manga roadside horse scene generates a single-panel black-and-white manga gag scene with two women, japanese speech bubbles, a sign, and a collapsed horse. create a black-and-white manga page panel in detailed seinen line art with halftone shading and a thick black rectangular border. the scene is a rural fantasy roadside under a bright cloudy sky, with distant hills, trees, fence posts, rocks, grass tufts, and a wooden sign pointing right that reads 希望に向かう道(たぶん)→. in the center foreground lies one large dead horse collapsed on its side, eyes closed, legs bent, with a tiny ghost-like soul puff rising from its back showing a dizzy dead expression. on the left stands one elegant blonde noblewoman in a frilled gothic-lolita dress, dark jacket, corseted waist, ribbons, and curled hair tied with a bow; her face is obscured by a soft gray rectangular blur, she folds her arms confidently, and a sparkle mark near her suggests smug certainty. above her is one oval vertical japanese speech bubble containing これは生殺しです. on the right stands one long black-haired young woman in a simple blouse and pinafore dress, also with her face obscured by a soft gray rectangular blur; she raises one finger to her chin in confusion, with a small question mark above her head. above her is one oval vertical japanese speech bubble containing これは何ですか?. include exactly 2 human characters, exactly 2 large speech bubbles, exactly 1 question mark symbol, exactly 1 sparkle symbol, exactly 1 wooden sign, exactly 1 dead horse, and exactly 1 ghost puff. use crisp ink outlines, expressive manga composition, realistic background texture, comedic absurd fantasy tone, and high-resolution monochrome print style. comic / storyboard realistic

entries.title: Polished Manga Page From Rough Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as a rough manga storyboard, turn it into a clean black-and-white manga page with polished line art, screentone shading, and crisp rectangular panel borders. Keep the same 5-panel story structure and visible circled panel numbers: 1 landscape scene with mountains, houses, a small car, and a cheerful woman leaning in from the right waving; 2 a compact car driving; 3 a small bird with a camera-like beak; 4 an announcer holding a microphone beside a street-food stall; 5 the woman in front of a large explosion. Preserve the rough layout order and the intended character/object positions, but render everything as finished manga art. Keep the faces in panels 4 and 5 intentionally obscured by a soft gray rectangular blur. Add Japanese text on the stall awning reading ラテスカーどっぐ. Make the page monochrome, high-detail, print-ready, with dynamic speed lines and explosion effects where indicated.

entries.title: Fantasy Pop-up Book Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Transform the entire image into a open pop-up book
Included Elements:
Castle, Forest, Stairs, Paper Clouds, Paper Mountains, Village, Flowers, Fairytale Objects
All elements are "Paper structures connected to book pages"

Style:
Semi-realistic fantasy character
A feel somewhere between classic fairytales and reality
Slightly fairytale-like proportions allowed
Maintain subtle realistic textures for skin and hair

Popup Book Style:

Pop up the main subject critically
Layered paper craft
Handcrafted popup book
Premium paper diorama

Color Scheme:
classic fairy tale color palette
Warm golden hour lighting
Pastel fantasy palette

Completely replace the original colors:
Cream - Warm Green - Soft Blue - Coral - Gold Accent
Premium paper diorama

Lighting:
Warm golden hour lighting
Soft cinematic light
Subtle shadows on the cross-section of the paper structure

Atmosphere:
Dreamy
Warm, Fairy tale sensibility
Between reality and fantasy
Sentimental adventure atmosphere
Keep the composition classic fairy tale and balanced.

Negative:
Completely 2D illustrations
Completely realistic images
Plastic toy feel
Low-quality paper model feel
Excessive SD characterization
Textures with a strong AI feel
Compositions where the book is not visible
Characters appearing detached from the fairy tale setting

entries.title: Cinematic Cycling Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic close-up of a female cyclist tightening a baby pink performance glove around her wrist. Focus on fingers, tendons, and fabric stretch. Realistic tension and folds in the glove material. Cool foggy environment, soft diffused light, cinematic shallow depth of field, subtle breathing movement transferred into frame, ultra-realistic textures.

Panel 5 - Balaclava & Focused Eyes

Ultra-realistic cinematic close-up of a female cyclist wearing helmet and performance glasses while adjusting a baby pink balaclava over the lower half of her face. Tight symmetrical framing focused on eyes and hands. Slow controlled movement as the fabric stretches softly around her face. Slight condensation on glasses, calm determined eyes shifting subtly to the side. Foggy blurred background, cool cinematic lighting, photorealistic detail.

Panel 6 - Misty Mountain Establishing Shot

Ultra-realistic cinematic wide shot of foggy mountain valleys and dense forest under overcast skies. Heavy fog drifting through trees and across the road. Cold moody atmosphere, soft volumetric fog, subtle wind movement in branches and grass. Cool cinematic color grading, high dynamic range, deep atmospheric depth, almost static camera with very subtle cinematic push-in.

Panel 7 - Drone Tracking Cyclists

Ultra-realistic wide cinematic drone shot of three female road cyclists riding uphill together on a wet mountain road in foggy weather. The cyclists wear baby pink performance cycling apparel contrasting against the cold gray environment. Smooth lateral drone tracking movement parallel to the cyclists. Wet asphalt reflecting soft light, subtle tire spray, drifting fog crossing the road, synchronized pedaling rhythm, natural movement, documentary realism.

Panel 8 - Frontal Speed Shot

Ultra-realistic cinematic frontal drone shot of three female cyclists riding fast in single-file formation on a wet mountain road. Camera flies backward at the exact same speed, keeping constant framing and centered composition. Baby pink cycling jackets visible through rain and fog. Wet asphalt reflections, water spray from wheels, dynamic rain particles, cinematic stabilization with subtle natural drone float, cold atmospheric mountain background.

Panel 9 - Bicycle Drivetrain Finale

Ultra-realistic cinematic close-up from a camera mounted near the rear wheel and drivetrain of a road bicycle. Baby pink cycling shoe and lower apparel visible while pedaling intensely uphill in rain. Detailed chain, cassette, crankset, and wheel movement with realistic mechanical motion. Water droplets splashing onto the drivetrain, wet asphalt texture sharp and reflective. Natural vibrations from the bike, shallow depth of field, cinematic motion blur, foggy mountain atmosphere, premium high-end commercial realism.
entries.description: A multi-panel storyboard prompt for a cinematic project featuring a female cyclist in various atmospheric, foggy mountain settings.

entries.title: Basketball Shoe Storyboard Advertisement
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please create a storyboard poster for a limited edition basketball shoe advertisement titled "Liftoff," horizontal 16:9, 3 columns x 3 rows, totaling 9 shots.

Brand Name: LIFTOFF
English Name: LIFTOFF
Product: Limited colorway basketball shoes
Character: Teenage Asian athlete
Slogan: Step down, the whole court is yours

Visual Style: High-contrast athletic feel, bright fluorescent orange + electric green + pure white color scheme, stadium lighting, basketball court wood floor texture, splashing sweat, explosive moments, motion blur, smoky atmosphere, spotlighting, Nike-level sports commercial quality.

The product is a high-top basketball shoe with a fluorescent orange to electric green gradient upper, a white air cushion midsole, and the tongue labeled "LIFTOFF."

Order of 9 shots:
Quiet scene (empty court, lights off) → Lights on (stadium lights flash on) → Close-up (front shot of the shoe, midsole detail) → Lacing (close-up of athlete tying laces) → Jump (athlete soaring for a dunk) → Floating (subject frozen mid-air, background blurred) → Landing (shoes landing hard, dust kicking up) → Celebration (athlete roaring after landing) → Hero shot (Brand Logo + Slogan + full side view of the shoe).
entries.description: A detailed prompt for creating a 9-frame storyboard for a high-performance basketball shoe advertisement, featuring dynamic sports lighting and athletic visuals.

entries.title: Retro Hand-Inked Manga Comic Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a wholly original, simple black-and-white comic strip in a retro hand-inked manga style. Use 2-3 horizontal panels. Treat the uploaded image as the character reference; redraw the character entirely in manga form with consistent line work and shading across every panel. Interpret the person as the main character and, based on their appearance, generate an uplifting encounter with a clear "setup-reinforce-turnaround" structure: the first panel establishes context, the second develops the situation, and the third delivers a surprise twist. Keep the dialogue short, natural, and upbeat. No technology.

entries.title: Street Dance Character Design Layout
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Character setting diagram layout, focusing on an 18-year-old Asian female street dancer. Includes 4 large, high-detail full-body dynamic dance poses (highlighting dance movements, clear face). A clear multi-angle reference strip is attached to the side, containing only 3 detailed head close-ups (front, side, 3/4 profile). Minimize text elements and prioritize pixel space for facial detail depiction. The background is a gritty industrial style with realistic lighting and shadow effects. Cinematic street dance moves, an 18-year-old beautiful Asian woman with long wavy black hair, wearing a white sleeveless tank top and loose beige cargo pants. She performs high-energy hip-hop dance moves in a sunlit industrial warehouse. Powerful dynamic poses, hair flowing in the air, sweat glistening, the lens focused on her expressive face. The camera circles around her in low-angle tracking shots, dust dancing in golden beams of sunlight, 4k, hyper-realistic, masterpiece.

entries.title: Ink Splatter Hand-Drawn Sketch
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create an illustration of 'me' from your imagination:

Korean-style illustration, featuring a distinct and memorable character design, natural and expressive facial emotions, a half-body composition, and a dynamic pose. The clothing should have complex and exquisite details. Adopt a hand-drawn graffiti style with ink splashes, loose and spontaneous lines, and a blend of soft pastel tones and ink shadows. The goal is a manga sketch-like texture. Keep the background minimalist pure white, with symbolic decorative elements scattered around the character. The overall atmosphere should be strong and engaging, rich in detail and of extremely high quality.

entries.title: Chibi Friends on Sparkling Water
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bright whimsical anime-style wide illustration of exactly 3 cute chibi figures running and dancing across a mirror-like shallow water surface under a vivid blue sky: 1 chibi boy on the left, 1 small mascot robot in the center, and 1 chibi girl on the right. The left child is a green hoodie, dark blue cuffed jeans, and green sneakers, with messy short black hair, arms spread as if skipping, one leg lifted, and the face intentionally covered by a soft square blur. The center character is a white and lime-green round robot mascot with big blue eyes, green heart emblem on its chest, leaf-like green ear panels, rounded segmented limbs, and a small sprout antenna ending in a white flower, smiling happily and waving while stepping forward. The right child is a pink hoodie, blue pleated skirt, white socks, and pink sneakers, with short brown bobbed hair, running lightly with one fist raised, and the face intentionally covered by a soft square blur. Set the scene on an expansive reflective water plain like a dreamlike salt flat, with crisp reflections of all 3 figures beneath them. Use distant low mountains on the horizon, fluffy sunlit clouds, and a radiant blue afternoon sky. Fill the air and water with many glowing star-shaped sparkles and warm golden light flares, creating a magical cheerful atmosphere. Use polished Japanese children's book anime rendering, soft watercolor-like shading, clean line art, pastel colors, luminous highlights, high detail, wide 16:9 composition, no text, no logos.
entries.description: Generates a cheerful wide anime scene of two chibi children and a cute robot mascot running across a reflective magical water landscape.

entries.title: Squash and Stretch Jump Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the character base, create a clean animation movement sheet that turns the character into a full-body jump sequence study while preserving the same outfit, badge, bald head, shoes, stylized ink-and-color illustration look, and the censored/blurred face treatment. Expand the view from the cropped portrait into a wide beige paper-textured layout with a ground line, subtle motion lines, small impact marks, and instructional typography. Add the title text SQUASH AND STRETCH at the upper left with the subtitle JUMP SEQUENCE - 7 STAGES. Show exactly 7 numbered poses arranged left to right across the page: 1 "ANTICIPATION (CROUCHING)" with the character crouched and arms back; 2 "EXTREME SQUASH (COMPRESSED)" with a deeper compact crouch; 3 "EXTREME STRETCH (TAKEOFF)" with the character elongated upward, arms raised, feet leaving the ground; 4 "APEX (MID-AIR ARC)" with the character tucked in midair; 5 "STRETCH (DOWNWARD ACCELERATION)" with the character stretched vertically while descending; 6 "SQUASH (IMPACT LANDING)" with the character compressed on landing, one hand touching the ground; 7 "RECOVERY (RETURN TO STANCE)" with the character standing relaxed with hands in pockets. Use bold black uppercase labels under each numbered stage, keep consistent character proportions across poses except for the intentional squash-and-stretch deformation, and make the sheet read like a professional 2D animation reference chart.
entries.description: Generates a seven-stage animation movement sheet from a character reference for studying jump timing, squash, stretch, and recovery poses.

entries.title: Pixar-Style Storyboard Layout
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a cinematic storyboard page in a 2x3 grid (6 panels) in a single image, 3D Pixar-like style, soft warm lighting, based on the Gugu Gaga kigurumi universe. This page is "Share Your Light - Part 1" and should feel self-contained for a 15 second short. Consistent characters across all panels: 

- Gugu Gaga Penguin: tiny chibi child in a black penguin mascot suit with white belly, yellow feet, yellow beak hood, short messy dark hair, blue hair clip, collar ring and diagonal strap.

- Sunny Chick: tiny chibi child in a round yellow chick suit with tiny orange beak, short curly orange hair, sunflower hairpin.

Include simple speech bubbles with the exact dialogue in quotes. No other text on the page.

Panel 1 (top left) - Opening loneliness:
Evening in a small cozy playground at sunset, soft orange light. Wide shot. Gugu Penguin sits alone at the edge of a sandbox, shoulders slumped, penguin feet dangling, a small dim glowing lantern toy beside them. Background slightly blurred with empty swings. Speech bubble from Gugu: "My light is so small... no one even notices me."

Panel 2 (top middle) - Closer sadness:
Medium shot closer on Gugu. The lantern glow is weak on their suit. Gugu looks at their own reflection in the lantern, eyes watery. Background still mostly empty. Speech bubble from Gugu: "Maybe I should just hide it."

Panel 3 (top right) - First contact:
Same playground, medium two-shot. Sunny Chick waddles into frame from the side holding a tiny paper star garland, looking kind and curious. Gugu glances up, surprised. Warm colors, sunset behind them. Speech bubble from Sunny: "Hey... I noticed. Your light got me here."

Panel 4 (bottom left) - Sitting together:
Two-shot of Gugu and Sunny now sitting together on the sandbox edge, the lantern between them glowing softly on their kigurumi suits. Background park lights starting to appear as little bokeh dots. Sunny's body language open and friendly. Speech bubble from Gugu: "Really? It doesn't feel like much."

Panel 5 (bottom middle) - Soft reassurance:
Slightly closer on Sunny and Gugu. Sunny leans in, smiling gently, one wing-like arm gesturing toward the lantern. Lantern glow a little brighter. Speech bubble from Sunny: "It was bright enough for me to find you."

Panel 6 (bottom right) - Part 1 hook:
Medium close two-shot, the lantern centered between their faces. Gugu looks uncertain but hopeful. Sunny's eyes shining in the warm light. Background faded. Speech bubble from Gugu: "But what if it's not enough to help anyone?" No other text; leave the emotional question hanging at the end of Part 1.
entries.description: A prompt for a 6-panel single image storyboard featuring consistent characters in a warm, Pixar-like 3D style.

entries.title: Anime Silhouette Narrative Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on Attack on Titan, automatically generate a collectible, epic narrative poster: use the side-profile silhouette of Mikasa Ackerman with her red scarf flowing as the outer contour. Within the silhouette, let a complete world organically grow that best fits the theme. The burning streets of Shiganshina reflect in her eyes; young Eren Yeager's smile fades within the smoke; the Ackerman bloodline crest appears subtly like a watermark; the sea breeze of the final battlefield carries away all memories; fragments of a countdown hourglass transform into falling cherry blossoms, then dissolve into ashes.

The overall composition should not be a simple collage, but a refined silhouette-filled narrative synthesis. It should carry a double-exposure associative effect, yet lean more toward a fusion of cinematic poster and dreamy watercolor illustration. Use soft atmospheric perspective, gentle mist transitions, paper grain texture, white edges with brushstroke marks, and large areas of negative space. The layout should feel restrained, premium, quiet, grand, sacred, nostalgic, poetic, and legendary.

Color palette: crimson blended with gray, muted pink, deep obsidian black.

All elements-style, color, scenes, materials-must automatically adapt to the theme, with every detail strongly bound to it. Instantly recognizable at a glance. Avoid clutter, forced collage, template-style backgrounds, or cheap fantasy assets.
entries.description: A poetic and grand silhouette-filled narrative poster prompt inspired by Attack on Titan, combining double-exposure and watercolor styles.

entries.title: Crayon Drawing Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Enhance the innocent and whimsical feel by subtly exaggerating proportions while keeping all elements recognizable, and maintain soft, friendly, joyful expressions. Preserve the core composition and identifiable elements of the original image, but reinterpret everything in a simplified, cartoonish crayon style. The final result should feel adorable, colorful, playful, innocent, and full of childlike personality, with a warm, imperfect, hand-drawn look that clearly resembles a real kid's crayon artwork brought to life, avoiding any polished digital painting appearance and strictly maintaining visible wax crayon textures and natural imperfections throughout.

entries.title: Monochrome Manga Woman Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Draw a single-panel black-and-white manga portrait of a young woman in a close-up three-quarter view, looking back over her shoulder toward the viewer with a calm, slightly distant expression. She has solid black ink hair gathered into a loose low bun at the back-left of her head, with many thin flyaway strands, messy wisps around the ear and neck, and a few long strands crossing her face. Her face is pale white with minimal shading, a long elegant neck, soft narrow jawline, small understated mouth, and a tiny nose indicated by only a few strokes. Make the eyes the main distinctive feature: almond-shaped, refined, slightly sleepy, with unusual sharp irises and delicate pupils, individuality level 8/10, avoiding generic anime eyes; eyelashes are short, simple, and sparse. Use expressive hand-drawn line art that feels human and imperfect, with varied line weight, confident rough sketch strokes, and visible artist hand habits. The composition is cropped tightly inside a thin black rectangular border, the head occupying the upper center and right side, the bun on the left, shoulder and robe-like garment entering from the lower left, and a diagonal gray halftone background block in the lower right. Keep the palette strictly monochrome black ink on white paper with subtle screentone shading under the jaw and in the diagonal background area. Style: elegant seinen manga illustration, fashion sketch sensibility, minimal but emotionally precise, airy negative space, no text, no color, no extra characters.
entries.description: A text prompt for generating an elegant black-and-white manga close-up portrait with expressive hand-drawn linework and distinctive eyes.

entries.title: Ginger Ale Samurai Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the sole inspiration, transform the ginger ale can into a polished Japanese game character design sheet. Anthropomorphize the can into a stern male samurai warrior, deriving the armor materials, colors, crest motifs, metallic highlights, red-and-gold accents, and green lacquered surfaces from the can design. Present it as a professional RPG concept-art reference page on a clean white background with thin divider lines and Japanese annotation text.

Create these discrete sections: 1 main character profile block at top left with the name 真田 錫一郎 and short Japanese bio text; 1 four-view turnaround across the top center labeled front, side, back, and half-body view; 1 large face close-up on the left; 1 weapon section showing exactly 2 weapon elements, a sheathed green katana and an unsheathed curved katana, plus a small circular guard detail; 1 clothing-parts detail section showing exactly 12 separate items: helmet, chest armor, shoulder armor, arm guard, collar, sleeve, shin guards, corded belt, waist armor, battle skirt, leg guard, and boots; 1 expression set showing exactly 4 bust portraits labeled normal, calm, battle-ready, and faint smile; 1 color palette showing exactly 6 swatches based on the can: deep green, black, metallic silver, gold, deep red, and white; 1 costume concept text block; and 1 dynamic action pose at bottom right with the character drawing his sword and cloth panels flowing dramatically.

Keep the design language tied to the reference can rather than copying the beverage packaging literally: use the can's emerald green as lacquered armor, silver aluminum as polished metal, red logo color as cords and trim, gold shield/crown elements as heraldic ornamentation, and white typography areas as cloth highlights. Make the sheet look like high-end Japanese fantasy game production art, detailed, realistic anime/semi-realistic rendering, crisp linework, accurate armor construction, readable layout, and no photographic countertop background. Use 四面図, 表情集, 衣装パーツ詳細, and カラーパレット as visible Japanese section headings.
entries.description: Generates a Japanese RPG-style samurai character design sheet inspired by a beverage can reference.

entries.title: Sleeping Girl on Moon Rock
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a whimsical children's storybook illustration of a small young girl peacefully sleeping on her side atop a floating broken slab of pale yellow moon rock in outer space. The character has black hair in a high ponytail tied with a red scrunchie, with straight bangs, closed eyes, rosy cheeks, and a gentle smile, resting her head on folded arms. She wears a black-and-yellow striped short-sleeve shirt under blue denim overalls and yellow sneakers with white soles. Behind her, show a huge warm golden crescent moon with visible craters, shaped as if a bite or chunk has been taken from its inner edge, matching the rocky platform beneath her. The background is a deep navy star-filled night sky with many tiny white stars, a few brighter sparkling stars, and soft purple clouds near the edges. Use a charming hand-painted digital illustration style, soft watercolor-like textures, rounded cute proportions, warm moonlight, dreamy bedtime atmosphere, gentle shading, clean composition, and vertical portrait framing.

entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image as the base, regenerate the same composition, pose, outfit, hair placement, and office setting, but transform it into a delicate Japanese-inspired white-line drawing with light pale watercolor washes. Keep the face anonymized with the same plain square mask. Use very fine graphite/ink contour lines, minimal shading, airy negative space, soft off-white paper texture, and restrained muted color only on key areas such as the navy dress, white blouse, skin, and hair. Simplify the background into faint line art while retaining the desk, monitor, window-side office feeling, and lamp silhouette. Overall style: white-line drawing with light pale watercolor; color mood: soft muted blue-gray and warm ivory; background detail level: minimal faint office line art.

entries.title: Watercolor Anime Café Colorization
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the exact line-art base, colorize the illustration into a richly detailed hand-painted watercolor/gouache anime illustration. Preserve the original composition, perspective, character pose, café setting, furniture, bookshelves, window, plants, food, and all line details, but replace the grayscale pencil look with warm natural colors and painterly texture. Use a cozy vintage café palette: honey-brown wood, cream and gold kimono fabric, blonde hair, blue and multicolored books, green foliage, yellow flowers, warm pendant lights, coffee and pastries. Keep the masked face area as a flat plain rectangle with no facial features. Add depth through soft sunlight from the window, gentle highlights on glass and porcelain, layered shadows, visible brush strokes, and high-detail color accents while maintaining the delicate original linework.

entries.title: Cozy Witch and Halo Girl Study Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a detailed cozy anime illustration of exactly 2 cute fantasy girls studying in a bright white-background room, rendered in delicate ink lines, muted watercolor shading, soft gray-brown tones, and teal/purple accents. On the left, show a shy black-haired witch girl seated at a dark wooden writing desk, wearing an oversized black pointed witch hat decorated with tiny stars, buckles, purple flowers, chains, and ribbons; she has long wavy black hair in thick braids, pale skin, purple eyes, a black-and-white gothic dress with puffy sleeves, black stockings, and buckle shoes. She writes with a purple feather quill while resting her chin on one hand. On the right, show a cheerful silver-haired halo girl sitting curled up in a cushioned armchair, smiling with bright teal eyes, short messy silver hair, small teal hair clips, and a glowing blue-white halo above her head; she wears a futuristic white-and-black oversized hoodie with teal details, shorts, black socks, chunky white sneakers, and an ID-style tag, holding a clipboard and pen as if taking notes. Include a whimsical speech bubble above her containing exactly 1 small lightbulb icon. The study area should contain exactly 1 wooden desk, 1 wooden chair, 1 cushioned armchair, and 1 small round side table. On and around the desk include exactly 1 brass globe, 1 hanging lantern with a warm candle glow, 1 purple potion flask, 1 ink bottle, 1 feather quill, 1 closed black spellbook on the desk, scattered handwritten papers, and 1 stack of 3 dark books on the floor. Add wall details with exactly 2 pinned parchment notes and exactly 1 hanging trailing vine in a small wall frame. In the background, place exactly 1 low bookshelf holding several books, 1 geometric crystal orb, and 1 potted spiky plant. entries.title: Hand-Drawn Storyboard Previs Sketch
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a rough hand-drawn PREVIS + rescue chase storyboard page in 16:9 horizontal format.

Use an extremely simple 2D previs sketch style:
- stick figures / mannequin silhouettes only
- no facial detail, no costume detail, no anatomy detail
- no texture, no shading, no polished rendering
- black loose sketch lines
- red boxes for camera framing only
- blue arrows for motion / force / breath / direction only
- rough director thumbnails, not concept art
- if unsure, draw less detail, not more

Show 8 numbered panels on one page with slightly irregular but readable placement.

Subject: two close friends racing on skateboards through the sky above the clouds
Environment: bright open sky, fluffy cloud pathways, floating cloud banks, distant sunlight, then a darker storm-cloud zone with wind, rain and lightning
Mood: playful, adventurous, fast, funny, suspenseful for a moment, then uplifting and triumphant
Sequence: during a fun cloud-skate race, one friend accidentally drifts into dangerous storm clouds and loses control, then the other friend makes a last-second rescue

Beats:
1. Wide establishing shot. Two friends on skateboards surf above the clouds, side by side, racing playfully through the sky.
2. Side tracking shot. The race speeds up. One friend leans forward and gains a little lead while the other follows close behind.
3. 3/4 front angle. The leading friend accidentally veers toward a dark storm-cloud area ahead while still focused on the race.
4. Overhead shot. The storm cloud swallows the lead friend. Strong wind arrows, rain and lightning. The skateboard wobbles violently.
5. Close-up / medium action shot. The second friend notices the danger, brakes hard for a split second, then pivots and dives toward the storm.
6. Dynamic low angle. The rescuer shoots into the storm clouds on the skateboard, reaching forward through wind and lightning toward the trapped friend.
7. Hero side shot. Last-second rescue. The rescuer grabs the other friend by the arm or hoodie and pulls them free from the storm cloud just as lightning strikes behind them.
8. Wide payoff shot. Both friends burst back into the sunny clouds, regain balance, keep riding together and continue the race laughing, now side by side.

Use varied camera angles: close-up, wide, low angle, overhead, side profile, rear, 3/4.
Add short handwritten notes near panels.
Maintain clear continuity of subject, props, environment and movement direction.

Focus on staging, camera, motion, timing and continuity.
Prioritize readability over drawing quality.
Avoid detailed illustration, clean UI and infographic design.

Tone target: fun family-animation energy, clear visual storytelling, simple readable action be
entries.description: An extensive and technical prompt for creating professional hand-drawn storyboards with stick figures, camera framing boxes, and motion arrows for cinematic planning.

angle. the leading friend accidentally veers toward a dark storm-cloud area ahead while still focused on the race. 4. overhead shot. the storm cloud swallows the lead friend. strong wind arrows, rain and lightning. the skateboard wobbles violently. 5. close-up / medium action shot. the second friend notices the danger, brakes hard for a split second, then pivots and dives toward the storm. 6. dynamic low angle. the rescuer shoots into the storm clouds on the skateboard, reaching forward through wind and lightning toward the trapped friend. 7. hero side shot. last-second rescue. the rescuer grabs the other friend by the arm or hoodie and pulls them free from the storm cloud just as lightning strikes behind them. 8. wide payoff shot. both friends burst back into the sunny clouds, regain balance, keep riding together and continue the race laughing, now side by side. use varied camera angles: close-up, wide, low angle, overhead, side profile, rear, 3/4. add short handwritten notes near panels. maintain clear continuity of subject, props, environment and movement direction. focus on staging, camera, motion, timing and continuity. prioritize readability over drawing quality. avoid detailed illustration, clean ui and infographic design. tone target: fun family-animation energy, clear visual storytelling, simple readable action be comic / storyboard cinematic

entries.title: Anime Fantasy Ensemble Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime movie poster in a polished modern Japanese fantasy style, with a deep navy, violet, and sunset-orange color palette, cinematic rim lighting, falling red petals, icy crystal shards, and glowing magical particles. The poster features exactly 6 characters arranged in a dense ensemble composition: 1 central black-haired teenage boy in a dark cloak holding a radiant blue crystalline star-shaped weapon at the lower center, his face obscured by a soft square blur; 1 white-haired young man in a white military-style coat on the left, turned in profile, face obscured by a soft square blur; 1 pink-haired young girl in a white academy uniform at the lower left clasping her hands, face obscured by a soft square blur; 1 long dark-blue-haired young woman on the right wearing a black sleeveless outfit and carrying a sword, face visible and looking determined; 1 blond young man in a pale coat at the lower right, face obscured by a soft square blur; and 1 ethereal pale-haired female figure looming behind them at the top, partially hidden, with her face covered by a large muted rectangular block. In the background, show a towering gothic castle or cathedral spire rising into a glowing dusk sky on the right, with dark flowing hair-like shapes and starry night textures sweeping across the upper left. Add exactly 8 text elements: large vertical Japanese slogan on the left reading 世界の真実を、取り戻せ。, a smaller vertical phrase beside it reading この運命に、抗え, vertical Japanese copy on the right reading 絶望が支配する世界で、少年は――, small production copy above the title reading 完全新作オリジナルTVアニメーション, a large luminous Japanese title at the bottom center reading 星灰のレゾナンス, a spaced Roman subtitle below it reading "SEIKAI NO RESONANCE", a release line reading "2025年 TVアニメ放送開始", and tiny staff/cast credits plus a final tagline along the bottom reading "信じる意志が、未来を変える". Use elegant Japanese poster typography, high contrast, layered depth, painterly detail, sharp highlights on fabric and hair, and a premium theatrical key visual composition.

Make the final image look like a dramatic comedic shonen manga splash panel, with crisp outlines, saturated colors, and dynamic impact effects.

entries.title: Hand Drawn Sketch Storyboard Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A professional hand drawn sketch storyboard sheet, pencil and ink illustration style, rough artistic linework, cross-hatching for shadows, loose expressive strokes, monochrome black and white on aged cream/off-white paper texture background, 2x2 grid layout with four equal storyboard panels bordered by thick hand-drawn black ink frames. Top-left panel sketch: abandoned rusted cargo ship at dock, heavy hatching for rust texture, broken railings, algae, seagulls, no humans, dark moody pencil shading, handwritten label below: "SCENE 01 - ABANDONED STATE | Static wide dock shot | Overcast | No humans". Top-right panel sketch: same ship with workers using pressure washers, dynamic water spray motion lines, figures in safety gear, debris piles, handwritten label: "SCENE 02 - CLEANING & STRIP-DOWN | Pressure wash + debris clear | Cloudy daylight". Bottom-left panel sketch: welding sparks as burst star lines, scaffolding structure, worker figures grinding and painting, primer sections with hatching, handwritten label: "SCENE 03 - REPAIR & REBUILD | Welding sparks + scaffolding | Primer applied". Bottom-right panel sketch: fully restored ship, clean hull, workers standing back, golden hour rays as radiating diagonal lines, handwritten label: "SCENE 04 - FULL RESTORATION | Final paint + golden hour | Completion". Bold hand-lettered title at top: "SEA HARVEST VALLETTA - RESTORATION STORYBOARD". Handwritten production notes at bottom: "Cam: Static Wide-Angle Dock | Lens: Wide | Progression: Linear | Style: Photorealistic". Pencil graphite texture, ink pen outlines, rough paper feel, professional film storyboard aesthetic.
