entries.title: ChatGPT App Screenshot With Cute 4-Panel Comic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT mobile app in dark mode, showing a generated image embedded in a conversation. The top header is a black interface with a left menu icon, the word ChatGPT, a small pink heart decoration near the title, and two rounded buttons on the right for edit/share and more options, all with a subtle purple glow. The main generated image is a rounded-corner 2x2 comic grid with exactly 4 panels, numbered 1, 2, 3, and 4 in pink circles. The comic has a dreamy bedtime aesthetic in warm pastel pink, lavender, cream, and soft gold lighting. In every panel, a fluffy white puppy with long droopy ears, a tiny pink bow near one ear, and a gentle emotional face comforts a small gray kitten plush-like character on a pink bed. The room is cozy and childlike, filled with glowing fairy lights, star-shaped bokeh, plush toys, pillows, a crescent moon visible through the window, and soft blankets. Panel 1 shows the white puppy sitting upright beside the gray kitten and holding open a picture book or storybook, both tucked into bed, with several lines of Chinese dialogue text above and small speech bubbles. Panel 2 shows the puppy hugging the kitten more closely under the blanket while talking softly, with a teddy bear or bunny plush visible on the right and Chinese text at the top. Panel 3 shows the kitten looking sadder and more curled up while the puppy wraps around it protectively, with a cup on a bedside surface in the foreground and more Chinese dialogue text. Panel 4 shows both characters lying down sleepily under the blanket, cuddled together, with the puppy's eyes half-closed and the kitten resting, surrounded by warm sparkles and bedtime glow; Chinese dialogue text appears at the top. Along the bottom edge of the comic is a pale caption strip with additional Chinese text and a small bunny icon; at the lower left corner of the image area is a large Chinese button-like label reading 编辑. Beneath the comic inside the chat, there is a long block of Chinese text in white on black background, written like an emotional social-media-style caption with crying-face, moon, sparkle, and heart emojis, spanning multiple short paragraphs. At the very bottom is the ChatGPT message input bar with a plus button on the left, the placeholder text 问问 ChatGPT, a microphone icon, and a purple circular voice button on the right. The overall image should feel like an authentic app screenshot, vertically framed, high-contrast black UI around a cute bedtime four-panel illustration, with Chinese interface text and a polished mobile-product-photo look.

entries.title: Luxury Perfume Advertising Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Generate a high-end perfume commercial storyboard poster, vertical 9:16, with 12 grids (3 columns and 4 rows), cinematic quality, and a consistent French elegant style.

[Header Section]
Brand: CHANEL
Product: COCO MADEMOISELLE
Slogan: Her fragrance speaks before she does

[Overall Style]
Champagne gold and soft pink tones with black contrast, high-end lighting, backlighting combined with Tyndall effect, slight graininess in the air with a scented atmosphere, creating a cinematic and luxurious feel.

[Storyboard Content]

1 (Hook - Morning Awakening)
Title: Morning Light
Visual: Sunlight through curtains, a woman's profile waking in soft light.
Action: Eyes opening slightly, steady breathing.
Mood: Quiet, refined.

2 (Emotion)
Title: Mirror Moment
Visual: She fixes her hair in front of the mirror, soft lighting.
Action: Touching behind the ear.
Mood: Self-appreciation.

3 (Promise)
Title: Choosing the Scent
Visual: Perfume bottle on the vanity, sunlight reflecting.
Action: Hand slowly reaching for the perfume.
Mood: Ritualistic.

4 (Product)
Title: Spraying Moment
Visual: Perfume mist particles, glowing in backlight.
Action: Spraying neck lightly.
Mood: Releasing charm.

5 (Interaction)
Title: Elevator Encounter
Visual: A man in the elevator glances sideways.
Action: She turns her head slightly.
Mood: Subtle attraction.

6 (Detail)
Title: Fragrance Trail
Visual: Moving light in the air, visual fragrance.
Action: Scent mist dispersing.
Mood: Mysterious.

7 (Reveal)
Title: Nightfall
Visual: City night scene, she steps out of a car.
Action: Hem of dress moving slightly.
Mood: Commanding presence.

8 (Gift)
Title: Lingering Gaze
Visual: Someone in the crowd turns to look.
Action: Slow motion capturing the eyes.
Mood: Attracted.

9 (Unboxing)
Title: Exquisite Details
Visual: Close-up of the perfume bottle, glass reflecting light.
Action: Camera slowly zooming in.
Mood: High-end texture.

10 (Showcase)
Title: Elegant Walk
Visual: Walking on the street, flowing city lights.
Action: Confident stride.
Mood: In control.

11 (Identity)
Title: Who is She
Visual: She turns and smiles, blurred background.
Action: Slight side profile.
Mood: Mysterious, confident.

12 (Hero)
Title: Brand Freeze
Visual: Perfume bottle centered, black background, golden light edges.
Action: Perfect stillness.
Mood: Luxurious, classic.

entries.title: Low-Poly Cartoon Stoner Living Room
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A stylized 3D low-poly cartoon scene of a skinny disheveled young man slouching in a plush blue armchair in a wood-paneled room, viewed in a medium-wide shot from slightly below table height. He has messy dark brown dreadlock-like hair, pale skin, droopy half-lidded eyes, and a huge open mouth showing uneven white teeth, with an exaggerated goofy expression. His pose is loose and lazy: one leg stretched far out and resting on the coffee table, the other bent up on the chair, one hand holding a small smoking item near his face with a tiny red ember, the other hand holding a gray remote control. He wears a royal blue T-shirt, mustard yellow shorts, long white socks, and oversized red slide sandals. In front of him is a rectangular wooden coffee table with 3 clearly visible items on top: a pile of bright green buds at the center front, 1 folded white paper beside the pile, and 1 round gray ashtray with dark ash near the right side. The room is simple and warm-toned with vertical wooden wall panels, a dark wood floor, soft indoor lighting, and a small cropped section of framed wall decor in the upper right corner. The overall look is humorous, rough-edged, and handcrafted, like an indie animated sitcom made from painted paper-cutout or low-poly clay textures, with muted shadows, slightly worn surfaces, and a casual stoner-lounge vibe.

entries.title: Censored Manga Schoolgirl Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A black-and-white manga-style illustration of a Japanese high school girl in a sailor uniform, shown from the chest up in side profile, standing by a classroom or school hallway window. She has long straight black hair with glossy inked highlights, loose strands blowing gently to the right as if caught by a breeze. Her face is intentionally obscured by a large centered rectangular gray censor block covering the eyes, nose, and most of the face. She wears a traditional navy sailor uniform with a dark sailor collar, triple stripe trim, long sleeves, and a neatly tied neckerchief. The composition is vertical and tightly cropped, with the girl occupying most of the frame, her head slightly bowed and posture calm, introspective, and melancholic. The background shows 1 window frame, 1 exterior railing, and 1 simplified school building structure rendered with thin architectural linework. Use clean pen-and-ink line art, high-contrast shading, halftone screentone textures, delicate crosshatching, sparse minimalist background detail, and elegant manga panel aesthetics. Monochrome only, white paper background, subtle cinematic lighting, emotional slice-of-life atmosphere, highly detailed hair and fabric folds.

entries.title: Cute Ferrets Cuddling in Pet Bed
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cute hand-drawn animal illustration in a soft watercolor and colored-pencil storybook style, viewed from directly above. Two ferrets are curled together snugly inside a square pet bed with high padded sides. The left ferret is a pale cream color with fluffy fur, a pink nose, round glossy black eyes, and a gentle sweet expression; its long body curves around the other ferret protectively. The right ferret is a sable ferret with a dark brown body, warm tan underfur, a cream face mask, pink nose, and bright black eyes, smiling slightly with tiny teeth visible and one small paw raised near its chest. Their bodies form a cozy spiral composition, touching cheek to cheek. The bed has a soft light gray inner cushion and dark charcoal-black outer sides, with visible fabric texture and softly shaded folds in each corner. Around them are 4 pink doodle hearts and 4 sparkle or emphasis marks in a playful sticker-like style, adding a kawaii mood. Use a warm off-white paper background with subtle beige wash, delicate textured edges, fine fur detail, soft lighting, charming pastel accents, and an overall adorable affectionate feel.
entries.description: This generates a cozy top-down kawaii illustration of two cuddling ferrets in a padded bed, ideal for cute animal art, stickers, or social media posts.

entries.title: Blue Pen Cringe Manga Battle Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hand-drawn manga page on off-white notebook paper, created entirely with rough blue ballpoint pen lines, messy teenage doodle energy, uneven panel borders, scratchy shading, exaggerated action effects, and intentionally amateur "cringe black-history notebook" style. The page has 6 panels total arranged vertically: 1 wide top panel, 1 wide second panel, 1 wide third panel, 1 narrow horizontal impact panel, and 2 small bottom panels side by side. In the top panel, a round cute hero resembling a pink puffball swordsman crouches dramatically at left with a long sword planted upward behind him, glaring intensely, while a delinquent-looking or office-worker man with curly hair stands at right in a shirt, tie, and slacks, hands in pockets, on a barren rocky plain with sketchy clouds and speed-scratch background. In the second panel, the round swordsman leaps diagonally through the air with the sword raised, surrounded by vertical motion lines; large handwritten Japanese sound-effect text fills the panel with exactly 2 text groups: "断タネ" on the left and "超時空" on the right. In the third panel, the hero flies low from left to right and releases a piercing energy slash or scream-like attack toward the man on the right; across the panel is 1 giant handwritten Japanese shout: "ズギャアアアン!!!". In the fourth narrow panel, the entire frame is filled with smoke, impact scribbles, and explosive chaos, with 1 large handwritten Japanese effect: "ドォォォン!!!". In the bottom-left panel, after the smoke clears, the man is unharmed and casually catches or stops the tiny sword between two fingers near his face; a tiny handwritten caption appears near the fingers reading "ピタ...". In the bottom-right panel, the round hero appears in close-up, shocked and screaming with huge eyes, sweat, and dark streaked shading on the face; along the right side is 1 vertical handwritten Japanese reaction: "なっ!?". Keep the faces on the human character obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. Overall tone: comedic overdramatic battle manga parody, middle-school notebook doodle, chaotic composition, monochrome blue-ink pen sketch, no polished digital rendering, visible scribbles and imperfect anatomy.
entries.description: A rough blue-ballpoint parody manga page showing an overdramatic cute swordsman attack ending in a comedic failure, ideal for recreating nostalgic black-history notebook doodles.

entries.title: Retro Anime Kotatsu Family Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A nostalgic anime illustration set in a traditional Japanese tatami room during winter, viewed from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle. In the center is a low wooden kotatsu table covered with a thick brown patchwork quilt, with 2 floor cushions visible on the tatami. Around the table sit 3 people: a young woman with long straight teal blue hair and a pink sleeveless dress with a white collar, sitting at the far side of the table and peeling a mandarin orange; a second young woman with short bobbed purple hair, wearing a pale yellow top, blue skirt, and a white apron tied in a bow at the back, seated in the right foreground; and a small boy in a white shirt with blue sleeves and blue shorts, kneeling on the left and crawling partway under the kotatsu to warm himself. On top of the table are 3 green-yellow plastic bottles labeled "mello Yello", a round woven tray holding 5 whole mandarins, and 1 peeled mandarin with loose orange peels spread on the tabletop. In the left background stands a chunky 1980s CRT television with woodgrain side panels on a low TV stand, with a silver video deck or console beneath it. The TV screen shows a blue title card with white Japanese credits and a glowing pale circular shape. Behind the characters are 1 shoji sliding door on the left and 2 beige fusuma sliding doors on the right wall. Warm indoor lighting, cozy family atmosphere, retro Showa-era Japanese home, detailed hand-drawn cel-anime style with soft shading, clean linework, and slightly faded vintage colors.
entries.description: A cozy vintage anime-style winter interior showing three family members around a kotatsu in a traditional Japanese room, ideal for nostalgic slice-of-life illustrations.

entries.title: Minimal Stick Figure Pose Sketch
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A very minimal rough black line sketch on a plain light gray background, showing a crude stick-figure-like human pose drawn with uneven hand-drawn strokes. The figure has 1 oval head near the upper center, 1 small dot eye, and 1 short curved facial line suggesting a simple nose or smile. A single vertical line runs down from the head as the neck and torso. There are 2 arms: the left arm is extended widely out to the left in a large curved arc, and the right arm bends outward to the right with a drooping forearm. The lower body is only partially indicated, with 1 central line continuing downward and 1 short curved line on the lower left suggesting a bent leg. The pose feels loose, abstract, and gestural, like a quick pose specification doodle, with lots of empty space and no shading, color, clothing, or detailed anatomy.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Machine Angel Over Megacity
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A colossal machine angel girl hovering above a dense futuristic megacity at night, viewed from a dramatic low angle so she dominates the skyline like a divine apparition. She has a sleek feminine humanoid body made of white, silver, and graphite biomechanical armor with exposed segmented joints, intricate filigree machinery, and glowing cyan energy lines embedded through the torso, hips, thighs, knees, and chest. Her face is smooth and mostly featureless like a blank mask, partially shadowed, with a luminous cyan visor across the eyes and a delicate metallic halo-crown or antennaed headpiece. She has exactly 2 enormous outstretched wings, each composed of layered metallic feathers in black, gray, and silver, with exactly 1 glowing circular cyan techno-emblem embedded near the center of each wing, for a total of 2 wing emblems. Her pose is calm, solemn, and godlike, arms relaxed at her sides, legs extended downward as if descending in silence. Surround her with heavy rain, mist, floating particles, and dramatic storm clouds split by bright celestial light behind her, creating a sacred cyberpunk atmosphere. Below her is a sprawling vertical city of dark skyscrapers packed with thousands of tiny window lights, haze, steam, and wet reflective surfaces. Include exactly 4 visible flying vehicles or drones scattered through the midair cityspace. Add illuminated billboards and neon signage with East Asian urban-future styling, including one large red vertical sign on the left reading "警戒" with small English text "ALERT", one smaller red sign reading "緊急警報", one huge right-side billboard reading "天使, 降臨。", and exactly 2 billboards that depict the same angelic machine figure. Color palette: cold steel gray, midnight blue, black, white, and electric cyan, with sparse red neon accents. Style: ultra-detailed cinematic sci-fi illustration, dystopian cyberpunk-meets-biblical angel imagery, painterly yet crisp, dense atmospheric effects, epic scale, high contrast, rain-soaked, awe-inspiring, haunting, and majestic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic cinematic sci-fi key visual of a giant biomechanical angel descending over a rainy dystopian city, ideal for concept art, posters, and album-cover style imagery.

entries.title: Mixed-Reality Comic Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Convert the subject in this image into a 4:5 mixed-reality transformation with a fully realistic background and a realistically rendered face, combined with bold cartoon apparel, hand-drawn comic fire effects, and playful cartoon companions. Use a live-action hybrid composition with the subject preserved as the clear identity anchor while the stylized elements read as designed overlays inside one coherent scene.

CHARACTER:
Preserve the subject's recognizable facial identity, hair state, and facial hair pattern if presented exactly, then re-render the face with realistic live-action AAA structure, natural skin response, and clean hybrid integration. Ensure high brightness, low contrast, medium saturation, low sharpness details. Dress the figure in exaggerated cartoon clothing with simplified seams, and graphic trims that feel intentionally designed rather than photographed. Add funny cartoon characters as supporting visual accents with expressive silhouettes, rounded forms, and lively attitude, while keeping the subject as the primary focal figure. The body should remain human and believable, but the clothing and accessories should carry comic exaggeration and strong graphic personality.

FACE & ANATOMY:
Keep the subject's core facial proportions, expression logic, and likeness intact, rendered with realistic but controlled hybrid facial detail. Use natural eye depth, believable skin, while avoiding any plastic toy look or full caricature distortion. The body should read as live-action proportioned, with the stylization concentrated in the outfit, props, and surrounding comic elements.

ENVIRONMENT:
Restyle the exact same environment as a realistic setting with clear depth and natural perspective. Build the scene as a mixed-reality stage where comic fire drawings, playful animated accents, and graphic energy bursts sit visibly inside the real space without breaking spatial coherence. Keep the background believable, structured, and physically present, with the stylized elements integrated as deliberate designed interventions.

RENDER PIPELINE:
Use a mixed-reality rendering pipeline that combines realistic plate-like environment treatment with stylized 2D graphic overlays and hybrid character compositing. Preserve live-action shading on the face and background, then layer cartoon clothing, comic effect shapes, and illustrated fire forms with crisp contour control and clean edge separation. The final finish must feel like a polished real-world composite with intentional animated design language, not a pure cartoon render and not a standard photograph.

COLOR & LIGHT:
Use clean low contrast, and bright comic-highlight behavior against a realistic ambient base. Shadows remain natural in the background and face, while the stylized garments and effects carry punchy neon-like energy and high chroma separation.

entries.title: Manga Pillar Anime Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body anime character poster on a vertical canvas, designed like a dramatic manga-themed hero introduction. At the top left, large bold Japanese title text reads "マンガ柱" with small furigana "ばしら" above it, and beneath it a black nameplate with pink trim reads "漫画咲" with small furigana above the kanji. In the center stands an energetic teenage girl anime swordswoman, facing forward in a confident wide stance, smiling brightly with an open mouth and sparkling eyes. She has very long voluminous twin-tail hair in pastel pink, with multicolored streaks of cyan, yellow, and lavender woven through the hair, and many decorative hair clips and ribbons, including small manga-themed tags. Her eye color is large and vivid pink-purple with glossy highlights. She wears a dark navy or black demon-slayer-inspired uniform with gold buttons, a white belt, loose tucked pants, white leg wraps printed with manga sound effects and doodles, and black platform sandals with pink straps. Over the uniform she wears a flowing haori whose entire outer surface is covered in black-and-white manga panels and graphic inked artwork, while the lining is bright pink. She holds 2 katanas: one raised across her shoulders in her right hand and one lowered in her left hand. Both swords have manga-decorated sheaths and hilts with pink accents, and one sheath includes bold Japanese lettering. Add small star-shaped sparkles around her. Surround her with flying loose manga pages and clipped comic panels, scattered diagonally across the composition as if blown by wind. Include 3 large manga sound-effect texts in pink and black: one "ドン!" at lower left, one "ドン!" near the lower right leg, and one "ドン" on the right side of the haori. Also include 2 speech-bubble callouts: one spiky bubble at upper right containing "!!" and one vertical spiky bubble at left containing Japanese dialogue. The background is a soft pink-and-white halftone and ink-splash pattern with dynamic speed lines radiating inward, giving the feel of a manga cover splash page. High-detail polished anime illustration, crisp linework, expressive face, glossy hair, fashionable fantasy styling, playful heroic attitude, vibrant pink-centric palette, poster-quality composition.

entries.title: Luxury Perfume Storyboard Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please create a high-end perfume advertisement 'Atmosphere' storyboard poster, vertical 9:16, 3 columns x 4 rows, totaling 12 shots. Brand name: Jiguang English name: JIGUANG Product: Eau de Parfum Slogan: Smell yourself, glow slowly. Overall white background with slight premium paper texture, centered title 'Jiguang' at the top, with 'JIGUANG · Eau de Parfum' and the slogan below. In the middle are 12 storyboard frames, the upper part of each being a cinematic image and the lower part containing a Chinese description. Visual style: cool soft white tones, light grey-purple, pale mist purple, soft white morning light, white curtains, light purple bouquets, fragrant mist, glass highlights, quiet white space, high-end perfume advertising texture. The protagonist is an elegant Chinese female model with loose dark hair in a bun, wearing a white or ivory light silk morning gown. The product is a transparent glass perfume bottle with lavender liquid, labeled 'Jiguang / JIGUANG'. Order of 12 shots: First Light → Stillness → Scent Arising → Light Mist → Diffusion → Into the Heart → Unfolding → Empty Space → Settling Scent → Self-Presentation → Resonance → Main Shot. The whole piece should look like a genuine high-end perfume commercial storyboard, not a simple collage.

entries.title: Moonlit Gothic Cannon Maiden
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic dark fantasy anime illustration in a towering vertical composition, viewed from a low angle. A lone ethereal warrior woman stands on the head of a gigantic roaring beast statue or slain monster in the foreground, her pose powerful and steady as she braces an enormous gothic cannon-lance or cathedral-like pillar weapon on her shoulder. The weapon is impossibly tall, blackened iron and stone with ornate spires and filigree, wrapped in glowing red chains, and its top is exploding with violent crimson fire, sparks, and shards. Behind her fills a colossal full moon with a luminous circular crosshair-like sigil etched across its surface, casting cold silver light through turbulent clouds. The woman has very long flowing platinum white hair streaming hard to the right in the wind, and wears layered torn black-and-white ceremonial armor robes with feathered and tattered textures, mixing gothic knight, fallen angel, and priestess aesthetics. Her face is mostly obscured, making her feel mysterious and solemn. Surrounding her are ruined gothic cathedral towers, broken flying buttresses, shattered stained-glass fragments, drifting debris, and distant spires fading into a stormy moonlit sky. The palette is desaturated blue-gray, charcoal, silver, and violet, punctuated by intense red glow from the chains and muzzle flare. Rendered as ultra-detailed, high-contrast, painterly concept art with dynamic motion, cinematic lighting, sharp atmospheric perspective, intricate architectural destruction, and a slightly gritty, rough-textured finish that feels intentionally crunchy and dramatic. Emphasize epic scale, apocalyptic grandeur, wind-swept fabric, glowing embers, and a tragic holy-war atmosphere.

entries.title: Anime Mahjong Loss Consolation Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A warm, cozy anime-style illustration set inside a traditional Japanese mahjong parlor with polished wood walls, shoji-style windows, bookshelves, framed calligraphy, bottles, flowers, and soft amber ceiling lights. In the center foreground, a sad teenage boy with messy dark navy-black hair and tired eyes sits hunched on a chair, wearing a loose dark indigo hoodie and black pants, holding a ranking sheet close to his chest. The sheet prominently reads "11位" at the top, with a vertical list of placements beneath it and the bottom line reading "11位 神代トウマ". He looks embarrassed and defeated, with small sweat drops on his face and 4 vertical blue stress marks above his head. Behind him stands a cheerful young woman with wavy medium-length chestnut-brown hair, a white flower hairpin, and a cream ribbed sweater, smiling warmly and placing one hand on his shoulder. She wears a name tag that reads "雀和ソリ". Her speech bubble says "トウマくん、ドンマイだよ〜! 次はきっとツイてるよ♡". To the left sits 1 young man with short dark hair in a white shirt, leaning in with one hand near his face, speaking supportively; his speech bubble says "内容は悪くなかったよ。 オーラスの押し引きもよかったし。". To the right sits 1 young woman in a dark blazer over a white shirt, with neat brown hair tied back, gently touching the central boy's shoulder and speaking calmly; her speech bubble says "結果より内容が大事よ。 焦らず一歩ずつ進んでいきましょう。". Add 1 small muttering bubble near the central boy that says "うっ...". In the upper left, include a hanging wooden sign decorated with cherry blossoms that reads "雀和荘 ようこそ!". In the upper right, place 1 framed scoreboard on the wall titled "本日の麻雀結果" listing 4 ranking lines for 1位, 2位, 3位, 4位 as dotted blanks, and a final line reading "11位 神代トウマ". In the foreground, show 1 green mahjong table with visible rows of mahjong tiles, including a standing tile labeled "中", a small wooden marker labeled "ドラ", and 1 ceramic cup printed with "雀和荘". On the right front corner, add a small snack setup with 3 boxed sweets or candy packages, 1 bowl of snacks, and 1 small potted plant. Use a soft painterly anime aesthetic, detailed fabric folds, expressive eyes, rich warm lighting, gentle emotional contrast between encouragement and disappointment, and a polished visual-novel illustration feel.
entries.description: This prompt generates a warm indoor anime illustration of a defeated mahjong player being comforted by friends and staff, useful for visual novel scenes or emotional character art.

entries.title: Rainy Alley Grim Reaper Horror Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark cinematic horror scene in a narrow rain-soaked urban alley at night, lit almost entirely by dim blue-black ambient light and a warm vertical Japanese hotel sign in the background. The sign glows on the left side and reads ホテル, with smaller vertical text beneath it, while distant city lights blur into soft bokeh through the heavy rain. In the foreground on the right, a young woman sits on the flooded ground with her back against a wet wall, knees bent and head hanging forward in exhaustion or despair. She has soaked shoulder-length dark hair plastered to her face and neck, a black wet jacket, a short plaid skirt, and chunky black lace-up combat boots. Her skin and clothing glisten with rain, and the shallow water on the ground reflects the neon sign and scattered highlights. Looming behind her in the center-left is a tall hooded grim reaper silhouette, draped in long ragged black robes that dissolve into shredded strands, holding one large curved scythe arcing above its head. Keep the reaper mostly in silhouette with only a faint rim light so it feels ghostly and threatening. The overall composition should be vertical, with 2 visible figures total: 1 seated woman and 1 reaper apparition. Style: hyper-realistic cinematic horror, moody noir atmosphere, high contrast, extremely dark shadows, wet textures, volumetric rain, reflective pavement, subtle filmic grain, ominous tension, photoreal lighting. Color palette: near-black, deep navy, muted charcoal, and warm amber highlights from the sign. No gore, no extra people, no daylight, no bright colors, no text overlays except the distant hotel sign.
entries.description: A moody cinematic horror image of a soaked woman in a neon-lit alley with a looming grim reaper, suited for dark thriller posters or atmospheric AI art.

entries.title: Neon Anime Poster with Dual-Protagonist Mood
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical anime key visual poster for an original TV series titled ナイトコード:リベラシオン, with the English subtitle "Nightcode: Liberation" placed directly beneath the large Japanese logo at the top center. The composition shows 2 main characters standing back to back in a neon cyber city at night. On the left is a slim teenage boy in side profile facing left, with messy black hair, pale skin, sharp violet eyes, and a serious expression, wearing a dark high-collar school-uniform-style jacket. On the right foreground is a slim teenage girl shown from the chest up, facing slightly right but turning away from the boy; her face is obscured by a large soft-edged rectangular blur block, but her body and hair are fully visible. She has extremely long split-color hair, half pastel pink and half dark charcoal gray, styled in loose flowing lengths with a side ponytail on the dark side, and she wears a white sailor school blouse with navy trim, oversized sleeves, a large hot-pink ribbon bow, and a dark pleated skirt. The background is a dense futuristic nighttime skyline with glowing windows, magenta and cyan city lights, haze, lens flares, bokeh, and subtle star-like particles, creating a moody urban fantasy atmosphere. Use a high-contrast palette of black, indigo, violet, cyan, and neon pink, with halftone dot textures in the upper-right and lower-left corners. Add stylized Japanese promotional copy throughout the poster: a short tagline in small text along the top, a vertical slogan on the right side, a circular badge on the left reading 今夏 7月 放送開始!, a left column of staff credits in small Japanese text, a lower-left cast block, a bold large tagline across the bottom reading 二重人格×魔法×青春=偽りの救世主、開幕。, and small official website and social handle text near the lower right. The logo should be luminous, elegant, and slightly fractured, with a supernatural cyber-magic feel. Render in polished modern anime poster style, cinematic lighting, crisp line art, glossy shading, premium promotional visual design, highly detailed hair and fabric folds, with the central mood of dual identity, magic, adolescence, and a false savior emerging in the neon night.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese anime promotional poster for a supernatural cyber-school series, ideal for key visuals, mock TV anime announcements, or fictional franchise branding.

entries.title: Dual-Personality Cinematic Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-quality vertical split-screen cinematic poster with a glowing vertical divide down the middle. Left side (lighter, more vulnerable personality): James McAvoy as a soft, anxious, intellectual version of Kevin from the movie Split. Neat button-up shirt, gentle expression, warm lighting, slightly nervous but intelligent eyes, subtle time particles floating around him, clean minimalist background with faint clock faces. Right side (dark, intense personality): James McAvoy as the powerful, menacing "The Beast" alter from Split. Shirtless or torn clothing, muscular and primal pose, intense glowing eyes, dramatic dark lighting with strong shadows, cracked concrete and broken chains, raw powerful energy. Bold text at the bottom in fractured futuristic font: "Split - One Mind, Many Realities". Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic color grading, moody thriller atmosphere, 8k quality.

entries.title: Anime School Spy Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic anime-style Japanese movie poster set in the middle of a modern downtown street canyon under bright afternoon sunlight, with tall office buildings on both sides, dense overhead utility wires, vertical Japanese shop and company signs, and a cinematic vanishing point down the road. In the foreground, two high school girls stand full-body in confident hero poses, framed low-angle like blockbuster poster key art. The girl on the left is slightly taller, with very long black hair flowing in the wind, styled half-up in a bun with a white flower hair ornament, arms crossed, serious and composed expression, wearing a navy school blazer with gold buttons, white shirt, red necktie, and a red plaid pleated skirt. She has bare legs and shiny black loafers. The girl on the right has a short light-brown bob haircut, a softer but determined expression, and holds up a peace sign with her right hand. She wears a matching navy blazer, white shirt, red tie, and red plaid pleated skirt, with navy knee-high socks and brown loafers. Make both characters elegant, stylish, and slightly idealized in polished contemporary anime illustration with crisp linework, rich cel-shading, glossy highlights, and subtle wind movement in hair and clothing. Use strong contrast, blue sky with scattered white clouds, warm sunlit rim light, long street shadows, and a high-budget action-drama poster mood. Add large layered title typography across the lower center, mixing Japanese and English in a bold distressed blockbuster style. Include 1 Japanese tagline above the main title reading "一命と絆とスパイー". Include 1 large Japanese main title reading "私立あかつき学園" with white, red, and cyan-blue emphasis. Include 1 English subtitle block below and overlapping it reading "THE SPY WHO FORGOT THE BONDS" in bold white condensed letters with gritty texture, with the word "SPY" especially large and dominant. The overall composition should feel like a fictional action-school-spy film poster, vertical format, highly polished, dynamic, and theatrical.
entries.description: A cinematic vertical anime poster showing two schoolgirls in a Japanese city street with bold bilingual title text, ideal for fake movie poster or promotional key art generation.

entries.title: Skincare Commercial Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a clean, bright skincare commercial storyboard in a 16:9 layout with 9 panels. Use soft natural lighting, minimal aesthetic, and a fresh, airy mood with white and pastel tones. The main character is a young woman with soft makeup and styled hair, wearing light, elegant clothing. The setting is a modern, sunlit interior with large windows and a calm atmosphere. No text or subtitles anywhere.
Show a clear story flow: she starts at her desk looking slightly tired or concerned, then a close-up of her face showing dry or dull skin. She discovers a clear skincare bottle and gently presents it. Show a close-up of the liquid pouring onto her hand, followed by her applying it to her face. After use, her skin looks hydrated, glowing, and smooth. Transition to her feeling confident and refreshed, walking in a bright, clean space with soft breeze and flowing elements. End with a calm product beauty shot on a minimal surface, then a final frame of her smiling softly at the camera while holding the product.
Focus on natural expressions, glowing skin, and a transformation from dull to fresh. Include cinematic close-ups, soft focus, light reflections, and subtle sparkles to enhance the clean beauty feel. Keep everything elegant, minimal, and visually soothing with no branding text.
entries.description: Generates a 9-panel storyboard for a skincare commercial, focusing on product use, transformation, and airy visual flow.

entries.title: Dark Fantasy Bureau Role Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base character sheet, redesign the same male student into a fictional Japanese dark-bureaucratic fantasy worldbuilding dossier. Keep his core body type, hairstyle, and face structure consistent, but replace the school uniform concept with 3 official role variants presented as a professional concept-art document on aged white paper with thin grid lines, black ink, muted grayscale, and deep red accent marks. Create a 3-column layout labeled 01, 02, and 03, each showing full-body front, side, and back views of the same character reimagined for a different job. Role 01 should be a tax collection officer in a long black coat with hanging paperwork, armband, shoulder straps, leather belts, and a compact case. Role 02 should be an arcane audit scribe with glasses, layered robe-like outerwear over formal clothes, dangling seals and inspection documents, a ledger or clipboard, writing tools, and a briefcase. Role 03 should be a sealed artifact courier with a military-style cap, face covering, heavier protective coat, straps, tags, and a large transport case plus a backpack-like cargo unit. Add vertical Japanese side notes beside each role, dense bureaucratic labels, official insignias, stamps, serial numbers, and small English sublabels for the role names. At the bottom, include 3 equipment sections, one under each column: for role 01 show exactly 3 items - a hard case, an official stamp, and 2 paper forms; for role 02 show exactly 4 items - a black device/ledger panel, a set of 4 pens, a tray of 6 seal sticks or cartridges, and 1 blue handbook; for role 03 show exactly 4 items - a transport chest, 2 paper tags/forms, 3 hanging sealing tools, and 2 circular sealing tools plus 1 document card. Include an additional footer strip with exactly 4 color swatches, exactly 3 insignia emblems, a notice block, and publication/record information boxes. Overall style: high-end anime concept sheet mixed with occult government archive design, meticulous costume detailing, restrained composition, realistic textile rendering, and a serious institutional mood.
entries.description: This prompt transforms a simple anime character turnaround into a detailed fictional government-uniform concept dossier for worldbuilding, costume design, or prop-heavy character presentation.

entries.title: Anime Sky Fantasy Key Visual
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished anime fantasy key visual in a wide cinematic composition, showing a serene young heroine on the right half of the frame against a vast sky kingdom. She is a beautiful teenage girl with long silver-white hair, large clear blue eyes, pale skin, and a calm, slightly wistful smile as she turns her head back toward the viewer over her shoulder. Her hair is very long and windblown, with soft layered bangs and a side ornament: 1 blue crystal hairpiece with silver filigree and trailing blue ribbons. She wears an elegant white-and-blue fantasy outfit with 4 visible main garment elements: 1 white hooded cape draped over her shoulders, 1 deep blue inner dress or tunic, 1 ornate silver armored shoulder and upper sleeve section with engraved details, and 1 blue gemstone brooch set at the chest. The background is a luminous high-altitude fantasy world filled with bright clouds, blue sky, and floating islands; include 3 prominent floating architectural elements: 1 large central floating landmass with castle structures, 1 tall narrow spire emerging from the lower left clouds, and 1 distant towered island near the center. In the upper left sky, depict 1 majestic white dragon with wings spread, flying diagonally above the title area. Add a large stylized Japanese title on the left side with metallic silver and glowing blue typography, reading 白竜の翼と青き記憶, with decorative wing motifs integrated into the lettering. Beneath it, add 2 smaller lines of subtitle text in Japanese, centered left: 第1話 and 白銀の空隙. Scatter a few white glowing feathers or petals in the air. Use a cool palette of white, silver, and luminous azure, highly detailed linework, soft cel shading, crisp highlights, ethereal lighting, and the feel of a premium light novel cover or fantasy anime promotional poster.

entries.title: Fantasy GPT Image Skills Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A richly detailed fantasy workshop illustration in a wide cinematic banner format, crowded with playful young apprentice characters gathered around an elderly master in the center. The scene has a magical artisan studio atmosphere with warm amber lighting, glowing runes, floating icons, scrolls, framed artworks, and shelves full of tools and curios. At the top center, a dramatic black brushstroke banner carries large hand-painted gold lettering reading GPTImage2Skill. In the middle sits an old sage-like teacher with white hair in a topknot and a long white beard, wearing layered tan and gray robes, seated calmly on a low stool as if mentoring the group. Around him are 8 chibi-style apprentices with exaggerated expressive faces, black hair tied in small topknots, colorful traditional outfits in purple, green, red, orange, yellow, blue, and teal, each proudly presenting a different creation. Count and show exactly 8 apprentices plus the central master. On the far left, one purple-clad child kneels and holds a framed anime-style action portrait with electric blue effects. Above left, one green-clad child raises a drink poster featuring a matcha beverage and East Asian typography. Near lower left-center, one apprentice in green presents a clean schematic page with small UI-like boxes and diagrams. Near center-right, one orange-red-clad child holds a realistic luxury perfume bottle product shot. To the right of that, one yellow-orange child presents a realistic bird photograph with soft bokeh. Upper center-right, one cheerful child lifts a tablet or framed mobile app screen showing a clean interface. Far right lower side, one blue-clad child displays a dark-themed analytics dashboard full of charts and graphs. On the upper right, a tall regal figure in ornate white-and-gold robes and crown-like headpiece stands holding 2 framed fantasy artworks: one darker landscape scene and one moonlit city or temple scene. Include exactly 2 artworks in this upper-right display. Scatter glowing floating UI-style icons around the room; include exactly 6 floating icon/sign elements: a puzzle-piece icon, a network-node icon, a code window, a cube icon, a glowing sign reading "PLUGIN" beside a puzzle icon, and a glowing star sign reading "SKILL". Also add 2 magical scroll banners with glowing edges, one near the top right and one across the bottom foreground, both covered in stylized code-like colored lines. The environment should feel like a blend of ancient atelier, fantasy library, and creative AI studio, with stone arches, wooden beams, distant mountainous scenery visible through openings, and golden magical particles swirling through the air. Highly polished digital illustration, dense composition, whimsical epic tone, saturated jewel colors, dramatic rim lighting, crisp detail, painterly textures, fantasy promotional poster quality.

entries.title: Retro Pop-Art Comic Strip
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A 4-panel comic strip in bold retro Sunday funnies / 1980s pop-art style, thick black outlines, halftone textures, vibrant saturated colors (hot pink, cyan, yellow, teal), dynamic comic lettering. Main character: A stylish young woman with wavy mint-green hair, wearing oversized black sunglasses and a pink polka-dot strapless top. Confident expression, glossy lips, dramatic lighting. Secondary character: A cute chibi-style character in a full penguin costume (dark blue body, white belly, yellow beak hood), big sparkling eyes, small body, playful and mischievous vibe. Panel 1 (close-up, bold intro): Zoomed-in portrait of the woman, hair slightly blowing. Bright comic burst background. Text: "THE WIND IS NO MATCH FOR MY SHADES!" Speech bubble: "Bring it, breeze." Panel 2 (beach chaos begins): Beach setting with strong wind-palm trees bending, hat, towel, and drink flying. Woman standing confidently. Penguin character appears at the side. Text box: "BEACH DAY!" Speech bubble: "Ha! Nice try, wind." Small penguin text: "awk!" Panel 3 (wind intensifies): Stronger gusts-trash can tipping, seagull mid-air, debris flying. Woman still composed, hair dramatically flowing. Penguin laughing mischievously. Text box: "STRONGER!" Speech bubbles: "Is that all?" / penguin: "hee hee!" Panel 4 (final punchline): Reveal a big electric fan wearing sunglasses blasting air dramatically. Woman surprised. Penguin proudly next to fan. Text box: "ULTIMATE BOSS." Speech bubbles: "Wait... no!" Big comic text: "YOU GOT BLOWN AWAY!" Caption at bottom: "RESPECT THE FAN."
entries.description: A 4-panel comic strip prompt in a 1980s retro pop-art style featuring a mint-green haired woman and a chibi penguin.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的其他条目《Retro Pop-Art Comic Strip》。 关键词：portrait、beach。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。
entries.searchText: retro pop-art comic strip a 4-panel comic strip prompt in a 1980s retro pop-art style featuring a mint-green haired woman and a chibi penguin. a 4-panel comic strip in bold retro sunday funnies / 1980s pop-art style, thick black outlines, halftone textures, vibrant saturated colors (hot pink, cyan, yellow, teal), dynamic comic lettering. main character: a stylish young woman with wavy mint-green hair, wearing oversized black sunglasses and a pink polka-dot strapless top. confident expression, glossy lips, dramatic lighting. secondary character: a cute chibi-style character in a full penguin costume (dark blue body, white belly, yellow beak hood), big sparkling eyes, small body, playful and mischievous vibe. panel 1 (close-up, bold intro): zoomed-in portrait of the woman, hair slightly blowing. bright comic burst background. text: "the wind is no match for my shades!" speech bubble: "bring it, breeze." panel 2 (beach chaos begins): beach setting with strong wind-palm trees bending, hat, towel, and drink flying. woman standing confidently. penguin character appears at the side. text box: "beach day!" speech bubble: "ha! nice try, wind." small penguin text: "awk!" panel 3 (wind intensifies): stronger gusts-trash can tipping, seagull mid-air, debris flying. woman still composed, hair dramatically flowing. penguin laughing mischievously. text box: "stronger!" speech bubbles: "is that all?" / penguin: "hee hee!" panel 4 (final punchline): reveal a big electric fan wearing sunglasses blasting air dramatically. woman surprised. penguin proudly next to fan. text box: "ultimate boss." speech bubbles: "wait... no!" big comic text: "you got blown away!" caption at bottom: "respect the fan." comic / storyboard portrait beach

entries.title: Dark Fantasy Inner Monster Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark fantasy gothic poster in a vertical composition, painted in a highly detailed anime-inspired style with dramatic lighting and rich texture. At the center is a beautiful young woman with long straight silver-white hair, pale skin, and an elegant, calm but dangerous presence. Her face is mostly obscured in shadow and mystery. She wears an ornate black-and-deep-blue crystalline dress with lace, feathered and jagged organic details, semi-transparent flowing sleeves, and glowing blue highlights across the bodice and collar, as if infused with magic. Her right hand is raised slightly with an open gesture, while her left hand rests lower near her waist. Surrounding and partly growing from her are luminous blue butterflies and shard-like petals, creating a sense of transformation and corruption. Behind her looms a gigantic monstrous entity made of darkness, ink, smoke, and cosmic texture, with exactly 7 glowing blue eyes visible and a huge fanged grin packed with sharp icy-blue teeth. The creature feels Lovecraftian, predatory, and intimate, curling around her like a guardian, curse, or inner demon. The palette is dominated by black, midnight navy, indigo, and electric blue, with sparkling highlights like stars or wet paint splatter. Add a decorative antique silver filigree border in all 4 corners and along the edges, making it feel like a sinister book cover or exhibition poster. Place large Japanese title text at the top: 私の中のバケモノ. Add 8 blocks of vertical Japanese copy around the figure, 4 on the left and 4 on the right, in elegant white Mincho-style type. Left side text blocks, top to bottom: 「創造の源、すべてを壊し、すべてを生む。」, 「正しさよりも、心が動く瞬間を信じる。」, 「美しいものに飢えている。」, 「静けさの中で、世界をかき混ぜる。」. Right side text blocks, top to bottom: 「感情を深く、人の痛みも、希望も、まるごと抱きしめる。」, 「枠を壊し、誰も見たことのない景色を描きたい。」, 「怖い、危ない、それでも止められない。」, plus a short atmospheric handwritten-style accent near the mid-right edge. At the lower center, add a large Japanese question line: これは、力?それとも、呪い?. At the very bottom, add a smaller Japanese line: 私の中のバケモノは、私だけの物語を待っている。. Make the whole image feel obsessive, beautiful, unsettling, and emotionally intense, like a high-end dark art poster about inner monsters and creative power.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic gothic anime-style poster of a silver-haired woman and a blue-eyed eldritch monster, ideal for moody art campaigns, book-cover concepts, or social media design pieces.

entries.title: Epic Momotaro Fantasy Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Japanese light-novel cover illustration in high-detail anime fantasy style, square composition, showing a heroic ensemble posed for battle in a ruined mountain pass at sunset with cherry blossoms blowing through the air. The scene centers on Momotaro, a young black-haired male warrior in glossy red samurai armor, crouched in the foreground and gripping a katana diagonally across his body. Beside him in the front-right foreground is a black-haired young woman in matching red armor with a high ponytail, also drawing a katana in a dynamic combat-ready pose. Around them stand 5 additional companions for a total of 7 characters: 1 brown-haired short-haired girl at front-left holding a short blade, 1 silver-haired angelic woman at upper-left with large white wings and a drawn bow, 1 tall red-haired warrior at top-center carrying a large weapon over the shoulder, 1 long straight black-haired shrine-maiden-like girl at upper-center-right in white and red with light armor, and 1 blonde girl at right holding a large ornate war hammer. Add a distant Japanese castle on the right background, jagged rocks and broken ground, glowing embers, drifting petals, and a luminous cloudy sky with strong backlight behind the group. Use cinematic fantasy lighting, epic adventure mood, polished painterly rendering, sharp detailed armor, flowing hair, layered depth, and a bold heroic poster feel. Include large Japanese title text across the top in metallic gold with black outline reading 《御伽話ファンタジー》シン・桃太郎伝, with a smaller Japanese subtitle beneath it in white with dark outline reading ~追放・転生した元神は、おとぎ話の世界の美少女たちと世界を救う!!. Include large Japanese promotional text across the bottom in bright red with white outline reading 追放、転生した神・桃太郎。御伽話の美少女たちと試練乗り越えて鬼退治!. Make it look like a commercial fantasy web novel or manga cover image, energetic, crowded, and visually striking.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic ensemble-style anime fantasy cover with seven battle-ready characters, Japanese promotional text, and a polished light-novel or webtoon key visual look.

entries.title: Epic Fantasy Mecha Light Novel Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic Japanese light-novel cover illustration for a fantasy mecha isekai story. Vertical poster composition with a huge heroic humanoid robot dominating the center foreground, viewed from a slightly low angle to make it monumental. The robot is sleek and ornate, with white and silver armor, rich gold trim, glowing cyan energy lines, a radiant emerald-green core in the chest, a crown-like crest on the helmet, and a long royal blue cape with gold edging. Behind its back spread multiple crystalline energy wings, about 8 large translucent green shards fanning out symmetrically like luminous blades. In its left hand it holds a long fantasy-tech spear with a blue glowing blade and gold mechanical detailing. At the robot's feet are 2 human characters: on the left, a red-haired fantasy heroine with very long braided hair, leather-and-fabric adventurer clothing, and a determined expression, looking up at the robot; on the right, a young male protagonist with short dark hair in a fantasy tunic and cloak, reaching one hand up toward the giant machine in awe and urgency, seen mostly from behind. The setting is an epic ruined sci-fi fantasy world with towering gothic spires, broken city structures, drifting smoke, dramatic clouds, and a sky filled with stars, planets, streaks of lightning, and 8 small flying warships scattered in the distance. Highly polished anime key visual style, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, intense contrast, blue-green-gold color palette, heroic atmosphere, intricate mechanical rendering, fantasy worldbuilding, premium game or novel cover finish. Add large Japanese title typography at the top: 《本格異世界SFロボット戦記》 above a massive metallic logo reading ASTRAIA, with a smaller Japanese subtitle line beneath it. Add a large dramatic Japanese catchphrase at the bottom in glowing white and gold text over 2 lines: 乗って!ユウキ! その叫びが、世界の運命を決めた!. Keep the overall design dense, premium, and readable as a commercial cover, with the central robot as the unmistakable focal point.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic anime-style Japanese sci-fi fantasy cover featuring a towering angelic robot, two protagonists, and bold title typography for novels, games, or promotional key art.

entries.title: Anime Split-Apartment Romance Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A cinematic anime-style vertical book-cover illustration for a romantic comedy light novel with slight fantasy atmosphere, split by a thin apartment wall down the center. On the left side, a warm, cozy kitchen glows in amber light from a hanging pendant lamp. A Nanako Iida, age 28, stands in three-quarter view holding a deep plate of freshly cooked food with visible steam rising in elegant curls. She has dark hair tied in a messy bun, soft bangs, a gentle mature expression, and wears a lavender knit sweater under a white apron. The kitchen contains exact visible details: 1 hanging lamp, 1 upper shelf with cookware, 5 hanging utensils, 1 cutting board, 1 knife block, and 6 small bottles or jars lined across the foreground counter. On the right side, a dim, cool-toned bachelor bedroom is lit in blue shadows. A Sota Ninomiya, age 26, slim but muscular, with tousled dark hair and a fitted charcoal T-shirt, leans one hand against the wall as if sensing the aroma through it. His room contains 1 bed, 1 bookshelf, 1 desk lamp, and 1 wall poster. A ribbon of steam drifts from the dish across the center wall into his side, visually connecting them. The mood is intimate, sensual, and slightly teasing, emphasizing the contrast between warm home cooking and lonely nighttime restraint. Add elegant Japanese vertical catch copy on the wall and upper right, small white serif-style name labels beside both characters with their ages, and a large bold Japanese title block across the lower middle. Include these exact text elements: left name label "Nanako Iida 28歳", right name label "Sota Ninomiya 26歳", vertical wall text "その香りが、ふたりの距離を、そっと溶かしていく。", upper-right vertical text "隣人は、優しい香りと、秘密のレシピ。", large center title "《飯テロ恋愛小説》
夜中に読まないでください〜
〜お隣のストイックくんは、
隣のお姉さんの愛の飯テロに勝てない〜", and bottom tagline "毎晩続く深夜の罪な料理の香り。
壁一枚の距離と心を溶かす". Highly polished promotional cover art, soft bloom lighting, detailed fabric folds, realistic steam, romantic tension, glossy illustrated publishing design.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style Japanese light novel cover showing neighboring adults divided by a wall, ideal for romance-comedy or food-themed book promotion.

entries.title: Surreal Clockwork Gentleman on a Gear
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A surreal impasto oil painting in the spirit of a late-19th-century post-impressionist masterpiece, showing a stout gentleman in a patterned golden-blue suit and tall top hat balancing awkwardly on a giant bronze gear high above a sunlit canal city. His face is obscured by a centered vertical rectangular censor block in warm brown, creating an intentional anonymous focal interruption. He wears a richly textured jacket with mosaic-like patches of ochre, cobalt, rust, and cream, matching trousers, heavy leather boots, and a waist area that opens into an exposed clockwork mechanism full of gears and ornate brass details. His body leans forward with both hands extended as if trying to keep balance, one boot planted on the gear and the other lifted slightly outward. The background is an airy blue sky with swirling painterly clouds and scattered gold brushstrokes, while below and to the left appears a historic bell tower and arched waterfront architecture, and to the right distant terracotta rooftops beside shimmering water. Use thick visible brushstrokes, luminous warm highlights, bold blue-and-gold contrast, expressive texture, and a whimsical steampunk-meets-Venetian atmosphere. Compose the figure large and central, slightly cropped by the frame, with the giant gear visible beneath him and the city receding below.
entries.description: This prompt generates a whimsical post-impressionist oil painting of an anonymous steampunk gentleman balancing on a giant gear above a Venetian-style city, useful for surreal fine-art image creation.

entries.title: Steampunk Cat Airship Over the Sea
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A whimsical fantasy oil painting of a gigantic flying steamship shaped like a cat, drifting above a bright ocean under a clear blue sky filled with soft pink clouds. The vessel dominates the composition in a low-angle three-quarter view from the front-left, making it feel monumental and airborne. Its hull is rounded and bulbous like a zeppelin-ship hybrid, painted pastel pink and lavender with warm peach highlights, and the bow is sculpted into the face of a fluffy cat with pale pink fur, pointed ears, luminous blue eyes, a small nose, and a huge open mouth lined with sharp dark teeth like a bizarre figurehead-jaw entrance. Ornate gilded brass trim, filigree, railings, pipes, rivets, balconies, portholes, hanging ornaments, and decorative mechanical fittings cover the ship. There are 4 tall smokestacks rising from the top deck, each striped in warm copper, red, and gold, releasing thick cotton-candy pink smoke that curls painterly into the sky. The upper deck is crowded with intricate Victorian steampunk details, domes, spires, lamp-like finials, tiny structures, and a small golden cat statue near the front. A suspended gondola or platform hangs beneath the belly of the ship with tiny visible machinery and a reddish-orange base. In the distance, 3 smaller ships appear near the horizon over choppy teal water, reinforcing the scale. The sea below is painted with lively waves and white foam. Use an imaginative storybook steampunk aesthetic with rich impasto brushstrokes, visible painterly texture, glowing sunlight, romantic pastel colors, and a dreamlike mood reminiscent of a fantastical maritime voyage. Vertical composition, highly detailed, magical, surreal, elegant, and playful.
entries.description: A richly textured fantasy illustration of a giant pink cat-shaped steampunk airship floating above the ocean, ideal for whimsical concept art, book covers, or imaginative poster imagery.

entries.searchText: steampunk cat airship over the sea a richly textured fantasy illustration of a giant pink cat-shaped steampunk airship floating above the ocean, ideal for whimsical concept art, book covers, or imaginative poster imagery. a whimsical fantasy oil painting of a gigantic flying steamship shaped like a cat, drifting above a bright ocean under a clear blue sky filled with soft pink clouds. the vessel dominates the composition in a low-angle three-quarter view from the front-left, making it feel monumental and airborne. its hull is rounded and bulbous like a zeppelin-ship hybrid, painted pastel pink and lavender with warm peach highlights, and the bow is sculpted into the face of a fluffy cat with pale pink fur, pointed ears, luminous blue eyes, a small nose, and a huge open mouth lined with sharp dark teeth like a bizarre figurehead-jaw entrance. ornate gilded brass trim, filigree, railings, pipes, rivets, balconies, portholes, hanging ornaments, and decorative mechanical fittings cover the ship. there are 4 tall smokestacks rising from the top deck, each striped in warm copper, red, and gold, releasing thick cotton-candy pink smoke that curls painterly into the sky. the upper deck is crowded with intricate victorian steampunk details, domes, spires, lamp-like finials, tiny structures, and a small golden cat statue near the front. a suspended gondola or platform hangs beneath the belly of the ship with tiny visible machinery and a reddish-orange base. in the distance, 3 smaller ships appear near the horizon over choppy teal water, reinforcing the scale. the sea below is painted with lively waves and white foam. use an imaginative storybook steampunk aesthetic with rich impasto brushstrokes, visible painterly texture, glowing sunlight, romantic pastel colors, and a dreamlike mood reminiscent of a fantastical maritime voyage. vertical composition, highly detailed, magical, surreal, elegant, and playful. comic / storyboard

entries.prompt: {"type":"character reference sheet","subject":"cute inorganic creature based on an old electric stove and oven","style":"high-detail concept art, whimsical industrial creature design, with short legs, small clawed paws, long floppy ears, large head formed by a vintage oven range","materials":"worn enamel-painted metal, brushed steel, dark rubber, glass oven door window, glowing electric coil elements","primary color":"aged white with gray shading and brown rust stains","accent color":"warm orange internal glow","face":"tiny white animal face inside the oven window, huge glossy amber-brown eyes, tiny nose, tiny mouth, plush and baby-like expression","head":"retro freestanding stove with 4 electric burners on top, black control panel, silver knobs, small digital clock display","body details":"rounded mechanical torso with a small front control panel and vertical orange indicator lights, visible seams, scratches, dents, power cable tail ending in a black two-prong plug","ears":"2 long hanging metal ears, one on each side, each with a glowing spiral heating-coil-like inner detail"},"layout":{"background":"plain light ivory","sections":[{"position":"upper left","count":1,"label":"front standing view","description":"main full-body hero pose, creature standing upright and facing forward, one top-left stove burner glowing orange, both eyes open and stove head, vent slits, worn metal casing, rounded mechanical back and hips, dangling ears, attached power cord and plug on the floor"},{"position":"middle right","count":1,"label":"oven open and plug"}

entries.title: Fantasy Warrior Character Concept
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body fantasy character concept art illustration of a young male warrior standing in a relaxed but ready pose on a plain light gray background, isolated with no environment. He has short, messy dark brown hair and a rough heroic JRPG-style design. His face is largely obscured and de-emphasized, with the focus on costume and silhouette. He wears 8 clearly visible outfit elements: a dark fitted bodysuit, a white and cream layered chest mantle with angular feather-like folds, a large deep blue cape draped over both shoulders and flowing behind him, dark arm coverings with wrapped forearms, a brown utility belt, multiple tan leather pouches and straps hanging from the hips, silver knee and shin armor on both legs, and worn brown leather boots. He holds 2 weapons: a sheathed sword gripped at his left hip and a long dark staff or rod angled downward in his right hand. The art style is painterly high-detail fantasy concept art with fine ink-like outlines, muted earthy colors, realistic fabric folds, soft shading, and polished videogame character design presentation, centered composition, full figure visible from head to toe.

entries.title: Blue Fantasy Knight Character
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body anime fantasy character design of a young adult male knight-adventurer standing front-facing in a neutral pose on a transparent background with a visible gray checkerboard transparency pattern. He has tousled medium-short warm brown hair with layered, slightly spiky strands and a refined heroic build. His face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block centered over the face area. He wears an elaborate royal-blue and dark leather outfit with silver armor and gold filigree trim: 1 long asymmetrical blue cape draped over both shoulders and flowing down both sides, 1 high-collared blue tunic with fitted black-brown leather torso panels, 2 crossed chest straps with buckles, 1 wide layered belt system around the waist, 1 leather side pouch hanging at the left hip, 1 set of silver pauldrons and arm guards, 2 armored gauntlets, 1 split blue tabard skirt with gold edging over dark trousers, 2 silver knee guards, and 2 tall brown armored boots with metallic toe caps and blue gem-like accents. Add intricate fantasy ornamentation throughout, including gold embroidery on the cape and tunic, engraved silver armor details, multiple buckles and straps, and a sunburst-like brooch clasp at the right shoulder. A decorative sword in a blue scabbard hangs at his right hip, with an ornate gold-and-silver hilt visible. The illustration should be clean, highly detailed, polished game character concept art in a refined JRPG style, centered composition, full figure visible from head to toe, crisp linework, soft painterly shading, elegant fantasy aesthetic, no scenery, isolated character cutout.

entries.title: Anime Pokémon-Style Versus Screen
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dynamic anime versus screen styled like a Pokémon battle intro, split diagonally into 2 opposing horizontal panels with a large metallic gold "VS" emblem in the center. The top panel has a hot pink speed-line background with black brushstroke borders and shows Rina Tennoji on the left, a teenage anime girl in a blue school uniform jacket, white shirt, and red ribbon tie, leaning in from the left with a confident expression, short layered pink hair with outward flips, and vivid yellow eyes. Beside her is 1 floating Porygon2-like creature, glossy red and blue with a rounded body, oval blue limbs, and a single circular yellow-and-black eye. On the right side of the top panel, large bold white text with a black outline reads "Rina Tennoji." The bottom panel has a vivid purple speed-line background with black brushstroke borders and shows Hime Anyoji on the right, a teenage anime girl in a soft pink hoodie over a school-style outfit, posed with one hand near her chin, pastel pink hair in twin braided buns tied with dark bows. Her face is obscured by a large solid censor block rectangle. Beside her is 1 floating Magnezone-like robot creature, metallic silver and blue-gray with a domed body, 1 central red eye, 1 smaller side eye, a yellow antenna on top, and 2 horseshoe magnets as arms with red and blue tips. On the left side of the bottom panel, large bold white text with a black outline reads "Hime Anyoji." Use crisp anime line art, glossy cel shading, dramatic motion streaks, high contrast, and a competitive game splash-screen composition on a black outer background. Include 2 characters, 2 creature companions, 2 name labels, 1 central VS emblem, and a small stylized white artist signature in the lower-left corner.
entries.description: This prompt generates a bold anime battle-introduction splash image with two rival girls, their monster partners, and a dramatic VS layout for matchup art or social media posts.

entries.title: Leverage Infinity Stand Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic manga-style character poster on an aged off-white paper background, designed like a JoJo-inspired Stand profile page with heavy ink lines, screentone texture, painterly shading, and exaggerated comic energy. The layout is vertical, with a dense information panel on the left and the main figures dominating the center and right. At the top left, large serif English title text reads "LEVERAGE INFINITY" under smaller Japanese text "スタンド名:". Below it, a left-column profile card contains 6 visible info lines with Japanese labels and values: "スタンド使い名:" with the value "1-sphere", "性別: 不詳", "見た目:" followed by a short Japanese description, "年齢: 不詳", "身長: 96cm", and "職業: 市場の条省・養分". Beneath that, add a framed ability box titled "スタンド能力" containing several lines of Japanese body text and a bold English catchphrase at the bottom reading exactly: "Choose... TO THE MOOOOON!! Or face the MARGIN CAAAAALL!!". At the lower left, add a framed radar chart section titled "スタンドパラメータ" with 5 labeled stats around the graph: "破壊力 B", "持続力 C", "成長性 A", "スピード C", and "人念力 B"; fill the radar graph with a translucent pink polygon. The main illustration shows 2 stacked figures: a humanoid Stand above and a pig-like user below. The Stand is tall, metallic, and menacing, with a mushroom-cap helmet head in glossy red with white spots, circular gold-and-pink ear-like side discs, a segmented chrome-and-brass body, muscular but sleek mechanical arms, and a pink pig-snout emblem on the chest. Its face area is obscured by a rectangular censor blur. It reaches one articulated hand toward the viewer in an aggressive foreshortened pose. Around the Stand's upper body, place 3 large stylized sound-effect glyphs reading "ゴゴゴ" in purple and black. On the far right, add a jagged speech or impact shape with 4 stacked lines of bold Japanese text reading "レヴァ", "レヴァ", "レヴァ", "レヴァ!!". Behind both figures, erupting pink-purple aura flames and floating rock fragments create intense supernatural energy. The lower figure is a short, squat, pig-bodied character standing wide-legged, with pink skin, small hoof-like feet, a yellow-green neckerchief, and a huge mushroom cap hat in red with white spots and a thick yellow underside rim; the torso area is obscured by a large rectangular censor blur. The pig points outward with one hand and holds a woven basket in the other hand containing 3 visible items: 1 blue heart-shaped object and 2 small round produce-like objects. Keep the composition theatrical and bizarre, combining grotesque humor, market-speculation parody, and high-impact manga poster aesthetics.
entries.description: A JoJo-inspired manga profile poster showing a bizarre mushroom-themed Stand and pig-like user, ideal for parody character sheets and dramatic anime-style meme art.

entries.title: Flaming Angel in Black Void
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic fantasy illustration of a single female angelic figure made entirely of fire, floating against a pure black background. The body is semi-transparent and sculpted from glowing orange, amber, and white-hot flame, with brighter highlights at the head, chest, knee, and pointed lower leg. She has 2 large feathered wings formed from flame trails, arcing upward behind her back, and long flowing hair that sweeps forward in a blazing halo around her head. Her pose is dynamic and balletic: torso arched, left arm extended outward, one leg bent, the other stretched downward into a tapering flame point, as if descending or diving through the air. The figure wears the suggestion of a short dress or skirt shape also formed from fire. Surround the body with turbulent smoke-like flame ribbons and motion streaks, especially trailing behind the wings and around the lower half, creating a sense of speed and supernatural energy. High contrast, luminous edges, ethereal anatomy, no ground, no props, no text, centered vertical composition, cinematic fantasy fire spirit aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a single dramatic fantasy figure of a winged woman formed entirely from glowing fire, ideal for mythic character art or supernatural poster imagery.

entries.title: Red-Haired Masked Samurai Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic anime-style portrait of a lone swordsman with an androgynous, elegant presence, shown from mid-thigh up in a three-quarter view, staring intensely at the viewer with narrowed golden eyes. The character has deep crimson red hair, long and layered with loose messy strands, plus one very long thick braid draped over the front of the body and decorated with turquoise beads and tassels. They wear a dark metallic half-mask covering the lower face, multiple ear piercings with red and silver ornaments, and a confident, dangerous expression. One hand rests behind the neck holding a katana across the shoulders; the sword has a black hilt with red accents and a reflective blade. The outfit is a richly detailed fantasy-meets-feudal-Japanese ensemble: muted brown inner kimono, wide navy and magenta waist wraps, a large golden obi tied loosely, dangling bead ornaments, and a black outer robe lined in red with a fluffy pale fur collar. Add a large red sun emblem on the robe sleeve and teal accessories at the waist. The palette is dominated by red, black, gold, cream, and deep blue. The background is a decorative Japanese-inspired painting with a large glowing red-orange sun disk behind the head, red plum blossoms, smoky cloud-like swirls, parchment-textured beige and charcoal tones, and scattered gold leaf splashes. Highly detailed digital illustration, painterly anime rendering, ornate textures, refined linework, moody lighting, luxurious fabric folds, samurai aesthetic, elegant and fierce atmosphere.
entries.description: This prompt generates a richly detailed anime-style warrior portrait suited for dramatic character art, fantasy key visuals, or stylized Japanese-inspired illustrations.

entries.title: Back-to-Back Dark Bishounen Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic, painterly anime-style illustration of two androgynous young men standing back-to-back in a dark, romantic historical-fantasy composition. The left figure is taller and shown from mid-thigh up, with very long, messy black hair cascading over the shoulders and chest, a partially open white shirt, a fitted black vest, a brown leather belt, and an ornate black military-inspired coat draped over one shoulder with gold embroidery, gold buttons, a large gold epaulet, fur trim at the collar, and a round red-and-cream rosette detail near the shoulder. His pose is relaxed and theatrical, with one hand lifted into his hair and his head tipped slightly back. The right figure is slightly shorter, shown from the waist up and turned away in profile, with short tousled black hair, a white high-collared shirt, a black vest, dark gloves, and crossed arms, giving a cool, reserved presence. Both characters have pale skin and a moody bishounen aesthetic. The background features a huge glowing red sun or moon centered behind them, with a textured gold-leaf and black grunge backdrop, deep crimson drapery or haze near the lower left, scattered glowing red petals or embers drifting through the air, and red flowering branches on the right side. Use rich crimson, black, antique gold, and ivory tones, cinematic rim lighting, layered textures, intricate costume rendering, elegant brushwork, and an emotional, nostalgic, high-detail finish.
entries.description: This prompt generates a richly textured anime-style duo portrait with two elegant dark-haired young men in ornate historical-fantasy clothing, ideal for dramatic character art or poster-style illustrations.

entries.title: Anime Key Visual Composition
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a TV anime key visual using the attached characters.
4:5 size.
Faithfully reproduce the character's hairstyles and the logo.

1. A woman with an ogre mask (legendary blacksmith) in the background with a mysterious large close-up of her face.
2. A man with a troubled expression holding the sword from the 7th image (slightly smaller as a sub-character).
3. A girl in green clothes holding the plushie from the 6th image, looking up at the sky with a startled face from a front position (protagonist).
4. A woman in a kimono looking on from a distance with a worried expression (supporting character).
5. A girl with a ponytail also looking on with a worried expression (supporting character).

Use the logo effectively.

[Credit Notation] (Make the production credit one line)
Director/Screenplay: Ikehaya Original Draft: Fuyuking
Production: Aoahiru, Ikehaya, Osushi Shokunin, Kurumi, tk, HATAHATA, Matabee, Yokappa
©︎ "Ninja Hankacho" Production Committee
