entries.title: Romantic Yuri Wedding Chapel Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A luminous, ultra-detailed anime-style wedding portrait of two brides in a romantic white chapel filled with soft ivory light, sheer curtains, carved arches, pale floral arrangements, and sparkling bokeh. The composition is vertical and elegant, showing the pair from about thigh-up to full dress detail, standing close together in an intimate yuri moment. The taller bride on the left has warm chestnut brown long wavy hair cascading over her shoulders and back, wearing a refined white bridal pantsuit with a fitted tailcoat, gold buttons, a cream vest, a silk cravat, subtle floral embroidery along the coat tails, and a white rose boutonniere with pale blue accents. She is visibly emotional, gently wiping tears with a handkerchief, her other hand resting near her chest, giving the feeling of being moved by the ceremony. The shorter bride on the right has long black hair, very long and glossy, and wears an ornate off-shoulder wedding gown in white with icy blue undertones, translucent lace sleeves, intricate beadwork, floral embroidery, layered ruffles, and a long veil decorated with tiny flowers and crystal-like details. A silver floral hair ornament with dangling pieces decorates the side of her head. She looks up at her partner tenderly while holding a cascading bouquet of white roses, blue flowers, and trailing greenery. Emphasize the contrast between the tailored princely suit and the delicate fairy-tale gown, with luxurious fabric textures, lace transparency, fine embroidery, soft glowing highlights, drifting sparkles, and a dreamy, emotional atmosphere. Make the scene feel like an original yuri wedding between an older office lady-style bride and a younger nurse-style bride, painted in polished, high-end romantic illustration style, ethereal, graceful, and heartfelt.
entries.description: This prompt generates a soft, ornate anime wedding illustration of two brides in contrasting bridal outfits, ideal for original character romance art or ceremonial key visuals.

entries.title: Moonlit Yuri Wedding Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A romantic fantasy wedding illustration of two women standing arm in arm in a moonlit palace balcony at night, highly detailed anime style with luminous painterly rendering, elegant and dreamy. The taller woman on the left has light brown shoulder-length softly layered hair and wears a regal ivory-white tailored wedding suit with gold embroidery, a high-collared ruffled shirt, cream vest, cravat, chain accessories, and a long ceremonial coat whose inner lining is deep violet with floral patterns; a purple flower corsage is pinned to her chest. The woman on the right has black long wavy hair and wears an ornate bridal gown in ivory with gold lace embroidery, sheer lace sleeves, a fitted bodice, a very long translucent veil, and rich crimson inner panels and accents peeking from the skirt; she wears red gemstone jewelry and floral hair ornaments in white and red. She holds a large bouquet of red, burgundy, and white flowers with greenery and trailing red ribbons while gently linking arms with her partner. Set them before gothic arched windows, hanging crystal ornaments, glowing lanterns, purple flowers, a distant city skyline, a star-filled sky, and a bright full moon. Add decorative vertical Japanese title text integrated into the composition: on the left, 紫苑の護り with smaller vertical ruby text beside it; on the right, 紅雪の献心 with smaller vertical ruby text beside it. Include crescent moon and snowflake-like decorative motifs framing the titles. Use a tall poster composition, full-body view, luxurious fabrics, sparkling highlights, soft bokeh, and an overall palette of ivory, gold, violet, crimson, and midnight blue.
entries.description: This prompt generates a luxurious anime-style wedding poster of two brides in coordinated fantasy attire, ideal for original character pairings, romance key visuals, or decorative cover art.

entries.searchText: moonlit yuri wedding poster this prompt generates a luxurious anime-style wedding poster of two brides in coordinated fantasy attire, ideal for original character pairings, romance key visuals, or decorative cover art. a romantic fantasy wedding illustration of two women standing arm in arm in a moonlit palace balcony at night, highly detailed anime style with luminous painterly rendering, elegant and dreamy. the taller woman on the left has light brown shoulder-length softly layered hair and wears a regal ivory-white tailored wedding suit with gold embroidery, a high-collared ruffled shirt, cream vest, cravat, chain accessories, and a long ceremonial coat whose inner lining is deep violet with floral patterns; a purple flower corsage is pinned to her chest. the woman on the right has black long wavy hair and wears an ornate bridal gown in ivory with gold lace embroidery, sheer lace sleeves, a fitted bodice, a very long translucent veil, and rich crimson inner panels and accents peeking from the skirt; she wears red gemstone jewelry and floral hair ornaments in white and red. she holds a large bouquet of red, burgundy, and white flowers with greenery and trailing red ribbons while gently linking arms with her partner. set them before gothic arched windows, hanging crystal ornaments, glowing lanterns, purple flowers, a distant city skyline, a star-filled sky, and a bright full moon. add decorative vertical japanese title text integrated into the composition: on the left, 紫苑の護り with smaller vertical ruby text beside it; on the right, 紅雪の献心 with smaller vertical ruby text beside it. include crescent moon and snowflake-like decorative motifs framing the titles. use a tall poster composition, full-body view, luxurious fabrics, sparkling highlights, soft bokeh, and an overall palette of ivory, gold, violet, crimson, and midnight blue. comic / storyboard balcony city

entries.title: Manga Stand User Profile Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A manga-style character profile page in the dramatic visual language of a supernatural battle comic, printed on a slightly aged beige paper background with black ink outlines, dense hatching, and high-contrast cel shading. The composition features 3 main sections: a left information panel, a central full-body female character portrait, and a right-side humanoid stand figure with vertical Japanese dialogue text. In the center, depict a tall, athletic young Japanese woman, about 22 years old, with long straight black hair, tan healthy skin, and a muscular sporty physique. Her face is completely obscured by a large rectangular mosaic censor blur. She wears 3 visible outfit pieces: a tight white sweat-soaked tank top, very short dark navy athletic shorts with a drawstring, and no visible accessories. Her skin and clothes glisten with sweat, emphasizing a humid, sensual, intense training vibe. She stands in a confident forward-facing pose with one arm lowered toward the viewer, creating a slightly foreshortened perspective. Behind and to her right, show a sleek humanoid stand entity made of glossy pale lavender liquid with splashing droplets around its head and shoulders, narrow eyes, smooth organic armor-like anatomy, and 3 round purple orb details down the chest and abdomen. Add 2 large stylized purple Japanese sound effects in a hand-drawn manga font: one near the top reading "ゴゴゴ..." and one near the lower body reading "ゴゴゴゴ......". On the far right, place a vertical Japanese exclamation in black text: "オラオララッ!汗の一滴まで見逃されェ!". The left panel is a boxed black-on-beige character dossier with multiple horizontal dividers and Japanese text. Include these profile fields exactly as visible: "スタンド使い名:" followed by "水沢 咲良(ミズサワ サクラ)", "性別:" followed by "女", "見た目:" followed by "黒髪ロング、健康的な体つき スポーティな服装が多い", "年齢:" followed by "22歳", "身長:" followed by "160cm", and "職業:" followed by "フリーター ジムトレーナー". Below that, include a boxed radar chart titled "スタンド能力パラメーター" with 6 labeled stats around the graph: "破壊力 B", "スピード A", "射程距離 C", "成長性 B", "精密動作性 A", and durability at the remaining axis, with a purple filled polygon. At the bottom left, include another boxed text section with the stand name and ability description. The stand section should read: "スタンド名:" then "『SWEAT BLOOM』" and below it "(スウェット・ブルーム)". Under "スタンドの能力:" include a dense Japanese paragraph describing a close-range stand activated by sweat and bodily fluids, able to manipulate surrounding moisture and alter the pressure and viscosity of liquids, dull an opponent's movement through sweat, make surfaces slippery to disrupt balance, and launch sweat like bullets at high speed. Overall style: gritty serialized manga splash page, dynamic sensual action-character design, JoJo-inspired exaggeration, clean page layout, detailed anatomy, purple accent color for stand effects and chart fill, no modern UI elements, full-page illustration.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic manga-style character dossier page featuring a sporty female stand user, her liquid-themed stand, stat chart, and Japanese profile text for anime and comic concept art.

entries.title: JoJo-Style Stand Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A manga-style JoJo-inspired character card poster set in a narrow urban alley, with dramatic cel shading, heavy ink lines, stylized speed-line energy, and a vertical comic-page layout. The main subject is a young Japanese man, タカ・ハシ, age 19, shown from mid-thigh up in the left foreground, raising his right fist high in a triumphant pose while holding a handheld microphone near his mouth with his left hand. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular mosaic blur. He has short messy green hair and wears a fitted green track jacket with gold side stripes and a large golden phoenix emblem across the chest, zipped up, with black pants and black fingerless gloves. To his right and slightly behind him stands his humanoid Stand, サガミ・サヴァイブ (SAGAMI SURVIVE), a compact armored mascot-like figure with a rounded pale yellow bird head, sharp angry eyes, an orange beak, and a sleek white-and-green mechanical body with metallic silver musculature. The Stand has green shoulder armor, green gauntlets, gold trim, and a bold letter S on each side of its chest armor. It is posed punching forward with both fists, aggressive and energetic. Include exactly 4 distinct text panels and effects: 1 large white rectangular description box at the top right filled with dense Japanese text explaining the Stand, 1 jagged white speech bubble at the mid-right with vertical Japanese battle cries, 1 white character-info box at the bottom left with Japanese profile text, and 1 white stat box at the bottom right containing a radar chart labeled STAND PARAMETERS with Japanese and English category labels and a 5-line stat list. Add exactly 4 stylized purple sound-effect texts around the figures: 1 large "ゴゴゴゴ..." near the upper middle, 1 "ド" near the lower left, and 2 separate "ドド" effects near the lower center and lower right. The background is a gray-blue city alley with tall buildings receding in perspective. Overall tone: parody homage to JoJo's Bizarre Adventure character introductions, combining comic intensity with a goofy mascot Stand concept, polished manga poster composition, sharp print-like detail, and Japanese magazine page aesthetics.
entries.description: This prompt generates a manga-style parody character sheet with a masked street performer and his bird-headed Stand, ideal for anime homage posters and dramatic comic-style character introductions.

entries.title: Retro Manga Love Guide Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A retro 1980s Japanese manga magazine cover illustration with a faded paper texture, slightly grainy print look, and warm vintage ink colors. The composition is crowded and playful, set against a deep blue-purple background filled with fluffy pink clouds and floating pink hearts. At the top left, a huge dramatic Japanese title in bold hand-drawn lettering reads 危険な恋愛手引書, with a smaller subtitle beneath it reading (ラブ・バイブル). In the center, a tall delinquent-style teenage boy in a dark gakuran school uniform points toward the viewer with one hand, confident and charismatic. Beside him at center-right is a sweet shoujo-style teenage girl with a short dark-brown bob haircut, large sparkling eyes, and a cream sailor-style school uniform with a pink collar and bow, looking up in surprise and admiration. At lower left sits 1 gothic-lolita girl with pale lavender twin-tail hair, black ribbon accessories, and an elaborate black-and-pink frilly dress, blushing shyly with her hands near her mouth. At the bottom center is 1 fluffy black toy poodle wearing a mint-blue polka-dot scarf, facing forward with a cute expression and tongue slightly out. In the upper center-right, 1 tiny cupid girl with black twin ponytails, white wings, a pink pleated skirt, white socks, and a flower hair accessory flies while reading a pink book with a heart on the cover. In the upper right background, 1 panicked bespectacled schoolboy in a blue uniform clutches his head with bulging comedic eyes. Near the right-middle background stands 1 glamorous older woman in warm orange clothing, partially obscured by the main pair. At the far right is 1 dramatic villain-queen woman in glossy black armor-like corset attire, long black gloves, a high red-lined cape, and a gold crown, posing with one hand lifted. At the bottom right, an enormous open book rises diagonally into the frame, as if all the characters are emerging from its pages. Use dynamic manga cover composition, exaggerated expressions, romantic-comedy energy, hand-painted cel anime shading, and nostalgic weekly-magazine poster design.
entries.description: This prompt generates a busy vintage-style Japanese manga cover illustration packed with romantic-comedy characters, ideal for nostalgic poster art or faux magazine covers.

entries.title: Luxury Perfume Transformation Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A high-end cinematic transformation artwork displayed in five vertical panels, showing a luxury perfume evolving from raw essence into a sculptural masterpiece, each panel separated by thin black dividers.
Panel 1 (Origin): A premium glass perfume bottle resting on a dark reflective surface, surrounded by raw ingredients like rose petals, oud wood, citrus peel, and mist, soft studio lighting, elegant shadows.
Panel 2 (Release): The perfume begins to diffuse into the air, visible fragrant mist swirling upward in fluid motion, forming soft organic shapes, glowing particles and vapor trails.
Panel 3 (Transformation): The mist starts shaping into a semi-formed silhouette (abstract human figure or flowing fabric), blending liquid, vapor, and light, luminous and dreamy.
Panel 4 (Abstraction): The form becomes fully abstract - flowing ribbons of scent turning into sleek glass-like curves and fluid geometry, dynamic motion frozen mid-air.
Panel 5 (Transcendence): Final form - a luxurious sculptural perfume bottle or abstract glass statue inspired by the scent's essence, polished, reflective, with glowing highlights, sitting on a minimal pedestal.
Style: ultra-detailed, photorealistic to abstract progression, deep black background, gold and silver accents, soft glow, high contrast lighting, glossy reflections, cinematic luxury aesthetic, perfume ad style, 4K quality, sharp focus.
entries.description: A multi-panel cinematic prompt showing a perfume bottle evolving from raw essence into a sculptural masterpiece.

entries.title: Vinland Saga Thorfinn Storm Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark, gritty cinematic anime poster in the style of a historical seinen manga cover, inspired by VINLAND SAGA. The composition is vertical and dramatic, with a lone young warrior resembling THORFINN standing on a jagged black rock at the edge of a stormy sea, seen from behind at full body. He wears a weathered brown-grey hooded tunic or cloak with a rough fur-trimmed collar, a belt at the waist, dark trousers, and worn leather boots. His posture is tense but reflective, his right hand holding a short dagger pointed downward, facing violent ocean waves and sea spray under a cold, overcast sky. Behind him and dominating the upper half of the image is a massive close-up side profile of his head and wet, tangled blond hair, rendered with dense ink-like linework and painterly shading, creating a layered double-exposure effect. On the left side, include 4 inset manga-style narrative panels stacked vertically: panel 1 shows a close-up of the same boy gripping a dagger; panel 2 shows him from behind facing a small group of armed men; panel 3 shows an intense close-up of his eyes; panel 4 shows him walking alone among gravestones or stone markers. Add visible typography integrated like a Chinese promotional poster: at the top left, small Japanese title text and the English text "VINLAND SAGA" with "YUKIMURA MAKOTO" beneath it; near the lower left, large distressed block letters reading "THORFINN" with smaller katakana beneath. Add multiple vertical Chinese quote lines in white along the left and right sides, with one emphasized phrase in muted gold. Use a desaturated palette of charcoal black, slate grey, steel blue, dirty white, and faded brown, with high contrast, mist, rain-speck texture, rough brushwork, and an epic melancholy atmosphere about renouncing violence and searching for peace. The overall look should feel like a premium character poster, moody, windswept, somber, and highly detailed.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic anime-style character poster of Thorfinn by a stormy sea with layered portrait imagery, inset manga panels, and Chinese promotional text, ideal for cinematic fan art or series-poster visuals.

entries.title: Fantasy Guild Receptionist Novel Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished fantasy light-novel cover illustration in anime style, square format, showing a beautiful adult female guild receptionist from the waist up in an elegant adventurer's guild interior. She stands slightly right of center behind a wooden counter, facing forward with a calm, professional pose, holding a black-and-gold pen lightly in one hand near her shoulder. Her face is intentionally obscured by a large centered beige rectangular censor block. She has リリアン・ヴェイル, age 27, with light blonde hair styled in a refined updo bun with soft loose bangs framing the face. She wears a dark brown tailored high-collared jacket richly embroidered with ornate gold floral trim, a green vest underneath, and a white ruffled blouse. Add one visible teal gemstone drop earring. The mood is dignified, intelligent, and dependable. The background is a warmly lit, luxurious guild office with dark carved wood, a blurred crest plaque on the wall, framed documents, a desk lamp, flowers, and soft golden bokeh, creating a high-end fantasy workplace atmosphere. At the top, include 3 lines of Japanese title typography: first a small header line reading "《冒険者ギルドのお仕事ファンタジー》", second a large main title line reading "鉄の受付嬢 リリアン のプロの流儀" with the highlighted name in emerald green and the rest in black, and third a subtitle line reading "〜冒険は、窓口から始まります〜". At the bottom, add an ornate dark brown and gold nameplate with 3 text lines: "リリアン・ヴェイル", "冒険者ギルド受付嬢 (27歳)", and "丁寧・正確・冷静 -- それが、私の仕事です。" Use refined Japanese book-cover typography, decorative flourishes, soft cinematic lighting, subtle depth of field, luxurious textures, and a premium fantasy novel cover composition.

entries.title: Anime Fantasy Key Visual Board
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic anime key visual and concept-art presentation board for a fantasy adventure titled Codex & GPT-Image-2. The main image fills the upper portion: a vast ruined stone causeway high above the clouds at night, leading toward a circular observatory-like sanctuary with towers, antennas, and a glowing mechanism at the summit. A vivid aurora arcs across a star-filled sky over distant mountain ranges. Three travelers stand on the bridge in a triangular composition. In the center foreground, a pale white-haired girl in a flowing white robe and cape walks toward the viewer, holding a staff with a red ring ornament; her expression is calm and mysterious. On the left, a tall woman with very long dark purple hair and a dark cloak turns slightly away, looking toward the structure. On the right, a red-haired young man in a brown coat stands with his back angled to the viewer, carrying a large dark weapon. The bridge is weathered, cracked, and lined with glowing cyan inlaid paths and runic strips, with stone pillars and balustrades on both sides. Add large title typography in the upper right, with a smaller Japanese subtitle beneath it reading 灰銀のアウロラ. Add a small Japanese tagline in the lower left reading 旅は、記憶の先へ続いている。. Beneath the hero image, place a horizontal strip of detailed monochrome and muted-color concept sheets showing exactly 8 grouped design panels: 1 white-haired heroine full-body costume turnaround sheet, 2 white-haired heroine face-expression sheet, 3 heroine accessories and gear sheet, 4 purple-haired woman outfit turnaround and detail sheet, 5 red-haired man outfit turnaround and weapon sheet, 6 architectural exterior elevation sheet of the observatory, 7 architectural interior and structure reference sheet, 8 circular mechanical diagram sheet. Along the bottom, place exactly 4 environment thumbnails: 1 ruined mountain road landscape, 2 icy-blue bridge or aqueduct environment, 3 distant hilltop approach to the sanctuary, 4 towering cathedral-like interior hall. Overall style: premium anime game art pitch board, highly detailed, painterly, dramatic lighting, cool blue and cyan palette with white stone and subtle orange title accents, polished layout, epic fantasy sci-fi atmosphere.
entries.description: A polished anime project poster combined with character, architecture, and environment concept sheets, ideal for pitching a fantasy game, film, or illustrated series.

entries.title: Oriental Cyberpunk Character Setting Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-completion character setting breakdown diagram, A4 vertical layout, oriental cyberpunk style, national tide technical style, next-gen 3A sci-fi game character setting collection texture, realistic digital painting, neon cinematic lighting, cold, majestic, and hardcore sci-fi feel. The protagonist is a completely new original image of the Chinese mythological figure 'Erlang Shen Yang Jian', not Sun Wukong, with no monkey characteristics and no Golden Cudgel. The character is set as a high-level tactical executive officer of a conglomerate, with a high-precision holographic scanning prosthetic eye (the third eye) emitting a faint blue light implanted in the forehead, and a neat tactical slick-back hairstyle. Wearing a matte black high-collar bulletproof windbreaker, silver dragon-scale Kevlar bulletproof vest, and military-grade exoskeleton, accompanied by a fully armed cyber-mechanical police dog (Xiaotian Dog). Holding a foldable laser three-pointed double-edged blade, possessing an aura of absolute suppression and cold law enforcement. The primary colors are titanium silver, tactical deep blue, cold white, and warning yellow. The page includes: main visual bust, character name title, basic profile, attribute radar chart, front/side/back three-view drawings, expression set, weapon breakdown, clothing and accessory details, color scheme, and design highlight descriptions. The overall layout is like a high-end sci-fi game setting manual, with a holographic HUD interface style, clear modules, unified borders, a few Chinese labels, clean text, and no garbled code. Realistic textures, including matte composite armor, Kevlar fiber, optical lenses, and rich details of faint blue holographic projections, making it look like a character setting page from a top-tier oriental cyberpunk action game.

entries.title: Martial Arts Grid Motion Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Output a 4x4 grid image (16:9 ratio) featuring a 3D drawing mannequin (8-head tall female) performing a sequence of scenes from the following Shorinji Kempo exhibition, numbered in chronological order. However, ensure the mannequin's limbs are never missing and add a nose to the mannequin's face.

From an upright position, transition into a low horse stance, connect a sharp straight punch into a series of consecutive strikes, incorporate an outer block and palm strike, and finish with a bow stance pose.

entries.title: Gas Giant Descent Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: {"type":"cinematic sci-fi storyboard contact sheet","subject":{"primary":"a small futuristic spacecraft descending into a massive gas giant storm system","secondary":"an enormous leviathan-like silhouette hidden within the clouds","mood":"oppressive, catastrophic, awe-struck, high tension, cosmic dread","style":"photorealistic cinematic concept art with dark sci-fi realism, volumetric storm clouds, strong contrast, amber and black palette with occasional cold blue lightning","aspect_ratio":"16:9"},"vehicle":{"design":"compact armored deep-atmosphere ship with 3 bright rear engines, angular industrial hull, worn metallic panels","scale":"tiny compared to the planet and creature"},"layout":{"grid":{"rows":3,"columns":4,"count":12},"sections":[{"position":"row 1 col 1","description":"wide exterior shot of the ship entering the upper atmosphere of a colossal gas giant at extreme speed, glowing clouds streaked with fire and friction around the vessel, curved planetary horizon visible"},{"position":"row 1 col 2","description":"cockpit POV, dark interior filled with red and cyan holographic instruments, forward visibility collapsing into turbulent storm layers and electrical haze"},{"position":"row 1 col 3","description":"exterior mid-wide shot of the ship diving into a gigantic rotating cloud funnel, surrounded by violent spiraling storm structure"},{"position":"row 1 col 4","description":"extreme close exterior of the ship hull as bright lightning strikes dangerously close, white electric energy crawling across the metal surface"},{"position":"row 2 col 1","description":"dashboard warning screen in red, showing a critical systems failure interface with the exact visible text count of 4 warning lines and 1 large percentage readout: ['WARNING','ENGINES COMPROMISED','THRUST FLUCTUATION','GRAVITY SPIKE DETECTED','DESCENT RATE -453%']"},{"position":"row 2 col 2","description":"rear three-quarter exterior of the ship fighting turbulence inside dense storm clouds, engines burning hard while the craft barely holds course"},{"position":"row 2 col 3","description":"massive circular disturbance forming in the clouds like an eye or maw, entire storm systems displaced by something huge moving beneath"},{"position":"row 2 col 4","description":"second cockpit view with radar-like navigation display and red alert text, pilot making a blind evasive maneuver through lightning-filled darkness"},{"position":"row 3 col 1","description":"first reveal of the colossal creature shape rising near the ship, black organic surface and immense curved anatomy emerging from darkness, ship tiny at lower left"},{"position":"row 3 col 2","description":"spiral descent shot, ship caught inside a vortex tunnel of clouds, spinning downward with engines flaring as it struggles to recover"},{"position":"row 3 col 3","description":"sudden breakthrough into a calm void, minimal composition, ship flying in eerie silence through dark open space with soft mist and no visible storm around it"},{"position":"row 3 col 4","description":"final reveal, gigantic leviathan fully emerging behind or beside the ship in cleared space, backlit by a pale circular storm opening, enormous open maw-like silhouette dwarfing the craft"}],"continuity":"all 12 panels depict one continuous descent sequence from atmospheric entry to final creature reveal"},"lighting":{"primary":"glowing amber storm light","secondary":"red cockpit interface glow","accents":"blue-white lightning and engine exhaust"},"environment":{"location":"inside the upper and middle storm layers of a gigantic gas giant","weather":"violent turbulence, electrical storms, vortex funnels, cloud walls, pressure chaos","threat":"no safe zone, repeated near-failure, unknown colossal presence driving the storm"}}

entries.title: Soft Pastel Anime Girl Full Body
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body anime girl character design on a plain white background, centered and floating slightly, drawn in a soft minimalist pastel style with very thin gray linework and delicate flat colors. She has a petite youthful build and a cute, gentle silhouette, with special emphasis on a soft rounded face shape, smooth cheeks, and a softened jawline and chin. Her face is completely obscured by a blank skin-colored rectangular block with no facial features visible. She has short bob hair in light ash brown, slightly tousled with wispy ends, long bangs covering part of the forehead, and a small ribbon hair tie on the right side in pale blue-gray. She wears 3 visible clothing pieces: an oversized pale blue cardigan with loose sleeves and front buttons, a cream-white slip dress with a scalloped neckline and a tiny button detail at the chest, and a frilled hem with a small ribbon near the right thigh. She is barefoot with slim pale legs, posed front-facing with both arms relaxed slightly outward, open hands, one leg straight and the other gently bent inward for a shy, weightless look. The illustration should feel airy, cute, understated, and clean, like a simple Japanese anime fashion sketch, with lots of negative space and no props, no shadows, and no background elements.
entries.description: This generates a clean full-body anime character illustration in a minimalist pastel style, useful for testing character proportions, clothing design, and facial silhouette.

entries.title: Urban Fantasy Coexistence Crossing
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime-style urban fantasy illustration set at a busy Tokyo-style scramble crossing on a bright clear day, viewed at street level with a wide cinematic composition. The city blends modern realism with mythic fantasy: dense high-rise buildings covered in giant billboards, a red broadcast tower in the middle distance, blue sky with fluffy clouds, and a crowded crosswalk full of pedestrians. In the foreground, show 7 prominent character figures: a silver-haired elf woman in a flowing white dress holding an iced drink and tote bag on the far left; a central schoolgirl with long dark hair, black animal ears, a navy school blazer, plaid skirt, blue ribbon, and large navy shoulder bag, lifting one hand to her head; a young man in a dark suit looking down at a smartphone; an androgynous white-haired angelic figure in an elegant white-and-gold ceremonial outfit with large white wings; a small blonde girl in an ornate pastel pink frilled dress beside the angel; a dark-haired woman in a black coat in right foreground profile; and a small blue-haired cat-eared child in a blue dress with a bow standing near a cave entrance on the right. In the midground crowd, include mixed humans and fantasy races walking together naturally. Add 4 clearly visible nonhuman or supernatural background beings: 1 dragon flying in the sky, 1 winged female angel descending above the street, 1 lizard-headed businessman in a suit near the angelic figure, and 1 tall red-skinned horned demon with crossed arms standing by the hillside path. On the right side, transition the city into a lush shrine hillside with large green trees, a red torii gate, stone steps, and a wooden signboard reading Japanese kanji. Below it, place a rocky cave-like tunnel entrance glowing blue, with a wooden sign over the entrance and several figures descending into an underground shared district lit by crystals. Show 6 major billboard/sign elements across the cityscape: a huge left billboard reading "Shinpi Sekai 神秘世界" with a cosmic planet image; a large central political poster with Japanese text and a raised fist icon; 2 rooftop signs reading "未来研究所" on separate buildings; a large right billboard with Japanese text about coexistence and silhouettes of different beings; and 1 vertical banner with Japanese text on a nearby building. Emphasize the theme of coexistence between ordinary modern city life and hidden fantasy societies. Crisp anime linework, polished light novel key visual rendering, rich textures, soft sunlight, subtle atmospheric perspective, vibrant but believable colors, intricate clothing details, and a sense of awe, everyday bustle, and worldbuilding depth.
entries.description: This prompt generates a detailed anime key visual of a modern city intersection where humans, angels, demons, elves, and beastfolk coexist, ideal for fantasy worldbuilding or light novel setting art.

entries.title: Anime Theatrical Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A stunning anime theatrical movie poster in portrait format. Studio Ghibli meets Makoto Shinkai visual language. A teenage girl in a tattered white shrine maiden robe stands on the wing of a crumbling giant stone deity - an ancient colossus covered in moss and glowing golden kanji script, slowly falling through a sea of clouds. Her long black hair streams upward against gravity. She reaches one hand toward the sky where a vast celestial rift tears open the heavens - beyond it, an inverted ocean floats above the clouds, ancient wooden cities hanging upside down from its surface, lanterns drifting like stars. The sky transitions from deep twilight blue at the bottom to a luminous peach and rose gold at the top. Volumetric god rays pierce through cloud layers. Cherry blossom petals and torn paper talismans spiral everywhere. Her expression is calm determination. Art style: hand-drawn 2D animation, ultra-detailed background painting, expressive linework, rich cel shading. Palette: deep indigo, peach, rose gold, warm amber, soft white. Title in large elegant Japanese kanji at the bottom with English subtitle beneath in a clean modern font. Tagline in small white italic text above the title. Mood: mythological, spiritual, bittersweet wonder. Theatrical release quality, Toho Films.
entries.description: A lush anime-style movie poster prompt combining the aesthetics of Studio Ghibli and Makoto Shinkai, featuring mystical elements like floating cities and stone colossi.

entries.prompt: {"type":"black-and-white manga page","genre":"romantic school slice-of-life manga","style":{"medium":"inked manga line art with grayscale screentones","reading":"right-to-left Japanese manga layout","mood":"gentle, shy, emotionally warm, slightly nostalgic","print_look":"clean magazine-style page with gutters, panel borders, speech balloons, and small panel numbers"},"page":{"single_page":true,"panel_count":8,"numbered_panels":[1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8],"text_language":"Japanese","note":"the Japanese dialogue should look authentic but may be slightly garbled or inconsistent, as if AI-generated manga text"},"characters":{"count":2,"main_pair":[{"role":"boy","age_appearance":"high school student","hair":"short messy light-colored hair","build":"slim","clothing":"short-sleeve white school shirt, dark trousers, shoulder bag","expression":"bashful, anxious, easily flustered"},{"role":"girl","age_appearance":"high school student","hair":"long straight dark hair with bangs","build":"slim","clothing":"white short-sleeve sailor-style school blouse with dark ribbon bow, dark pleated skirt, shoulder bag","expression":"calm, kind, softly smiling, emotionally perceptive"}]},"setting":{"location":"quiet Japanese residential street at sunset","background_elements":["utility poles","overhead power lines","narrow road","walls and houses","soft evening sky"],"flashback_location":"elementary school classroom with desks and children"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"opening street scene","position":"top left","count":1,"description":"boy and girl walking side by side home from school on a sunset street, the girl speaking while the boy looks down nervously"},{"title":"close-up conversation panels","position":"top right","count":3,"description":"stacked close-ups of the shy boy and the girl as she gently encourages him and he struggles to explain himself"},{"title":"flashback classroom","position":"middle left","count":1,"description":"elementary school memory: a younger version of the boy sitting at a desk holding paper while 3 other children are in the background, their faces indistinct or blurred"},{"title":"boy inner thoughts","position":"middle right","count":2,"description":"two horizontal close-up panels of the boy blushing and thinking, surrounded by soft tone bubbles"},{"title":"girl revelation and reaction","position":"lower middle","count":2,"description":"the girl reveals she thought his small voice was cute; the boy reacts with shock; one panel may obscure part of the girl's face with a soft rectangular blur"},{"title":"emotional resolution","position":"bottom left","count":2,"description":"the girl smiling brightly with eyes closed in a larger panel, followed by a smaller close-up of the boy blushing harder and looking overwhelmed"},{"title":"closing walk-away scene","position":"bottom right","count":1,"description":"rear view of the pair continuing down the same street at dusk, talking more comfortably"}]},"composition":{"camera_flow":"alternate between environmental two-shots, intimate face close-ups, and memory panels","focus":"the emotional contrast between the boy's insecurity and the girl's reassuring affection","screen_tone_effects":"soft bokeh-like screentones behind close-ups to emphasize tender feelings"},"story_beats":["1: the girl asks the boy why he used to be so small and quiet","2: the boy hesitates and says it is hard to explain","3: flashback shows childhood classmates and his fear of speaking loudly","4: he reflects that no matter what he said, he felt he could never speak properly","5: the girl begins to respond, remembering his small voice","6: she says his quiet, careful voice was cute; the boy is startled","7: she smiles and implies he should be more confident because she liked that about him","8: they walk off together, the mood lighter and hopeful"],"quality":"highly polished manga page, believable professional composition, expressive faces, detailed backgrounds, romantic-comedy tenderness"}
entries.description: A polished grayscale manga page showing a shy high school boy and a kind girl discussing his quiet childhood, useful for generating Japanese romance comic pages.

entries.title: Shy Classroom Romance Manga Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: {"type":"black-and-white shoujo manga page","format":"single page original manga","reading_direction":"right to left","style":{"rendering":"clean polished manga ink drawing with soft screentone shading, delicate highlights, expressive eyes, light romantic atmosphere","genre":"school romance comedy","color":"monochrome grayscale","linework":"fine detailed line art with glossy hair rendering and gentle facial blush"},"setting":{"location":"Japanese high school classroom","time":"daytime","details":["rows of desks and chairs","large classroom windows","students chatting in the background","typical school uniforms"]},"page":{"panel_count":8,"numbered_panels":true,"panel_numbers":[1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8],"layout":"multi-panel manga page with varied rectangular panels and close-ups"},"characters":{"male_lead":{"role":"shy teenage boy","appearance":"short messy light hair, slim build, school shirt, easily flustered, frequent blush, surprised and bashful expressions"},"female_lead":{"role":"popular or striking teenage girl","appearance":"very long straight dark hair, slim build, sailor-style school uniform with a dark ribbon bow, calm direct gaze, gentle smile, close conversational posture"},"supporting_students":{"count":6,"description":"classmates in the background, including gossiping girls and a male friend, used to create social tension and commentary"}},"story":{"premise":"A shy high school boy becomes very conscious of a beautiful girl who has recently started talking to him more, while classmates notice and tease them.","beats":[{"panel":1,"summary":"Morning classroom greeting scene. The girl greets the boy, and he reacts with awkward surprise while classmates are present."},{"panel":2,"summary":"Close-up exchange. The girl says he should speak to her properly, and the boy becomes intensely flustered as she suggests that if he gets used to it they will talk more naturally."},{"panel":3,"summary":"Nearby girls comment and tease that the two would look good together, making the boy panic while the girl innocently asks what he thinks."},{"panel":4,"summary":"A male classmate points out that the girl has been spending a lot of time with him recently. The girl turns toward the boy and his embarrassment spikes."},{"panel":5,"summary":"The girl reassures him not to worry and says she just wants to talk with him, creating a soft intimate moment at close distance."},{"panel":6,"summary":"The boy's internal monologue admits that she really has been smiling more naturally lately and wonders why he had been so uneasy."},{"panel":7,"summary":"He smiles and says that if that is how she feels, he is happiest. The girl asks if from tomorrow they should try speaking a little more than just during class, and he is shocked."},{"panel":8,"summary":"Classmates in the background notice the development and react with excitement. The girl gently tells him not to panic, and he shyly agrees to do his best."}]},"composition":{"focus":"alternating close-ups of the two leads with medium classroom reaction shots","camera_notes":["frequent tight face close-ups for blush and eye contact","over-the-shoulder conversation framing","reaction panels with classmates","soft white bokeh screentone backgrounds during emotional beats"]},"text":{"language":"Japanese","dialogue_style":"authentic manga speech bubbles and internal monologue","sfx_style":"subtle handwritten manga sound effects","include_text":true},"mood":["sweet","awkward","teasing","romantic tension","youthful"],"quality":"professional serialized manga page quality, cohesive storytelling, readable panel flow, emotionally expressive"}

entries.title: Retro Sci-Fi Armor Back View
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic sci-fi portrait of a person seen from behind in a sterile futuristic laboratory corridor, medium close-up framing from the upper thighs to the head, with the subject turned slightly to the right and looking toward an open vertical pod chamber in the background. The subject has short, wet-looking black hair with messy layered strands and wears a retro-futuristic armored suit: glossy worn red shoulder plates and upper armor, brushed silver metal back plating with rounded panel lines, two flexible ribbed metallic tubes running from the upper back into circular ports, a black shiny undersuit on the arms and sides, a white padded neck seal, and a red waist section with subtle gold trim at the wrist. The armor should feel practical and used, with light scuffs, scratches, and realistic reflections. Place a rectangular privacy blur over the visible side of the face, centered on the head profile. In the background, slightly out of focus, show 1 futuristic standing capsule or medical stasis pod recessed into the wall, dark interior with cool blue vertical accent lights and a bright white overhead light, plus a small control panel mounted on the right side of the pod. The environment is clean and industrial, with pale gray walls, smooth floor, soft diffused lighting, shallow depth of field, photorealistic textures, realistic metallic materials, subdued cool tones in the room contrasted by the deep red armor, high detail, serious atmosphere, live-action science fiction aesthetic.

entries.title: Retro Tokusatsu Armor Candid Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic live-action-style portrait photo of a young Japanese woman in a retro sci-fi tokusatsu armored suit, framed from mid torso to just above the head, standing outdoors against a softly blurred concrete industrial background. She has black short wet hair in a messy bob tucked behind one ear, and her face is mostly hidden by a large rectangular blur censorship block centered over the face. She is holding 1 clear crinkled plastic water bottle in one hand, raised to her mouth as if drinking. The costume is a worn vintage hero suit with 4 visible main armor components: 2 glossy red shoulder pauldrons, 1 red-and-silver chest plate with scratches and grime, and 1 circular blue orb embedded on the right side of the chest. Under the armor is a shiny black bodysuit with a white high neck undersuit collar and a thin gold ring detail at the neck. Around the collar are 2 short ribbed metallic hoses connected to 2 small rectangular metal modules near the shoulders. The armor should look practical, scuffed, slightly dirty, and heavy, like an old Japanese special-effects superhero costume rather than sleek modern armor. Natural overcast daylight, shallow depth of field, muted gray concrete tones in the background, documentary cosplay photography, candid moment, highly detailed textures, realistic skin and fabric, vertical composition.

entries.title: Moonlit Tiger and Rose Fantasy Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy, cinematic fantasy illustration in vertical poster format, showing Liu Yifei in side profile walking barefoot across a perfectly still midnight-blue lake under a luminous full moon and a richly detailed star-filled sky with the Milky Way stretching diagonally behind her. She is a graceful East Asian woman with shoulder-length dark hair, wearing a shimmering silver sleeveless evening gown with a flowing skirt and a thigh slit, the fabric sparkling like stardust. Her expression is calm and introspective, and she faces to the right as one foot touches the water, creating delicate glowing ripples. Two small dark islands sit low on the horizon, one on each side, emphasizing the vast open water and sky. A glowing vine of soft white roses and petals wraps around her body in an elegant S-curve, beginning behind her upper back, spiraling around her waist and legs, and continuing downward into the reflection. Beneath the water, instead of a normal reflection, create a large luminous line-art tiger formed from fine white neon-like contours, upside down relative to the woman above, with its body curled dynamically and its head near a large glowing white rose at the lower right; the tiger should feel majestic, lean, and ethereal rather than aggressive. The overall palette is cool blue, silver, and white, with gentle moonlight, soft bloom, mirror-like reflections, magical realism, ultra-clean composition, high detail, romantic fantasy mood. Add elegant cursive text centered near the bottom that reads In me the tiger sniffs the rose., plus one small four-point star icon near the lower right corner. Make it refined, poetic, and visually symbolic of inner strength and tenderness.
entries.description: This prompt generates a poetic vertical fantasy poster of a moonlit woman on water with a glowing tiger reflection and rose vine, ideal for artistic quote imagery and symbolic AI art.

entries.title: Manga Cover With Bass Girl and Designer Boy
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vibrant Japanese comic-style cover illustration with two anime characters standing side by side against a split pink-and-blue pop graphic background filled with stars, dots, music notes, hearts, spark lines, and playful doodles. At the top, place a huge bold Japanese title in thick black and brown kanji with white outline and pink shadow reading 夜坂さんと茶藤くん, arranged in an energetic layered composition inside a fluffy cloud-like title shape. The left half of the background is pink and the right half is light blue, with a diagonal dividing rhythm and decorative manga-cover accents. Show exactly 2 characters from about mid-thigh up. On the left is a rebellious teenage girl with a straight black bob haircut and blunt bangs, pale skin, punk-rock fashion, and a slightly annoyed withdrawn pose with one hand near her mouth. She wears an oversized black zip hoodie over a red-and-black horizontal striped shirt, a red plaid pleated skirt, fishnet stockings, and a black heart-shaped choker. She holds a black electric bass guitar vertically across her body, with visible tuning pegs, strings, pickups, and chrome hardware. On the right is a cheerful teenage boy with messy light brown hair, fair skin, and a friendly expressive pose. He wears a white button-up shirt with sleeves rolled to the elbows, a fitted black vest with a small emblem on the chest, and black slacks. He holds a stylus pen near his face in one hand and a dark drawing tablet tucked in the other arm. Add exactly 2 vertical Japanese speech balloons: on the left, うるさいのはキライ。 in a pink outlined balloon; on the right, そのセンスもっとみんなに届けたいです... in a blue outlined balloon. Include small floating icons between and around them: exactly 2 black music notes, 2 pink hearts, 2 blue stars, and a few curved arrows and spark marks suggesting lively chemistry. The overall style is polished modern manga cover art, clean linework, glossy shading, expressive character design, bright pastel pop palette, high detail, commercial light novel or comic serialization cover aesthetic.

entries.title: Elegant Oni Warrior Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined anime illustration of a tall adult oni woman in a calm, elegant full-body portrait, standing in three-quarter view with her hands folded over the pommel of a large upright sword. She has very long straight silver-white hair flowing past her knees, pale skin, pointed elf-like ears, narrow crimson eyes, and two smooth curved red horns rising from her forehead. Her expression is cool, aloof, and slightly melancholic. She wears a white ceremonial kimono with black and red accents: a fitted white dress-like inner layer with a deep neckline, a black obi and layered waist ornaments, a translucent patterned outer robe with subtle geometric motifs, wide sleeves lined in red, and a short skirt hem decorated with smoky dark flame shapes. Her forearms are covered in polished silver armor gauntlets, adding a warrior feel. The sword is oversized and heavy, planted vertically before her, with a black blade and hilt, metallic guard, and vivid glowing red flame-like patterns running down the center. The composition is graceful and balanced, mixing Japanese traditional aesthetics with dark fantasy. The background is a soft pale lavender-gray decorative collage with a circular window framing Mount Fuji and a winding river landscape, delicate floral silhouettes and blooming branches, abstract cloud motifs, hanging tassel ornaments, geometric textile patterns, and a red sun-like circle on the right. Use muted whites, lilacs, gray-violets, black, and deep crimson as the main palette. Add subtle paper texture, clean linework, soft cel shading, delicate highlights, and an ornate high-detail anime style. Make the overall mood serene, noble, mystical, and slightly ominous, like Oni Alter in a luxurious Japanese fantasy key visual.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style full-body portrait of a horned oni woman in ceremonial kimono attire, ideal for character art, posters, or fantasy-themed key visuals.

forehead. her expression is cool, aloof, and slightly melancholic. she wears a white ceremonial kimono with black and red accents: a fitted white dress-like inner layer with a deep neckline, a black obi and layered waist ornaments, a translucent patterned outer robe with subtle geometric motifs, wide sleeves lined in red, and a short skirt hem decorated with smoky dark flame shapes. her forearms are covered in polished silver armor gauntlets, adding a warrior feel. the sword is oversized and heavy, planted vertically before her, with a black blade and hilt, metallic guard, and vivid glowing red flame-like patterns running down the center. the composition is graceful and balanced, mixing japanese traditional aesthetics with dark fantasy. the background is a soft pale lavender-gray decorative collage with a circular window framing mount fuji and a winding river landscape, delicate floral silhouettes and blooming branches, abstract cloud motifs, hanging tassel ornaments, geometric textile patterns, and a red sun-like circle on the right. use muted whites, lilacs, gray-violets, black, and deep crimson as the main palette. add subtle paper texture, clean linework, soft cel shading, delicate highlights, and an ornate high-detail anime style. make the overall mood serene, noble, mystical, and slightly ominous, like oni alter in a luxurious japanese fantasy key visual. entries.title: Back-to-Back Sirens in Sakura Dusk
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Two powerful fantasy women standing back-to-back in the center of a vast cherry blossom field at dusk, full-body heroic composition, seen from a slightly low angle, ultra-detailed cinematic anime-realism. The woman on the left has vivid crimson red short layered hair, a curvy athletic build, and a fierce dominant presence; she wears a black and dark red strappy battle outfit with a cropped leather top, high-cut bottoms, garter-like thigh straps, flowing translucent red ribbons, and long glossy black armguards. The woman on the right has golden blonde with soft pink ends wavy shoulder-length hair, an athletic curvy build, and extensive floral tattoo sleeves and body tattoos across her arm, shoulder, ribs, and thigh; she wears a black and purple strappy fantasy outfit with sheer purple fabric panels, chain accents, and black gloves. Their bare upper backs press together as they face opposite directions with calm, intimidating confidence. There are exactly 2 massive glowing energy swords planted upright in the ground behind and beside them: 1 on the left radiating molten red-orange fire and ember-like cracks, and 1 on the right radiating electric violet and cyan energy with lightning coursing through the blade. The scene is set in a breathtaking sakura landscape with dense pink cherry trees, countless petals swirling violently through the air, a dramatic sunset sky filled with magenta, purple, and orange clouds, distant lightning, and a glowing horizon over a Japanese-inspired cityscape with a pagoda visible on the right. Emphasize raw power, sensual elegance, high contrast rim lighting, wind-blown fabric and hair, luminous particle effects, rich red-versus-purple color contrast, epic fantasy atmosphere, hyper-detailed rendering, sharp focus on the two women, and painterly cinematic depth.

entries.title: Funny DIY Disaster Cat Comic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a colorful humorous comic-style poster in Spanish, vertical format, with a retro cartoon look, thick black outlines, warm orange and yellow palette, halftone texture, and exaggerated expressive characters. The layout has 4 distinct panels: 1 large title panel across the top and 3 equal vertical panels along the bottom row. In the top panel, show a smug orange tabby cat handyman standing upright like a person in a cozy living room workshop, holding a screwdriver in one paw and the other paw on the hip, wearing a utility belt with visible tools. The cat has narrowed confident eyes and a sly grin. On the left side of this top panel, place a large jagged comic burst with the Spanish headline in bold distressed lettering: "3 PASOS PARA ARRUINAR ALGO FÁCIL", with "ARRUINAR" in red and the rest in black. Below it, add a taped paper strip that says "edición casera". In the background of the top panel, include a framed sign on the wall that reads "YO PUEDO SOLO" with a small paw print, a small potted plant, shelves, and dynamic radial lines behind the cat. In the bottom row, create 3 labeled step panels, each with a yellow header box and bold black text. Panel 1 header: "PASO 1". Show the same orange cat sitting calmly on the floor beside a standing lamp, eyes closed with overconfidence, casually holding a screwdriver. Add a speech bubble that says "Tranqui, esto lo arreglo en 2 minutos." Include a small open toolbox and a few screws on the floor. Panel 2 header: "PASO 2". Show the cat mid-repair, now alarmed with wide eyes, awkwardly unscrewing the wrong part of the lamp while pieces and screws fly through the air. Add a speech bubble that says "Ups..." and a sticky note near the bottom that says "tocar lo que no era". Include visual motion lines, scattered debris, and a toppled plant pot. Panel 3 header: "PASO 3". Show the aftermath: the lamp is broken and smoking with exposed wires and sparks, the room is messy with shattered parts everywhere, and the cat sits stunned holding the screwdriver. A brown dog stands to the right, looking disappointed, asking in a speech bubble "¿Qué hiciste?" The cat replies in another speech bubble "No sé... se complicó solo." Add a taped label at the bottom that says "resultado final". Make the entire image playful, chaotic, and meme-like, with polished digital illustration, expressive faces, comic lettering, and a DIY disaster tone.
entries.description: A retro comic poster showing a smug orange cat ruining a simple home repair in three Spanish-labeled steps, ideal for memes, social posts, and humorous DIY content.

entries.prompt: {"type":"8-panel romantic manga page","style":"clean polished anime manga illustration, soft indoor lighting, warm neutral living room tones, detailed character rendering, modern digital comic layout","title_text":{"main":"恋するメイドロボと、気付かないマスター","subtitle":"第4話 それは、近すぎます"},"page":{"background":"white page with 2 columns and 4 rows of bordered comic panels","panel_count":8},"characters":{"female_1":{"role":"maid robot","appearance":"petite young woman with very long silver-white hair, straight bangs, slight waves at the ends, white maid headband, black-and-white classic maid dress with frilled apron, black ribbon at the collar, metallic over-ear robotic side attachments near both ears, pale skin, large violet eyes, shy demeanor"},"male_1":{"role":"master","appearance":"young adult man with tousled short dark brown hair, tall broad build, dark charcoal button-up shirt with open collar, calm but clueless expression"}},"setting":"cozy living room with sofa, shelves, framed pictures, lamp, and soft evening indoor light","layout":{"sections":[{"title":"1","position":"top-left","count":1,"labels":["マスターとの距離に対する耐性が低下..."]},{"title":"2","position":"top-right","count":1,"labels":["何読んでるんだ?"]},{"title":"3","position":"middle-left upper","count":1,"labels":["...っ!"]},{"title":"4","position":"middle-right upper","count":1,"labels":["難しい本だし"]},{"title":"5","position":"middle-left lower","count":1,"labels":["ここ分かるか?"]},{"title":"6","position":"middle-right lower","count":1,"labels":["分からなかったら教えるぞ"]},{"title":"7","position":"bottom-left","count":1,"labels":["無理するなよ"]},{"title":"8","position":"bottom-right","count":1,"labels":["原因:マスター"]}],"reading_order":"left to right, top to bottom"},"panel_descriptions":[{"panel":1,"scene":"The maid robot sits on a sofa alone reading a dark hardcover book held in both hands. A vertical narration box appears on the left. She looks composed but delicate."},{"panel":2,"scene":"The master leans in from the right over her shoulder to look at the book. The maid robot lowers her gaze slightly. A speech balloon on the right says he is asking what she is reading."},{"panel":3,"scene":"He moves even closer, his face near hers as both look at the open book. The maid robot stiffens in surprise. A small speech balloon on the left shows a startled reaction."},{"panel":4,"scene":"They are nearly shoulder to shoulder, both viewing the book together. The master speaks casually, saying it is a difficult book."},{"panel":5,"scene":"The master points at a place on the open page with one finger while leaning close. The maid robot remains frozen and flustered. A speech balloon asks if she understands this part."},{"panel":6,"scene":"Close two-shot. The maid robot turns her face toward him with a visible blush across her cheeks, wide violet eyes, and embarrassed tension. He continues speaking from the right in a supportive tone."},{"panel":7,"scene":"The master has stepped back and stands upright alone in the room, speaking gently. Background furniture becomes more visible. A speech balloon on the left says not to force herself."},{"panel":8,"scene":"Close-up of the maid robot alone, hands clasped in front of her mouth, face deeply flustered, hair flowing around her shoulders. Pink handwritten sound effects repeat beside her to show pounding heartbeat, and a vertical narration box states the cause is the master."}],"composition_notes":"Keep the maid robot as the emotional center of every panel except panel 7. Emphasize progressive physical closeness from panels 2 through 6. Maintain manga speech balloons, narration boxes, and panel numbers 1 through 8 in black squares. The tone is romantic comedy with innocent tension, not explicit."}

entries.title: Cinematic Heist Mastermind at Whiteboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic, moody heist-planning scene in a dimly lit office at night, shot in a realistic thriller style. A single adult man stands with his back mostly to the camera, slightly turned in profile, writing on a huge whiteboard filled edge to edge with tactical notes, building sketches, floor plans, arrows, routes, and hand-drawn diagrams. He has wavy dark hair and wears a dark olive or charcoal casual jacket over dark trousers, giving the impression of a mastermind strategist. The whiteboard is the focal point and contains multiple readable planning areas: the top left title says "OPERATION NIGHTHAWK"; the left column has 3 sections labeled "OBJECTIVE," "TARGET," and "TIMELINE"; the upper right has 2 labeled diagram areas, "ENTRY PLAN" and "CAMERA NETWORK"; the lower middle-right has 4 labeled planning blocks, "TRANSIT," "EQUIPMENT," "HOTEL ROUTE," and "CONTINGENCIES." Include sketched building elevations, a rooftop access drawing, loading bay notes, room labels, arrows in black and red marker, and a small van sketch near the lower center. The room is warm and shadowy with amber practical lighting. On the left side of the frame, show a desk lamp glowing over a dark wooden desk with scattered papers, and a wall with 3 framed black-and-white photographs arranged vertically. Composition is a medium-wide over-the-shoulder shot, the man centered slightly left, the whiteboard dominating the background. High contrast, soft filmic grain, tense atmosphere, realistic textures, prestige TV crime-drama aesthetic similar to a brilliant planner preparing a robbery, but not depicting any specific copyrighted character. Add a white "Pollo.ai" watermark in the top-right corner.
entries.description: This prompt generates a moody crime-drama scene of a lone strategist mapping a robbery plan on a whiteboard, ideal for thriller posters, social media promos, or cinematic concept art.

entries.title: Vintage Miami Art Date Comic Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage American comic-book page in a faded 1950s romance-adventure style, printed on slightly yellowed paper with visible halftone texture, inked panel borders, and soft weathered colors. The page contains exactly 5 panels arranged in a classic comic layout: 1 wide top panel, 2 middle panels side by side, and 2 bottom panels side by side. In the top panel, show a sunny coastal boulevard in Miami, with turquoise water on the left, a sailboat offshore, pastel Art Deco buildings in the distance, tall palm trees, and a pink classic convertible driving along the waterfront. A stylish couple sits in the car, and large dramatic comic title lettering reads "ART IN MIAMI!" with a small caption box at the top saying "MIAMI, SATURDAY AFTERNOON...". Add two speech balloons: "READY TO SEE SOME ART?" and "ALWAYS!". In the second panel, an interior car view from behind the couple as they drive down Ocean Drive, showing colorful pastel buildings and palms ahead; the man has dark hair and a blue shirt, the woman wears sunglasses, a pink dress, and a lavender headscarf. Include a caption box reading "WE DROVE DOWN OCEAN DRIVE..." and speech balloons saying "LOOK AT THOSE COLORS..." and "MIAMI FEELS LIKE A PAINTING!". In the third panel, show the couple approaching the entrance of a modern museum with the visible wall text "MIAMI ART MUSEUM", glass doors, and people inside; add a caption box reading "THE EXHIBIT WAS AT A MODERN MUSEUM..." and a speech balloon saying "LET'S GO!". In the fourth panel, place the couple inside a gallery viewing large abstract paintings in bright pastel blocks and shapes, with a small sculpture on a pedestal nearby; add a caption box reading "INSIDE, THE ART SURROUNDED US." and speech balloons saying "I LOVE HOW BRIGHT AND BOLD IT IS." and "IT FEELS LIKE MIAMI... VIBRANT AND FREE!". In the fifth panel, show the couple outside again by the water with the skyline, palm trees, and a sailboat in the background, standing close together in the sun; add a caption box reading "WE STEPPED OUT INTO THE SUN..." and a small closing narration box at the bottom right saying "A BEAUTIFUL DAY." Include speech balloons saying "THAT WAS PERFECT." and "ART, SUN, AND MIAMI... CAN'T BEAT IT!". Use hand-lettered uppercase comic text, black outlines, slightly imperfect vintage printing registration, muted pinks, aquas, sandy beige, and seafoam green, with a nostalgic warm romantic mood.

entries.title: Retro Constructivist Fight Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A gritty retro propaganda-style poster illustration with a limited palette of black, deep red, and aged beige paper texture, designed like a bold vintage screen-printed action poster. Show 2 stylized women in a dramatic diagonal composition, frozen mid-fight. On the left, a woman dressed like a nurse in a short white uniform and angular nurse cap lunges forward with one knee raised and one arm bent, her body sharply foreshortened. On the right, a woman in a fitted black dress and wide-brim black hat leans backward in a defensive pose, one arm raised above her head and the other near her torso, long dark hair flowing behind her. Render both figures with hard-edged geometric shapes, exaggerated limbs, sharp shadows, and high-contrast noir facial planes. Use aggressive red diagonal rays sweeping across the background, with black architectural bars and abstract constructivist shapes framing the scene. Add distressed paper grain, ink wear, and slight misregistration for a worn print effect. Place a small blurred monkey head emblem in the upper-right corner. Include large blocky poster text in the lower left across 3 lines reading "SCOTTISH RECIPE:" then "MINCE AND" then "TATTIES", with the first 2 lines in beige and the final 2 lines in strong red, using a heavy squared sans-serif display font. Add a red cross-like graphic element in the lower-right corner. The overall mood is violent, satirical, cinematic, and strikingly graphic, like a Soviet constructivist pulp film poster advertising Scottish Recipe: Mince and Tatties.
entries.description: This prompt generates a bold vintage propaganda-style poster with two women in a stylized fight scene, ideal for satirical pulp artwork or dramatic graphic poster designs.

entries.title: Dark Fantasy Stage Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical Japanese stage-play poster in luxurious dark fantasy anime style, featuring a single androgynous young actor in a half-body portrait against a nighttime city skyline with glowing high-rise windows and soft bokeh lights. The character has long straight hair in deep black with vivid teal-turquoise inner glow and streaks, glossy highlights, and strands flowing across the shoulders. They wear an elegant black high-collared costume with subtle brocade texture, a fitted dark coat, black leather gloves, and a jewel-like diamond-shaped turquoise pendant at the throat set in ornate gold. One gloved hand is raised near the collar in a poised theatrical gesture. The mood is mysterious, romantic, and slightly gothic, with cinematic rim lighting from behind, strong contrast, gold sparkles, and luminous accents in the hair and costume. Use a refined magazine-quality key visual composition with decorative gold filigree corners and a premium theatrical poster layout. Leave space for Japanese typography integrated into the design: at upper right, small text "夜空に輝く、唯一の星。", then "主演俳優" and the actor name "夜乃 宙" with small romanization "SORA YORUNO" beneath; along the left side, a vertical quote reading "この役に、すべてを捧げる。闇さえ、愛に変えてみせよう。"; near center-lower, small text "幻想ロマン・ステージ" above the large glowing gold title "夜の檻に囚われた光" with a small subtitle beneath "-それでも、君を愛した。"; include a dark teal rose motif and thorny circular ornament near the title. At the bottom left, add the date block "2025 6.20 FRI - 6.29 SUN" and venue "天穹シアター". At the bottom right, add a bordered ticket box with "チケット一般発売 5.10 SAT 10:00~". Center bottom credits in Japanese: "原作・脚本 霧月 澪", "演出 七海 翼", "音楽 深月 奏". Along the very bottom, add the tagline "-光か、闇か--。愛が、運命を選ぶ。-". Color palette: midnight blue, black, teal, cyan glow, and antique gold. Emphasize polished poster typography, layered depth, elegant fantasy drama branding, and a consistent face and atmosphere suitable for a theatrical promotional campaign.

entries.title: Shoujo Manga Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A glossy Japanese shoujo manga magazine cover illustration, packed edge to edge like a real weekly romance comic issue, in a dreamy spring sunset city scene with glowing bokeh lights and falling cherry blossom petals. The cover is dominated by 4 high-school-age characters in fashionable modern anime style. In the foreground, 1 main girl stands large and centered-right, shown from mid-thigh up, with long wavy blonde hair with pink streaks, multiple ear piercings, soft glamorous makeup, and a shy romantic pose with one hand near her lips. She wears a white blouse, a large pink plaid ribbon bow, a pink plaid skirt, a loose pink cardigan slipping off her shoulders, layered necklaces, and a navy school backpack over one shoulder. Behind her stand 3 supporting students: 1 tall handsome boy in a dark school blazer and loosened tie, 1 elegant girl with blonde hair in a braided bun wearing a beige cardigan and school uniform, and 1 shorter dark-haired girl in a school uniform with a ribbon tie. The background shows a glowing pedestrian bridge or riverside walkway at dusk, lined with lights and cherry trees in full bloom, with a pink-orange-purple sky and sparkling romantic atmosphere. The composition should feel like a premium manga cover: highly rendered anime illustration, luminous highlights, delicate linework, glossy print finish, dense overlapping Japanese cover text, issue badges, callouts, hearts, sparkles, and a barcode at the bottom right. Include exactly 7 main text clusters: 1 giant magazine masthead across the top in large bubbly pink Japanese lettering with white outline, 1 vertical romance headline on the right in large pink characters with a huge numeral 3, 2 circular promotional badges on the left, 1 angled banner on the lower left, 1 stacked list of 5 serialized story titles with author names at lower left, and 1 stacked list of 5 serialized story titles with author names near the lower center-right. Add exactly 3 small publication info elements on the upper right: a date/price block, a circular issue number badge, and a narrow vertical tag. Add exactly 1 inset bonus poster preview near the lower right above the barcode. Use a hyper-detailed shoujo manga cover aesthetic, romantic, fashionable, youthful, sparkling, soft glow, sunset rim light, cherry blossom storm, print-magazine realism, intricate typography layering, vibrant pinks and warm golds.
entries.description: A richly detailed anime-style Japanese romance magazine cover, ideal for generating editorial-looking shoujo artwork with multiple characters and dense cover typography.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Pink Mecha Angel Girl
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dynamic anime cyberpunk action illustration of a young female cyborg with bright pink twin-tail hair, suspended in a vast futuristic neon city shaft filled with glowing circuitry, holographic reflections, and dense sci-fi architecture. She is viewed in an extreme foreshortened perspective, lunging directly toward the camera with one oversized mechanical hand thrust forward, fingers spread and tipped with long glossy claws, while the other cybernetic arm is bent back in attack posture. She has a fierce focused expression, luminous green eyes, small glossy black-and-magenta horn-like head implants, and long flowing hair whipping outward in all directions. Her body is encased in a high-detail reflective chrome-and-magenta cybernetic exosuit with translucent chest plating, segmented armored shoulders, mechanical gauntlets, exposed joint details, armored thighs, and blade-like lower leg armor. Behind her are 2 large radiant energy wings made of pink crystalline electricity and particle streaks, exploding outward symmetrically. The environment is a vertical futuristic corridor or megacity canyon with layered glass panels, glowing signage, metallic frameworks, blue and cyan lights mixed with dominant hot pink illumination, countless spark-like particles, lens glow, and high-density detail. Use a dramatic low-angle composition, centered character, aggressive attack pose, glossy surfaces, intense specular highlights, saturated magenta and cyan palette, cinematic sci-fi atmosphere, ultra-detailed anime rendering, sharp linework, and a sense of speed, power, and overwhelming visual density.

entries.title: Anime Swordsman in Suit
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dynamic anime-style illustration of a sharply dressed young man in a dramatic foreshortened action pose, viewed from above as if he is lunging upward toward the camera while drawing a rapier straight at the viewer. He has golden blond hair, neatly styled with a center part and soft swept-back volume, and fair skin. His face is mostly hidden by the camera angle and shadow, creating a mysterious, stylish look. He wears a tailored dark navy business suit with a subtle sheen, a light blue dress shirt, a vivid blue necktie, and polished black dress shoes. One hand dominates the foreground in extreme perspective, gripping the ornate rapier hilt; the other hand pulls the blade free, emphasizing motion and tension. The sword has 1 slender silver blade, 1 elaborate metallic guard with interlocking loops, and 1 engraved pommel. The composition is bold and graphic, with the character diagonally crossing the frame over 1 large inverted triangle backdrop filled with pale aqua and turquoise geometric fan-like patterns, outlined with a thin warm beige border, set against a clean light gray background. High-detail digital painting, glossy anime illustration, elegant action character art, crisp linework, rich fabric folds, dramatic perspective distortion, fashion-magazine polish, cool blue palette, white negative space, centered vertical composition.

entries.title: Elegant Wuxia Swordsman Design Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an elegant high-fantasy character design sheet in a refined wuxia/xianxia style on a clean ivory background with a thin ornate vintage border. The layout is a split showcase with 5 visible panels: 1 large full-body panel on the left, 1 tall upper-right portrait close-up, and 3 stacked/lower detail panels on the right showing armor and weapon craftsmanship. The main subject is a handsome adult male swordsman, original character, with long flowing black hair tied in a half-up topknot, the rest loose and wind-swept, wearing a small gold earring. His expression is calm, noble, and slightly aloof. He wears luxurious layered robes in white, deep navy blue, and black, with wide sleeves, flowing sashes, and highly detailed gold embroidery. Over the shoulders and torso are ornate dark blue and black armor elements with elaborate gold filigree and dragon-like decorative metalwork, plus a jade-green gemstone set into the waist ornament and weapon fittings. In the full-body panel he stands in a poised three-quarter stance holding a long straight jian sword diagonally downward, with the robe hems and ribbons flowing gracefully to suggest motion. The costume should include exactly 6 standout outfit elements: white inner robe, dark blue outer robe panels, black underlayer trousers, wide black-and-gold waist belt, sculpted gold shoulder armor, and black bracers with gold detailing. The right-side close-up portrait emphasizes the layered collar, glossy hair texture, shoulder ornament, and elegant fabric rendering. The 3 detail panels show exactly these focus areas: a gold dragon-like waist armor emblem, a jade-set sword guard or accessory ornament, and a close-up of the ornate gold sword hilt and guard with part of the blade. Overall aesthetic: ultra-detailed concept art, stylish and polished, crisp linework blended with painterly rendering, premium character-sheet presentation, soft neutral studio lighting, subtle shadows, luxurious textures, and a restrained palette of ivory, midnight blue, black, gold, and jade green.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Elf Girl Full-Body Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body anime character illustration of a cyberpunk elf girl standing alone against a clean plain white background, centered and facing slightly left in a relaxed neutral pose with both arms hanging naturally. She has a short bob haircut in icy light blue, straight blunt bangs, pale skin, large pointed elf ears, and vivid glowing red-orange eyes with a calm, slightly serious expression. Her design blends fantasy and futuristic biomechanics: she wears 1 oversized white techwear hooded jacket with black lining, black straps, zipper details, and red warning-style markings on the sleeve; underneath is 1 glossy black biomechanical bodysuit with exposed cutout sections, cables, segmented armor plates, and intricate hard-surface cybernetic detailing around the torso and hips. She has 1 strapped black thigh pouch on her right thigh, 2 mechanical knee braces with visible circular joints, 2 external cables running from the knees downward, and 1 pair of chunky black combat boots with thick soles, buckles, and subtle red accents. Add small black earrings and tiny industrial accessories around the ears. Render in highly detailed polished manga-style line art with crisp edges, delicate cel shading, glossy highlights on the skin and latex-like surfaces, subtle red accent lights, and an overall premium sci-fi character concept art look. Keep the figure fully visible from head to boots with generous negative space and no props, scenery, text, or shadows beyond minimal grounding.
