entries.title: Epic Anime Warrior with Crystal Wolf Companions
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic high-fantasy anime illustration in a vertical poster composition, showing a celestial sky battle scene with 4 distinct subjects surrounded by glowing blue feathers, crystal shards, and swirling clouds. In the center, a heroic male warrior inspired by Norse mythology stands floating in the air, raising one arm toward a radiant circular magic sigil above him. He has long flowing brown hair, a horned gold-and-blue helmet, a dark teal cape billowing behind him, and ornate black, gold, and turquoise armor with angular geometric trim. His chest is partly exposed, with a bright cyan wolf-emblem glow at the center of his torso, and he holds a long spear with a crystal blue trident-like blade in his other hand. At the bottom foreground, the largest creature is a massive wolf-beast lunging forward toward the viewer, with orange fur, cream mane, huge fangs, oversized claws, and blue crystalline armor covering its head, shoulders, back, and limbs; the crystal plates are faceted and luminous, and the beast wears metallic blue-and-gold bands around its legs and tail. On the upper left, include a second wolf-like humanoid companion in a midair attack pose, with golden-orange fur, athletic muscular anatomy, large spread wings made of sharp blue crystal feathers, blue crystal helmet and shoulder armor, and armored gauntlets and boots with glowing cyan accents. On the right, include a small chibi fox mascot floating cheerfully, with bright orange fur, very large ears, a fluffy tail, huge blue eyes, a smiling open mouth, and a blue tunic with cyan geometric trim and a diamond-shaped chest jewel. The entire image should use vivid electric blues and warm orange-golds for strong contrast, with intense rim lighting, sparkling particles, dynamic motion, stylized manga linework, and highly detailed fantasy rendering. The background is a cosmic storm of luminous clouds and deep starry sky, with a glowing circular constellation-like emblem centered above the warrior, suggesting divine summoning power. Make the scene energetic, triumphant, magical, and epic, like premium anime key art or a trading card game splash illustration.

entries.title: Countryball Strait of Hormuz Standoff
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A detailed satirical countryball meme illustration of the Strait of Hormuz as a very narrow sea passage between two steep rocky cliffs, painted in a polished digital cartoon style with dramatic shading and textured stone. In the center foreground, exactly 2 countryballs block each other in the tight channel so that only one can pass. On the left is a USA countryball with angry narrowed eyes, painted with the American flag, wearing a dark navy baseball cap labeled "USA" in large white letters. On the right is an Iran countryball with angry narrowed eyes, painted with the Iranian flag and emblem, wearing a green-and-white headband tied on the side; the headband contains Korean text that reads "저항은 우리의 권리". Above each ball is exactly 1 white speech bubble with thick black outline, for a total of 2 speech bubbles, and both say 길! in large bold Korean lettering, as if neither side will yield. Show the two balls facing each other nose-to-nose in a standoff in the bottleneck. On the left cliff, include exactly 1 wooden sign reading in Korean and English: "호르무즈 해협" and "Strait of Hormuz". On the right cliff, include exactly 1 warning sign with Persian text at the top and a red warning triangle below, indicating that only one person can pass. In the left bottom corner, place exactly 1 black oil barrel labeled "OIL" with dark spilled oil pooling around it. In the right bottom corner, place exactly 1 black naval mine with Persian writing on it, attached to a chain. In the background beyond the narrow passage, show open sea with exactly 3 distant ships, including at least 1 larger tanker and faint dark smoke rising into the sky. Use a tense but humorous geopolitical meme tone, centered composition, eye-level view, soft daylight, slightly muted realistic colors, crisp outlines, and high readability for all text.

entries.title: Anime Maid Thriller Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic anime theatrical movie poster in a tall vertical composition, centered on 2 young women in classic black-and-white maid uniforms standing back-to-back and facing opposite directions. The left maid has a short silver bob haircut with straight bangs and a white maid headband; the right maid has a short vivid pink bob haircut with straight bangs and a matching white maid headband. Both wear fitted black dresses with puff sleeves, white aprons with ruffled trim, white collars and cuffs, and black ribbon accents at the neck. Their poses are confident and tense, with one hand lowered at their sides, suggesting mystery and rivalry. Place them large in the foreground, filling most of the poster height. Behind them, create a split-color night sky: deep electric blue on the left and saturated magenta-pink on the right, blending at the center. In the upper left, show a bright full moon and a small helicopter with a searchlight. Along the horizon and lower sides, include a glowing city skyline, blue-lit on the left and pink-lit on the right. In the center background, place a gothic mansion or castle with pointed towers at the end of a path, illuminated with warm lights. In front of the mansion, show 2 smaller full-body figures of the same maids from behind, walking toward the building side by side. Add 4 supporting characters around the lower edges: 1 dark-haired man in a suit at bottom left, 1 older stern man in a suit at lower right-center, 1 young woman with long dark hair at bottom right, and the 2 small maid figures in the center distance, for a total of 6 visible human figures in the poster. Scatter bright pink flower petals across the image as if blown by the wind. Use intense cinematic lighting, glossy anime rendering, high contrast, sharp linework, glowing rim light, and a suspenseful psychological thriller mood. Include vertical Japanese tagline text on both sides, a large stylized title at the bottom center reading Re:maid, smaller Japanese subtitle text beneath it, and release text at the lower left reading 7.25 [FRI] ROADSHOW. Add a final Japanese tagline line along the bottom. Overall style: premium anime key visual, mystery thriller, neon blue and hot pink dual-color palette, polished poster typography, highly detailed background, dynamic petals, and theatrical film-poster finish.

entries.title: Blindfolded Sorcerer Victory Pose
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-impact shonen manga anime illustration of a powerful white-haired sorcerer in a dramatic low-angle full-body pose, laughing with his head thrown back and mouth wide open, wearing a sleek black high-collar uniform and a black blindfold over his eyes. His left hand is thrust toward the viewer making a two-finger peace sign, with strong foreshortening that makes the hand large in the foreground, while his right arm hangs lower at his side. Surround him with explosive electric blue supernatural energy, violent brushstroke-like aura trails, flying debris, sparks, and swirling curved streaks cutting across the frame. The background should be a dark, abstract, chaotic energy burst with glowing blue shards and motion lines, creating a sense of overwhelming power. Use bold cel-shaded anime rendering with painterly highlights, sharp linework, intense contrast, and glossy fabric folds on the black outfit. On the right side, add 1 large jagged white manga speech bubble with thick black outline containing the text LUDDITES ALWAYS LOSE! in huge distressed black uppercase letters. Vertical composition, dynamic action poster framing, confident triumphant attitude, modern dark fantasy anime aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic vertical anime action poster of a blindfolded white-haired sorcerer with explosive blue energy and a bold manga speech bubble, ideal for stylized character art or fandom-inspired visuals.

entries.title: Surreal Woman at a Weathered Window
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A moody surreal painting of a woman leaning forward through an old window frame, shown from behind and cropped tightly so the composition centers on her wildly windblown dark brown with copper highlights hair streaming left across the image in long tangled strands. Her bare shoulders and upper back are mostly hidden by her hair, and both hands rest on a worn wooden windowsill at the bottom center, with 2 visible fingers on each side gripping the ledge. The face is completely obscured by hair and angle. Behind her is a weathered multi-pane window with 6 rectangular panes in a 3-by-2 grid, painted in cold gray-blue tones with grime, scratches, drips, and distressed edges. Use an expressive mixed-media style combining charcoal, ink, dry brush, scratched lines, and textured oil paint on rough canvas, with sketchy white and black linework layered over muted industrial colors. The mood is introspective, stormy, and haunting, as if wind or emotion is pulling the figure apart. Soft diffused light, subtle contrast, painterly realism fused with abstract expressionism, square composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a square, atmospheric fine-art portrait of a wind-whipped woman at an old window, useful for creating emotional surreal editorial or gallery-style imagery.

entries.title: Nostalgic 80s 90s China Memory Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a richly detailed nostalgic Chinese retro poster collage in warm sepia, faded red, and aged paper tones, designed like a memory scrapbook spread on an old desk. The composition is vertical and packed with miniature diorama scenes embedded inside a large irregular paper cutout path, while a realistic adult hand at the upper right holds a black fountain pen with a gold nib, as if writing the memories into existence. At the top, large distressed Chinese headline text reads 8090的记忆, with smaller handwritten-style subtitle text beneath it reading "那些简单、热闹、发亮的日子". The paper surface should look cracked, yellowed, stained, and worn, with old magazine clippings, notebooks, marbles, ribbon, pencils, enamel mug, and children's illustrated books scattered around the edges. Include exactly 8 numbered memory scenes arranged from top to bottom on the central paper path, each with a red circle number and Chinese handwritten annotations beside it: scene 1 is a boy crouching outdoors aiming a slingshot under a tree; scene 2 is two children running with a metal hoop and stick in an alley; scene 3 is two children crouching over small firecrackers on the ground with smoke and red paper debris; scene 4 is a tiny old-fashioned neighborhood shop counter labeled "供销社", with one child buying snacks from the shopkeeper and shelves packed with goods; scene 5 is a bustling market fair with many adults, baskets, poultry, produce, and a bicycle vendor; scene 6 is an open-air village opera stage with red curtains, performers in colorful traditional costumes, and a seated audience; scene 7 is two children at a tree, one climbing or reaching into a nest while another watches below, with a green tin frog toy nearby; scene 8 is a man riding a motorcycle with a child passenger down an old street at sunset. Add surrounding retro printed items with visible vintage Chinese cover text, including a left-side old children's book, a right-side magazine titled "儿童画报 1985 5", a small blue booklet near the lower left, and a worn exercise notebook near the lower right. At the bottom, place a bold red banner with large cream-colored Chinese text reading 那时候日子不快,但快乐很满。 and a second smaller line reading 很多东西都旧了,可一想起来还是会发亮。. The entire image should feel tactile, cinematic, and emotionally warm, combining photorealistic objects with handcrafted poster design, dense storytelling details, tiny human figures, nostalgic 1980s-1990s Chinese childhood atmosphere, and soft golden lighting.
entries.description: A warm retro collage poster depicting eight iconic childhood memories from 1980s-1990s China, ideal for nostalgic editorial art or social media storytelling.

entries.title: One Piece Manga Coloring Cover Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean manga-coloring test page styled like an official One Piece chapter cover on a light gray background. At the very top, place the large black-and-white ONE PIECE logo with the skull wearing a yellow straw hat with a red band, integrated rope elements, and the silhouette inside the lettering. Centered beneath it, add the subtitle text Chapter 1177: FURIOUS in bold black serif italics. Below that, create one large rectangular full-color illustration framed by a thin black border. The scene shows Nico Robin, a young woman with long straight black hair and pale skin, seated in a garden with her knees drawn up, planting flowers. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur censor block. She wears a loose white short-sleeve shirt and black-and-white horizontal striped thigh-high socks, giving a casual, slightly playful look. Around her are 3 small One Piece characters helping or watching: on the left, Tony Tony Chopper in a straw hat and blue overalls holding a small shovel near freshly dug soil; in the right foreground, another small chibi-like Chopper figure wearing a blue cap with round yellow ear covers labeled "MOGO" and pink shorts, turned partly away; near the center-left foreground, a tiny helper with goggles and a hat standing by the flower bed. The garden is whimsical and storybook-like: a huge old tree with a thick twisting trunk fills the left side, a white picket fence runs behind the flower beds, and a crooked cozy cottage with blue scalloped roof tiles, dormer windows, flower boxes, and a round wooden door stands on the right. The sky is bright blue with a few puffy white clouds. In the flower bed, show exactly 3 distinct flower clusters being planted: 1 pink cluster in Robin's hands, 1 white cluster to the right, and 1 orange cluster farther right, with several dug holes in the brown soil and chopped tree stumps in the foreground. Add a caption strip overlapping the bottom of the illustration with uppercase serif text: READER REQUEST: \. Beneath the image, center the credit line By EIICHIRO ODA in bold black type, and below it a smaller line reading Translation: STEPHEN PAUL • Lettering: VANESSA SATONE. Use crisp inked manga linework with vibrant hand-colored fills, slightly textured shading, and an authentic colored manga cover-page aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a colored manga-style One Piece chapter page with logo, chapter heading, credits, and a whimsical garden illustration centered on Robin planting flowers.

entries.title: Blue-Haired Bunny Hood Anime Girl
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A close-up anime fantasy illustration of a cute young girl in a luminous cathedral-like hall, reaching one hand toward the viewer in strong foreshortened perspective as if inviting them forward. She has long wavy light blue hair spilling from under an oversized glossy green bunny-eared hood, with one ear flopping across the top left and the other hanging down on the right. Her face is mostly obscured by her hair and the hood, creating a mysterious, shy composition. She wears an elaborate frilly outfit in white, green, and pastel pink, with lace trim, ribbons, and a pink bow at the collar. In her other arm she holds 1 plush toy: a white rabbit doll with pink inner ears, a wide open smile, one button X eye, and a small jester-like collar with tiny bells. The background is a grand blue crystal palace interior with tall glowing arches, soft bloom lighting, reflective floors, sparkling particles, and dreamy ethereal atmosphere. entries.title: Cute Four-Panel Cat Jealousy Comic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cute hand-drawn four-panel comic in a soft, warm, slice-of-life style on a light cream background with thick black panel borders and slightly textured paper grain. Use simple rounded cartoon cat anatomy, expressive faces, clean black outlines, muted natural colors, and a gentle manga-like presentation. In the top-left panel, show 2 cats: a brown tabby cat with dark stripes and white muzzle sitting with eyes closed, looking pleased, while a mostly white cat with dark brown patches on the head stands beside it and affectionately licks the tabby's cheek; add 2 small black musical notes above them to suggest happy grooming. In the top-right panel, show the white-and-brown patched cat in the foreground looking toward a small calico kitten standing to the right; include a speech bubble containing the Japanese text "めい" above the kitten. In the bottom-left panel, show 3 cats together: the brown tabby on the left with a surprised or blank expression, the white patched cat on the right looking cheerful, and the small calico kitten centered in front between them, looking up. In the bottom-right panel, show a close-up of the brown tabby cat alone, facing forward with narrowed yellow-green eyes and an angry, jealous expression; add 2 short emphasis lines near the face and 1 small puff-shaped anger symbol to the right. Keep the tone cozy and comedic, with the visual joke that the tabby was happy being groomed until the new kitten appears. Use flat colors, minimal shading, and a charming Japanese webcomic feel.
entries.description: This prompt generates a warm, hand-drawn four-panel cat comic ideal for social posts, manga-style humor, or cozy pet illustrations.

entries.title: Night Forest Thriller Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A moody graphic-novel style book cover illustration set in a snowy conifer forest at night, painted in deep blue tones with cinematic contrast. In the foreground, show exactly 4 human figures standing behind a low striped road barrier: 3 adults and 1 small child. The central adult is a tall broad-shouldered man in a dark winter jacket, holding the sleeping or limp child in his arms; the child wears a puffy purple snowsuit. To his left stands a teenage or young adult male with a backpack beside a dark parked SUV partially visible at the edge of the frame. To his right stands an adult woman in a dark hooded winter jacket, holding a flashlight that casts a warm cone of light onto the snow and the barrier. All faces should be mostly in shadow, unreadable, emphasizing mystery and danger. Place exactly 2 man-made warning elements in the foreground: 1 red-and-white striped gate blocking the path and 1 weathered warning sign on a wooden post showing a deer silhouette inside a red prohibition circle and slash. In the midground and background, fill the scene with tall black pine trees, a narrow snow-covered road or clearing, and a dead animal shape lying partly buried in the snow on the right side. In the far distance, show a rugged snow-streaked mountain under a star-filled sky. From behind the mountain, a single narrow vertical blue beam of light rises straight into the sky, acting as the focal point. Composition should be vertical, dramatic, and poster-like, suitable for a thriller or survival graphic novel cover for La Réserve. Style: detailed Franco-Belgian / realistic comic-book painting, inked outlines, textured brushwork, cold nocturnal atmosphere, subtle rim lighting, high contrast, ominous and suspenseful.
entries.description: A dark graphic-novel cover showing four travelers blocked in a snowy forest at night beneath a mysterious blue beam, ideal for thriller or survival fiction.

entries.title: Gear 5 Chalkboard Classroom Mural
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic classroom interior centered on a large green chalkboard filled with an elaborate chalk mural of Monkey D. Luffy in Gear 5 from One Piece. The drawing dominates the board: a dynamic low-angle foreshortened pose with one oversized foot thrust toward the viewer, both fists raised, wild curly white hair, huge manic grin, intense round eyes, open white jacket, bare muscular chest with visible scars, loose white pants, and a flowing purple sash. Surround him with swirling white smoke-like aura drawn in expressive chalk strokes. On the right side of the chalkboard, include 2 text elements written in chalk: 1 vertical Japanese phrase reading "太陽の神" and 1 large English label reading "GEAR 5" near the lower right. Render the chalk art with layered white, gray, tan, and purple pastel-chalk texture, visible smudging, dust, and hand-drawn shading. Show the full blackboard frame, tray, and a realistic classroom setting with beige walls and a small speaker box above the board. In the foreground, place a worn wooden teacher's desk covered in chalk dust, with exactly 5 visible desk items: 1 open yellow box of multicolored chalk sticks, 3 loose chalk sticks on the desk, and 1 black rectangular chalkboard eraser. Add 2 small erasers resting on the left side of the chalk tray. Soft natural indoor lighting, straight-on composition, highly detailed, realistic photograph of a classroom with spectacular anime chalkboard art.

entries.title: Dark Manga Monster Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark monochrome manga-style horror illustration on a pure black background, in a tall vertical poster composition. Centered at the bottom is a small lonely teenage boy with messy short dark hair, sitting on the ground with his knees pulled to his chest and his arms wrapped around them, head slightly bowed, conveying fear, isolation, and helplessness. Towering over him is a gigantic biomechanical demon or armored monster head descending from above, with a long angular skull-like face, sharp chin, narrow hollow eye sockets, layered helmet-like plates, and a jagged open mouth. Surrounding the boy are exactly 2 enormous skeletal clawed hands, one on the left and one on the right, framing him like a cage; each hand has long segmented metallic fingers ending in sharp pointed tips, bent inward menacingly. Render everything in rough scratchy white ink linework and heavy crosshatching against deep black, with intense high-contrast seinen manga energy. Add vivid neon purple paint-like liquid in splashes and long dripping streaks from the monster's face, the hands, and the ground, pooling around the boy for the only strong color accent. On the upper right side, add vertical Japanese text reading 逃げちゃダメだ, and beneath it in small white English text: EGO BORDER: ACTIVE. The mood is oppressive, psychological, claustrophobic, and nightmarish, like a dark anime poster about inner fear and mental collapse.
entries.description: This prompt generates a high-contrast psychological horror anime poster with a small frightened boy trapped beneath a giant skeletal biomechanical monster, ideal for dramatic cover art or dark character-themed visuals.

entries.title: Gritty Evangelion Unit-01 Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A gritty vertical anime-mecha poster in distressed screen-print style, inspired by retro military dossiers and Evangelion key art. The main subject is a massive close-up side profile of EVANGELION: UNIT-01, dominating the right two-thirds of the composition, facing left with its jaws open in a feral scream. The head is angular and biomechanical, with deep purple armor, olive-green accent plates, black metal inner structures, a single long horn projecting diagonally upward to the left, sharp teeth, and a narrow glowing eye. The surface is scratched, chipped, weathered, and inked with heavy comic-style linework. Behind it is a dark navy blueprint background filled with 8 visible technical diagram clusters, white schematic lines, anatomical overlays, cross-sections, labels, measurement marks, and interface graphics. A violent red paint slash explodes diagonally across the upper center and left side, with additional red drips running downward from the mecha's mouth area. In the lower left corner, 1 small human figure sits hunched on a gray equipment crate: a teenage boy in a short-sleeve white school shirt, dark pants, and white sneakers, elbows on knees, looking down at a glowing handheld device, conveying isolation and anxiety. Add layered poster typography and warning graphics throughout the border: a torn yellow caution sign in the upper right with Japanese warning text and "CAUTION NERV ONLY"; a tall left sidebar with "01", barcode-like blocks, hazard icons, and red-black labels; large distressed white kanji vertically stacked over the mecha torso; the word ESCAPE in spaced red capitals beneath the kanji; a small black label reading "PILOT: IKARI, SHINJI"; a bottom-right NERV logo; and footer text such as classified file markings and top secret stamps. Include 6 clearly readable English technical labels in the blueprint area: "TEST TYPE", "BIOLOGICAL CONSTRAINT", "AT FIELD", "MAGI SYSTEM", "INTERNAL", and "CLASSIFIED MATERIAL". Add Japanese dossier text blocks as authentic graphic texture. The palette is limited to dark indigo, black, crimson red, purple, olive green, dirty beige, and off-white. High contrast, torn-paper collage details, halftone texture, ink splatter, cracked paint, and worn print edges. Cinematic, oppressive, chaotic, collectible poster design, ultra-detailed, sharp, textured, no clean modern polish.
entries.description: This generates a distressed anime-mecha poster featuring a screaming purple biomechanical unit, blueprint overlays, warning graphics, and a small seated pilot figure for collectible print or cover-art use.

entries.searchText: gritty evangelion unit-01 poster this generates a distressed anime-mecha poster featuring a screaming purple biomechanical unit, blueprint overlays, warning graphics, and a small seated pilot figure for collectible print or cover-art use. a gritty vertical anime-mecha poster in distressed screen-print style, inspired by retro military dossiers and evangelion key art. the main subject is a massive close-up side profile of evangelion: unit-01, dominating the right two-thirds of the composition, facing left with its jaws open in a feral scream. the head is angular and biomechanical, with deep purple armor, olive-green accent plates, black metal inner structures, a single long horn projecting diagonally upward to the left, sharp teeth, and a narrow glowing eye. the surface is scratched, chipped, weathered, and inked with heavy comic-style linework. behind it is a dark navy blueprint background filled with 8 visible technical diagram clusters, white schematic lines, anatomical overlays, cross-sections, labels, measurement marks, and interface graphics. a violent red paint slash explodes diagonally across the upper center and left side, with additional red drips running downward from the mecha's mouth area. in the lower left corner, 1 small human figure sits hunched on a gray equipment crate: a teenage boy in a short-sleeve white school shirt, dark pants, and white sneakers, elbows on knees, looking down at a glowing handheld device, conveying isolation and anxiety. add layered poster typography and warning graphics throughout the border: a torn yellow caution sign in the upper right with japanese warning text and "caution nerv only"; a tall left sidebar with "01", barcode-like blocks, hazard icons, and red-black labels; large distressed white kanji vertically stacked over the mecha torso; the word escape in spaced red capitals beneath the kanji; a small black label reading "pilot: ikari, shinji"; a bottom-right nerv logo; and footer text such as classified file markings and top secret stamps. include 6 clearly readable english technical labels in the blueprint area: "test type", "biological constraint", "at field", "magi system", "internal", and "classified material". add japanese dossier text blocks as authentic graphic texture. the palette is limited to dark indigo, black, crimson red, purple, olive green, dirty beige, and off-white. high contrast, torn-paper collage details, halftone texture, ink splatter, cracked paint, and worn print edges. cinematic, oppressive, chaotic, collectible poster design, ultra-detailed, sharp, textured, no clean modern polish. comic / storyboard cinematic

entries.title: Cosmic Ink Dragon Roar
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical close-up of a roaring cosmic dragon head in side profile, painted in a violent ink-splatter and brushstroke style on a stark white background. The creature has a long sharp horn, angular armored facial plates, a glowing white-green eye, and a huge open mouth lined with jagged teeth. Inside the mouth and throat, instead of flesh, there is a swirling galaxy-like void of luminous violet and magenta nebula light, with sparkling stars and dust erupting outward like cosmic fire. The dragon's body is mostly black and deep indigo with glossy highlights, accented by iridescent emerald reflections along the neck and scales. Use expressive high-contrast sumi-e-inspired strokes, splattered paint textures, torn abstract edges, and explosive particle effects concentrated around the eye, mouth, and upper head. Composition should fill the frame with the head tilted upward in a feral scream, cropped tightly for maximum intensity, with no environment and no extra subjects, just raw abstract energy, ink, and celestial debris.
entries.description: A high-contrast fantasy illustration prompt for generating a fierce close-up dragon portrait with galaxy energy effects and expressive ink-splatter styling.

entries.title: Pastel Anime Promo Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bright pastel anime promotional poster for a fictional slice-of-life comedy series. The composition is a single-page Japanese key visual with one central heroine surrounded by 5 inset moments and blocks of Japanese promotional text, like an anime announcement poster. The main character is もち子さん, a cute anime girl with short white hair fading slightly to silver, large vivid blue eyes, soft blush, and twin low ponytails tied near the shoulders. She wears an oversized black hood shaped like floppy dog ears, round silver goggles resting on top of her head, a black choker with a metallic round ornament, a futuristic white-and-black cropped sleeveless top with dark trim and a small emblem on the chest, detached black arm sleeves, very short white shorts with black edging, a thigh strap on one leg, and a small side pouch on her hip. Her body proportions are youthful anime stylization with a slim, petite build and slightly exaggerated chest, rendered in polished modern moe character design. In the center she stands full body, smiling gently and holding a pen in one hand as if she is about to make a mistake while writing, facing the viewer in a confident but sweet pose. Around her place 5 supporting vignette images of the same character: 1) upper left, a chibi-style scene of her outside with both hands thrown forward, crying dramatically with a huge open mouth; 2) lower left, a comic scene of her collapsed face-down on a desk or floor with scattered papers, exhausted and flustered; 3) upper right, a bust shot where she holds up a paper sign with Japanese writing, looking apologetic; 4) lower right, a cheerful half-body portrait with closed smiling eyes and one fist raised in encouragement; 5) a small background portrait in the top-right area behind text, used like a character callout. Include exactly 2 small white mascot creatures near the bottom center, both round and mochi-like with tiny dot eyes and tiny mouths, one larger and one smaller, floating or standing beside the heroine. Use a soft spring palette with pink, sky blue, mint green, peach, cream, and white, with scattered cherry blossom petals and rounded graphic shapes in the background. The background should feel airy and celebratory, with subtle outdoor scenery blur and decorative swooshes, stars, and bubbles. Fill the poster with Japanese typography in a playful commercial-anime style: a large multicolored title at top left, small header text above it, a red seasonal broadcast announcement, a pink "あらすじ" synopsis box on the left with several lines of body text, a blue explanatory box at bottom left, vertical and angled exclamatory phrases around the character, and a pink production-credit block at bottom right. Add a prominent character name banner in the upper right. Keep all text looking like authentic printed Japanese promotional copy, using rounded colorful fonts for the title and clean magazine-style fonts for the smaller text. Overall mood: adorable, comedic, slightly chaotic, professionally designed anime key art for a new TV series announcement in 16:9 landscape format.
entries.description: A colorful Japanese anime announcement poster featuring a white-haired mascot girl with multiple comedic inset scenes, ideal for recreating TV-series key visuals or parody promotional art.

entries.title: Moonlit Anime Horror Cosplay Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark, cinematic anime-horror key visual in a vertical poster composition, set at night inside or beside a shattered window with a huge glowing full moon dominating the background. In the center foreground, a young couple stands in an intimate embrace. The male figure is tall and slim, wearing a dark brown or charcoal hoodie with the hood up, white drawstrings, subtle red blood-like stains on the sleeve and lower hem, and dark red pants. His skin is pale, his long black hair falls over one eye, and the lower half of his face is wrapped in dirty white bandages stained with blood, giving him a disturbing but protective antihero presence. One hand and wrist are also wrapped in bandages. He looks slightly upward and away with a solemn, haunted expression while holding the girl around her back. The female figure is petite with extremely long straight platinum-blonde hair reaching past her waist, wearing a loose white coat or cardigan over a black-and-white outfit and a black choker. She faces him closely with both hands clasped together against his chest, creating a tender contrast against the horror atmosphere. Add 2 ghostly supporting figures in the background: on the left, a pale blonde girl in shadow wearing striped clothing and holding an object close to her chest; on the right, a hooded male figure in profile with glasses or sharp facial lines, his hood marked by a dark blood stain. The environment is filled with floating shards of broken glass, blue moonlight, dust motes, and star-like particles, with deep navy, black, and icy blue tones throughout. Place a stylized red Japanese title at the top right, 殺戮の天使, with a smaller red serif English subtitle beneath it reading Memory Collection. Make the overall style a polished live-action cosplay poster blended with anime horror cover art, highly detailed, dramatic rim lighting, glossy fabric textures, supernatural atmosphere, tragic romance mood, and a premium game or visual novel promotional aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic vertical anime-horror promotional poster with a moonlit couple, two shadowy background figures, and a dark supernatural romance atmosphere.

entries.title: Anime Martial Arts Dojo Duel
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dynamic anime action illustration of two young martial-arts women fighting inside a traditional Japanese-style wooden dojo. The left fighter is in the foreground, a black-haired girl with a neat bun tied by a yellow ribbon, wearing a sleeveless yellow Chinese kung fu tunic with black trim, loose black pants, and black cloth shoes. She is in a deep low stance on the wooden floor, one fist pulled back and the other punching forward, surrounded by bright red energy trails that arc around her body and sweep across the scene. Water splashes dramatically around her feet as if her movement skims through a shallow layer of water. The right fighter is airborne in the midground, a pale-skinned girl with light lavender hair in two round buns, wearing a short black-and-white cheongsam-inspired battle dress with gold trim, black sheer tights, and black shoes. She performs a flying side kick while a vivid blue energy spiral curls around her in a circular motion. The collision of force between them has cracked and exploded the wooden floor at center-right, with debris and wood fragments flying outward, while dust and smoke billow across the lower right corner. The dojo interior has exposed timber beams, tatami edging, shoji-style windows, and warm natural light entering from the left. Hang a wooden sign above them with the Chinese text 币安 vs OKX. Use a dramatic wide-angle composition, strong foreshortening, cinematic motion blur, intense speed lines, high-detail anime rendering, glossy highlights, clean line art, energetic combat choreography, and a polished poster-like finish. Add exactly 2 visible fighters, 1 overhead wooden sign, 1 cracked floor impact point, 1 red energy effect around the left fighter, and 1 blue energy effect around the right fighter. Optionally place a subtle watermark-like text at the lower right reading UM YouMind.
entries.description: This prompt generates a high-energy anime-style two-girl martial arts battle scene in a wooden dojo, ideal for dramatic promotional art or social media visuals.

entries.title: Anime Martial Arts Duel in Dojo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic anime action illustration inside an old wooden martial arts hall, showing two young women in mid-battle with explosive motion and elemental energy trails. In the foreground, a fierce female martial artist lunges low toward the viewer in a powerful punching stance, her right fist extended straight ahead and her body twisted dynamically. She has dark black hair tied into a messy high bun with loose strands and red ribbons, sharp intense eyes, and a focused combative expression. She wears a white traditional Chinese martial arts top with red trim, red tassel frog closures, and subtle embroidered patterns, paired with flowing deep red pants and black cloth shoes with red accents. Red ribbon-like energy and glowing scarlet brushstroke arcs coil around her arms, torso, and legs, sweeping across the frame like fiery calligraphy. In the upper right, a second young woman leaps through the air in a defensive or spellcasting pose, one hand stretched outward. She has light purple hair styled in two buns with trailing strands and ornate gold hair ornaments. She wears a dark green Chinese-style dress with gold embroidery, black stockings, and dark shoes. Bright blue water-like energy spirals around her in a large circular arc, splashing and glittering with luminous droplets. Set the scene in a weathered dojo or wuguan interior with tall wooden beams, hanging lanterns, broken floorboards, flying splinters, dust, sparks, and debris exploding from the impact of the fight. Include one large wooden signboard above them with the black calligraphy text 武术会, plus two vertical hanging banners, the left reading 以武会友 and the right reading 刚柔并济. Use a low-angle cinematic perspective, strong foreshortening, extreme motion, dense particles, and dramatic warm-vs-cool color contrast between the red and blue energy. Highly detailed anime painting, ultra-dynamic composition, sharp linework, rich textures, glowing effects, volumetric lighting, and epic battle key visual quality.

The background is completely black, emphasizing the dramatic lighting and intricate cross-hatching details on the man's face, hands, and clothing. The style resembles a detailed, gritty manga or graphic novel.

entries.title: Anime BBQ Girls Key Visual
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An anime-style key visual poster for a fictional slice-of-life anime. In the foreground left, an energetic blonde anime girl with star hairpins and blue eyes wears an American flag t-shirt and denim shorts, holding tongs with a slice of smoked meat towards the viewer. In the foreground right, a gentle girl with long dark hair and a white sweater sits at a wooden table writing in a notebook. In the background, two more girls are present: one with a brown ponytail carrying firewood, and another with short silver hair holding a blue mug. The scene is a sunny outdoor BBQ area with a large black smoker grill featuring a sign that reads LONE STAR BBQ. In the immediate foreground is a massive wooden platter loaded with sliced brisket, ribs, sausages, burnt ends, and pickles, along with side dishes like coleslaw and bread. In the top left corner, a large, cute, bubbly anime logo reads もくもく すもーく ガールズ with smoke and grill motifs. In the bottom left corner, there is a staff credits block with names and roles. In the bottom right corner, a small text box lists four character names. The overall atmosphere is cheerful, highly detailed, and vibrant.

entries.title: Anime Light Novel Cover Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An anime-style light novel cover illustration featuring two characters in an intimate pose. On the left, a young woman with short dark hair, purple eyes, wearing a white hat, a frilly white dress with a pink bow tie, white gloves, and two white flower hairpins. She has an affectionate, teasing smile and is gently touching the chin of the man next to her. On the right, an adult man with red hair parted in the middle, purple eyes, and a light goatee. He is wearing a black button-down shirt and has a slightly annoyed, reluctant expression with a sweat drop on his cheek. The scene features soft, romantic lighting with out-of-focus purple flower petals in the foreground corners. The image includes several Japanese text elements: a large stylized main title at the bottom reading ちかつば, a subtitle below it reading ーその溺愛、独占欲の裏返し。ー, vertical text on the top left reading 可愛いだけじゃ、許さない。, and vertical text on the top right reading その不機嫌、俺だけに向けろよ。.

entries.title: Watercolor Picture Book Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A watercolor illustration of a children's picture book cover. The main subject is a cute furry kemonomimi girl with short green hair, cat ears, and green eyes. She is smiling happily while holding up her middle finger with a white-furred hand. She wears a green garment with a fluffy white collar. The background features soft, painted green foliage and small yellow flowers on textured paper. At the top, large hand-drawn green Japanese text reads "なかゆびさん". Below it, brown Japanese text reads "こんにちは". On the middle-left, smaller black text reads "さく・え:とらの". The image has a visible book spine on the left edge, emphasizing the physical book format.

entries.title: Anime Light Novel Cover with Painters
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An anime-style promotional illustration of 3 characters running forward dynamically amidst a joyful painting scene under a bright blue sky with fluffy clouds. On the left, a blonde young woman in an elegant white ruffled dress and gloves smiles brightly, holding a paintbrush dripping with pink paint. In the center, a black-haired young man in blue overalls and a black t-shirt looks excited, holding a roll of masking tape and a green paint roller. On the right, an older laughing man wears dark traditional Japanese work clothes with a white towel around his neck. Colorful paint splatters fly through the air alongside floating props including 2 paint buckets, 2 paintbrushes, and 2 rolls of masking tape. At the top is a stylized title logo reading お嬢様は塗装を知らない decorated with paint splatters. Below it is a banner ribbon reading 清楚なお嬢様 × 塗装男子. At the bottom, a bold tagline reads 未知の世界でふたりの距離が縮まっていく...!. The style features vibrant colors and a light novel cover aesthetic.

entries.title: Anime Light Novel Cover Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime-style light novel cover illustration. In the foreground, a beautiful young woman with long silver hair and large blue eyes wears an intricate white lace dress and a silver floral tiara with white roses, reaching her hand forward with a gentle, longing smile. Behind her, a young man with black hair wearing an ornate black coat with red accents and silver chains stands facing away, looking back over his shoulder melancholically. They are on a balcony overlooking a gothic fantasy castle city at dusk, with white petals scattering in the wind. The image features prominent, elegant Japanese typography. The large main title reads "善人をやめた悪役貴公子は、白薔薇の聖女を遠ざける" in stylized fonts with gold and blue gradients. A vertical catchphrase on the left reads "世界を守るため、俺はもっと悪になる。" and another on the right reads "世界を敵に回しても、あなたの隣にいたい。". Additional text at the bottom includes author credits and a publisher logo. The overall mood is dramatic and romantic with dynamic lighting.
entries.description: Generates a dramatic, high-quality anime-style light novel cover featuring two characters, a fantasy background, and elegant Japanese typography.

entries.title: Anime Music Romance Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An anime-style movie poster featuring a bright, energetic high school girl in the foreground and a quiet high school boy in the background. The girl has long dark purple hair adorned with ribbons and musical note clips, wearing a white short-sleeved school uniform shirt, a dark plaid skirt, and a striped ribbon tie. She is smiling warmly and reaching forward, handing a piece of paper to the viewer that reads この歌、あなたと、未来で届けたいです...♡. In the background, the boy sits at a desk, leaning his head on his hand with an aloof expression. He has messy dark hair, wears a dark blazer over a white hoodie, and has headphones around his neck. The setting is a sunlit room equipped for music production, featuring two computer monitors displaying audio waveforms, a microphone, and a keyboard. The scene features bright, cinematic lighting with lens flares and sparkling effects. Prominent text overlays include large vertical catchphrases on the left reading 億再生 秘密 初恋 運命の歌 in pink and blue, a massive stylized main title 放課後ミリオンノート in the lower center with sparkling gradients, and a subtitle 〜陰キャの僕が億再生ボカロPだと、歌い手志望のお嬢様だけが知っている〜 just below it. A dense block of movie credits sits at the very bottom alongside a logo reading STELLA FILM THEATER.
entries.description: Generates a cinematic anime-style promotional poster for a youth romance story centered around music production, complete with titles and credits.

entries.title: Surrealist Koi Fish Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A surrealist digital illustration style, using a low-angle upward perspective. The scene depicts a giant colorful koi fish swimming in a dreamlike nebula, surrounded by vibrant nebulae and bubbles. In the center of the frame stands a small figure, back to the audience, looking up calmly at the huge koi in the air, while the koi looks down at the person. The overall image presents a strong contrast in scale, with an ethereal and dreamlike atmosphere. Ratio 9:16

entries.title: Multi-Angle Studio Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, generate a 4-panel studio-style character sheet. Transform the black-and-white reference into full color, applying natural skin tones and black hair. Remove the original environment and place the subject against a plain grey background with clean, neutral studio lighting. The generated grid must show the exact same character, wearing the preserved white lace camisole and heart necklace, in 4 distinct poses: 1) straight-on front view, 2) right profile view, 3) left 3/4 view looking over the shoulder, and 4) right 3/4 view looking slightly down.

entries.title: Woman Embracing a Bear in Winter
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic shot of a young woman with long wavy brown hair with small braids wearing rustic, heavy brown historical garments with fur trim and leather pouches. She is kneeling in the snow and tenderly hugging a massive, gentle brown grizzly bear. Both the woman and the bear have their eyes closed in a peaceful, affectionate embrace. The bear rests its large head against her. The setting is a snowy pine forest during winter, with soft, natural daylight. Light snowflakes are dusted across the woman's hair and the bear's thick fur. High detail, 8k resolution, fantasy realism.

entries.title: Anime Movie Poster at Twilight Station
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic anime-style movie poster of a girl with light blue hair, animal ears, and a fluffy tail, wearing an oversized white t-shirt. She stands on a wet, reflective rural Japanese train station platform at twilight, looking back over her shoulder. The sky is a dramatic gradient of deep blue to pink. The platform has a glowing vending machine, train tracks, and signs reading "終点 TERMINAL" and "まもなく 終点 ご乗車ありがとうございました". Elegant typography includes top text "終点のひとつ手前で、ソーダさんはいつも笑う。", a large bottom title "終点からソーダさん" with English subtitle "FROM THE TERMINAL, SODA-SAN", and bottom text "たぶん恋ではなく、もう少し炭酸だった。".

entries.title: Xianxia Cityscape from God's-Eye View
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An extreme top-down god's-eye perspective looking directly down at a vast, glowing ancient Chinese city extending to the horizon, where the curvature of the planet is visible. In the foreground, a lone swordsman in traditional robes stands on the edge of an ornate, dark-tiled ancient palace roof, looking down. Below lies an endless sea of ancient architecture illuminated by warm glowing lights, bustling streets, and dense crowds. Soft mist and fog layers drift through the sprawling metropolis. Photorealistic fantasy concept art, Chinese Xianxia aesthetics, extreme wide angle, massive depth of field. Grand, lonely, and poetic atmosphere with strong color contrast and a moody dark blue and warm gold color palette.

entries.title: Watercolor Double-Exposure Fantasy Silhouette
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy watercolor double-exposure illustration where the main shape is the side profile silhouette of a young anime girl facing left. Inside her silhouette is a rich, layered fantasy world. At the top is a grand white castle with multiple spires under a starry night sky with a crescent moon. Below the castle, two cloaked figures stand in a mystical forest. In the center, a young female mage with pink hair holding a glowing magical staff stands prominently. To the left of the mage, a white horse is visible. At the bottom of the silhouette is a fantasy village surrounded by blooming cherry blossom trees, with a large open spellbook and a sword resting in the foreground. The artwork features a soft pastel purples, pinks, and blues color palette. The background outside the silhouette is textured parchment with soft watercolor splatters and fading cherry blossom petals, with the signature "tamanyo" written in cursive at the bottom left.

entries.title: Cinematic Anime Train Station Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic anime-style movie poster featuring an anime girl with short blue hair, blue cat ears, and a fluffy blue cat tail, wearing an oversized white t-shirt. She is standing on a wet, reflective outdoor train station platform at twilight, looking back over her shoulder with a gentle, melancholic expression. The background features a beautifully detailed sky transitioning from deep blue to orange and pink, with scattered clouds and early stars. To the left is an illuminated vending machine and an overhead electronic sign displaying Japanese text about the terminal station. To the right, train tracks curve away into the distance alongside rusty metal railings and a convex mirror. The lighting is atmospheric and nostalgic. At the top center, small elegant Japanese text reads "終点のひとつ手前で、ソーダさんはいつも笑う。". At the bottom, large elegant Japanese typography displays the main title "終点からソーダさん", with the English subtitle "FROM THE TERMINAL, SODA-SAN" just below it. At the very bottom edge, small Japanese text reads "たぶん恋ではなく、もう少し炭酸だった。".

entries.title: Fantasy Xianxia Portrait Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the character base, transform the subject into a fantasy Xianxia setting. Dress her in elaborate purple and gold traditional Chinese robes with a sheer purple veil. Add ornate gold and pearl hair accessories and long pointed nail guards. Change her pose so she is looking slightly away, with one hand raised delicately near her face and the other holding a large, glowing white lotus flower. Set the scene at night with a large full moon, a dark silhouette of a traditional temple roof, and cherry blossom branches. Apply an ethereal, magical purple-tinted moonlight effect.

entries.title: Anime Scholars with Cosmic Holograms
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An anime illustration of two characters at a desk in a cozy study overlooking the ocean at sunset. In the foreground, a young man in a dark knit sweater sits with his back to the viewer. Facing him is a young woman with long blonde hair and striking, glowing blue eyes, wearing an elegant navy and white Victorian dress with a sapphire brooch. Floating between them are exactly 4 glowing holographic spheres connected by faint lines, showing cosmic and futuristic scenes: a swirling galaxy, a golden energy tree, a futuristic control room, and a planet with an energy burst. The desk holds open astronomical journals, a starry mug with steam, a glowing brass lamp, a pocket watch, and a pen. Warm sunset lighting contrasts with the magical blue and gold holograms.

entries.title: Anime Light Novel Cover with Typography
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An anime light novel cover. Top left features a stylized Japanese title 黒焔の魔眼使いは、追放先の学園都市で三人の最強ヒロインに溺愛される and English subtitle The Exiled Black-Flame Eye in Arcane Metropolis. A vertical Japanese blurb on the right reads 追放されたはずの俺が、なぜか最強美少女たちの運命そのものになっていた。. The scene includes 4 characters and 1 creature. Centered is a male protagonist with black hair, a glowing red eye, and a dark coat. He is surrounded by 3 heroines: a top-right girl with long silver hair and a white-blue crystal dress; a mid-left blonde girl with a side ponytail casting a pink magic circle; and a bottom-right girl with short magenta hair holding a grimoire. A black-and-white wolf familiar sits bottom-left. The background is a dark gothic academy at night, filled with floating pink petals, glowing magic particles, shattered glass, and a faint demonic figure top-right.
entries.description: Generates a detailed anime-style light novel cover featuring a protagonist, a harem of heroines, magical effects, and integrated Japanese and English typography.

entries.title: Post-Apocalyptic Tactical Anime Girl
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-quality anime illustration of a young girl with short brown hair with cat ears and blue eyes standing in a post-apocalyptic wasteland. She is wearing a white short-sleeve shirt, blue plaid pleated skirt, black thigh-high socks with white stripes, and a heavy tactical chest rig, equipped with a backpack, a wrist-mounted retro-futuristic computer device, and a katana strapped to her waist. The background features a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. To her right is a heavily rusted brick building with a large, weathered red sign on the roof partially reading "RED R" alongside a red rocket sculpture. In the foreground, there is a rusted bright blue metal container cart, and to the left, a dilapidated, rusted blue car sits among dry, overgrown weeds and debris. The scene combines vibrant anime character design with detailed, realistic textures of rust and decay.
entries.description: Generates an anime-style illustration of a schoolgirl with tactical gear in a vibrant, rusted post-apocalyptic wasteland.

entries.title: Traditional Chinese Ink Wash Banquet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed traditional Chinese ink wash painting of an outdoor banquet. Across the top, an unrolled scroll displays Chinese calligraphy reading 君不見,黃河之水天上來. Below, a landscape features a waterfall and red sun on the left, and a full moon over a water pavilion on the right. In the foreground, 10 figures gather around a stone table. The central bearded man in white robes is standing and raising a wine cup to the sky. He is surrounded by 8 seated scholars drinking and 1 servant boy carrying a wine jar. The table holds fruit and metal pitchers. Large ceramic wine jars sit on the ground. On the left, 3 goats rest among rocks. In the background right, 1 figure rides a horse near pine trees.
entries.description: Generates a traditional Chinese landscape painting of scholars drinking wine, complete with a calligraphy scroll at the top.

entries.title: Mars Rover Discovery Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic, raw space agency photo of a Martian landscape with red dirt, scattered rocks, and a hazy orange sky. In the middle ground, two dark stone tablets covered in ancient carved hieroglyphs are jutting out of the ground at a slight angle. In the immediate foreground, the distinct shadow of a Mars rover is cast onto the rocky terrain, indicating the perspective of the photo. Across the top edge of the image, there is a plain white text overlay resembling a raw file name reading "ZCAM_0847_0734291854_678RAD_N0412172ZCAM08050_1100LUJ01.png". The lighting is harsh and realistic, mimicking actual extraterrestrial surface photography.

entries.title: Gritty Tattooed Woman Mugshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic, slightly grainy, low-lighting mugshot of a young woman with long, messy black hair, prominent cheekbones, and full lips. She has a small tattoo near her right eye and extensive, intricate mandala-style tattoos covering her neck, chest, and both hands/arms. She is wearing a simple black sleeveless top. She is holding up a rectangular white placard with blurred-out text, held with both hands showing long, manicured nails. The background is a plain white cinderblock wall with a height chart on the right side, showing numbers like 150, 160, and 170 in black stencil font. The overall aesthetic is gritty and raw, resembling a genuine police booking photograph.

entries.title: Anime School Stairwell Conversation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-quality 2D anime screenshot of two students talking on a Japanese school stairwell landing. On the left, a blonde anime girl with red eyes, wearing a cream sweater and plaid skirt carries a navy school bag. She looks toward a black spiky-haired anime boy in a black school blazer and striped tie on the right. They stand facing each other mid-conversation. Soft daylight streams through a background window, illuminating the stairs and a 2F directional sign on the wall.

entries.title: Anime Fantasy Cityscape Exhibition Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic anime illustration of an elf girl with long white hair in twin tails wearing a white and gold dress holding a brown briefcase on a stone balcony. Beside her is a pillar with potted blue flowers. In the background, a girl with long purple hair in a black dress looks out over a sprawling fantasy European city with a castle and ocean. A white bird flies in the foreground. The top right features elegant typography reading "葬送のフリーレン", "F R I E R E N", and "アニメーション原画展". The artwork is framed by a thin decorative border.
entries.description: Generates a high-quality anime illustration of characters overlooking a fantasy city, perfect for exhibition posters or promotional art.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
{
 "type": "comic book page layout",
 "header": {
 "title": "",
 "subtitle": "",
 "part": "PART ONE",
 "credits": [

 "JOHN ROMITA JR. PENCILS",
 "KLAUS JANSON INKS",
 "BRITTANY PEZZILLO COLORS",
 "VC'S JOE SABINO LETTERS"
 ]
 },
 "panels": [
 {
 "id": 1,
 "position": "top row",
 "visual": " crouching on a rooftop overlooking a city skyline at sunset. Includes a right-side inset panel showing a close-up of the masked face.",
 "text_boxes": 3,
 "text_content": [
 "NEW YORK NEVER STOPS.",
 "AND SOME DAYS IT FEELS LIKE NEITHER DO I.",
 "BUT TODAY... I PAUSED."
 ]
 },
 {
 "id": 2,
 "position": "second row",
 "visual": " indoors, looking at a smartphone, holding a mug reading 'WORLD'S OKAYEST SCIENTIST'.",
 "text_boxes": 2,
 "speech_bubbles": 3,
 "text_content": [
 "CITYWIDE OUTAGE AVERTED THANKS TO EARLY RESPONSE BY LOCAL HEROES.",
 "--CHANNEL 5.",
 "\"LOCAL HEROES.\"",
 "THAT'S... NICE.",
 "BUT SOME PEOPLE DON'T GET HEADLINES."
 ]
 },
 {
 "id": 3,
 "position": "third row",
 "layout": "diagonally split into 3 sub-scenes",
 "visuals": [
 "young man walking in a city crowd",
 "sepia-toned memory of an older man smiling",
 "superhero swinging on a web"
 ],
 "text_boxes": 4,
 "text_content": [
 "MY UNCLE BEN USED TO SAY:",
 "\"\"",
 "I THINK ABOUT THAT EVERY DAY.",
 "BEING SPIDER-MAN ISN'T JUST ABOUT STOPPING THE BIG THREATS."
 ]
 },
 {
 "id": 4,
 "position": "fourth row, left",
 "visual": "superhero shooting a web, swinging into a chaotic street with civilians running from a fire/explosion.",
 "speech_bubbles": 1,
 "text_boxes": 1,
 "text_content": [
 "ON YOUR LEFT!",
 "IT'S ABOUT THE PEOPLE."
 ]
 },
 {
 "id": 5,
 "position": "fourth row, right",
 "visual": "close-up of a young Black girl smiling at the superhero.",
 "speech_bubbles": 1,
 "text_boxes": 1,
 "text_content": [
 "THANK YOU, SPIDER-MAN!",
 "ALWAYS."
 ]
 },
 {
 "id": 6,
 "position": "bottom row",
 "visual": "silhouette of the superhero sitting on a rooftop water tower at dusk.",
 "text_boxes": 2,
 "text_content": [
 "THE CITY NEEDS HOPE.",
 "AND AS LONG AS I CAN SWING, I'LL BE THERE."
 ],
 "footer_text": "TO BE CONTINUED!"
 }
 ]
}

entries.title: Visual Novel Screenshot Mockup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A visual novel screenshot of an anime-style classroom scene featuring exactly four high school girls in matching uniforms consisting of grey blazers, white shirts, red ribbons, and blue skirts. On the far left, a girl with short coral hair and a red bow looks excited with clenched fists. Next to her, a girl with long dark purple hair holds a red book with a gentle smile. Beside her, a girl with short pink pigtails and a red hairclip stands with crossed arms looking slightly grumpy. On the far right, a girl with long brown hair in a ponytail and a large white bow leans forward on a desk, smiling and talking. The classroom features a window on the right, a bulletin board on the left, and a foreground desk holding exactly three items: a notebook, a pink book, and a pen. On the back wall is a single poster reading Just Monika. ♥. In the top left corner is a circular pastel logo reading Doki Doki Literature Club! decorated with a green pencil and a pink heart. At the bottom of the screen is a pink polka-dot visual novel dialogue box. The name tag reads Monika and the main dialogue text reads 'Welcome to the Literature Club!' 'It's a pleasure to meet you all!' ♥. Below the dialogue is a menu row reading 'History Skip Auto Save Load Settings'.

entries.title: Samurai Armor Turnaround Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a clean fantasy character concept sheet for a heavily armored samurai warrior, suitable for game or film pre-production.

Canvas: Wide horizontal white studio background, roughly 16:9, with faint gray watercolor texture at the edges and no environment. Use crisp comic-book concept art linework, detailed ink outlines, subtle cel shading, muted colors, and high-contrast armor highlights.

Layout: Show exactly 4 discrete full-body figures arranged left to right: 1 small pale gray human scale silhouette on the far left, 1 large front-view warrior, 1 large three-quarter-view warrior facing slightly right, and 1 large right-side-profile warrior. Keep the three warrior views evenly spaced and aligned at the feet like a turnaround sheet.

Subject details: The character is a tall, broad, muscular older male samurai with long white hair tied back, visible hairline and ponytail, and a plain blurred rectangular face censor over the face in each warrior view. He wears dark layered samurai armor in black lacquer with deep burgundy red plates and cords: large segmented shoulder guards, plated chest cuirass, layered waist skirt armor, forearm bracers, shin guards, wrapped trousers, split-toe boots, and tied waist sash. The armor is bulky, worn, and functional, with many rectangular lamellar plates, rivets, straps, red lacing, and black under-cloth.

Weapons and counted elements: Include exactly 3 warrior poses and exactly 1 scale silhouette. Include exactly 4 visible sword elements across the sheet: a sheathed katana or sword handle rising diagonally behind the front-view warrior's left shoulder, a short dark scabbard or sword held downward near the front-view warrior's right side, a sheathed katana handle rising diagonally behind the three-quarter-view warrior's left shoulder, and a curved katana drawn at the right-side-profile warrior's waist extending diagonally backward. Do not add extra weapons.

Pose details: Front-view warrior stands powerfully with fists clenched, feet apart, shoulders square. Three-quarter-view warrior stands with one fist clenched and the other hand near a lowered scabbard, head turned slightly. Side-profile warrior stands upright looking left, showing the layered side silhouette of the shoulder armor, waist plates, ponytail, and sword at the hip.

Style constraints: Keep the background blank white, no title text, no labels, no logos, no watermark. Use a realistic comic concept-art style rather than anime chibi. Make the armor intricate and readable, with dark red-black palette, white hair contrast, and clean full-body silhouettes.
entries.description: A structured prompt for generating a wide character concept sheet showing a dark armored samurai from multiple views with a scale silhouette.

entries.title: 3D CG Ethereal Starry Fairy
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An adult oriental fantasy female character, dreamy galaxy fairy style, 3D CG high-precision illustration texture, 9:16 vertical composition, the scene is filled with holographic galaxies, flowing light particles, Milky Way ribbons, and soft mist halos. The character is located slightly to the left of the center, half-body to thigh perspective, with the body in an elegant S-shaped dynamic standing pose. Her upper body tilts slightly to one side, the waist is naturally constricted and gently twisted, and the hips form a soft arc in the opposite direction. One shoulder is slightly raised while the other is relaxed. The overall posture looks like a slow rotation in the starry river, appearing both light and feminine. Her head is slightly lowered, her face is in a two-thirds profile, her eyes are gentle, quiet, and dreamy, and her expression is cool and elegant. She has exquisite and soft oriental fantasy features, fair and transparent skin with soft subsurface scattering and pearly highlights. Her facial contours are clean and delicate, with a slender nose, soft lips, and long eyelashes. Her long hair is a gradient of pale silver-white and light pink-purple; the strands are blown by the stellar wind, scattering widely to the right side of the frame, forming a strong flowing arc that echoes the S-shaped body curve. Her outfit is a dreamy galaxy gown, made of light and transparent material while maintaining elegant restraint. The shoulders have a soft tulle structure, and the chest and waist feature galaxy-like gradient light textures. Colors are mainly light pink, light blue, lavender purple, and pearl white, with local golden stardust accents. The skirt seems fused from nebulae and tulle, fluttering lightly and forming spiral light bands around her body, emphasizing the waistline, shoulder-neck line, and overall S-shaped posture without being overly revealing. The background is a dreamy cosmic galaxy space with an overall color palette of light pink, light blue, lavender purple, and soft gold, filled with fine starlight, stardust particles, Milky Way streamlines, and translucent holographic light bands. Light falls softly from the upper left, creating gentle rim lighting on her hair, shoulders, cheeks, and the edges of the gown. The image has a strong sense of atmosphere with soft halos, making the whole scene feel like floating in a Milky Way dream. Composition requirements: The character's body lines should form a clear but natural S-curve; the shoulders, waist, and hips should form a soft reverse dynamic; the hair and galaxy ribbons together form a wrapping flow; the image should retain a lot of dreamy mist and stardust; the character should be elegant, soft, dreamy, and sophisticated; focus on expressing the soft curves of the female figure, the galaxy fairy temperament, and a high-end sense of fantasy. Style keywords: dreamy fantasy girl, celestial goddess, galaxy dress, holographic starlight, soft pastel colors, ethereal beauty, elegant S-curve pose, cinematic lighting, ultra detailed 3D CG, soft glow, translucent silk, star particles, romantic fantasy atmosphere, high-end illustration, 16K detail, vertical poster composition. Negative prompts: incorrect body proportions, deformed fingers, extra fingers, extra arms, facial distortion, asymmetrical eyes, cheap texture, gray and dull, dirty tones, over-sharpening, low resolution, cluttered background, text, watermark, logo.
entries.description: A detailed prompt for generating a high-precision 3D CG illustration of a dreamlike oriental fairy in a galaxy-themed dress.

entries.title: Cozy Pixel Farm Island Village
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a bright cozy pixel-art farming village map on small islands in a blue ocean, like a top-down/isometric 16-bit life-sim game screenshot.

Canvas: 4:3 landscape image, about 1024×768, crisp pixel art with no UI overlay, no borders, no watermark. Use a vibrant turquoise ocean background with gentle wave highlights, ripples around shores, scattered lily pads, and small rocks.

Layout: Show exactly 6 grassy/sandy islands connected by wooden bridges and docks. The largest central island sits in the middle and contains the main house, paths, a fenced crop field, a well, a signpost, a human character, and a dog. Four smaller grassy islands surround it at upper left, upper right, lower left, and right. One small sandy beach island sits near the bottom center.

Island count and contents:
1. Central island: irregular grassy island with dirt paths forming a crossroad. Place a cozy blue-roof cottage near the top center with a chimney puffing smoke, round attic window, wooden front door, flower boxes, shrubs, and a short fence behind it. Put a small pixel farmer character named young farmer standing slightly below center beside a corgi-like dog. Add a fenced crop plot at the lower center with exactly 4 crop rows: leafy green vegetables, white turnips, orange carrots, and golden wheat. Add a stone well to the left of the crop plot, a wooden signpost with a hanging lantern near the left-center path, bushes with flowers, small stones, and daisies.
2. Upper-left island: red-roof barn with open double doors, hay bales, a fenced pen, and exactly 1 black-and-white cow. Include a large leafy tree, crates, flowers, and a wooden bridge connecting to the central island.
3. Upper-right island: village shop with purple roof, striped purple-and-white awning, front door, window display, flower pots, barrel, and a freestanding signboard. The sign above the awning must read SHOP. Include a fruit tree with red apples and a bridge connecting to the central island.
4. Lower-left island: fishing dock island with a wooden pier, a lamppost, barrels, crates, small tackle box/sign, and exactly 1 small wooden rowboat tied near the dock. Connect this island to the central island with a wooden bridge.
5. Right island: small orange-roof cottage with chimney, round attic window, front door, blue window, flower box, small fence, trees, flowers, and a wooden bridge connecting to the central island.
6. Bottom-center island: tiny sandy beach with a palm tree, red-and-white beach umbrella, blue-striped lounge chair, starfish, shell, and grass around the edges; it is not connected by a bridge.

Discrete element counts to preserve: exactly 6 islands, exactly 4 bridges connecting to the central island, exactly 4 buildings total (barn, blue-roof cottage, purple shop, orange-roof cottage), exactly 1 human character, exactly 2 animals (1 cow and 1 dog), exactly 1 rowboat, exactly 1 crop field with 4 visible crop types, exactly 1 well, exactly 1 signpost lantern, exactly 1 beach umbrella, exactly 1 lounge chair, exactly 1 palm tree.

Visual style: Cute high-detail pixel art, top-down three-quarter perspective, warm sunny daylight, saturated colors, soft shadows, chunky readable shapes, detailed grass texture, tiny flowers, rounded shoreline outlines, and animated-game charm. Use bright turquoise blue for the surrounding ocean, blue for the central cottage roof, and cheerful cozy farming adventure as the emotional tone.

Constraints: Keep the whole scene visible as a single map-like composition. Do not add interface buttons, text besides the shop sign, extra characters, extra animals, vehicles, modern objects, or photorealism.

entries.title: ChatGPT Game Asset Generation Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a realistic screenshot of a ChatGPT-style web conversation showing an image-generation result for game assets, with Japanese UI text and four generated asset thumbnails.

Canvas: Landscape browser/app screenshot, approximately 797×750 px, white background, clean minimal interface, cropped so only the assistant response area and the bottom row of images are visible.

Layout: At the top center, place one rounded light-gray user message bubble containing image genでゲームで使えそうなアセットの画像を4枚を個別で生成して それぞれを3D化してみて!. Below it, left aligned, show a small gray status line reading 「25m 50s作業しました 〉」 followed by a thin horizontal divider. Under that, create an assistant response in Japanese with file lists and blue clickable file links.

Text content: Include the assistant paragraph 「できました。4枚のゲーム向けアセット画像を生成して、それぞれPixal3DでGLB化まで通しました。」 Then the label 「画像:」 followed by exactly 4 bullet links with small image/file icons: 1) mana_crystal_alpha.png, 2) treasure_chest_alpha.png, 3) energy_turret_alpha.png, 4) mushroom_house_alpha.png. Then the label 「3D化したGLB:」 followed by exactly 4 bullet links with document icons: 1) mana_crystal.glb, 2) treasure_chest.glb, 3) energy_turret.glb, 4) mushroom_house.glb. Then add the closing Japanese sentence 「生成したのは、魔法クリスタル、宝箱、SFエネルギータレット、きのこ家です。背景はクロマキーから透明化して、3D化に渡しています。」

Bottom image strip: Show exactly 4 rounded-square thumbnail cards in one horizontal row, each about 178×178 px with small gaps. Thumbnail 1 has a vivid green chroma-key background and a stylized fantasy blue mana crystal obelisk on a dark stone base. Thumbnail 2 has a vivid green chroma-key background and a wooden treasure chest with dark metal bands, gold lock, and red jewel. Thumbnail 3 has a vivid green chroma-key background and a gray sci-fi energy turret with blue glowing core and cannon barrel. Thumbnail 4 has a bright magenta chroma-key background and a cute mushroom house with red spotted cap roof, wooden door, and warm windows. All four assets are polished 3D game-art icons with transparent-cutout style lighting, centered and isolated.

Visual style: Modern ChatGPT interface screenshot, Japanese typography, black body text, blue link text, small monochrome icons, generous margins, subtle divider lines. The asset thumbnails should look like high-quality mobile game props rendered in colorful semi-realistic 3D.

Constraints: Include exactly 8 file links total, exactly 4 PNG links and exactly 4 GLB links, and exactly 4 asset thumbnail images. Do not add extra panels, watermarks, browser chrome, avatars, or unrelated UI controls.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Future Idol Concert
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 ultra-detailed anime key visual of a futuristic idol singer performing on a massive cyberpunk concert stage in the year 2035. Show exactly one full-body female idol in the center, low-angle dynamic perspective, one arm thrust toward the viewer with a V-sign gesture and the other hand holding exactly one black microphone near her mouth. Her face is intentionally hidden by exactly two opaque censor-like overlays: one square muted mauve block centered over the face and one larger rounded purple rectangle in the upper-right over part of the hair and background screen. Give her very long flowing iridescent silver, cyan, violet, and pink hair streaming dramatically in all directions, decorated with futuristic headset ornaments and glowing accessories. Outfit: one holographic cropped idol top, one layered translucent prism skirt with angular panels, black and gold straps, neon star accents, bracelets, fingerless gloves, thigh straps, and exactly two shiny white iridescent knee-high platform boots with metallic buckles and yellow-black trim. Environment: a huge circular arena packed with a glowing pink audience, a reflective black digital stage floor covered in neon circuit lines, triangles, grids, and holographic UI markings. Behind her, place one enormous curved LED screen wrapping across the top of the arena with blue, magenta, and cyan data graphics and readable futuristic text such as "FUTURE IDOL STAGE 2035", "SHIKINAMI CODE:01", "LIVE", and Japanese-style characters meaning future. Lighting: explosive idol-concert spectacle with countless laser beams, starbursts, lens flares, sparkles, neon triangles, holographic shards, saturated electric blue, hot pink, violet, cyan, and yellow highlights. Style: premium glossy anime illustration, maximal detail, crystalline reflections, vibrant kiran-kiran sparkle aesthetic, dramatic foreshortening, clean sharp linework, high contrast, no watermark, no extra characters, no additional censor blocks.

entries.title: Crowded Night Office Tower
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an ultra-detailed nighttime isometric city illustration centered on one enormous rounded-corner office tower, viewed from a high aerial angle, with the facade cut open through continuous glass windows so every floor is visible. The tower should have exactly 34 visible occupied horizontal office floors, each floor packed with tiny individual people, desks, chairs, lamps, partitions, plants, shelves, meeting rooms, and colorful interior details; make the crowd density extreme, like a visual counting challenge, with hundreds or thousands of miniature figures visible through the windows. Use a tall rounded rectangular glass office tower with curved corners as the main subject. Surround it with a dense cyberpunk-like metropolis of shorter high-rise buildings, glowing windows, neon signs, street traffic, and crowds at street level. Lighting is nighttime blue with warm yellow, orange, and white office lights, creating a strong contrast between the dark city and the brightly illuminated tower interiors. The style should be intricate hand-drawn architectural illustration with crisp linework, dense micro-detail, slightly painterly colors, and no empty areas. The image should be vertical, poster-like, packed edge to edge with buildings and tiny people. Add a busy entrance plaza and streets around the base filled with many tiny pedestrians and vehicles, but keep the main tower dominant and centered. Do not include readable text, logos, watermarks, or UI elements. Emphasize that every window bay contains distinct tiny scenes and visible human silhouettes for counting.
