entries.title: Dark Fantasy Bird-Armor Anime Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical dark fantasy anime poster portrait in a 9:16 aspect ratio, extreme close-up of PONYO, a young androgynous character with pale skin, intense amber eyes, messy black hair falling across the face, and a serious, brooding expression. The face is partially covered by an elaborate metallic bird-like helmet and feathered armor made of layered gold-bronze plates, shaped like overlapping feathers and raven beaks. Include exactly 2 visible human eyes: one central amber eye under the hair and one smaller amber eye near the right edge; add exactly 1 glowing red jewel-like eye embedded in the bird helmet above the character's right eye. Add exactly 1 small bird skull or beak ornament near the lower foreground as part of the armor. Use dramatic warm lighting with molten orange highlights, glowing embers, glossy reflections, and deep black shadows, creating a cinematic chiaroscuro effect. The composition should crop tightly around the face, helmet, and shoulder armor, with the character looking directly at the viewer from beneath the bird mask. Render in highly detailed painterly anime concept-art style with intricate texture, scratched metal, feather details, sharp beak shapes, and a mysterious ominous mood. At the bottom center, place the title text PONYO in a glowing pale-gold gothic fantasy font with sharp angular serifs, partially illuminated by orange light. No extra text, no watermark, no border.

entries.title: JRPG Hatsune Miku Fantasy Logo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a wide JRPG fantasy title logo splash screen for Hatsune Miku. Canvas: 16:9 horizontal white background, clean high-key presentation with no border. Main composition: huge ornate serif fantasy logo centered-left reading HATSUNE MIKU, arranged on two lines with "HATSUNE" above "MIKU"; use metallic teal-to-white gradient letters, beveled 3D edges, sharp Gothic serifs, bright star glints, thin gold outlines, and subtle drop shadows. Add a small Japanese subtitle centered under the logo reading 初音ミク, flanked by tiny decorative sparkle ornaments. Character silhouette: on the right side, place a dark teal anime idol silhouette of Hatsune Miku in profile facing left, showing exactly 2 very long twin-tails flowing dramatically to the right and downward, with exactly 2 rectangular hair accessories accented in pink and cyan. Background fantasy elements: behind the logo add a pale gold circular magic crest with compass-like spokes and one tall spear-shaped ornament rising above the title; on the far right behind the silhouette add a distant dark teal Gothic castle skyline with multiple pointed towers. Decorative elements: add sweeping translucent aqua brushstroke waves curling around the logo and character, especially one large crescent stroke on the left and several ribbon-like hair/water strokes on the lower right; scatter small star sparkles, paint splashes, and a few pink petal-like fragments. Include a small magenta number 01 near the lower right of the main logo. Visual style: elegant Japanese fantasy RPG key art, logo design focus, crisp vector-like typography mixed with watercolor splashes, luminous cyan and teal palette with pale gold accents, high detail, polished game-title presentation. Constraints: use exactly one character silhouette, one main two-line title, one Japanese subtitle, and one edition number; keep the background mostly white and uncluttered; no extra logos, no watermark, no frame.
entries.description: A wide fantasy RPG-style title splash featuring an ornate metallic logo, anime silhouette, castle skyline, magic crest, and flowing aqua effects.

entries.title: Retro Pixel Space Shooter HUD
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a premium vertical mobile game screenshot for a retro pixel-art space shooter, portrait 9:16. The image must look like an actual in-game scene, not a poster or asset sheet. Use crisp high-resolution pixel art with dense neon detail, black space background, purple nebula clouds, star field, scattered asteroids, and two visible planets near the lower left and lower right edges. Center the action vertically: at the bottom center is the player ship, a white, cyan, and gold angular fighter with three bright cyan engine flames and blue cockpit glass, firing a thick central stream of cyan laser bullets upward. At the top center is one enormous symmetrical boss battleship in purple, teal, dark gray, gold, and neon green, with wide wings, many armor panels, two large side cannons, glowing green core diamond in the middle, and blue exhaust trails beneath it. The scene shows intense bullet-hell combat: exactly 1 player ship, exactly 1 giant boss ship, exactly 4 smaller enemy fighters around the middle area, exactly 2 crescent-shaped drones near the upper left and upper right sides, exactly 2 round green shield drones near the mid-left and mid-right, exactly 1 orange explosion slightly left of center, exactly 1 green health pickup icon with a plus sign on the lower right, many cyan player shots rising in columns, and multiple purple and green enemy projectiles descending diagonally. Overlay a futuristic cyan and magenta pixel HUD with transparent dark panels and sharp sci-fi borders. Top left HUD: label "SHIELDS" with exactly 10 glowing blue hex shield icons, and below it a score panel reading "SCORE" and 00547890. Top center HUD: label "TIMER" with a clock icon and 01:48. Top right HUD: label "BONUS TIMER" with a segmented magenta bar showing exactly 6 filled pink segments and 3 empty dark segments, and below it a "KILLS" panel with a purple alien skull icon and 235. Bottom left HUD: "WEAPON" panel with a cyan three-shot weapon icon and a small charge meter with exactly 4 filled cyan bars and 2 empty bars. Bottom center HUD: "OVERDRIVE" panel with exactly 10 filled orange bars and 8 empty dark bars. Bottom right HUD: "SMART BOMB" panel with a skull bomb icon and x03. Keep all UI text pixelated, legible, and aligned to the screen edges like a real mobile arcade game interface. Use vibrant cyan, violet, magenta, green, and orange glow effects, strong contrast, symmetrical composition, no watermark, no extra logos, no realistic 3D rendering, no blurred painterly style.
entries.description: Generates a vertical pixel-art mobile game screenshot showing a neon bullet-hell space shooter boss battle with detailed HUD elements.

entries.title: Censored Dark Fantasy Treasure Hunter
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a gritty dark-fantasy anime illustration of a muscular blond treasure hunter sitting confidently on a large wooden treasure chest in a dim, ruined vault overflowing with gold coins, jewels, goblets, and scattered valuables. The character is a tall, athletic, broad-shouldered male with messy long dirty blond hair, tan skin, scratched and dirty arms, and a rugged pirate-like outfit: open black-brown leather vest with crossing straps over a bare chest, multiple belts and brass buckles, black fitted pants, tall worn leather boots, leather wrist wraps, armbands, chains, rings, and a dark green pendant necklace. Pose him in a relaxed dominant seated posture, one arm braced behind him on the treasure chest, one knee raised, one hand resting loosely over the raised knee, viewed from a slightly high angle in a vertical portrait composition. Cover the entire face with a centered opaque square censor block in muted brown, leaving hair and body visible. The environment should feel grimy and aged, with wet stone walls, tarnished metal, dust, mud, scratches, and chaotic piles of treasure surrounding him. Use a moody palette of black, bronze, dark gold, brown, and smoky gray, with dim warm highlights glinting off coins and gems. Style: detailed semi-realistic anime fantasy art with intentionally degraded low-quality texture, noisy grain, muddy contrast, rough brushwork, dirty smudges, imperfect anatomy, cluttered details, and a corrupted generated-image feel rather than clean polished artwork. No text, no watermark, no clean modern objects.

entries.title: Anime Streetwear Techwear Redesign
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a stylized illustration of Rumi from the anime series Kpop demon hunter
Character Direction
Analyze the character's canon personality and translate it into a clear visual archetype (confident, unpredictable, calm, dangerous, etc.).
Identify the character's signature color palette from the original design and use it as the dominant visual accent throughout the artwork.
Pose & Movement
Design a pose that instantly communicates the character's nature:
Heroic / energetic → explosive movement, open stance, dynamic action
Calm / composed → relaxed posture, controlled motion, confident balance
Dark / mysterious → lowered stance, hidden intensity, sharp gaze
Aggressive / intense → attack-ready posture, tension in body language, clenched fists
Facial Expression
Keep the expression fully aligned with the character's emotional identity and canon personality.
Visual Style
Anime-inspired illustration mixed with streetwear fashion and graphic poster aesthetics.
Use crisp linework, semi-flat rendering, bold contrast, and a polished modern finish.
Composition
Vertical 3:4 poster layout
Character positioned slightly off-center
Strong diagonal composition for movement
Foreground/background layering to create depth
Outfit Redesign
Transform the original costume into a modern techwear/streetwear interpretation while preserving recognizable character elements and silhouette cues.
Color Direction
Predominantly white background
Signature character color as the main accent
One additional complementary or analogous accent color
Minimal but striking high-contrast palette
Background Design
Abstract geometric poster-style backdrop with clean negative space.
Incorporate subtle visual motifs inspired by the character's color identity.
Effects & Motion
Add stylized motion streaks, paint textures, energy trails, and graphic accents that match the character's aura and color theme.
Lighting
Directional cinematic lighting with sharp shadows and a soft colored glow using the signature accent tone.
Rendering
Ultra-clean vector-inspired rendering, poster-grade composition, highly detailed, sharp 4K finish.
entries.description: A comprehensive character design prompt for redesigning anime characters into modern techwear/streetwear styles with stylized poster aesthetics.

entries.title: Anime Live2D Turnaround Chat Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical smartphone screenshot of an AI chat interface showing a generated anime character model sheet for Live2D use.

Canvas: 691 × 1024 vertical mobile screenshot, white background, soft iOS-like UI with lots of empty space and rounded translucent controls.

Top status bar: Show the time "2:50" at top left, a muted bell icon beside it, and exactly 3 status indicators at top right: cellular bars, Wi‐Fi, and a black battery pill reading "95".

Header UI: Under the status bar, place exactly 4 floating rounded controls: a circular hamburger menu button on the left, a white pill labeled "Thinking" in blue, a white pill on the right containing an outlined edit/pencil icon, and a white pill with a three-dot menu.

Chat content: On the upper right, show a small full-body anime girl sticker sitting/kneeling, facing forward, with long blonde twin tails fading to lavender tips, aqua eyes, pale skin, lavender hair bows, a white frilly sleeveless blouse, and a mint-aqua skirt. Beneath it, place one large rounded light-gray user message bubble containing Japanese text: 画像をLive2Dに使う用に三面図にして.

Generated image card: Below the message bubble, display one large embedded character reference sheet image on a white background. It contains exactly 3 full-body views of the same character, evenly spaced left to right: 1) front view labeled 正面図, 2) right-facing side view labeled 側面図(右向き), and 3) back view labeled 背面図. Add faint horizontal guide lines and small Japanese height markers along the left side, like a model turnaround sheet. The character is a cute anime girl named unnamed blonde twin-tail girl: long blonde twin tails with lavender gradient ends, pastel purple ribbon bows, turquoise eyes, soft blush, white ruffled sleeveless top with vertical buttons, mint turquoise high-waisted skirt with frilled hem and asymmetrical trailing fabric, slim legs, white ankle-strap sandals with small turquoise accents. Keep proportions consistent across all 3 views and make the art delicate, clean, and pastel.

Overlay controls on the generated card: Add exactly 2 floating buttons over the bottom of the image card: a rounded white button at lower left reading "編集する" and a circular white share button at lower right with an upward arrow icon.

Bottom reaction bar: At the bottom edge, show exactly 3 small icons: thumbs up, thumbs down, and an ellipsis.

Visual style: Crisp mobile screenshot, minimal white interface, soft shadows, Japanese chat app aesthetic, pastel anime illustration, clean line art, no watermark, no extra panels, no additional characters.
entries.description: Creates a mobile AI chat screenshot featuring a pastel anime girl converted into a three-view Live2D character reference sheet.

entries.title: Chronowa Black Cat Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a clean monochrome-and-red Japanese character reference sheet poster for a cute black cat mascot named Chronowa, a night-music themed black cat wearing white sunglasses and red headphones.

Canvas: Vertical A4-style poster, white/off-white background, thin black border, subtle red corner marks, small halftone dots, diagonal tech lines, tiny skyline silhouettes, waveform accents, barcode at bottom left, and a black footer strip reading in English "LISTEN TO THE NIGHT." Use a crisp vector/ink illustration style with limited palette: black, white, gray, and accent red.

Main layout: Place a large central full-body front-view black cat as the hero subject, sitting upright with a curled tail, oversized pointed ears, long whiskers, white angular sunglasses with black lenses and reflective highlights, and red-and-black headphones resting around the neck. Add a bold top title in Japanese plus English using クロノワ / CHRONOWA, with a smaller tagline beneath using 夜の音を聴く黒猫. Add a red crescent moon and black city skyline silhouette in the upper right.

Left character views: Include exactly 3 smaller cat pose panels stacked vertically on the left, each with a black label tab and red accent: 1) side view, cat sitting in profile wearing white sunglasses with headphones around neck; 2) listening pose, cat wearing red headphones over ears, paws touching headphones, small music note nearby; 3) relax pose, cat lying down with headphones around neck.

Right item box: Include exactly 2 item illustrations inside a bordered box: 1) white sunglasses; 2) red headphones. Label them in Japanese using the same graphic style.

Right mood icon box: Include exactly 6 small chibi mood icons in a 2-column by 3-row grid, all black cat icons with white sunglasses: 1) good mood with music note; 2) cool but moody; 3) shy/embarrassed; 4) alert with motion marks; 5) kind with small red heart; 6) slightly angry with red anger symbol.

Bottom information cards: Create exactly 8 bordered info cards across the lower third, numbered 01 through 08 with black slanted header tabs and red number accents. The 8 cards are: 01 profile; 02 personality; 03 features; 04 favorite things; 05 dislikes; 06 abilities; 07 setting; 08 quotes. Use compact Japanese text inside the cards, with small decorative icons such as a waveform, paw print, sun warning symbol, small cat silhouette, and red paw mark. For the quote card, include three short Japanese quote lines using 『今夜の音、悪くないね』 / 『星は苦手。世界が明るすぎる』 / 『いい夜だね。少しだけ、歩こうか』.

Text style: Use strong Japanese display typography, black labels with red side bars, small red waveform graphics, and clean technical annotation lines. Keep the poster readable but allow tiny Japanese text to feel like a designed reference sheet.

Constraints: Use exactly one central hero cat, exactly 3 left pose panels, exactly 2 item illustrations, exactly 6 mood icons, and exactly 8 bottom info cards. No humans, no extra characters, no full-color background, no photorealism, no watermark.
entries.description: A structured prompt for generating a Japanese-style mascot reference poster of a black cat with sunglasses and red headphones.

entries.searchText: chronowa black cat character sheet a structured prompt for generating a japanese-style mascot reference poster of a black cat with sunglasses and red headphones. goal: create a clean monochrome-and-red japanese character reference sheet poster for a cute black cat mascot named chronowa, a night-music themed black cat wearing white sunglasses and red headphones. canvas: vertical a4-style poster, white/off-white background, thin black border, subtle red corner marks, small halftone dots, diagonal tech lines, tiny skyline silhouettes, waveform accents, barcode at bottom left, and a black footer strip reading in english "listen to the night." use a crisp vector/ink illustration style with limited palette: black, white, gray, and accent red. main layout: place a large central full-body front-view black cat as the hero subject, sitting upright with a curled tail, oversized pointed ears, long whiskers, white angular sunglasses with black lenses and reflective highlights, and red-and-black headphones resting around the neck. add a bold top title in japanese plus english using クロノワ / chronowa, with a smaller tagline beneath using 夜の音を聴く黒猫. add a red crescent moon and black city skyline silhouette in the upper right. left character views: include exactly 3 smaller cat pose panels stacked vertically on the left, each with a black label tab and red accent: 1) side view, cat sitting in profile wearing white sunglasses with headphones around neck; 2) listening pose, cat wearing red headphones over ears, paws touching headphones, small music note nearby; 3) relax pose, cat lying down with headphones around neck. right item box: include exactly 2 item illustrations inside a bordered box: 1) white sunglasses; 2) red headphones. label them in japanese using the same graphic style. right mood icon box: include exactly 6 small chibi mood icons in a 2-column by 3-row grid, all black cat icons with white sunglasses: 1) good mood with music note; 2) cool but moody; 3) shy/embarrassed; 4) alert with motion marks; 5) kind with small red heart; 6) slightly angry with red anger symbol. bottom information cards: create exactly 8 bordered info cards across the lower third, numbered 01 through 08 with black slanted header tabs and red number accents. the 8 cards are: 01 profile; 02 personality; 03 features; 04 favorite things; 05 dislikes; 06 abilities; 07 setting; 08 quotes. use compact japanese text inside the cards, with small decorative icons such as a waveform, paw print, sun warning symbol, small cat silhouette, and red paw mark. for the quote card, include three short japanese quote lines using 『今夜の音、悪くないね』 / 『星は苦手。世界が明るすぎる』 / 『いい夜だね。少しだけ、歩こうか』. text style: use strong japanese display typography, black labels with red side bars, small red waveform graphics, and clean technical annotation lines. keep the poster readable but allow tiny japanese text to feel like a designed reference sheet. constraints: use exactly one central hero cat, exactly 3 left pose panels, exactly 2 item illustrations, exactly 6 mood icons, and exactly 8 bottom info cards. no humans, no extra characters, no full-color background, no photorealism, no watermark. game asset phone camera city

entries.title: Punk Gunslinger in Steampunk Undercity
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic dark fantasy steampunk alley scene in a gritty undercity at night, in the style of high-end animated game concept art. A punk young woman with bright magenta-pink short spiky hair stands in the foreground from a dramatic low angle, aiming an oversized brass-and-black revolver directly toward the viewer so the gun barrel dominates the upper left foreground with strong foreshortening. Her face is deliberately obscured by a flat opaque square censor block in muted reddish-brown, centered over the face. She wears a sleeveless off-white shirt, dark cropped vest, fingerless bandage wraps around both hands and forearms, belts and holsters at the waist, dark purple striped trousers, and visible arm tattoos; her posture is tense, aggressive, and confrontational. The background is a dense industrial undercity street with towering arched architecture, pipes, catwalks, hanging lamps, smoke, warm window lights, teal-blue atmospheric glow, and neon signs. Include exactly three readable/sign-like elements: one torn poster on a barrel at far left reading "WANTED" with smaller rough text "PILTOVER ENFORCERS" and "VI", one pink circular neon sign on the right reading THE LAST DROP, and one small blue circular neon face icon with X eyes and an O mouth. Use moody blue-green and amber lighting, volumetric haze, painterly detail, dynamic perspective, sharp focus on the weapon and character, wide cinematic 16:9 composition, no extra characters, no watermark.
entries.description: A cinematic concept-art prompt for generating a magenta-haired punk gunslinger aiming a weapon in a neon industrial undercity.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Anime Character Select Screen
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical cyberpunk anime fighting game character select screen for a fictional game titled SynClub, styled like a glossy arcade versus menu.

Canvas: Tall 2:3 mobile-poster composition, 675×1200 style, dark futuristic neon city background split diagonally into blue left side and hot pink/red right side, with glowing HUD lines, scanlines, sparks, particles, and high-contrast rim lighting.

Layout: At the very top, place angular metallic logo text "SynClub" with electric blue highlights, and beneath it the title "CHARACTER SELECT". Put "PLAYER 1" in a blue sci-fi tab at the top-left and "PLAYER 2" in a pink sci-fi tab at the top-right. The screen is divided into two large featured character areas: left selected fighter for Player 1 in blue, right selected fighter for Player 2 in red. In the center lower half, place a character portrait selection grid with glowing frames. At the bottom center, place a large luminous "VS". Along the bottom edge, add a game controller command bar with five options: select, confirm, back, random, option, each with small PlayStation-style button icons.

Main characters: Player 1 is REGULUS, a dark hooded anime fighter with black cloak, chains, metallic accessories, glowing blue highlights, pale shadowed face, red eyes, one gloved hand lifting the hood, mysterious assassin/rogue mood. Add the Japanese reading "レグルス" under the name. Player 2 is MERU, a blonde gothic-lolita anime girl with long twin-tail hair, red and black frilled dress, rose accessories, black gloves, choker, heart gem, playful elegant pose with one hand near her face. Add the Japanese reading "める" under the name.

Stats panels: Under each large character name, include a compact rectangular stat box with exactly 5 labeled rows: TYPE, POWER, SPEED, RANGE, TECHNIQUE. For Regulus, the TYPE value is "スピード" and the bars glow blue. For Meru, the TYPE value is "トリッキー" and the bars glow red.

Character select grid: Include exactly 14 selectable tiles in the central grid, each with a glowing sci-fi border. Count and arrange them as follows: Row 1 has 3 tiles: hooded dark male portrait, blonde female portrait, dark masked/obscured portrait. Row 2 has 3 tiles: silver-haired maid girl, selected Regulus tile marked with a blue "P1" tag, selected Meru tile marked with a red "P2" tag. Row 3 has 5 tiles: robot/cyborg head, witch girl with hat, blond male portrait, black-haired masked fighter, tan spiky-haired boy. Row 4 has 3 tiles: turquoise aquatic/mermaid-like girl, pale white-haired character, and a black silhouette tile with a question mark labeled "Random". Use blue selection glow around P1 and red selection glow around P2.

Bottom versus panels: Bottom-left blue player panel reads "PLAYER 1 REGULUS レグルス" with an emblem and a weapon box labeled "MAIN WEAPON" showing 黒剣 -ノクターナル- beside a sleek dark sword illustration. Bottom-right red player panel reads "PLAYER 2 MERU める" with a rose emblem and a weapon box labeled "MAIN WEAPON" showing ローズマイク beside a rose-themed microphone weapon illustration.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed anime key art, glossy UI, esports fighting game interface, neon blue versus neon magenta palette, sharp angular frames, glowing typography, dramatic lighting, dense futuristic city details, polished game-menu screenshot look.

Constraints: Keep all text legible and aligned like a real character select UI. Use exactly 2 large featured characters and exactly 14 central selectable tiles. Do not add extra characters outside the grid. No watermark.
entries.description: Generates a neon anime fighting game character select interface with two featured fighters, stats, portrait grid, and versus panels.

entries.title: Ethereal Stand Profile Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a vertical 2:3 cinematic fantasy character-design poster for a guardian spirit called a Stand, blending ethereal Chinese typography with soft fashion photography and mythic creature design. The main subject is Higanbana · Wu, a young woman seated on a rough stone ledge beside a misty pond or stream, wearing a white ruched floral mini dress with thin straps and an oversized off-white knit cardigan slipping from one shoulder. Her hair is medium brown, loosely tied in a low messy bun with soft strands around the face; pose is elegant, quiet, slightly melancholic, hands resting on the ledge, legs angled forward. Hide or softly blur the face if needed, keeping the mood anonymous and poetic.

Behind and above her right shoulder, create the Stand: a large translucent white dragon-deer / fox-dragon guardian spirit with an elongated delicate snout, flowing feather-like mane, branching antler or horn shapes, veil-like fins, silk ribbons, dangling gold chains and tassels, and many small white flowers blooming along its head and body. It should feel like fog, petals, and moonlight given animal form: beautiful, fragile, protective, slightly uncanny, not cartoonish. The spirit curves around the woman as if guarding her, occupying the upper-right half of the poster.

Environment and lighting: a shaded waterside garden with drooping willow branches, dark green foliage, reflective water, floating mist, translucent gauze ribbons, tiny glowing petals or fireflies, and warm morning backlight filtering through haze. Use a palette of ivory, pearl white, champagne beige, pale blush, muted moss green, smoky gray, and soft gold. Overall atmosphere: serene, romantic, spectral, elegant, dreamlike, with a faint sense of grief and distance.

Design the poster as an information-rich Stand profile sheet with refined white serif typography and thin decorative rules. Include exactly 6 text blocks: 1) upper-left small label in Chinese and English, "替身設定 / STAND NAME"; 2) large title "彼岸花・霧" with smaller romanization "Higanbana · Wu"; 3) a short poetic Chinese paragraph beneath the title; 4) mid-left section titled "特殊能力" with ability name "花影迷離" and romanization "Hua Ying Mi Li," followed by a concise ability description; 5) bottom-left section titled "設計關聯" with several short bullet-like Chinese lines and exactly 7 circular color swatches in ivory, cream, warm beige, dusty pink, gray-green, deep moss, and taupe; 6) bottom-right quote box containing "「你看到的美好,也許只是我編織的夢。」" plus a smaller boxed profile headed "少女檔案" with brief attributes such as personality, image, aura, and preferences. Add one narrow vertical Chinese text panel on the right side over the spirit, framed by thin lines. Text should be decorative and readable enough to evoke a luxury editorial character sheet, without overwhelming the image.

Visual style: high-end fantasy editorial poster, ultra-detailed, soft-focus photorealism mixed with delicate illustration, translucent layers, bokeh, shallow depth of field, fine ornamental linework, elegant Chinese book-design aesthetics, no harsh neon colors, no modern UI, no watermark. Use 彼岸花・霧 as the largest title, 花影迷離 as the ability heading, and make the Stand feel like a white mist dragon-deer covered in flowers.
entries.description: Generates a vertical fantasy character sheet featuring a young woman and a translucent floral guardian spirit in an elegant Chinese editorial layout.

entries.title: Gothic Stand Guardian Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a dark gothic fantasy "stand / guardian spirit" character setting poster for Lin Wan Tang, combining a seated fashion portrait with an eerie humanoid guardian spirit named Bad Apple!! Shadow. The design should feel like a luxury occult character dossier, emotional, mysterious, dangerous, and elegant.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 4:5 ratio, dark blue-gray and black palette with warm beige typography, thin decorative border lines, subtle film grain, scratches, pearls, chains, sparkles, and faint mystical diagrams. Use a cinematic editorial composition with high detail and layered shadows.

Main layout: On the left foreground, show the stand master: a young woman seated on a black leather chair, legs crossed, wearing a loose beige knit sweater with large black heart shapes, sheer dark stockings, and pointed black high heels. She has long wavy dark brown hair falling over her shoulders, a quiet melancholic pose, and an intentionally blurred or obscured face. Behind and to the right, towering over her, show the guardian spirit: a tall slender feminine humanoid doll-creature with a porcelain mask face, long wild black hair flowing like smoke, a black heart motif on the face and chest, pale stitched skin, black glossy heart-shaped bodice, skeletal mechanical arms, pearl and chain ornaments, translucent shredded black veils, and a thin rapier-like weapon held downward. The guardian's silhouette should be both graceful and grotesque, like a cursed bridal puppet.

Text and typography: Use elegant serif and small-caps typography mixed with delicate Chinese dossier text. Include large Chinese name text on the upper left, romanized name beneath it, and the label "STAND MASTER." Include a quoted line in Chinese-style typography near the left side. On the upper right, place the heading for the stand name with the large text "Bad Apple!! • Shadow" and a short subtitle about the stand's existence as a tangible embodiment of the silent heart realm. Along the bottom center, place the large spaced title "BAD APPLE!! • Shadow" and the subtitle "SILENT HEART REALM." Keep text decorative and legible enough to suggest a character sheet, but do not overcrowd the poster.

Information panels and counted elements: Include exactly 7 visible character profile rows in a small rectangular panel on the left: birthday, height, zodiac sign, temperament, traits, stand type, and stand attribute. Include exactly 6 small color palette swatches below that panel, in dark navy, charcoal, beige, pearl gray, muted brown, and steel blue. Include exactly 1 radar chart at the lower left with 6 labeled ability axes. Include exactly 3 rectangular ability-visualization thumbnails along the bottom left: a black heart core, a circular time-gear diagram, and a shadowy cocoon or veil form. Include exactly 4 circular detail callouts on the right side, each connected to the guardian by fine lines: porcelain face mask, black heart chest pattern, mechanical needle or rapier structure, and shadow silk ribbons. Include exactly 3 small heart-bullet ability descriptions in the lower right text block. Include exactly 1 ornate tarot-card-like inset illustration in the lower right showing a black heart trapped in a delicate frame of chains and thorns.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed dark fantasy concept art blended with fashion editorial photography, gothic lolita occult aesthetics, Art Nouveau dossier framing, JoJo-like stand design energy, porcelain doll horror, black-heart symbolism, smoky hair and fabric motion, soft spotlighting from above left, cool shadows, high contrast, intricate linework, elegant poster typography.

Constraints: The final image must look like a finished character setting sheet rather than a simple portrait. Maintain exactly one human stand master and exactly one guardian spirit. Keep the guardian much taller than the seated woman. Use the theme silent heart realm, rotten sweetness, dangerous tenderness. Use the primary palette black, smoky navy, pearl gray, beige, and muted gold. Avoid bright colors, modern UI styling, extra characters, weapons besides the single rapier, and any readable watermark.
entries.description: Creates a dark fantasy character dossier poster pairing a seated fashion portrait with a grotesque elegant guardian spirit.

entries.title: Chibi Sparrow Four-Pose Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a clean character pose sheet of a cute chibi sparrow mascot, showing exactly 4 discrete poses on a plain white background.

Canvas: Square 1:1 canvas, high resolution, no border, no text, no shadows or scenery. Arrange the bird poses in a balanced 2-by-2 grid with generous white space between them.

Subject details: The character is a round, front-facing chibi sparrow with an oversized head and tiny body. It has a warm chestnut-brown head, glossy black bead eyes with small white highlights, a short dark charcoal beak, cream-colored cheeks and fluffy cream belly, dark cheek patches, tiny brown feet with little claws, and layered orange-brown wings with darker feather tips. Use a cute sticker-like anime illustration style with clean dark outlines, soft cel shading, painterly feather details, and a polished mascot design.

Pose count and layout: Include exactly 4 separate full-body bird drawings: 1) top left, wings raised high vertically in an excited upward flap; 2) top right, wings spread straight outward horizontally; 3) bottom left, wings hanging downward along the sides in a resting/downstroke pose; 4) bottom right, wings spread outward again in a symmetrical mid-flap pose. All 4 birds should face forward and keep the same facial expression and proportions.

Visual style: Adorable Japanese game mascot / sticker art, crisp linework, warm natural browns and creams, detailed layered feathers, soft highlights, clean white background, centered composition.

Constraints: Show exactly four poses, no extra birds, no labels, no accessories, no environment, no watermark, no cropped wings or feet.

entries.title: Celestial Idol Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a highly detailed anime idol character showcase poster featuring a mysterious starlight idol, with a dark celestial concert aesthetic and ornate trading-card layout.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 poster, richly detailed, dark navy and warm gold palette, glossy premium illustration finish. The design should look like an idol character card collection page with decorative borders, film-strip accents, tiny stars, confetti, and elegant gothic arches in the background.

Layout: Use exactly 7 character illustrations total: 1 large central full-body portrait and 6 smaller surrounding portrait panels. The 6 smaller panels are numbered in small gold text as 01, 02, 03, 04, 05, and 06. Arrange them as two panels across the top corners, two panels in the middle left and middle right, and two panels along the lower left and lower right, framing the central figure. The central portrait is the largest, inside an ornate rounded rectangular gold frame with a crown-like decorative crest at the top and a small plaque at the bottom showing five small gold icons: star, star, crown, star, star.

Subject details: The character is a young anime idol girl with very long glossy black hair, straight bangs, long flowing side strands, and small silver star hairpins. Her face is intentionally obscured in every panel by a soft rectangular blur, while the rest of the illustration remains sharp. She wears a white short-sleeve puff blouse with frilled neckline, black ribbon bow at the chest, black choker with white frill trim, black fingerless gloves, silver bracelets, a high-waisted dark navy pleated skirt with a galaxy sparkle gradient, white underskirt ruffles, black belt with silver ring buckle, dangling silver star chains on the hip, black thigh garters, and idol accessories. The overall outfit theme is gothic celestial idol.

Panel poses: Include exactly these 6 numbered side-panel variations: 01 shows an upper-body idol pose holding a microphone near the lower right, one hand near the chest; 02 shows an upper-body pose touching the choker or collar with one hand; 03 shows a waist-up pose holding a microphone downward in one hand; 04 shows an upper-body pose with one hand near the face making a playful idol gesture; 05 shows a side/back three-quarter pose looking over the shoulder with long hair flowing dramatically; 06 shows a cheerful upper-body pose with both hands raised in small finger-heart or pointing gestures and a large microphone floating near the right side. The central portrait shows the idol standing full-body, one hand making a peace sign beside the face, skirt flared outward, confident concert-poster stance.

Background and decoration: Set all portraits inside a grand cathedral-like hall with tall arched windows glowing with warm light, dark columns, night-sky sparkles, floating confetti, lens flares, and magical star particles. The bottom center outside the portraits contains a large gold compass star emblem, laurel branches, and a curved film-strip ribbon. Add tiny gold numbering, thin ornamental borders, subtle film sprocket marks, and a polished collectible-card feel.

Visual style: High-resolution anime illustration, crisp line art, luminous highlights, glossy hair shading, dramatic rim lighting, intricate fabric folds, deep navy shadows, gold accents, magical idol atmosphere, symmetrical composition, premium poster design.

Constraints: Use exactly 7 character depictions and exactly 6 numbered side panels labeled 01 through 06. Keep all faces covered by the same soft blur effect. Do not add readable text besides the small panel numbers and decorative icons. Avoid logos, watermarks, and extra characters.
entries.description: Generates an ornate anime idol showcase poster with one central full-body character and six numbered pose panels for character design presentation.

entries.title: Blood-Red Western Gunslinger Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical western action character poster in Rockstar Games official concept-art style, polished hard-boiled graphic novel rendering. A confident male gunslinger, a faceless placeholder man with a smooth tan rectangular mask covering the face, stands in a low-angle heroic pose occupying the lower 75% of the frame. The top 25% must remain a strictly empty solid blood-red sky with no text, logos, clouds, or objects. He holds exactly 2 ornate long-barrel revolvers: one raised upright in his left hand on the viewer's left, and one raised upright in his right hand on the viewer's right, both with engraved gold-and-steel details and ivory grips. Attire: cream off-white wrinkled button-up shirt, dark navy neckerchief, wide dark leather gun belt with two buckles, black trousers, and a brown leather holster on the left hip. Background: red desert canyon with tall rocky spires and saguaro cacti at sunset, dark silhouettes and orange rim light behind the character. Composition should crop close from thighs to above the head, with the head centered, shoulders broad, weapons extending toward the upper corners, and the viewer looking upward at the character. Use dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, heavy ink-like shadows, warm orange highlights, painterly halftone texture, gritty western poster finish, sharp costume folds, detailed leather tooling, and no readable text or watermark.
entries.description: A vertical Red Dead Redemption-inspired western concept-art poster featuring a heroic dual-revolver gunslinger against a blood-red desert canyon backdrop.

entries.title: Multi-Layered Cyborg Transformation Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
[Main Prompt]
Based on the person or character in the attached image, maintain the original facial features, eyes, hairstyle, color, expression, body type, clothing, pose, composition, color scheme, lighting, and background atmosphere as much as possible, while depicting them as a cyborg-like entity with an internal mechanical skeleton. While keeping the overall appearance looking like the original, parts of the outer skin or surface should be peeled away according to the chosen damage level, exposing artificial muscles, fibrous protective tissue, nerve cables, metal frames, joint units, hydraulic mechanisms, circuits, light-emitting elements, and precision mechanical parts. Avoid the expression of "precision machinery packed tightly under a single thin layer of skin." The internal structure should be depicted as a multi-layered structure with a humanoid mechanical skeleton at the center, layered with artificial muscles, nerve cables, protective tissue, and outer skin. At the damage sites, artificial muscle or fibrous protective material should be visible behind the torn skin, and deeper in, metal frames, joint units, drive units, wiring, and light-emitting parts should be partially visible. Mechanical parts should be placed naturally along the flow of the human/character's skeleton, muscles, and joints. Do not make it look like mecha is simply pasted just beneath the skin. Provide depth to the damaged areas, showing the internal structure in order: outer skin, protective layer, artificial muscle, and mechanical skeleton. Depict skin peeling naturally as tears, curls, chips, or cracks. Mechanical parts should be high-definition and realistic, or have a texture that matches the style of the original image. Do not make the whole body a complete robot; do not lose the charm or identity of the original character. Depict artificial materials, mechanical skeletons, and artificial muscles instead of biological organs or excessive bleeding.

[Damage Level 1: Mild Damage]
Appearance remains almost the same as the original image. Add small cracks, abrasions, and skin peeling to parts of the face, neck, shoulders, arms, legs, etc. Behind the peeled skin, artificial muscles, fibrous protective tissue, and thin nerve cables are slightly visible. Deeper inside, metal skeletal frames or small joint parts are only slightly visible. No electric sparks, or very weak ones. The first impression is that of the original person/character, but upon close inspection, it becomes clear that the interior is an artificial structure.

[Damage Level 2: Moderate Damage]
While maintaining the original person/character identity, add clear exposure of the cyborg structure. Moderate skin peeling or damage is added to parts of the face, neck, shoulders, arms, chest, legs, etc. At the damage sites, depict depth showing the outer skin, protective layer, artificial muscle, nerve cables, and metal skeleton in order. Naturally arrange metal frames, artificial muscles, joint units, hydraulic parts, control cables, circuits, and light-emitting parts inside. Naturally represent the edges of the damaged areas as peeled skin, cracks, or chipped surface material. Weak electric sparks or faint light from internal circuits may be added. Retain humanity, character identity, and beauty.

[Damage Level 3: Severe Damage]
Heavy damage representation. However, ensure it is recognizable as the person/character from the original image. Large areas of skin are peeled away from half the face, especially around one eye to the cheek, exposing artificial muscles, nerve cables, mechanical eye structures, and metal frames. The area around the eyes should not look like machinery packed directly under the skin, but a structure where the orbital frame, artificial muscle, protective layer, and mechanical eye unit are visible in stages. Large skin defects or exposure of the mechanical skeleton can be added to the shoulders, arms, chest, legs, etc. At damage sites, add crackling electric sparks, discharge like a short circuit, fine sparks, and glowing disconnected wires. Internal mechanics can be shown with high density but should have natural space and layers as an internal body structure. Metal skeletons, joint units, artificial muscles, cables, circuits, light-emitting elements, and hydraulic mechanisms should be visible along the structure of the human body. A slightly eerie and tense atmosphere is acceptable. However, avoid excessive bleeding, internal organ representation, or overly strong gore expressions.

[Negative Prompt]
Precision machinery packed tightly under a thin layer of skin, over-congested mechanical detail directly under the skin, mechanical parts just pasted on the surface, mechanical placement that ignores human body structure, full robotization of the whole body, turning into a different person, facial collapse, significant changes to body type, hairstyle, clothing, or background, excessive bleeding, internal organ depiction, overly strong gore expressions, unnatural joints, extra limbs, distorted face, low quality, crude mechanical parts, loss of original character characteristics.
entries.description: Transforms an image into a cyborg by revealing internal mechanical structures through selectable damage levels (mild to high) while preserving the original character's likeness.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的其他条目《Multi-Layered Cyborg Transformation Prompt》。 关键词：beauty、realistic。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Pasta Maker Evolution Sprite Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create an isometric object evolution sprite sheet for a Merge 2 cooking game, showing a progression from a simple rolling pin to advanced pasta-making machines.

Canvas: 4:3 horizontal canvas, light neutral gray background, no borders, no text, no watermark. Arrange the sprites in a clean 3-row by 4-column grid with generous spacing and soft shadows under each object.

Visual style: Polished mobile game asset style, semi-realistic cartoon rendering, isometric three-quarter view, crisp outlines, warm highlights, detailed materials, consistent scale, clean cutout sprites suitable for a casual merge game inventory.

Subject details: Show exactly 12 discrete evolution stages, left to right and top to bottom:
1. A simple wooden rolling pin with rounded handles.
2. A wooden rolling pin beside one smooth ball of pale dough.
3. A wooden rolling pin on a rectangular wooden board flattening a sheet of dough.
4. A small wooden manual pasta roller with two shiny metal rollers, crank handle, and one flat sheet of pasta feeding out.
5. A compact gray metal manual pasta cutter with crank handle, producing flat ribbon noodles.
6. A teal-blue manual noodle cutter with silver rollers and crank handle, producing curly spaghetti-like strands.
7. A cream-and-teal electric stand pasta extruder with a metal mixing bowl, extruding short strands into the bowl.
8. A cream-and-teal countertop electric pasta extruder with transparent top lid, round front nozzle, side button, and spaghetti strands coming out.
9. A beige electric pasta sheet roller with silver top rollers, front noodle sheet output, side dial, plus two small removable cutter attachments placed beside it.
10. A heavy polished silver manual pasta machine with broad rollers, crank handle, black knob, and multiple flat noodle ribbons exiting the front.
11. A modern stainless-steel automatic pasta maker with dark side panels, transparent lid, small blue digital display, control buttons, front extrusion nozzle, and several noodle strands coming out.
12. A premium black-and-gold luxury automatic pasta machine with transparent lid, crown emblem on the front panel, glowing controls, gold trim, and thick flat noodles flowing from the front.

Constraints: Keep all objects isolated as individual sprites, maintain the same isometric perspective and lighting across all 12 stages, emphasize the visual upgrade path, and avoid adding labels, arrows, hands, people, or kitchen backgrounds.
entries.description: Creates a 12-stage isometric pasta-making object evolution sheet for casual merge game assets.

entries.title: Isometric Krakow Market Square Diorama
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly detailed isometric miniature diorama of Krakow Main Market Square, Poland at warm golden lunch hour, viewed from above at a three-quarter angle like a handcrafted architectural model on a dark square display base. Show ornate European old-town architecture with pastel townhouses along the back and right edges, red tiled roofs, decorative gables, cobblestone paving, and soft shallow-depth-of-field lighting. The main landmarks should be a long Renaissance cloth hall with arcaded sides and an ornate roofline, plus a large brick Gothic basilica with exactly 2 unequal tall towers, dark spires, onion domes, and gilded details. In the open square include exactly 1 central stone monument with a standing statue, exactly 5 horse-drawn carriages, exactly 6 small market stalls or flower kiosks with pale yellow awnings, and exactly 7 white café umbrellas around outdoor seating. Fill the plaza with many tiny colorful pedestrians in summer clothing, clustered naturally around stalls, cafés, the monument, carriages, and church entrances. Use ultra-detailed tilt-shift miniature, photorealistic 3D render, with warm sunlight, crisp shadows, rich brick and pastel colors, tiny flowers and greenery, and a charming lunch-time tourist atmosphere. Avoid readable signage, modern cars, oversized people, watermarks, or text overlays.
entries.description: A detailed text-to-image prompt for generating a warm tilt-shift miniature of a historic European city square filled with landmarks, pedestrians, stalls, and carriages.

entries.title: Floral Aqua Dome Anime Knight
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 ultra-detailed anime fantasy illustration of a delicate miniature aqua dome containing the world of Nozomu. Inside a clear oval glass cloche on an ornate white-and-gold base, place exactly 1 young magical-girl knight as the central subject, exactly 1 oversized silver broadsword held upright in front of her, exactly 1 ornate oval name plaque at the bottom, exactly 2 slender gold candle stands, and exactly 1 arched cathedral-like background window. The character has pale golden blonde long voluminous twin-tail hair, a wreath of small white flowers with pale blue and blush pink blossoms, a soft pearl-white and translucent pale-blue dress with layered ruffled skirt, floral corsage belt, arm garlands, white gloves, and silver-gold filigree armor accents. Her face is intentionally covered by a flat skin-toned rectangular blank mask with no facial features, centered over the face. The sword is elegant and ceremonial, with a long satin-silver blade, gold cross ornaments, dangling chains, and a bouquet of pale blue roses and white flowers wrapped around the hilt. Fill the dome with an ethereal sanctuary garden: abundant white blossoms, pale blue roses, pearly petals, tiny white butterflies, crystal droplets, sparkling beads, soft hanging ornaments, and dreamy bokeh lights. The plaque should display のぞむの花の聖域 / のぞむ in delicate gold lettering. Use a luminous pastel palette of ivory, silver, champagne gold, pale blue, blush pink, and transparent glass highlights. Style: high-end Japanese anime figure illustration, ornate shoujo fantasy, soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, glossy glass reflections, intricate floral details, magical aquarium-dome atmosphere, no watermark, no extra characters, no modern objects.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Anime Character Dossier
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a high-impact anime character dossier poster for RIONA, a cyberpunk tactical female fighter named Riona Cyan, shown in an extreme dynamic foreshortened action pose as if leaping or drop-kicking toward the viewer.

Canvas: Vertical poster, approximately 2:3 aspect ratio, clean white background with black, cyan-blue, and gray accents. Use a crisp premium character-key-visual style, like a futuristic game operator profile sheet.

Layout: Put a huge bold black sans-serif title "RIONA" in the upper left, with smaller subtitle "RIONA CYAN" underneath. The character dominates the center and right side, overlapping the typography. Add thin technical UI lines, crosshair marks, barcode-like details, tiny serial numbers, and scattered glass or metal shards across the poster. On the left side, include a compact profile column with a cyan-and-black emblem logo and the label "CYAN REAPER," followed by dossier fields. On the right edge, add one vertical Japanese-style motto text column using 〈青狩〉は政府に属さない独立治安部隊で、表に出せない事件や戦術任務を請け負う。. At the bottom left, include the slogan "CLEAR. CALCULATED. DEADLY." and two short Japanese-style microtext lines; at the bottom right, add tiny unit ID text "UNIT ID : CR-0722."

Character details: A young adult woman, age 22, athletic and lean with visible toned abdomen, pale skin, black hair with electric cyan-blue dyed ends, messy windblown medium-length hair, and a deliberately obscured face covered by a soft rectangular blur censor block. She wears a black cropped tactical top, a cropped black bomber jacket with cyan trim and small square cyan patches, loose black cargo pants with straps, belt, chain, pouches, holster-like utility bags, fingerless black gloves, and heavy black combat boots with thick soles and cyan laces. The most prominent boot sole is huge in the foreground, facing the viewer, with detailed tread and a small cyan square mark. Her pose is aggressive and airborne: one leg thrust forward toward the camera, the other bent high, one arm extended back for balance, and the other holding a short electrified baton or compact blade with a glowing cyan tip.

Visible counted elements: Include exactly 1 main character, exactly 1 huge foreground boot sole, exactly 1 secondary raised boot, exactly 1 handheld cyan-glowing weapon, exactly 1 cyan-and-black "CYAN REAPER" logo, exactly 1 large title word, exactly 1 left dossier column, exactly 1 right vertical motto column, exactly 3 small crosshair UI markers, exactly 1 barcode block, and many small shard fragments dispersed diagonally around the character.

Left dossier text: Use these readable English field labels and values: "AFFILIATION: Independent Security Force (Blue Hunt)"; "CODE NAME: Cyan Reaper"; "AGE: 22"; "HEIGHT: 168cm"; "WEAPON: Arc baton / short blade / electromagnetic tool"; "PERSONALITY: Calm, confident, rational." Keep the text tiny but legible, like a military database printout.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed anime illustration, sharp inked linework, dramatic perspective, high contrast black clothing against white negative space, cyan rim lighting, glossy fabric highlights, technical graphic design, clean editorial poster composition, subtle motion arcs and blue slash trails near the lower right. Make the image feel like a polished sci-fi character profile splash art.

Constraints: Keep the background mostly white and uncluttered, preserve the bold typography hierarchy, do not add extra characters, do not add a realistic photo style, do not remove the intentional face blur, and avoid excessive readable text beyond the specified dossier and poster labels.
entries.description: Generates a dynamic cyberpunk anime operator profile poster with bold typography, dossier text, tactical clothing, and an extreme foreshortened action pose.

entries.title: Mystic Ruins Platformer Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished 2D side-scrolling platformer concept screenshot for a fantasy game level called MYSTIC RUINS, showing a playable prototype scene with HUD elements overlaid.

Canvas: Wide cinematic 24:9 game screenshot, approximately 1200×450 px. Use a layered parallax composition with strong depth: dark foreground silhouettes, midground playable platforms, and a misty glowing background. No borders or watermark.

Scene: A magical ancient forest ruin at sunset/night, with warm orange, magenta, purple, and deep navy lighting. The environment is dense with gnarled trees, hanging vines, moss, floating dust/fireflies, crumbling stone arches, waterfalls in the distance, and oversized bioluminescent mushrooms glowing pink, violet, and amber. The mood is cozy, mysterious, adventurous, and high-fantasy.

Layout and counted scene elements: Include exactly 4 main walkable platforms: 1 large dark mossy ledge on the upper left with a giant glowing purple-pink mushroom on it, 1 central moss-covered platform where the hero stands, 1 elevated upper-right ruined stone platform with a broken stone column and hanging lantern, and 1 lower-right mossy platform with glowing mushrooms. Add distant ruined arches and cliffs in the background, but keep them non-playable and atmospheric. Place the hero slightly left of center on the central platform.

Hero character: A small cute anthropomorphic fox adventurer, chibi proportions, orange fur, cream muzzle and tail tip, wearing a small brown adventurer outfit with boots, belt, scarf or capelet, and holding a warm glowing lantern. The character should face right in an idle pose, readable as a playable sprite against the environment.

HUD and text content: Top left HUD has the label "HEALTH" in small pale-gold pixel/fantasy UI text, with exactly 3 glowing heart icons underneath. Below that show "LIVES 03". Bottom left HUD has the label "ABILITIES" and exactly 2 square ability icons: one dash/slash icon and one lantern/light icon. Top right HUD shows a small gold coin icon followed by "128", and below it "SCORE 02450". Bottom right shows the level title "MYSTIC RUINS" in widely spaced white-gold capitals with a thin decorative line beneath it.

Visual style: High-quality painterly 2D game art, whimsical platformer concept art, soft bloom, volumetric mist, cinematic rim lighting, sharp readable silhouettes, detailed foliage and moss, glowing particles, warm lantern light, vibrant fantasy color grading, suitable for a playable 2D platformer prototype.

Constraints: Keep the image as a single gameplay screenshot, not a menu or poster. Make all HUD text clean and legible. Do not add extra hearts, ability icons, characters, enemies, dialogue boxes, logos, or watermarks.
entries.description: A polished fantasy 2D platformer gameplay mockup with a fox hero, magical ruin platforms, glowing mushrooms, and a complete HUD overlay.

Maintain the composition and characters of the original illustration.

entries.title: Dark Fantasy Archmage Splash Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic dark fantasy anime key art illustration in the style of high-detail Korean action RPG promotional art, featuring a mysterious female archmage standing in a ruined cathedral under a starry night sky. She has long flowing silver-white hair with lavender highlights, an elegant curvy silhouette, and a white-and-black ornate sorceress outfit: cropped white hooded cloak with gold embroidery, black corset bodice, layered white skirt panels, belts, chains, dangling charms, thigh straps, sheer black stockings, and tall dark boots. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft-edged square blur censor block, while her body and costume remain sharply detailed. She extends her left hand toward the viewer, conjuring a glowing purple magical orb inside a golden astrolabe-like ring with sparks and arcane energy; her right hand holds an ancient dark spellbook with gold filigree. Behind her is a huge circular celestial clock or magic sigil halo with radial lines and constellations, broken stone pillars, flying parchment, torn white ribbons, violet smoke, and distant ruins. Add the white stylized logo text Dungeon & Fighter in the top-left corner. Use cinematic rim lighting, purple and gold highlights, high contrast shadows, intricate linework, dynamic flowing hair and fabric, ultra-detailed fantasy illustration, vertical poster composition, polished game splash art quality.
entries.description: Generates a cinematic anime RPG promotional illustration of an ornate silver-haired sorceress casting purple magic in ruined cathedral scenery.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Gacha Game Dialogue Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: {"type":"gacha game urban exploration screenshot","style":"highly polished anime 3D render, cyberpunk action RPG UI, Zenless Zone Zero inspired, cinematic night lighting, detailed wet pavement reflections, neon signs, lantern glow, depth of field, 16:9 widescreen game capture","scene":{"setting":"narrow futuristic Asian city street at night with restaurants, storefronts, alleys, high-rise buildings, overhead string lights, red paper lanterns, glowing shop signs, arcade machine, street signs, café tables, and damp reflective asphalt","mood":"moody but vibrant, cozy neon nightlife, immersive open-world hub area","camera":"third-person dialogue view, eye-level camera, character centered slightly left, street receding into the distance"},"main character":{"name":"","position":"foreground center-left","appearance":"young adult blonde woman with shoulder-length bob hair, slim build, wearing a loose white button-up dress shirt, black necktie with small yellow INFO lettering, dark skirt or trousers, one hand raised to her ear as if speaking through an earpiece","face":"covered by a flat tan rectangular censor block with no facial features","pose":"casual support-agent introduction pose, shoulders angled toward viewer"},"visible text":{"top left profile":"NEW! INFO Lv. 30","quest objectives count":2,"quest objectives":["Talk to Wise","Visit the video store"],"dialogue speaker":"???","dialogue lines count":3,"dialogue lines":["You must be the Proxy everyone's talking about.","I'm with INFO.","If you ever need support, you know where to find us."],"distance marker":"26.0m","small sign":"Random Play","uid":"UID:13004538278"},"hud layout":{"top left":{"components count":4,"components":["black rounded main menu tile with white ME-like logo and red exclamation badge","yellow NEW! label above player name","player name and level block","two circular character/status icons"]},"top right":{"components count":6,"components":["Events icon labeled C","Store icon labeled F1","Tasks icon labeled F2","Agents icon labeled F3","Signal icon labeled F4","Menu icon labeled Tab"]},"right side":{"components count":4,"components":["circular minimap with compass N and quest icons","wireless scan button","objective navigation icon","26.0m distance label"]},"bottom left":{"components count":2,"components":["large transparent virtual joystick with W A S D labels","small camera shutter button labeled Q"]},"bottom right":{"components count":6,"components":["globe interaction button labeled R","large circular movement/skill button","ellipsis chat button labeled F","large swirl action button labeled Space","double-chevron dash button labeled Shift","small network bars beside UID"]},"bottom center":{"components count":1,"components":["black rounded dialogue box with white text, yellow highlighted character name, and double-chevron continue symbol"]}},"composition requirements":"Make it look like an authentic playable gacha-game screenshot rather than a poster. entries.title: 3D Anime RPG Gameplay Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Generate an actual gameplay screenshot of a non-existent modern urban 3D anime-style open-world RPG. The setting is a high-end lounge-style social space with a visible bar and sofa seating under warm lighting. A conversation event scene showing the main heroine serving with cute service attire and gestures. Other cast members are naturally placed around to create a glamorous and calm adult atmosphere.

Characters should not be high-definition illustrations, but rather cel-shaded 3D character models similar to event scenes in recent bishojo 3D games, featuring rounded faces, simple skin shading, soft hair strands, and a clean 3D model texture with a slight plastic feel.

As a game screen, include a Japanese conversation subtitle window at the bottom, character name display, selection UI, status UI like money or affection level in the top right, and operation UI like skip/log display at the screen edges. Make the dialogue and choices feel realistic, cute, and slightly quirky. The image should look like an actual in-game screenshot rather than promotional art. Overall, emphasize a sophisticated modern 3D anime game aesthetic that is healing, heart-fluttering, and glamorous in an adult way.
entries.description: Generates a realistic gameplay screenshot of a modern 3D anime-style open-world RPG set in a luxury lounge with UI elements and dialogue.

entries.title: Traveling Alchemist at Misty Ruins
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a moody vertical fantasy anime illustration of Kanon, a young traveling alchemist sitting on the broken edge of an old stone pier above a misty flooded ruin at sunset. The character wears a dark baseball cap, large blue headphones, a pale hooded travel cloak over layered adventurer clothing, dark loose trousers, fingerless gloves, and heavy lace-up boots; long blonde hair falls in two thick braids over the shoulders. A square muted gray face-obscuring block covers the face, centered under the cap brim. She holds a small glass vial of glowing blue liquid in both hands, with two additional potion bottles hanging from a worn brown leather satchel at her hip. Beside her on the stone ledge sits one small spherical robot companion, white and weathered, with a black screen face showing two cyan glowing eyes and a cyan ring light on its side. The background shows a broad reflective swamp or lake, reeds in the foreground, drifting fog, and distant ruined gothic towers and arches silhouetted against a warm low sun near the horizon. Use atmospheric perspective, soft painterly brushwork, cool blue-gray shadows contrasted with warm peach sunset light, subtle magical glow from the potion and robot, detailed fabric folds, damp stone texture, cinematic composition, melancholic yet adventurous mood, high-quality fantasy concept art, portrait aspect ratio.
entries.description: Generates a cinematic fantasy anime main visual of a potion-carrying alchemist and robot companion resting beside flooded ruins at sunset.

entries.title: Traveling Alchemist Campsite
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy anime illustration of Kanon, a young traveling alchemist resting at a nighttime forest campsite under a deep blue starry sky. She sits on a wooden log beside a bright campfire, one knee raised, holding a wooden mug up near her face as if drinking; her face is mostly hidden by the mug and shadow. She has long blonde hair in two thick braids, wears a navy baseball cap with the visible text 0235, large blue headphones, fingerless gloves, a loose white shirt, dark blue trousers, rugged lace-up boots, belts, pouches, and a flowing dark navy cloak. Beside her floats one small round companion robot, white and metallic with a glossy black face screen, two cyan glowing oval eyes, and cyan illuminated ring details. The campsite includes one canvas teepee tent on the left, one warm lantern glowing near the tent, a wooden crate with glass alchemy bottles and flasks in the lower left, one kettle near the fire, travel bags and wooden gear on the right, and scattered warm fireflies or ember sparks in the forest. Use a rich painterly anime style with highly detailed fabric folds, leather, metal, glass reflections, warm orange firelight contrasting with cool blue moonlit shadows, atmospheric depth, dark pine trees, cozy adventurous fantasy mood, and a polished main-visual composition.

entries.title: 3D Wireframe Illustration Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please convert this illustration into a Wireframe style. Express the outline and internal structure with thin, precise lines, and draw polygon edges and geometric lines overlaid throughout like a 3D model. Lines should be uniform and sharp, emphasizing three-dimensionality and depth through intersecting lines, making it look like a light, transparent structure. The overall atmosphere should be cool and technological, futuristic and minimalist, finished with the refined beauty of digital design or 3D modeling. Do not alter the composition, character's expression, pose, silhouette, or major features of the original illustration at all, and reconstruct it beautifully as a wireframe.

entries.title: Elegant Blue-Haired Fantasy Woman
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished full-body anime game character standing pose on a clean white background, featuring an elegant adult woman with icy light blue short layered bob hair, long side bangs, and a small dangling earring. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered soft gray square blur, while the rest of the design remains highly detailed. She wears a fitted gothic-fantasy formal dress in black and deep sapphire blue: a high-neck bodice with a sculpted corset waist, long flared sleeves, a short front skirt, and a long split tailcoat-like overskirt that opens in the front and falls behind her calves. Decorate the outfit with ornate silver trim, thorn-like metallic filigree, star-shaped accents, blue crystal gems at the chest, waist, sleeves, and shoes, plus a small chain pendant hanging from the waist. Add sheer dark stockings and glossy black pointed high heels with ankle straps and matching blue gemstone ornaments. Pose her gracefully with one hand raised near her collarbone, the other hand relaxed outward, legs crossed in a refined stance. Use clean high-end visual novel character art, crisp linework, soft cel shading, glossy highlights, delicate fabric folds, subtle translucent blue inner lining with faint floral patterns, elegant proportions, and a premium fantasy RPG heroine design.

entries.title: Ame-no-Uzume Sacred Cave Dance
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an ornate vertical fantasy anime illustration of Ame-no-Uzume dancing in a sacred cave shrine, framed like a luxurious Japanese mythological tarot card. The composition has 1 central female dancer standing on one bare foot on a round wooden kagura stage, her other knee raised, one arm lifted high holding a golden suzu bell wand with trailing red ribbons, and the other arm extended gracefully outward. She wears a revealing layered miko-inspired ceremonial outfit: flowing white kimono sleeves, red inner lining, gold floral embroidery, black-and-gold ornate waist ornaments, braided cords, tassels, anklets, and jewelry; her long dark hair streams dramatically around her body beneath a large floral-gold divine headdress. Her face should be softly obscured or left featureless rather than detailed. Behind her is a blinding warm golden cave opening with a thick shimenawa rope and 6 hanging paper shide streamers above it. Surround the stage with 6 background attendants or deities, 3 on the left and 3 on the right, partially hidden in shadow with indistinct or softly obscured faces, raising hands or instruments as if worshipping and celebrating the dance. Add swirling petals, sparkling star-like lights, mist, ribbons, and a deep indigo-purple cavern filled with magical reflections. Use an extremely elaborate gold filigree border with 4 large corner floral ornaments, dangling tassels, bells, gemstones, and a circular chrysanthemum crest at the top center and bottom center. Lighting is dramatic and divine, with intense backlight, warm gold highlights, cool blue-violet shadows, glossy fabric, intricate ornament detail, dynamic motion, high fantasy, highly detailed anime painting, cinematic vertical poster, no readable text.

entries.title: Layered Paper Alchemist Figurine
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic shallow-depth-of-field tabletop photo of a handmade layered paper-cut shadowbox figurine of a fantasy alchemist girl standing on a green self-healing cutting mat in a craft workshop. The figure is built from many stacked cut cardstock layers with visible brown cardboard edges, like a 3D paper model or failed papercraft pattern test, and has a deliberately imperfect construction. She wears a pale mint-green long coat with layered skirt panels, tan leather straps crossing her chest and waist, brown boots and gloves, and a belt full of small potion bottles. Count 7 visible potion bottles: 1 purple bottle raised in her left hand, 1 small bottle on her left hip pouch, 3 bottles hanging across the front belt, and 2 bottles on the right side of the skirt. Her hair is pale icy blue, long, wavy, voluminous, and cut into separate stacked paper layers; her face is intentionally hidden by a centered square pixelated beige blur censor block. Pose her dynamically as if skipping or floating, one arm raised holding the bottle, the other hand open to the side, one boot lifted, attached to a small layered oval display base with tiny paper grass and plants. Surround the figurine with exactly 5 main crafting items: 1 white squeeze bottle of craft glue on the left with a cute bear label reading Bearly Art Precision Craft Glue, 1 metal ruler on the right, 1 silver hobby knife at the lower right, 1 green cutting mat with white grid lines underneath, and multiple brown cardboard offcuts and flat pattern pieces in the background. Use warm natural indoor light, macro lens perspective, realistic paper texture, soft bokeh background, muted earthy colors, and a high-detail photorealistic craft-desk aesthetic.
entries.description: A photorealistic craft-table scene featuring a layered paper-cut fantasy alchemist figurine, useful for generating papercraft or shadowbox-style concept images.

entries.title: Custom Cat Beastman Playing Cards
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please create playing card images (J, Q, K, A, JOKER) using the character from the first image. You can choose the suits. Do not use the image exactly as is; arrange the pose and angle to look like a playing card design. Add botanical-style decorations. Make the horizontal symmetry boundary diagonal. Add a flower crown to the character and change their outfit to a dress. The character is a cat beastman, so do not make them human. Ensure consistency in the character's body shape. Show only the upper body. Do not add any extra cat motifs. There is no need for the character to look at the camera.

entries.title: Moonlit Sierra-Style Castle Pixel Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a richly detailed 1990s Sierra adventure game style pixel-art scene of a medieval Bavarian castle at night, viewed from across a calm lake. The castle is large and storybook-like, with white stone walls, red steep roofs, half-timbered upper floors, multiple cylindrical towers and turrets, crenellated ramparts, a glowing arched gate, and warm yellow light shining from many small windows. A narrow stone bridge crosses the water to the entrance on the left side of the castle. Set the scene in a deep cobalt-blue moonlit landscape with a bright full moon in the upper left sky, scattered stars, soft layered clouds, dark pine forest silhouettes, distant mountain peaks, rocky lake edges, and a few tall evergreens framing the left and right sides. The lake should dominate the foreground, reflecting the entire castle, moonlight, bridge, windows, and towers in shimmering horizontal pixelated ripples. Add small glowing fireflies around the lakeshore and over the water. Use a nostalgic VGA pixel-art aesthetic inspired by classic Sierra point-and-click adventure games, with crisp dithering, limited but vibrant blue-purple palette, luminous highlights, high contrast, painterly pixel clusters, romantic fantasy atmosphere, and no modern UI or text.
entries.description: Generates a nostalgic VGA adventure-game-style fantasy castle scene reflected in a moonlit lake, useful for retro game backgrounds or storybook art.

entries.title: Xahau Panda Streetwear Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dynamic streetwear character poster on a white background with teal and gold paint-splatter brush strokes. The main subject is one anthropomorphic panda standing full body in a confident three-quarter pose, looking to the side, with one hand in a pocket and the other holding one ornate vertical staff/cane decorated with gold-and-teal geometric glyphs. The character wears a dramatic Aztec/Mesoamerican-inspired feather headdress in teal, emerald, navy, black, and gold, a gold ceremonial forehead mask ornament, layered turquoise-and-gold jewelry, a black oversized bomber jacket with gold patches and teal trim, a white graphic T-shirt printed with a stylized ancient mask face, loose black cargo pants with teal straps and gold side detailing, chunky green-black-white sneakers, gloves, and one small teal crossbody pouch with a golden mask emblem. Add a visible fluffy black-white-teal tail behind the legs. The composition includes exactly 3 large brush-lettered words on the left reading "BUILDING ON XAHAU", with "BUILDING" and "XAHAU" in dark teal and "ON" in metallic gold; place the text diagonally and make it look hand-painted with splashes. On the right background, include one large thin white line-art mask illustration over a dark teal brush-stroke panel. Use high-contrast comic/anime concept art styling, sharp ink outlines, energetic splatter effects, detailed fabric folds, gold highlights, and a premium crypto-street-culture aesthetic.
entries.description: Generates a bold anthropomorphic panda character poster blending Mesoamerican ornamentation, streetwear fashion, and Xahau-themed graffiti typography.

entries.title: Mecha Schoolgirl Katana Action Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished anime action illustration of a mecha schoolgirl warrior in a dynamic low crouching pose on a clean white background, framed by a thin red futuristic HUD-style border with angular corner cuts. The character is a young anime girl with dark brown long straight hair, blunt bangs, a white hair clip, large brown eyes, and a focused expression, wearing a cropped white-and-teal Japanese sailor school uniform with a red neckerchief, pleated teal mini skirt, white sneakers, and exposed midriff. Give her bulky articulated cybernetic armor: glossy white and deep teal mechanical forearms, shoulders, thighs, shins, knee guards, and hands, with brass/gold joints, circular pistons, screws, segmented fingers, and small red technical markings; the hands must be anatomically correct, with clear articulated fingers and believable gripping. She is holding a long katana vertically at the left side of the image, one mechanical hand gripping the hilt above her head and the other braced on the ground, with the blade extending down beside her and faint sweeping motion arcs behind her to imply a fast slash landing. Use clean cel-shaded anime rendering with detailed mecha design, soft highlights on glossy armor, warm skin tones, crisp line art, subtle ground shadow, and a futuristic concept-art poster feel. Include exactly 3 visible text/logo elements: MECHA GIRLS in small red lettering near the upper left, MECHA GIRL at the bottom center border, and IONEN with a circular red emblem at the lower right.
entries.description: Generates a dynamic anime mecha girl action poster with cybernetic limbs, a katana, and futuristic HUD branding.
