entries.title: Elegant Oriental Fantasy Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
An adult Oriental fantasy female character in a front-facing close-up bust composition, with a cold, gentle, mysterious, and noble temperament. She possesses exquisite Oriental features, porcelain-white translucent skin, and soft, delicate facial lighting. Her eyes are quiet and detached, with a snow-like clarity and a hint of melancholy. Her black-gray long hair is styled in gorgeous ancient-style double buns, smooth and fluffy with natural layers, accented by light bangs and decorated with gold hairpins, green gemstones, tassels, bead chains, and exquisite butterfly-shaped ornaments-elegant but not cluttered.

She wears a magnificent ancient-style robe in white and dark green, evoking Oriental court and Xianxia vibes. The inner layer is white silk, and the outer layer is draped with a heavy and soft white fox fur shawl with a realistic plush texture and fluffy edges. The hem and sleeves feature dark green gradients, black woven patterns, and fine gold thread decorations, embodying a high-end, restrained, and cold Oriental aesthetic. Her slender hands elegantly hold a sprig of green bamboo covered in white snow, with crisp green leaves and delicate snowflakes creating a wintry poetic feel.

The background is a gradient of very light warm white and pale blue-gray with clean white space. Soft snowflakes, ice crystals, shimmering particles, and faint gold light spots fall through the air, creating a serene, dreamy, and beautiful winter wonderland atmosphere. The overall color palette features snow white, dark green, jasper, pale gold, and ice blue-gray. The image is bright and transparent with soft lighting, combining ink-wash aesthetics, Oriental illustration texture, and high-end fantasy art.

Style: Beautiful Oriental fantasy illustration, ancient Xianxia beauty, detailed digital painting, soft focus lighting, snowy atmosphere, gorgeous hair accessories, exquisite clothing textures, realistic fur texture, cold fairy-like aura, poetic white space, high-end feel, ultra-high detail, exquisite character portrait, dreamy atmosphere, clean and elegant, wallpaper-grade quality.
entries.description: Generates a high-quality illustration of a cold and elegant oriental fantasy female character with snowy winter aesthetics.

entries.title: Crimson Winged Giant Mecha
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime mecha illustration of a colossal humanoid robot named Heaven-Piercing Crimson, standing in a powerful symmetrical front-facing pose on a futuristic circular launch platform. The robot is primarily glossy crimson red with white, black, dark gunmetal, and small gold accent panels, covered in intricate hard-surface armor plating, panel lines, vents, exposed mechanical joints, decals, scratches, and tiny warning markings. Give it a sharp Gundam-like heroic silhouette with a horned angular helmet, glowing cyan eyes, a narrow face mask, broad armored shoulders, layered chest armor, long segmented legs, and two large arm-mounted weapons or shield-blade units; one forearm carries a long rifle-like cannon with a cyan energy strip, while the other has a large angular red-and-white shield blade. Add an enormous wing backpack made of six major blade-like wing assemblies: two huge upward red wings, two wide horizontal red-and-white wings, and two long downward tail fins, all edged with white and gold pieces, creating a phoenix-like aerial form. Use a low-angle camera looking up to make the robot feel gigantic, centered composition, dynamic perspective, crisp cel-shaded anime rendering with realistic mechanical detail, high contrast sunlight, glossy reflections, and deep shadows. Set the scene against a bright clear blue sky with scattered white clouds, with a distant futuristic base and horizon below, emphasizing scale and grandeur. Style it as a premium Japanese giant robot poster, ultra-detailed, clean line art, vibrant colors, cinematic lighting, no visible text except optional tiny technical markings on the armor.

entries.title: Cinematic Fire Effect Asset
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-resolution VFX fire effect asset: a wide horizontal wall of intense flames rising from the bottom edge across the full width of the frame, on a pure black background. The fire should have bright yellow-white cores, saturated orange and red outer tongues, and semi-transparent smoky heat wisps fading upward into darkness. Use tall varied flame peaks with uneven curling shapes, including several large twisting flame columns at the left, center, and right, plus a dense low band of smaller flames along the base. Add many glowing ember particles and sparks drifting upward, with tiny red-orange specks scattered above the flames. Make it look like a realistic cinematic game effect or compositing element, high contrast, sharp detail, natural turbulent motion implied, no objects, no text, no people, no border, centered composition, pure black, yellow white orange red, 16:9 wide landscape.

entries.title: Electric Blue Lens Flare VFX
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-resolution cinematic VFX asset of a brilliant electric blue-white lens flare on a pure black background. The composition is centered slightly left of frame with an intensely overexposed white core, surrounded by radiant blue glow. A razor-straight horizontal light streak spans edge to edge across the image, intersected by a vertical beam through the center to form a luminous cross. Add many thin radial starburst rays shooting outward from the core, with soft volumetric bloom, subtle blue haze, and faint circular lens artifacts around the center. Include exactly 4 small secondary flare orbs along the horizontal beam: 1 tiny dim orb to the left of the core and 3 brighter blue-white orbs to the right. Keep the background completely black with no text, no objects, no borders, and no visible texture, designed as a transparent-feeling game/anime effect material even though rendered on black. Use a wide 16:9 frame, sharp highlights, realistic optical flare physics, high contrast, glossy sci-fi energy, and clean compositing-ready edges.

entries.title: Cleaned Taisho Mystery Game Title Screen
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, create a cleaned-up revised version of the same Taisho-romantic mystery game title screen. Preserve the overall composition, Japanese logo text, ornate UI frame, character placement, moonlit Ginza street setting, and all interface elements unchanged, including the 2 top circular buttons and the 6 bottom menu buttons labeled 「はじめから」, 「つづきから」, 「記録」, 「設定」, 「資料室」, and 「特典」. Redraw the linework and repaint the colors for a sharper, higher-quality illustration with clearer edges, richer but still dark antique tones, and more polished lighting. Correct the streetcar so it has a more believable vintage tram shape, perspective, windows, rails, and front details. Greatly reduce GPT-image-style tiny dot garbage, speckle noise, random artifacts, muddy textures, and messy broken lines while keeping the cinematic nighttime atmosphere, falling petals, wet pavement reflections, newspapers, mask, pocket watch, telescope, pen, and decorative border.
entries.description: Generates a polished revision of a Taisho-romantic mystery visual novel title screen while preserving the original layout and UI.

entries.title: Professional Trading Card Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please generate a high-quality trading card-style illustration.

[Reference]
Base it on the provided character image. (Do not refer to text in the image.) Maintain the character's face, outfit, features, and identity.

[Style]
Modern Japanese trading card game style. High definition, dynamic composition, dramatic lighting, vivid colors, sharp rendering. A high-end feel like hologram processing. Readable text and organized UI design.

[Layout (Fixed)]
A vertical card with the following composition:
- Top left: Rarity display (text)
- Directly below rarity: Attribute (icon + text)
- Center: Full body of the character (with effects based on abilities)
- Bottom left: Status section
- Bottom right: Skill/Special move description
- Bottom center: Character name (large and prominent)

[Text Elements]
- Name: {{★Input manually or auto-generate from appearance}}
- Attribute: Auto-generate from appearance
- Rarity: Auto-generate from appearance

[Status (Auto-generate 0-100 values and gauges for each item based on appearance)]
- Attack
 High: Large weapons, aggressive poses, red/orange tones
 Low: Defensive, soft designs
- Defense
 High: Armor, heavy equipment, sense of weight, shield-like expression
 Low: Light equipment, slender
- Speed
 High: Slender, dynamic poses, speed effects
 Low: Large, solid stance
- Intelligence
 High: Calm expression, sharp eyes, blue/purple tones, mechanical/magical symbols
 Low: Emotional, impression of brute force
- Magic Power
 High: Luminescence, aura, magic effects, surreal expressions
 Low: Realistic, few effects

[Important Rules]
Do not maximize all statuses. Balance them with strengths and weaknesses.

[Rarity Standards]
N: Standard
R: Strong aura and direction
SR: Overwhelming presence and amount of information
UR: Overwhelming presence and information, with gloss and shine over the whole card

[Skill Generation]
Auto-generate the following:
- Skill (Name + Effect)
- Special Move (Flashy name + powerful effect)

[Direction]
Apply effects based on attribute and magic power (fire, lightning, darkness, etc.)

[Output]
Ensure a professional card design that is organized and easy to read without overlapping text.
entries.description: A comprehensive prompt for creating a high-quality trading card game illustration with a structured UI, rarity indicators, and character stats.

entries.title: Clay Baba Yaga With Chicken-Leg Hut
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cute stylized 3D clay-rendered character on a clean white background: Baba Yaga as a squat elderly folklore witch wearing a large soft burnt orange-red hood or cap, long gray hair hanging down on both sides, and a simple brown robe with rounded toy-like folds. Her face is deliberately hidden by one flat opaque square censor block in a warm brown skin tone, centered over the head and covering all facial features. She holds exactly one crooked wooden walking staff in her left hand. Beside and partly attached to her right side is exactly one miniature log cabin hut, made from rounded golden-brown logs, with exactly one arched wooden door, exactly one small square upper window, exactly one dark blue-gray shingled roof, and exactly one squat chimney. The hut stands on exactly two birdlike chicken legs with three front claws visible on each foot, sculpted in the same warm wood-clay style. Use soft studio lighting, smooth rounded forms, tactile polymer-clay texture, subtle ambient shadows, high detail, centered composition, isometric front three-quarter view, whimsical fairy-tale toy aesthetic, no text, no border.

entries.title: Fantasy Ice Phoenix Goddess Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
An adult fantasy female character, close-up bust composition, with silver-white extra-long fluffy hair, strands are light and flowing, rich in layers, with a soft luster and silky texture, spreading naturally in the air to form elegant flowing curves. 

Her face is exquisite and ethereal, with delicate and three-dimensional features, fair and transparent skin, a delicate nose, soft and natural lips, and a quiet and mysterious expression, possessing a goddess-like and elven temperament. 

The collarbone lines are distinct, the shoulder and neck area is more stretched and elegant, the upper chest contour is moderately visible, and the clothing opening and fit are optimized to make the visible range of the chest and collarbone more natural and beautiful, sexy but not overly revealing. 

The character's eyes are a clear and charming brown, with delicate highlights and dreamlike eyelashes, decorated with faint sparkling particles and exquisite makeup around the eyes. 

The character is surrounded by a magnificent fantasy divine bird, similar to a phoenix, with long and stretched wings and light, transparent feathers. The overall color scheme is dominated by blue, ice blue, light blue, and silver-white, supplemented by a small amount of delicate metallic edges, making the bird appear holy, dreamlike, and elegant. 

The background is a deep night sky and starlit space, with small stars, glowing particles, and a hazy cosmic feel, creating a dreamlike and mysterious atmosphere. The overall color of the picture is unified into a blue and silver-white theme, emphasizing the level changes between ice blue, lake blue, light blue, and silver-white, creating a pure, cold, gorgeous, and ethereal visual experience. 

The overall style is high-quality 3D CG illustration. Characters, feathers, and the divine bird all have a clear sense of volume, material, and fine rendering effects, combining aesthetic fantasy with commercial-grade visual quality. The lighting uses cinematic soft light and edge contour light, skin is delicate and transparent, hair is distinct, and feathers have a semi-transparent glowing effect. Aspect ratio 9:16.
entries.description: A high-detail 3D CG illustration of a mystical silver-haired goddess accompanied by a glowing blue ice phoenix in a starry void.

entries.title: Cinematic Yasuo Fantasy Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dark, vertical fantasy game poster for Yasuo from League of Legends, in an ultra-detailed painterly cinematic splash-art style with black ink splatter edges, stormy navy-gray atmosphere, and dramatic gold rim lighting. The composition has two human depictions: one huge close-up head and wild topknot hair filling the upper half, with the face covered by a large flat opaque brown square censor block, and one full-body warrior standing heroically in the lower center on a stone pedestal, also with a small opaque brown square censor block over the face. The warrior wears layered samurai-inspired black and deep blue armor with ornate gold trim, a flowing tattered blue cloak and ribbons, long windblown hair, and holds a glowing katana angled downward to the left; swirling golden wind trails, sparks, and calligraphic energy ribbons wrap around his body and hair. Behind him is a dense battlefield of shadowy soldiers, banners, spear silhouettes, ruined towers, and a storm of dust and light, all framed by expressive black brush strokes and parchment-like texture. Include exactly five visible text groups: left vertical Chinese quote 死亡如风,常伴吾身。 with a small League-style emblem beneath it; right vertical Chinese subtitle 疾风剑豪; large gold Chinese name 亚索 on the right with small vertical Roman letters "YASUO" beside it; bottom large spaced serif title "YASUO"; and beneath it two small centered lines, "THE UNFORGIVEN" and "LEAGUE OF LEGENDS". Use a premium collectible poster layout, high contrast, ornate gold typography, mystical wind effects, gritty ink-wash fantasy realism, sharp armor detail, and a 2:3 portrait aspect ratio.

entries.title: Anime ChatGPT Companion in Study
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished anime-style personification of ChatGPT as a gentle young female AI companion in a warm sunlit study. She has short silvery-white bobbed hair with soft waves, small braids, teal gradient tips, and teal OpenAI-knot hair ornaments with ribbons; her face is covered by a centered plain beige square censor block. She wears an elegant white academic robe with wide sleeves lined in teal, black inner dress or vest, teal tie, gold trim, small tech-like pins, and a teal ribbon emblem on one sleeve. She sits at a wooden desk, holding a dark book against her chest with the words "Knowledge Understanding Inspiration" and a small OpenAI-style knot symbol on the cover, while her other hand is raised as if presenting a hologram. To her left floats one translucent cyan chat bubble labeled "ChatGPT" with the text "Your AI companion. Here to help, inspire, and understand." plus a small heart, and three smaller glowing square icons around it: one light bulb icon, one magnifying glass icon, and one chat message icon. On the desk include exactly eight visible study objects: a dark mug with an OpenAI-style knot logo and the word "ChatGPT," a stack of four labeled books reading "Science," "History," "Art," and "Philosophy," one teal pen, one open notebook, one black book held by the character, and one small white robot mascot with teal glowing eyes and an OpenAI-style logo. The open notebook has two pages: the left page titled "Ideas" with notes "Conversations," "Possibilities," and "Infinite," and the right page titled "Today's Plan" with checklist items "Help someone," "Spark ideas," and "Make a difference," with small doodles and hearts. In the background, show a cozy library with bookshelves, potted plants, sunlight streaming through a window, and a dark chalkboard. The chalkboard displays an OpenAI-style knot symbol and the phrase "Together, we can:" followed by exactly five bullet points: "Learn," "Create," "Solve," "Explore," and "and more!" plus little star doodles and a cat face doodle. Use a soft painterly anime illustration style, luminous rim lighting, teal and cream color palette, delicate highlights, high detail, shallow depth of field, cozy optimistic atmosphere, vertical composition.
entries.description: Generates a cozy anime personification of ChatGPT as an AI companion in a sunlit library study with holograms, books, notes, and mascot details.

entries.title: Milky Pastel Chibi Music Camera Twins
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cute milky pastel anime illustration of two chibi twin-like girls sitting closely behind a large retro camera, centered in a perfectly balanced composition. The left girl has cream blonde short bobbed hair with a huge pink bow, oversized round pastel headphones, tiny blush cheeks, and simple oval dark eyes. The right girl has soft peach short hair with a side tuft and a small ribbon-like shape, matching oversized pastel headphones, blush cheeks, and the same minimal chibi facial features. Both characters lean their hands on top of the camera as if peeking over it, with calm, slightly curious expressions. The camera is large, detailed, and whimsical, in powder blue with pink and cream accents, featuring one big central lens and two smaller circular side lenses for a toy-like, mechanical look. Behind them is a dark navy semicircular backdrop filled with floating white and pastel music notes. Surrounding the entire scene are many interlocking gears, dials, rings, dots, and small decorative shapes, all arranged symmetrically like a music box or clockwork halo. Use a soft cream background and a limited palette of pastel cyan, baby blue, blush pink, peach, ivory, and navy. The linework should be clean and rounded, with a flat graphic anime style, gentle shading, subtle texture, and a dreamy retro-futurist kawaii mood. Emphasize a polished sticker-like finish, high visual clarity, and a sweet "milky pastel" aesthetic.
entries.description: This generates a soft pastel kawaii anime artwork of two headphone-wearing chibi girls framed by a retro camera, gears, and music notes, ideal for cute character art or decorative poster visuals.

entries.title: Anime Double-Exposure Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A character promotional poster titled "INPUT NAME", designed in a cinematic vertical key visual composition (9:16). The upper half features a large, softly glowing silhouette of an anime girl's face formed from flowing wind and cherry blossom particles. The silhouette feels dreamy, delicate, and slightly transparent.
The lower section shows the full-body character standing gently in a calm pose, wearing an elegant modern kimono-inspired outfit with light fabric movement.
Inside the silhouette, use double-exposure storytelling: floating cherry blossoms, memory fragments, soft sky gradients, emotional close-up moments, and subtle nature elements blended into watercolor mist.
Left side contains warm pink tones and floral energy, while right side has cool sky blues for balance. A thin glowing breeze line connects top silhouette to the character below.
Edges are soft, painterly, and fade into white negative space with an ethereal anime aesthetic.
entries.description: A creative cinematic poster prompt for anime characters using double-exposure storytelling and cherry blossom elements.

entries.title: Celestial Blue Anime Princess
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body anime character design of a dreamy celestial ice princess standing centered against a clean white background with faint glowing cyan swirls and sparkles. She has very long, flowing icy gradient blue hair that reaches past her knees, with soft volume, glossy strands, a braided side section, and star-shaped hair ornaments. Add a delicate silver crescent-moon headpiece above her head, plus tiny dangling star accessories near the ears. Her face is mostly soft and pretty in shoujo style, but keep it simple and elegant. She wears a short fantasy dress in light sky blue and white, with a fitted bodice, sweetheart neckline, translucent puff sleeves, lace trim, tiny floral accents at the sleeves, and a sparkling star-shaped ornament at the chest with hanging jewel chains. Around her neck is a moon-and-star choker necklace. The skirt has 2 layers: a short front skirt and a long high-low overskirt draping down on both sides and back. Decorate the dress with celestial motifs including 3 crescent moons on the hem of the short skirt, 1 large central starburst motif, white filigree patterns, glitter, and tiny star-like lights throughout. Add small dangling charms under the skirt hem and overskirt, including stars and teardrop crystals. She wears white thigh-high stockings, with 3 visible star decorations on the upper thigh area of one stocking, and glossy blue high heels with ankle straps, bows, and star ornaments on the toes. Pose her front-facing with one leg slightly forward, arms relaxed naturally, and hair spreading outward in elegant flowing curves. Surround her with 4 larger glowing star sparkles and 2 small snowflake-like motifs. The image should feel ethereal, refined, luminous, pastel, magical-girl inspired, ultra-clean, highly polished, and delicately detailed, with soft gradients, crisp line art, subtle glitter effects, and a premium character-sheet illustration aesthetic.

entries.title: Fantasy UR Forest Priestess Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A lavish high-fantasy collectible character card in a premium mobile RPG style, full-frame vertical composition with an ornate black-and-gold filigree border and luminous emerald accents. The card depicts リネア / RINEA, a mystical forest priestess standing in an enchanted woodland stream, wearing layered flowing robes in ivory, sage green, moss, and muted gold, with long translucent veils, floral embroidery, vine-like trim, delicate beadwork, and many small white blossoms woven through the outfit and hair. Her face is mostly shadowed beneath a hood and veil for an ethereal anonymous look. She holds a slender wooden bow wrapped with vines and blossoms. Behind her stands a majestic spirit deer made of living wood and roots, with branching antlers covered in flowers, glowing pale eyes, and a swirling magical vortex of teal-green light in its chest. The background is a dense sacred forest with tall trees, dappled light rays, floating motes, glowing wisps, circular magic rings, water reflections, and soft green-blue atmospheric mist. Use ultra-detailed fantasy illustration rendering, elegant painterly realism, rich texture, luminous magical effects, intricate costume design, and premium trading-card polish.

At the top center, a dark green nameplate with gold trim reads "神異 - Divine Anomaly -". At the top left, place a very large iridescent rarity mark "UR" with a violet-to-cyan glow and exactly 7 gold stars beneath it. At the top right, add a circular green elemental emblem with white leaf and wind motifs, and beneath it a small plaque reading "属性 木・風 WOOD + WIND". Near the lower center, add a large rounded dark green plaque with gold edging showing the character name "リネア / RINEA" and the subtitle "西の森の巫女 / Priestess of the Western Forest".

Create exactly 3 middle information panels above the stats row, each dark green with gold borders and a circular icon: panel 1 labeled "守護神" with the value "森の精霊鹿" and English subtitle "Forest Spirit Deer"; panel 2 labeled "役割" with the value "浄化・再生" and English subtitle "Purify Regenerate"; panel 3 labeled "スキル" with the value "鎮魂の森風" and English subtitle "Requiem of Verdant Souls".

Create exactly 5 bottom stat panels with icons and large serif numerals, reading from left to right: "ATK 720", "DEF 810", "SPD 840", "MAG 910", "SUP 880". Overall style: premium gacha card UI, sacred nature fantasy, ornate decorative framing, glowing emerald and gold color palette, crisp typography, symmetrical polished layout, highly detailed and majestic.

entries.title: Neon Crime Game Cover at the Marina
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A stylized cinematic illustration inspired by a neon-soaked Florida crime-game cover scene at sunset, showing two armed protagonists standing heroically on a wooden marina dock in the foreground, facing the viewer. The scene has a polished modern video game key-art look with pastel vaporwave colors, warm pink and peach highlights, turquoise water, and a clear blue sky. On the right, a tall athletic young man in a white t-shirt, open short-sleeve blue tropical print shirt, tan cargo pants, and a wristwatch stands in a dominant forward pose with both hands aiming a silver semi-automatic pistol toward the camera. On the left, a curvy young woman with long dark curly hair tied half-up wears a black crop top, denim shorts, layered gold necklaces, and a crossbody bag at her hip, holding a handgun pointed downward in a relaxed but ready pose. Both characters are centered and framed like iconic action-game cover art. Behind them is a bright waterfront city skyline with high-rise hotels and apartment towers, a low bridge crossing the water, several palm trees on the left, and glossy reflections across the bay. Include 1 helicopter in the upper left sky, 1 police speedboat racing across the water on the right with a white wake, 1 sleek black speedboat docked in the lower right foreground with visible bullet cracks in the windshield, and 1 white seabird standing in the shallow water near the left side. Strong late-afternoon sunlight, long shadows, saturated retro Miami palette, crisp cel-shaded digital painting style, dramatic action-poster composition, ultra-clean lines, highly detailed environment, wide 16:9 framing.

entries.title: Minimal Fox Spirit Character Sketch

entries.prompt: A clean full-body anime character concept sketch on a plain white background, centered with lots of empty space around her. Depict a slender young fox-spirit woman with 2 upright fox ears on top of her head, very long flowing hair in silver white, and a softly blurred, featureless face for an unfinished design-sheet look. She wears a short wrap-style robe dress inspired by a kimono, with short sleeves, a wide sash belt at the waist, layered asymmetrical skirt panels, and 1 long trailing ribbon or fabric tail drifting to the right. Add knee-high fitted boots with simple angular trim near the knees. Her pose is elegant and relaxed, standing with one leg slightly crossing in front of the other, left arm lowered naturally, right arm raised with palm open. Hover above her raised hand 1 small magical flame spirit, glowing in turquoise and pale gold, with a curled teardrop shape and tiny wisps orbiting it. Render the figure mostly in delicate monochrome pencil or ink line art with very light gray shading, while the floating flame is the only colored element. Minimalist character design sheet aesthetic, refined manga proportions, soft clean outlines, airy negative space, no background objects, no text.

entries.title: Chibi Dinosaur Museum Diorama
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A highly detailed, warm, whimsical isometric interior of a two-story dinosaur museum packed with chibi anime children and fossil exhibits, rendered like a handcrafted miniature diorama with toy-like figures, glossy eyes, soft rounded faces, and intricate wood-and-brass museum furniture. The scene is viewed from an elevated corner angle looking down into a bustling central hall with exactingly arranged displays and visitors everywhere. Include approximately 52 chibi children scattered throughout the museum, with a crowded upper balcony and busy ground floor, each dressed like young explorers in colorful casual clothes, backpacks, caps, jackets, shorts, and sneakers, many holding guidebooks or pamphlets. The setting should feel cheerful and adventurous, with golden ambient lighting from small hanging lamps, polished wooden railings, staircases on the left, tiled stone flooring, framed dinosaur posters on the walls, educational signs, specimen cases, bookshelves, plants, and gift-shop-like display tables.

Feature 6 major dinosaur skeleton exhibits clearly visible: 1 large Tyrannosaurus rex skeleton dominating the right side upper floor with open jaws, 1 medium theropod skeleton in the center-right ground floor exhibit pit, 1 triceratops skull and partial skeleton display on the lower right, 1 long-necked partial skeleton running vertically along the lower left edge, 1 large fossilized skull display in the lower center foreground, and 1 small fossil or turtle-like specimen on top of a wooden cabinet at the far lower right. Also include 5 glass display cases or tabletop specimen exhibits: 1 central rectangular butterfly or insect specimen table in the lower middle, 1 glass-topped fossil case left of center, 1 smaller blue-topped specimen counter near the middle left, 1 angled educational control panel or fossil information stand beside the central dinosaur pit, and 1 additional exhibit table integrated into the lower-right work area. Add many smaller fossil trays, bones, rocks, and excavation samples across counters and floor exhibits.

The architecture should include 2 visible levels: 1 upper mezzanine balcony wrapping around the back and right sides, and 1 open ground floor exhibition space below. Show 1 staircase ascending along the left side to the balcony. On the upper walls, place several framed dinosaur posters and museum boards, including one prominent poster reading DINOSAURS. Add an emergency exit sign above a back doorway. Use a rich palette of honey-brown wood, beige fossils, teal and blue exhibit graphics, and pops of red, yellow, and green in the children's outfits. The overall mood is playful discovery, like a children's science museum mixed with a collector's model world, with extreme scene density, crisp focus, high detail, cinematic depth, and premium storybook miniature realism. No adults, no empty space, no modern minimalism; every part of the image should be filled with charming museum activity.
entries.description: This prompt generates a densely detailed miniature-style dinosaur museum interior filled with chibi child explorers, ideal for whimsical poster art or storybook-style scene creation.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Izanagi Divine Warrior
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic cyberpunk portrait of Izanagi reimagined as a divine futuristic warrior, shown from the back and slightly in profile in a rain-slick neon metropolis at night. The figure stands centered in the foreground with a calm, commanding presence, looking left over one shoulder, with messy black layered hair with a braided strand and a youthful masculine silhouette. His body is an intricate fusion of human and machine: glossy black biomechanical arms, shoulders, and torso with exposed cables, metallic joints, and elegant gold-lit circuitry. He wears flowing white ceremonial robes inspired by Shinto and imperial Japanese garments, layered in torn, wind-swept translucent fabric with subtle gold embroidery, tassels, cords, and ornamental clasps, draped over the cybernetic body like sacred vestments. In his right hand he holds a luminous katana angled downward, the blade blazing with white-gold energy, with an ornate guard and glowing reflections across the wet ground. Behind his head is a huge radiant circular halo made of holographic golden concentric rings, arcane circuitry, and celestial interface lines, creating the effect of a divine techno-mandala. In the mid-background stands a large red torii gate, framed by towering futuristic skyscrapers covered in dense windows and vertical city lights. The street surface is glossy with rain and mirrors the sword glow and city illumination. Fill the scene with drifting sparks, floating embers, fine mist, cinematic backlighting, and dramatic contrast between dark steel tones and white and gold. Ultra-detailed, epic, mythic, photorealistic concept art, high contrast, sharp focus, volumetric lighting, reflective surfaces, intricate costume design, Japanese myth fused with sci-fi futurism, vertical composition.
entries.description: A dramatic vertical concept-art portrait of Izanagi as a cyberpunk god-warrior, ideal for mythological sci-fi key art and poster-style character generation.

entries.title: Cute Mermaid Puppy Underwater Game Screen
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bright, whimsical underwater 2D game scene in a polished children's animation style, shown as a full-screen level screenshot inside a rounded-rectangle game viewport. The setting is a colorful coral reef with a sandy seabed and a pale stone path winding from the foreground into the distance at center, creating depth. Sunbeams stream down through clear blue water from above, with many small air bubbles floating throughout the scene. Surround the path with soft, toy-like coral formations and sea plants in pastel pink, peach, lavender, turquoise, and mint, plus rocky ledges on both sides. Place 2 starfish in the foreground, one purple on the lower left rock and one pink-orange on the lower right. Add 2 translucent pink jellyfish, one left of center and one right of center, both gently glowing. Scatter 6 glowing pink clam shells along and beside the path, each emitting a soft magical aura. Add 4 golden-orange collectible shells with a pearl-like center, positioned near the middle play area. Include 2 large purple balloon-like jelly obstacles with white outlines and short dangling tentacles, one in the lower center-left and one in the mid-right. Near the left-center foreground, place a cute mermaid puppy character inspired by a preschool cartoon rescue dog: small smiling puppy face, big expressive eyes, light brown and cream fur, pink head accessory, teal mermaid tail, playful cheerful pose as if moving forward. On the right side, add a faint dashed circular target marker over the environment. Overlay simple mobile-game UI in Chinese: at the top left, two white rounded pill buttons, one reading "收贝壳" and one reading "1/5"; at the top right, a white circular pause button with "II". At the bottom center, place 3 white rounded instruction buttons with blue-gray text: "方向键 / WASD", "空格 / 回车:泡泡", and "Esc 回地图". Make the whole image glossy, soft-lit, kid-friendly, high-saturation but pastel-balanced, with a dreamy fantasy reef atmosphere and clean casual game-art composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a colorful children's underwater game screenshot with a mermaid puppy hero, collectible shells, coral reef scenery, and simple Chinese UI for casual game mockups.

entries.searchText: cute mermaid puppy underwater game screen this prompt generates a colorful children's underwater game screenshot with a mermaid puppy hero, collectible shells, coral reef scenery, and simple chinese ui for casual game mockups. a bright, whimsical underwater 2d game scene in a polished children's animation style, shown as a full-screen level screenshot inside a rounded-rectangle game viewport. the setting is a colorful coral reef with a sandy seabed and a pale stone path winding from the foreground into the distance at center, creating depth. sunbeams stream down through clear blue water from above, with many small air bubbles floating throughout the scene. surround the path with soft, toy-like coral formations and sea plants in pastel pink, peach, lavender, turquoise, and mint, plus rocky ledges on both sides. place 2 starfish in the foreground, one purple on the lower left rock and one pink-orange on the lower right. add 2 translucent pink jellyfish, one left of center and one right of center, both gently glowing. scatter 6 glowing pink clam shells along and beside the path, each emitting a soft magical aura. add 4 golden-orange collectible shells with a pearl-like center, positioned near the middle play area. include 2 large purple balloon-like jelly obstacles with white outlines and short dangling tentacles, one in the lower center-left and one in the mid-right. near the left-center foreground, place a cute mermaid puppy character inspired by a preschool cartoon rescue dog: small smiling puppy face, big expressive eyes, light brown and cream fur, pink head accessory, teal mermaid tail, playful cheerful pose as if moving forward. on the right side, add a faint dashed circular target marker over the environment. overlay simple mobile-game ui in chinese: at the top left, two white rounded pill buttons, one reading "收贝壳" and one reading "1/5"; at the top right, a white circular pause button with "ii". at the bottom center, place 3 white rounded instruction buttons with blue-gray text: "方向键 / wasd", "空格 / 回车:泡泡", and "esc 回地图". make the whole image glossy, soft-lit, kid-friendly, high-saturation but pastel-balanced, with a dreamy fantasy reef atmosphere and clean casual game-art composition. game asset

entries.title: Pastel Underwater Mermaid Puppy Game UI
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cute side-view underwater casual game start screen in a soft pastel 3D cartoon style, designed like a polished children's browser game interface. The scene shows a bright ocean floor with sun rays streaming down through clear blue water, floating bubbles, distant tiny fish silhouettes, and a dreamy coral reef environment filled with rounded pink, purple, blue, and mint corals, sea plants, shells, rocks, and sandy ground. Slightly left of center, a small mermaid puppy character inspired by a rescue-dog cartoon floats happily underwater, with a puppy face, big sparkling eyes, floppy ears, a tiny tiara-like head accessory, and a fish tail instead of hind legs, facing forward with a cheerful expression. On the right stands a whimsical candy-like coral lighthouse shaped like a pink-and-cream seashell tower with a glowing lantern room at the top, a pearl on the roof, circular shell windows, a small balcony, a purple door, and decorative coral details around the base. Overlay game UI elements directly on the scene: at top left, 2 rounded white pill buttons, the first reading "去灯塔" and the second showing "0/3"; at top right, 1 circular white pause button with a pause icon. Near the lighthouse, show 4 translucent colored target rings floating over interactive spots: 1 pink ring near the upper middle windows, 1 yellow ring near the upper right lantern area, 1 pale blue ring over a lower right shell window, and 1 large white-outlined ring around a purple jellyfish near the lower center-left. Add 3 collectible pearl-in-shell objects visible in the scene: 1 glowing golden pearl in an open shell near the center, 1 small dark blue pearl shell near the lighthouse base, and 1 red pearl shell resting on the bottom center UI panel. At the bottom center, place 3 rounded white control hint buttons with Chinese text: "方向键 / WASD", "空格 / 回车:放珠", and "Esc 回地图". Include a large semi-transparent rounded white panel behind the bottom controls. The overall image should feel joyful, safe, colorful, and magical, with high polish, gentle depth of field, soft lighting, glossy toy-like materials, and a kid-friendly mobile or web game aesthetic.
entries.description: A whimsical underwater game screen featuring a mermaid puppy, a coral lighthouse, and playful Chinese UI elements, suitable for children's casual game splash screens or level scenes.

entries.title: Manga Panel to Apocalyptic Mecha Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, remake the original manga panel as a dramatic cinematic anime key visual. Keep the same 2 characters, their relative placement, and the exact Japanese dialogue from the speech bubbles, but remove the manga panel borders and speech balloons and recompose the text as 2 large vertical copy blocks floating in the sky: on the right, 「戦争なら だいじょうぶ。 もうすぐ 終わります。」; on the left, 「地は焼かれ 涙と悲鳴は 新たなる争いの 狼煙となるの。」 Transform the simple black-and-white drawing into a highly detailed painted scene with realistic lighting, weathered textures, and an apocalyptic battlefield atmosphere at dusk. Replace the plain background with a colossal Gundam-like mecha towering behind them, covered in sharp wing-like protrusions and glowing magenta energy cracks, with smoke, embers, ruined city debris, and a dark cloudy sky. Upgrade the boy into a full-color anime version wearing a dark military-style uniform with red trim, still smiling and raising one hand. Upgrade the cat-like masked character into a sinister but expressive full-color figure with cracked white armor-like face plating, glowing pale blue eyes, a wide grin, a dark hooded cloak, and a small bell at the neck. Add a red war flag near the lower left background. Make it feel like an epic war poster, low-angle composition, ultra-detailed, high contrast, gritty, ominous, and cinematic.
entries.description: This prompt transforms a simple reference manga panel into a cinematic anime war poster with the same characters and dialogue but a newly added giant mecha battlefield setting.

entries.title: Hidden Duck in Chibi Venice
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed isometric miniature diorama of Venice in a whimsical chibi style, designed as a busy hidden-character puzzle scene. The setting is a sunlit Venetian canal district packed with tiny cute travelers and locals, viewed from a slightly elevated angle so the canal, bridges, piazza, storefronts, and upper facades are all visible at once. Warm terracotta buildings with weathered stucco walls, flower boxes, striped awnings, shuttered windows, balconies, rooftop chimneys, and ivy frame both sides of a narrow turquoise canal. In the distance, elegant Venetian architecture includes a large arched bridge, domes, towers, and a clock tower, creating depth and a postcard-like skyline. The streets and canal are extremely crowded with exactly over 150 chibi characters, each with oversized heads, small bodies, glossy eyes, varied skin tones, and distinct outfits, hairstyles, hats, and accessories, posed walking, chatting, shopping, sitting, rowing, or sightseeing. Many wear straw boater hats, striped shirts, dresses, vests, jackets, and travel clothes in cheerful colors. Several gondolas move through the canal, each carrying tiny passengers, with gondoliers in classic Venetian striped attire. Include exactly 3 stone pedestrian bridges crossing the canal, multiple gondolas, many canal posts, ornate green street lamps, café tables, market stands, pigeons on the pavement, and souvenir displays. Add a playful scavenger-hunt mood with a small hanging sign in the upper right that reads Find the duck! and shows a cute yellow rubber duck icon. Hide exactly 2 small yellow ducks in the scene, subtly placed among the crowd and canal area so viewers can search for them. Visible shop and street signs should include HOTEL CA' DEL SORRISO on the left building, GELATO on a striped awning storefront, TRATTORIA alla Gondola on the right, SERVIZIO GONDOLE on a green canal sign near the center foreground, VENEZIA MASK on a souvenir stall, and CARNEVALE DI VENEZIA on a poster display at the lower right. Include carnival masks for sale, café seating, a market umbrella, and tiny decorative details everywhere. Render it as ultra-detailed, polished 3D storybook art with toy-like textures, soft global illumination, vibrant Mediterranean colors, crisp focus, and a charming travel-poster atmosphere centered on Venice, featuring a hidden mascot search for yellow duck, in the playful world of Ruhia.

entries.title: Hidden Duck in Miniature Venice
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A richly detailed miniature-diorama style illustration of a busy Venetian canal street in warm afternoon light, designed like a whimsical "find the hidden duck" scene. Show a narrow turquoise canal running through the center with 4 black gondolas, each with striped-shirt gondoliers and tiny tourists, crossed by 1 ornate white stone footbridge crowded with people. Fill the scene with dozens of cute chibi travelers and shopkeepers in a handcrafted toy-like style, with oversized heads, soft expressive faces, textured clothing, and highly detailed props. Surround the canal with colorful old Venice buildings in peach, terracotta, cream, and yellow stucco, red tile roofs, green shutters, balconies, flower boxes, laundry lines, lanterns, and narrow shopfronts. Include 6 clearly readable shop or sign texts placed naturally in the environment: "TRATTORIA," "MASCHERE," "CALLE DEI COLORI," "CAFFE LAGUNA," "VENEZIA," "FIORI," plus a small chalkboard sign reading "GONDOLA SERENATA." On the right, feature a Venetian mask shop overflowing with ornate masks and carnival decorations; on the left, a trattoria with outdoor diners; in the lower left, a small café kiosk; in the lower center, a postcard stand labeled VENEZIA; in the lower right, a flower cart labeled FIORI; near the center bottom, an artist painting at an easel and a street musician with a guitar. Scatter luggage, tables, pastries, postcards, flower pots, market goods, and canal posts throughout the cobblestone street to create a dense travel-market atmosphere. Add a decorative framed game sign in the upper-right corner with a tiny duck icon and the text Find the duck!. Hide exactly 1 tiny yellow rubber duck subtly among the lower-left luggage area near the café so it is visible but easy to miss. Use a high-angle isometric composition, storybook travel-poster charm, ultra-detailed handcrafted textures, vibrant colors, cozy European ambiance, and a playful seek-and-find aesthetic.

entries.title: Minecraft Family Compass UI
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean in-game screenshot mockup in the visual style of Minecraft Bedrock Edition, showing a custom teleport menu overlay titled Family Compass. The background is a bright outdoor Minecraft scene with blocky grass in the foreground, a line of leafy trees in the middle distance, and a pale blue sky with rectangular clouds. On the left side, a large Bedrock-style UI window dominates the frame, with a light gray panel, darker gray border, and a small close X in the top-right corner. Centered at the top of the window is the title text. Inside the panel, a dark header bar asks Where should we go?. Below it are exactly 4 large horizontal rectangular buttons stacked vertically with even spacing. The first button is highlighted bright green with white pixel-style text reading Teleport to Player. The next 3 buttons are light gray with medium gray pixel-style text reading, in order, "Saved Locations", "Add Current Location", and "Remove Saved Location". In the lower-right foreground, partially cropped and held as if by the player, is an oversized pixel-art compass item with a tan face, gold rim, and a red needle angled diagonally downward, rendered in chunky Minecraft item icon style. Use authentic Minecraft Bedrock UI proportions, pixelated font, crisp blocky edges, soft in-game lighting, and a polished game-screenshot composition with the menu as the main focus.

entries.title: Celestial Blue Anime Girl Floating
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body anime illustration of a dreamy celestial girl floating diagonally across a pure white background, viewed from above as if weightless in open air. She has very long, flowing deep navy blue hair spreading in elegant ribbons around her body, with glossy highlights, loose strands, and star-shaped hair ornaments near one side of her head. Her face is softly obscured and de-emphasized, while the composition focuses on her delicate pose, costume, and swirling magical atmosphere. She wears a highly detailed white and blue sailor-inspired fantasy dress with translucent layered sleeves, frilled ruffles, sparkling lace, sheer fabric panels, and a large star-like crystal brooch at the chest. The outfit includes 5 clearly visible clothing elements: a short frilled dress, a sailor collar and neck ribbon, semi-transparent detached sleeves or draped chiffon layers, 1 white thigh-high stocking on one leg, and 1 dark blue starry thigh-high stocking on the other leg with a matching garter band. She is barefoot, with both feet visible. Her pose is graceful and drifting: one arm reaches upward with an open hand, the other hand rests near her chest, one leg extended and the other slightly bent. Surround her with a luminous constellation motif in cool blue tones, including exactly 6 prominent five-pointed star ornaments scattered around her, multiple tiny star sparkles, circular watercolor-like swirls, floating bubbles, and ornate crescent-ring filigree arcs framing parts of the image. Make the palette icy blue, cobalt, indigo, and white, with shimmering glitter textures, soft translucent overlays, crisp line art, and a light ethereal glow. The overall mood is magical, elegant, celestial, and serene, like a star maiden suspended in a winter night sky interpreted on a clean white canvas.
entries.description: A polished anime-style full-body character illustration of a floating star-themed girl, ideal for fantasy key art, social avatars, or decorative character posters.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Game Crossover Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic crossover promotional poster for a gritty sci-fi military game collaboration, designed like a premium Chinese game event key visual. Vertical composition, ultra-detailed, dark futuristic battlefield city at night with rain, smoke, sparks, neon haze, satellite dishes, towers, launch structures, and a war-torn industrial skyline. Two female combat characters stand back-to-back in the center as the main focus. The left character is a tactical recon operative in a black hooded armored stealth suit with layered plates, straps, gauntlets, and glowing blue tech accents, holding a compact high-tech crossbow pointed downward; her silhouette is sleek, lethal, and military. The right character is a cyberpunk female fighter inspired by a punk marksman archetype, with long electric-blue braided hair, shaved side details, tattoos on her arm, black leather and tactical belts, and a large futuristic minigun-like weapon glowing purple-blue; she feels rebellious, dangerous, and iconic. Their faces are obscured by dark censor-like square blocks, preserving a mysterious meme-poster look. At the very top, small Chinese tagline text reads "两大战场 一种信念". Dominating the header is enormous distressed metallic Chinese title text reading "三角洲行动 × 英雄联盟", with the first part in weathered silver and the second part in worn gold. Beneath the headline is a thin line of smaller Chinese slogan text: "战术协同 · 信息制胜 · 突破极限". On the left midground, include a large luminous blue holographic sign with a geometric logo and the word "HAAVK". On the right midground, add a purple neon billboard with Chinese text "金克斯·信息位" and smaller subtitle lines beneath it. On the lower left near the left character, add a green-labeled caption box reading "露娜·侦察位". Across the environment, add red laser streaks in the sky, blue scanning lines, purple atmospheric glow, faint explosions, and dense cinematic volumetric lighting. At the bottom center, place collaboration branding logos and text: "三角洲行动 × 英雄联盟" with English subtitles "DELTA FORCE" and "LEAGUE OF LEGENDS", followed by the date line "战场集结 6月12日 战场重构". Beneath that, show exactly 4 small feature badges in a row with icons and bilingual labels: "限定皮肤 / LIMITED SKIN", "限定任务 / LIMITED MISSIONS", "专属奖励 / EXCLUSIVE REWARDS", and "战术协同 / TACTICAL SYNERGY". Add a final small Chinese footer slogan and tiny copyright text. Overall style: blockbuster game marketing art, hyper-detailed photorealistic concept art, cyberpunk militarism, Tencent-style collaboration poster, dramatic contrast, blue-purple-orange lighting, crisp typography, epic and commercially polished.
entries.description: Generates a high-end Chinese-style crossover promotional poster for two game franchises, ideal for collaboration campaigns, event key visuals, and cinematic marketing art.

entries.title: Oriental Mythical Beast Suanni Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Oriental mythological beast Suanni, lion-shaped, standing on four feet, in a forward-marching posture, low-angle perspective, with a sense of oppression and a protective aura. The body features deep ink-black fur, thick and heavy, with a clear muscular structure and realistic hair volume. The mane on the neck and tail is snow-white, shaped in Oriental cloud patterns, flowing like smoke or clouds, layered and swirling with a calligraphic rhythm. The mane is light and airy, contrasting with the heavy fur of the body. A majestic beast's face with locked brows, sharp glowing eyes, and a fierce yet restrained expression. A pair of curved horns with natural texture on the head. Thick and powerful limbs with golden claws showing slight metallic reflections. The body surface is integrated with Oriental gilded patterns, similar to cloud or ruyi patterns, enhancing the sense of divinity and design. The background is a Chinese landscape artistic conception, with layers of distant mountains, and the ground and space filled with swirling mist and clouds. Dotted with golden flowing light lines, resembling energy or aura flow. The overall background is ink-wash staining, a combination of void and solid. Cinematic lighting, low-key setup, soft key light + rim light, emphasizing hair layers and volume. Chinese ink painting, high-end digital painting, concept setting art. Ultra detailed, 8K, sharp focus, clean rendering, no noise, no grain, high-end concept art, cinematic quality.

entries.title: Isometric Fantasy RPG Market Bug Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A top-down isometric fantasy RPG gameplay screenshot set in a rustic medieval market street, with a strong tilt-shift depth-of-field effect that makes the scene look miniature. In the foreground, a tiny chibi-style anime girl adventurer stands facing a merchant stall; she has medium brown hair in twin ponytails with blue ribbon ornaments, very large round eyes, a blue pacifier in her mouth, and a detailed blue-and-white dress with lace trim, puff sleeves, white stockings, dark shoes, and a small brown pouch at her waist. She is positioned slightly left of center, looking up at a male shopkeeper leaning over a long wooden counter covered with a muted green cloth. The shopkeeper wears a white lace-up shirt with rolled sleeves and a brown vest, but his face is unnaturally blurred, smeared, or featureless like a rendering bug. The stall is dense with props: 2 wicker baskets of produce, 2 cloth sacks, 1 loaf of bread on the counter, 1 folded map or paper, 1 small framed chalkboard sign, 2 ceramic bottles or jars in reddish tones, stacked wooden crates, wooden beams, and a round hanging shop sign with a cup emblem. In the background, 1 blurry woman in a long dress walks along the cobblestone street, and a horse-drawn cart or wagon shape is visible in soft focus on the left. The lighting is warm afternoon sunlight with dappled shadows across the stone pavement and stall. Include a full game UI overlay: top-left Japanese quest text reading "各地を冒険し、情報を集めよう", bottom-left circular minimap with 2 small adjacent icons, bottom-center status bar showing "Lv.12" and "1286/1286" with a green HP bar, center-right interaction prompt with a speech bubble icon and the Japanese text "話す" plus an "A" button icon, and bottom-right 4 circular action buttons including 1 large blue sword attack button and 3 smaller skill buttons around it. The overall feeling should be a high-detail JRPG town scene, cozy and painterly, but with one eerie glitched face that makes the image resemble a ghostly bugged screenshot.
entries.description: This prompt generates a detailed JRPG-style market gameplay screenshot with a chibi heroine, full UI, and a glitched faceless merchant, ideal for recreating a bug-like eerie game scene.

entries.title: Watercolor Minecraft World Cross-Section
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed watercolor illustration on textured off-white paper, depicting a vertical floating slice of a Minecraft-inspired world framed by a gigantic ruined rectangular stone portal arch. The composition is centered and portrait-oriented, with soft cloudy washes around the edges and crisp voxel-like block detail inside. At the top, the weathered arch is built from mossy stone, cracked bricks, and mineral-stained blocks, opening like a window onto a distant fantasy mountain range with misty spires and 2 small flying birds. On the upper landscape layer, include 2 blocky trees, 2 small village houses with pitched roofs, 1 church-like tower in the middle distance, wooden fences, grassy ledges, a small waterfall on the left, and another waterfall spilling down the right edge. Place 1 Steve-like adventurer near the center-left foreground, seen from behind, wearing a teal shirt and blue pants and holding a pickaxe, gazing into the world beyond the arch. Add 1 pig on the upper left grassy ledge. Beneath the surface, reveal a cutaway cross-section of underground biomes and structures: 1 abandoned mineshaft with timber supports and minecart rails on the left, 1 central cavern with blue water and ladders descending vertically, 1 glowing blue crystal deposit in a lower-left cave, 1 bright orange lava shaft running downward on the right, 1 green creeper in a mid-right cave, 1 white skeleton archer in a small right-side chamber, 1 purple Nether portal near the lower right, and 1 tiny spider in a dim lower chamber. Scatter warm torchlights through the caves for contrast. The palette should mix earthy browns, mossy greens, cool blue mist, and fiery orange lava, with a dreamy atmospheric perspective in the distance. Render the whole scene as a delicate fusion of Minecraft block geometry and traditional watercolor fantasy painting, intricate, magical, nostalgic, and painterly.
entries.description: This prompt generates a painterly Minecraft-inspired fantasy cutaway scene with a giant stone arch, village surface, and detailed underground caves, ideal for poster art or evocative game-inspired illustration.

entries.title: Luxury Sakura Yae Miko Collector Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a lavish vertical anime character collector poster in a premium magazine-cover and merchandise-catalog style, centered on Yae Miko, a beautiful adult shrine maiden with very long flowing pink hair, violet eyes, and a confident flirtatious expression, seated elegantly on a dark lacquered shrine chest with gold tassels and floral ornamentation. She wears an elaborate sheer sakura-themed ceremonial outfit in layered translucent pink and white fabric, with floral embroidery, ribbons, jeweled accessories, gold details, detached sleeves, a delicate veil, ornate earrings, and strappy high heels, showing a glamorous fashion-illustration silhouette with one leg crossed and one hand near her lips. Surround the whole composition with cherry blossoms, petals, decorative borders, gold filigree, and soft pastel pink lighting. The page should look like a special edition fan collectible poster with many integrated design elements and readable labels. At the top, place giant decorative serif typography reading "YAE MIKO" across the background, plus a small upper-left label "Generalpost • ETERNAL SAKURA" and an upper-right plaque reading "Lady Guuji OF THE GRAND NARUKAMI SHRINE". On the right side near the character, add one vertical Japanese text line. Include a left-side stamp sheet titled "CHIBI STAMP COLLECTION" containing exactly 6 stamp-style chibi portraits arranged in a 2x3 grid, all of the same character in different cute expressions or poses. Below that, include a section titled "Mini Figure Collection" with exactly 3 small chibi figure variants standing side by side. Below that, include a "Stickers" section with exactly 5 die-cut stickers: 4 chibi character stickers and 1 fox mask sticker. On the right lower side, add a hanging "Character Profile" card with the labels "Birthday", "Affiliation", "Vision", and "Constellation", plus a short quote line at the bottom. At the bottom edge, include exactly 4 ticket or stamp-like bonus items: 1 round emblem with a fox symbol, 1 commemorative sakura festival ticket, 1 Narukami Shrine special pass, and 1 postage-style stamp marked with the date 27 APR 2024 and a fox motif. Add a limited-edition serial tag on the lower left reading "NO. 08888 / 10000". Place a detailed white fox mask with red markings and floral decoration in the lower-right foreground. Overall style: ultra-detailed anime illustration, polished gacha-merchandise advertisement design, elegant sakura fantasy aesthetic, pink and rose-gold palette, layered print textures, crisp line art, luxurious shading, high detail, collectible premium poster composition.
entries.description: A richly detailed anime merchandise-style poster featuring a glamorous pink-haired shrine maiden surrounded by collectible stamps, stickers, profile cards, and sakura-themed decorative layout elements.

entries.title: Retro Open-World Seaplane Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A third-person gameplay screenshot styled exactly like an early-2000s open-world crime game, showing a small white and burgundy seaplane flying low over a tropical coastal city. The camera is positioned directly behind the aircraft, centered on its tail, with the plane heading toward a cluster of mid-rise buildings near the waterfront. The city below has flat-roofed buildings, palm-lined streets, canals, and bright turquoise water, with a hazy blue sky and light atmospheric fog that softens the distance. A tall striped office tower stands near the center background, and a glowing pink checkpoint ring floats in front of the buildings. On the right side, a curving shoreline and canal are lined with dense palm trees. Add a retro video game HUD in the top-right corner with the time reading 13:27, green money text reading 500045605, two lines of white health and armor values both reading 100, a row of 6 wanted stars with 2 lit and 4 unlit, a small weapon icon in a rounded square, and ammo text reading 2076-30. Beneath that, display the mission text "SKIMMER FUEL!" with a small horizontal blue progress bar. In the bottom-left corner, include a circular minimap with a pink border, black streets, pale land, blue water, a north marker labeled N, and a small player arrow. In the bottom-right corner, overlay the location name Little Havana in elegant green cursive script. Use low-polygon vehicles and buildings, simple textures, soft shadows, saturated tropical colors, slight screen blur, and the unmistakable nostalgic look of a PlayStation 2-era action game screenshot with a 16:9 frame.
entries.description: This prompt generates a nostalgic PS2-era open-world game screenshot of a seaplane flying over a tropical city with a full retro HUD, useful for recreating classic video game imagery.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A first-person survival horror game screenshot set in a dark abandoned Japanese office at night, viewed from the player's eye level as if standing beside a cubicle desk. In the lower left foreground, show 1 outstretched human hand reaching cautiously into frame. The central foreground is a small white office desk lit by a harsh focused overhead light, creating deep shadows and a tense cinematic atmosphere. On the desk place exactly 7 visible desktop elements: 1 red stapler floating slightly above or oddly hovering over the desk, 1 messy stack of papers and newspapers, 1 loose folded sheet, 1 black smartphone, 2 pens lying separately, and 1 black mesh pen cup holding several pens. Behind the desk is a gray cubicle wall with exactly 3 posted items: 1 yellow sticky note with handwritten Japanese scribbles, 1 white Japanese office notice about saving electricity with a simple lightbulb illustration, and 1 blue corporate cityscape poster with Japanese text. On the right side of the desk area place exactly 4 upright office storage items: 3 thick binders or file books, one with a prominent label reading 15 and another with Japanese vertical text, plus 1 small plastic drawer unit. In the front-right foreground place 1 freestanding desk sign with Japanese text and a prohibition symbol. In the left background show 1 brightly lit vending machine glowing cold white-blue, with a few cardboard boxes and trash bags on the floor nearby. The office extends into a long aisle of cubicles and shelves, cluttered with scattered papers on the floor, fading into darkness. In the far center background, place 1 lone human silhouette standing motionless at the end of the corridor, backlit by dim bluish window light from the distant city. Add subtle game HUD elements at the bottom center with 2 interaction prompts in Japanese, each with a controller button icon, to make it unmistakably a modern horror video game screenshot. Use realistic 3D rendering, ultra-detailed environmental storytelling, moody blue-black color grading, soft volumetric darkness, strong contrast, eerie empty office ambience, and a sense of meaningless but unsettling supernatural presence.

In the foreground, count 3 female elf warriors standing in a heroic triangular formation, all wearing ornate metallic armor with glossy magenta, silver, and violet tones. Center character: blonde elf princess-warrior, short to medium hair, small crown or jeweled tiara, white fur mantle over shoulders, polished silver armor exposing midriff, black gloves, confident battle stance, wielding a gigantic double-bladed ceremonial axe with intricate filigree, turquoise crystal core, and engraved silver-blue blades. Left character: taller elf archer-warrior with long light brown hair, pointed ears, elaborate rose-magenta armor, large curved fantasy sword in her right hand, and a quiver of pink-fletched arrows on her back. Right character: long dark magenta-haired elf swordswoman with floral hair ornaments, violet-magenta armor, black cape, holding a slender sword angled downward. The image should feel like premium box art for an original game titled ECLIPSE SAGA. Include visible game-package typography and branding elements: top left white PS5 logo; top right small bracketed studio tag [O-prompt laboratory]; large vertical Japanese slogan on the right side; count 2 lines of Japanese promotional copy on the upper left; the main title in huge glowing gold serif letters across the bottom center reading ECLIPSE SAGA; a smaller Japanese subtitle beneath it; bottom left CERO C rating badge; bottom center count 3 short Japanese feature blurbs separated by diamond icons; bottom right OPL logo. Use a lavish painted-anime-meets-hyperreal style, dense detail, polished reflections, fiery rim light, purple and orange color contrast, and the overall feel of a mature-rated epic console fantasy adventure cover.

The centerpiece is a photorealistic compact commercial van drifting fast on a wet nighttime expressway in , rear three-quarter view, sparks scraping from underneath, blue route arrows painted as glowing game guidance on the road, and bright green overhead road signs. Use a bold oversized Japanese title across the top, with explosive yellow and red magazine typography. Surround the hero image with exactly 12 editorial panels and callouts: 1 top-left header strip, 3 burst badges, 1 main promo burst, 2 right-side widgets, 4 left-side player stat boxes, 1 center description, 1 feature checklist with 4 bullets, 1 speed cluster, 3 strategy panels, 4 management/review panels, and 5 footer promo slogans. Include a countdown timer set to , a complaint meter with 4 face icons, a speedometer reading 128 km/h in 5th gear, a route minimap, a status screen with rank B+, and a large review badge showing . Add a small portrait of a tired salaryman player avatar and a mysterious silhouette teaser in the bottom right. Make it look like a glossy chaotic game magazine review page from Japan, humorous but intense, with high readability, thick outlines, neon accents, and print-authentic texture."}

entries.title: Retro Space Heroine Cosplay Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body photorealistic portrait of a female tokusatsu-style space heroine standing in a modern concrete corridor, leaning lightly against a pale gray column. She wears a retro-futuristic armored bodysuit with glossy materials: a silver and black skin-tight jumpsuit, bulky red shoulder armor, red forearm guards, a red belt with a large rounded hip pouch, red knee-high armored boots, and white gloves. Her chest armor is metallic silver with red trim and a single circular blue orb on the right side of the chest, with small vent-like details and a mechanical collar ring around the neck connected to two short gray cables resting on the shoulders. She holds a matching red, white, blue, and black full-face helmet in her left hand at thigh level. Her hair is dark brown, medium length, slightly messy, tied back loosely with strands falling around the face. The character's face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. The setting is an open, quiet station-like or parking-structure hallway with smooth stone walls and floor, shallow depth of field, and a blue square sign with the white number 5 visible in the background on the right. Natural soft daylight, realistic reflections on the glossy armor, cinematic cosplay photography, centered vertical composition, full body in frame, neutral stance, high detail.

entries.title: Catgirl Idol Concert Stage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dynamic anime idol concert illustration of a single female catgirl singer performing on a large stage, viewed from a dramatic low angle as she steps toward the camera and reaches one gloved hand forward in extreme foreshortening while holding a black microphone in the other hand. She has bright pink twin-tail hair with fluffy cat ears, orange-tinted steampunk goggles resting on her head, and red plaid ribbon bows at both sides. Her outfit is an elaborate black and red punk-idol costume with a black lace-trimmed cropped top, a red tartan frilled mini skirt, many gold chains, heart and bell charms, belts, buckles, garters, and layered accessories. Counted outfit details: 1 pair of cat ears, 1 pair of goggles, 2 hair bows, 1 fingerless glove on the reaching hand, 1 microphone, 1 cropped bustier-style top, 1 plaid skirt, 1 waist belt, 2 thigh garter systems, 1 fishnet stocking on one leg, 1 red-and-black striped thigh-high on the other leg, and 1 pair of black lace-up boots. She also has a fluffy pink cat tail visible behind her. Her expression should feel energetic, flirty, and commanding like a live pop-rock performance. The stage is packed with concert lighting trusses, purple and magenta spotlights, glowing bokeh, stairs behind her, 2 large black stage monitors in the foreground, and 3 visible venue screens showing her live image from different angles. Include 2 visible neon signs reading Neko Otome, one on a large screen in the upper left and one glowing pink on the front-right speaker, both accompanied by cute cat-face iconography. The crowd at the bottom right glows with pink light sticks. Use ultra-detailed polished anime rendering, glossy fabrics, metallic highlights, vivid pink-purple-red lighting, crisp linework, high contrast, and the high-energy atmosphere of a sold-out arena concert for Neko Otome.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic anime-style catgirl idol performing on a neon-lit concert stage, ideal for VTuber, idol, or promotional poster visuals.

entries.title: Sparkling Anime Idol Concert Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dazzling anime idol concert illustration of a single female virtual singer performing center stage, shown in a dynamic medium full-body shot from slightly below, with one hand holding a microphone near her chest and the other arm reaching outward toward the viewer. She has extremely long, voluminous twin tails that flow dramatically across the entire composition, in a soft peach-blonde to pink gradient with glossy highlights and curled ends, plus a teal futuristic headband and matching ear-cover accessories. Her face is intentionally obscured by a simple square censor block in a muted beige-pink tone. She wears a vivid turquoise-blue idol dress with a glossy, jewel-like finish, a fitted bodice, white frilled cap sleeves, a white sailor-style collar, a large red bow at the chest set with a blue gem, gold chain ornaments and gold buttons at the waist, and a layered flared skirt with white ruffles underneath and thin pink stripe accents near the hem. Add long flowing red ribbon tails streaming from the waist and costume, black thigh-high stockings, and a gold-and-teal handheld microphone. The stage is a spectacular futuristic arena packed with a glowing audience of blue and purple penlights, surrounded by intense sparkling bokeh, glitter, confetti pieces, lens flares, and star-like light bursts. Fill the background with curved luminous stage structures, neon arcs, and multiple pink, purple, and blue spotlights crisscrossing overhead, creating a magical high-energy live-show atmosphere. The art style is polished modern anime key visual, ultra-detailed, glossy painterly rendering, radiant lighting, shimmering highlights on fabric and hair, saturated cyan-magenta palette, celebratory and emotional idol performance energy.

entries.title: Fantasy Paladin Trading Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly detailed fantasy trading card game card in a polished premium TCG style, full-frame vertical layout with ornate gilded borders, engraved filigree corners, and a dark navy, black, ivory, and radiant gold color palette. The card title at the top reads SIR ALARIC DAWNBLADE in large serif capitals, with the subtitle PALADIN OF THE LIGHT beneath it. The main illustration shows a heroic male paladin standing in a luminous cathedral filled with tall glowing stained-glass windows, drifting golden sparks, and sacred light rays. He has long wavy blond hair, wears elaborate gold-and-steel plate armor with blue cloth accents and a flowing deep blue cloak, holds a glowing longsword upright in one hand, and carries a massive ornate shield in the other, emblazoned with a radiant sun-cross emblem. His pose is noble, powerful, and defensive, centered as the card's focal figure. Add exactly 4 stat icons stacked vertically along the left side in circular medallions with numbers: crossed swords with 3, shield with 3, heart with 4, and boot with 2. Include a sun emblem medallion in the upper left corner and a vertical banner crest in the upper right with a gold sword-and-cross symbol. The lower third contains a parchment-like rules text box with exactly 3 named abilities, each with a small icon and bold serif name followed by rules text: DIVINE SMITE, AURA OF PROTECTION, and LAY ON HANDS. Beneath the abilities, add an italic flavor quote centered on the parchment: By the Light, I stand. By the Light, I strike. By the Light, I shall not fall. At the very bottom, place the type line in serif capitals reading ALLY ♦ HUMAN ♦ PALADIN. Add a large blue-and-gold gem-framed mana or cost badge with the number 4 in the lower left corner, and a circular faction badge with a white sword or holy symbol in the lower right corner. The overall look should feel like an official premium fantasy card game, cinematic, readable, richly illuminated, intricately textured, and collector-grade.
entries.description: A premium fantasy TCG character card featuring a radiant armored paladin, ornate stats and icons, and fully readable card-game layout for custom card design mockups.

entries.title: Dark Fantasy Orc Warchief TCG Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a single high-detail fantasy trading card in a dark Warhammer-inspired style, full portrait orientation, with an ornate aged metal-and-red leather frame, distressed gold trim, and readable printed card text. The card title at the top reads GROKTHAR in large serif capitals, with the subtitle "Orc Warchief" centered below it. The main artwork shows a massive green-skinned orc war chief charging forward through a fiery battlefield, wearing brutal blackened spiked armor with skull motifs, leather straps, tusks, and blood-red war paint, one arm thrust forward as if commanding the attack and the other gripping a huge jagged battle axe. His physique is extremely muscular, with a savage snarling expression, long dark hair tied back, and a war-torn red-black color palette. The background is filled with smoke, embers, banners, silhouettes of warriors, and orange firelight. In the top left corner place a circular skull faction emblem. In the top right corner place a red vertical banner tab with a black tribal insignia. Along the left edge, stack exactly 4 circular stat icons in separate panels with values: sword attack 4, shield defense 3, heart health 5, boot movement 2. At the bottom, include a large parchment-colored text box with exactly 2 named abilities and 1 flavor quote. Ability 1 title: BRUTAL STRIKE, with body text: "When Grokthar attacks, he deals +2 damage." Ability 2 title: RALLY THE HORDE, with body text: "Once per turn, when another friendly Orc enters the battlefield, Grokthar gains +1 attack until end of turn." Beneath them, add the italic flavor quote: Strength is law. Blood is proof. The weak serve. The strong rule. In the bottom left corner place a red gem-like cost badge with the number 5. In the bottom right corner place a round crossed-weapons icon. Along the bottom type line, center exactly 3 class words separated by dots: "Ally • Orc • Warrior". Make the card look like a professionally printed collectible card game piece with crisp typography, balanced layout, dramatic fantasy illustration, rich texture, and authentic tabletop TCG design.
entries.description: A richly detailed custom fantasy trading card featuring an orc war chief, suitable for generating printable TCG card concepts with readable stats and abilities.
