entries.title: Overdecorated Sophie Magic Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly embellished full-body anime fantasy illustration of SOPHIE, a young elegant female alchemist-mage standing in the center of a vast celestial library laboratory. She has platinum blonde hair in a soft short bob with a side ponytail and a large crystalline flower hair ornament, though her face is obscured by a flat pale square censor block. She wears an ornate white and icy-blue dress with silver filigree, corset lacing, layered ruffles, translucent trailing panels, detached flowing sleeves, gemstone pendants, thigh garter ornaments, and white high-heeled ankle boots with metallic trims. Two glowing blue potion bottles hang at her hip. Her pose is graceful and confident: one hand raised with a floating faceted blue crystal hovering above her palm, the other holding an open magic book that projects transparent holographic pages and arcane interface diagrams in neon blue. The environment is a grand circular observatory-like library with towering bookshelves, alchemical instruments, astrolabes, hanging ornaments, glassware, candles, and luminous magical symbols. A huge backlit arched window behind her casts cool heavenly light. The floor beneath her is covered in glowing concentric magic circles and reflections, surrounded by crystalline blue flowers and sparkling particles. The composition is vertical, centered, and extremely polished, with dense decorative detail, ethereal lighting, layered translucency, shimmering highlights, and a palette dominated by white, silver, sapphire, and pale violet. Include large decorative title text on the left reading SOPHIE, smaller Japanese text beneath reading ソフィー, a small "CV:" line below, a short block of tiny English flavor text on the lower left, and a luminous blue hologram panel on the right with the word SOPHIC. Make it feel like a luxurious character key visual or promotional poster for a magical science heroine, ultra-detailed, glossy, radiant, and intentionally over-the-top.

entries.title: Dark Cyber Elf With Crimson Blade
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark ultra-detailed anime cyber-gothic portrait of a female elf warrior in a three-quarter side profile, framed from upper thighs to head, standing in a ruined futuristic industrial city. She has a short blunt bob in silver-white, pale skin, long sharp elf ears, and a calm cold expression with one visible glowing crimson red eye. Her hair is windswept across her face, and she wears a black star-shaped metallic hair ornament near one temple. Outfit is a sleek black biomechanical armored dress with glossy obsidian surfaces, spiked and layered plates, torn lace-like textures around the shoulders and chest, and intricate demonic exoskeleton detailing. One arm is heavily armored into a massive organic-mechanical gauntlet. She holds or merges with an enormous jagged living sword crossing diagonally from the lower left foreground toward her torso; the blade is black metal with glowing veins, embedded red cores, and violent molten energy bursting through it like liquid fire. Red energy ribbons, sparks, smoke, and ember-like particles swirl around her body and weapon. The background is a vertical dystopian megastructure filled with black steel towers, cables, hanging chains, fragments of red holographic code, occult-tech insignias, and faint industrial symbols, all mostly swallowed by shadow. Use a black and deep crimson palette with extreme contrast, glossy highlights, sharp rim light, dramatic backglow behind the head, dense detail, chaotic painterly effects, and a grim apocalyptic atmosphere. Composition should feel like premium dark fantasy key art, highly polished, cinematic, intimidating, elegant, and explosive.

entries.title: Cinematic Portrait with 3D Mini Character
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a woman from a photo, fully preserving her facial features, natural skin texture, realistic hair strands, and simple everyday clothing. The woman holds a small 3D miniature of herself in the palm of her hand. She looks at the miniature with obvious surprise and slight pleasure, with raised eyebrows, a soft smile, and expressive eyes. Her facial expression appears spontaneous and authentic. The miniature version is very similar to this woman in facial structure, hairstyle, and clothing, but is rendered in a smooth, high-quality 3D cartoon style. The miniature features a disproportionately large cartoon head and an exaggerated, playful expression. Both characters are dressed in the same casual attire-a patterned sweater with accurate color scheme and fabric texture. The difference in scale is obvious and visually playful. The lighting is professional cinematic, with clear object separation, soft highlights on the skin, and subtle contour lighting around both figures. Ultra-detailed textures for a real person. Clean, realistic 3D textures for the miniature. Balanced realism.
entries.description: A prompt for generating an ultra-realistic portrait of a woman holding a 3D cartoon-style miniature of herself.

entries.title: Shadow Ensemble Movie Poster Template
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please create a high-completion, high-narrative tension 「Shadow Ensemble Cover」 suitable for serialized release based on the [Subject: Write character names]. This is not an ordinary character illustration, nor a simple combat poster, but an "ensemble action cover" with the feel of a novel cover, manga visual, game promotion, and dark fantasy illustration. The image needs to be composed of a huge spiritual core figure, multiple mid-ground action characters, background threat elements, local energy light effects, and a blank title area to form a complete character faction and worldview cover. [Basic Settings] Theme: Jujutsu battle / Dark Journey to the West / Cyber Hunter / Monster Hunting Team / Doomsday Survivor / Magic Academy Battle Group Work Name: [Work Name] Series Name / Brand Name: [Brand Name or Series Name] Subtitle: [Subtitle] Style Direction: Dark fantasy, retro manga cover, hand-painted impasto, fantasy novel cover, game visual Main Tone: Dark green-black-gray / Deep blue neon / Dark brown-gold-red / Sand yellow-iron rust / Deep purple-gold Accent Color: Blood red energy, turquoise spell light, golden divine light, blue lightning Frame Ratio: 2:3 vertical / 3:4 vertical / 4:5 vertical / 9:16 vertical [Screen Structure] Use a vertical cover composition. There must be a huge visual figure as the spiritual core and atmosphere-dominating element. This person can be a profile, half-body, back, front stare, or huge silhouette, occupying the right, top, or main background area, with a calm, mysterious, and oppressive expression, not necessarily participating in the battle, but must govern the temperament of the whole picture. Arrange 3 to 6 action characters in the middle ground to form a combat faction ensemble. There should be clear division of labor and posture differences between characters, such as charging, holding a knife, casting spells, defense, summoning, jumping, alerting, long-range attack, etc. Avoid characters standing still; a strong rhythmic action and visual movement must be formed. Add enemy threats or worldview elements in the background, such as monsters, giants, villain shadows, mechanical legions, demons, ruins, forests, alien spaces, battlefield smoke, or city disasters. Background threats should not overshadow the main subject but wrap around characters like shadows to enhance the sense of crisis and narrative depth. Set 1 to 2 high-saturation energy hotspots, such as red flame fists, blue lightning, green cursed aura, purple magic, golden divine light, or white sword light. The energy effect should be concentrated on key characters or weapons, forming a visual focus, not uniformly lit across the screen. [Composition] The overall structure is "large spiritual core character + mid-ground action ensemble + background threat shadow + bottom or side blank title area". The image can use diagonal lines to organize characters, letting the ensemble rush from top-left to bottom-right or from bottom to center, forming a strong forward push. Retain a clear blank title area, suggested at the bottom-left, bottom, or side. Use off-white, gray-white, light paper color, or low-saturation background colors for the blank area to place the [Brand Name / Work Name / Subtitle]. The title typography should have a publication cover feel, using elegant serif fonts, retro title letters, manga cover titles, or high-end magazine-style layout. The text area must be clear and not completely blocked by characters and background. Do not make the edges a complete rectangle; use irregular brush edges, ink diffusion, torn paper style, or natural dissipation to let characters and background grow out of the paper, enhancing the hand-drawn cover feel and artistic quality. [Visual Style] The overall style should be a combination of hand-painted impasto and manga cover, with paper texture, brushstrokes, dark layers, and a retro publication temperament. Lighting is mainly low-key dark light with a darkened background, clear character silhouettes, and high-contrast focal points provided by local energy light. The image should not be excessively clean; it should retain hand-painted textures, paper grain, edge strokes, and dark mist. Use low-saturation dark tones mainly, supplemented by a small amount of high-saturation energy colors. The overall atmosphere should have a sense of pressure, mystery, combat, and worldview thickness. [Visual Goal] The final image should look like a mature fantasy novel cover, manga special cover, game character faction visual, or IP promo poster. It needs to possess: 1. A clear main visual character; 2. An ensemble with rhythmic movement; 3. Clear enemy threats or worldview background; 4. Strong but restrained energy effects; 5. A readable title text area; 6. An overall texture of a retro hand-drawn cover. Ensure the image is informative but not cluttered, with clear character levels and visual gravity, suitable for continuing to generate the same series with different themes.
entries.description: A professional and highly detailed template for creating cinematic posters with narrative depth and complex character arrangements.

entries.title: Full-Body Fantasy Adventurer Male
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body fantasy character illustration on a plain light gray background, painted in polished anime-inspired RPG concept art style with crisp linework, soft rendering, and realistic leather, fur, and skin textures. Show a tall, athletic young man with a muscular build and fair skin, standing in a relaxed contrapposto pose. His right arm is raised across his forehead as if shielding his eyes from light, with his gloved hand touching the brim of a dark cap; his left arm hangs down with a clenched fist. His face is mostly obscured by the raised forearm and cap shadow, making the expression unreadable. He has platinum blond medium-length hair, slightly tousled, visible beneath a black flat cap, with a small earring on one ear. Dress him in layered adventurer clothing dominated by dark brown, black, and muted reddish-brown. The upper body has a fitted black short-sleeve shirt under a brown leather vest with wide straps and buckles, topped with a thick pale fur collar draped around the neck and shoulders. Add a necklace with small metallic ornaments at the collarbone. Both hands wear dark fingerless gloves or fitted leather gloves, with multiple stacked wristbands and bracers. Around the waist, include several crossing leather belts, metal clasps, and hanging accessories, plus a reddish-brown sash tied at the hips with long hanging strips. On the left hip, attach 1 small leather pouch. The pants are slim dark trousers with a strapped harness around 1 thigh, including metal rings and buckles. The boots are 1 matching pair of tall, dark leather lace-up boots with reinforced knee guards or ornate metal-plated shin-and-knee armor, slightly weathered but stylish. From the right side of the waist, let a long torn cloth panel hang down, patterned near the end with subtle decorative motifs and finished with 1 dangling metal charm or spearhead-shaped ornament. Emphasize a rugged handsome adventurer aesthetic, detailed costume design, and a refined game character sheet feel, centered composition, full figure fully visible from head to boots, with a faint soft cast shadow on the floor.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished full-body RPG-style male character illustration suitable for fantasy character design, profile art, or concept presentation.

entries.title: Elegant Anime Spearwoman Full Body
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body anime fantasy warrior girl standing alone on a plain light gray background, clean character illustration with soft painterly rendering and crisp line art. She is a slender young woman with long straight platinum blonde hair, center-parted with long face-framing strands and a small tied section at the back, light amber-brown eyes, fair skin, and a calm slightly serious expression. Her pose is dynamic and confident: legs apart in a stable stance, one arm raised over her head gripping a long spear shaft behind her shoulders, the other hand holding the spear lower near her side so the ornate spear extends diagonally across the composition. The weapon is 1 elaborate dark metallic spear with a long narrow blade, cross-shaped barbs, engraved gothic details, and a sharp butt spike. Her outfit is a refined dark fantasy battle costume with exactly 6 visible main pieces: 1 black steel armored right arm gauntlet with engraved plating, 1 fitted black-and-bronze corset breastplate, 1 white high-neck blouse with sheer long sleeves, 1 short asymmetrical white skirt with flowing split overskirt panels, 1 pair of black thigh-high armored boots with silver filigree knee and ankle accents, and 1 brown belt set with straps including a right-thigh garter strap. Add subtle silver ornamentation at the collar and armor edges, elegant leather textures, polished metal highlights, and gently wind-swept fabric. Keep the palette muted and sophisticated in ivory, charcoal, bronze, and silver. The style should feel like premium Japanese RPG character concept art, highly detailed, graceful, slightly gothic, isolated full figure, no extra props, no scenery, only a faint soft ground shadow beneath her feet.

entries.title: Colorful Kimono Kemonomimi Festival
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-detailed, ultra-colorful anime festival illustration of 2 kemonomimi girls jumping midair in a joyful pose, filling the center of a tall vertical composition. The girl on the right is a cheerful catgirl with white-blonde hair, large fluffy cat ears, bright blue eyes, one eye winking, and a big open smile, wearing a vivid blue floral kimono-inspired short dress with oversized sleeves, layered frilly white petticoat trim, a large multicolored obi bow, floral hair ornaments, white ankle socks, and geta sandals, with a fluffy pale tail visible behind her; her right arm is raised making a peace sign and her left hand is near her chest. The girl on the left is a doggirl with medium brown hair, fluffy brown-and-white dog ears, and a curled fluffy tail, wearing a vivid pink and magenta floral kimono-inspired short dress with layered frills, a large decorative obi bow, floral hair ornaments, white socks, and sandals; she is also leaping with one arm raised in a peace sign. Render the left girl's face as intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. Surround them with an explosive fantasy-Japanese backdrop packed with decorative detail: Mount Fuji centered in the upper background with radiant sunrise rays, a large rainbow arc swirling on the right, stylized Great Wave-like curling waves on both sides, dense pink cherry blossoms overhead, 2 glowing paper lanterns near the upper left and upper right edges, and 2 more paper lanterns near the lower left and lower right corners, plus a red arched bridge at the bottom left. Use a saturated candy-bright palette of pink, cyan, blue, gold, orange, violet, and white, with confetti-like petals, sparkling particles, paint splashes, and intricate floral patterns covering nearly every surface. The mood is festive, cute, ecstatic, and celebratory, with dynamic foreshortening, crisp linework, glossy highlights, layered textures, and a highly polished gacha-card style illustration.
entries.description: A vibrant anime-style festival artwork of two animal-eared girls in colorful kimono outfits jumping joyfully against a dense Japanese fantasy background, ideal for celebratory character art or eye-catching social media illustrations.

entries.title: Pastel Anime Fantasy Poster with Heroine
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertical Japanese anime fantasy game or light-novel promotional poster in a soft pastel lavender, white, and gold palette, featuring a single heroic teenage girl as the main subject in a grand celestial city. She stands in a dynamic three-quarter full-body pose, slightly turned left, holding an ornate staff in her left hand, with her right arm extended behind her as if caught in wind. Her face is obscured by a flat pale square censor block centered over the head, but the visible design suggests a delicate anime heroine with very long flowing silver-lilac hair, side bangs, loose strands, and star-shaped hair ornaments with dark indigo ribbon bows. She wears an elaborate magical-girl style dress: off-shoulder white bodice with navy and violet trim, gold star motifs, layered asymmetrical skirt in white, periwinkle, violet, and deep indigo, a very large dark blue waist bow with a gold star jewel, detached flowing sleeves, gold chains with tiny star charms draped at the hip, white thigh-high stockings, and a blue star-shaped garter ornament on one thigh. Her staff is tall and elegant, dark shaft with gold frame elements and a suspended faceted blue crystal near the top, decorated with bows and star accents. The background is an airy fantasy skyline of white towers, cathedral-like spires, clouds, feathers, and drifting pink petals, with bright ethereal backlighting and a dreamy heroic atmosphere. Compose it like a polished key visual poster with abundant Japanese typography integrated into the artwork. At the upper left, place the Japanese tagline text "願いが、未来を照らす。" with two smaller lines below it. At the upper right, place a star-like emblem, the large character name "ルミナ", the subtitle "- Lumina -", and a smaller CV credit line. On the right side, add 3 vertically stacked feature callouts, each with a small icon and a bold Japanese heading followed by 2 short lines of smaller text. On the left side, add 1 vertical Japanese copy block running downward beside the character. At the lower right, include 3 small portrait inset panels of the same girl, stacked diagonally: 1 calm front-facing expression, 1 side-profile serious expression, and 1 smiling eyes-closed expression. At the lower left, place the large Japanese title "星紡ぐレガシア" with the English subtitle "- LEGACIA: Weave the Stars -" beneath it. At the bottom right, add the date text "2025. 夏" and one short Japanese tagline line below. At the very bottom edge, include 2 small social or website info blocks on the left and a tiny copyright line on the right. Render in high-end modern anime promotional illustration style, luminous pastel fantasy atmosphere, elegant composition, smooth linework and coloring, soft cel shading, delicate fabric movement, glossy highlights, intricate costume details, clean typography layout, and refined commercial poster finish.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished vertical Japanese anime fantasy promotional poster with one magical heroine, integrated title typography, character callouts, and inset expression portraits for game, novel, or anime key art.

entries.title: Anime Heroine Promo Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A polished anime-style vertical key visual poster for a futuristic fantasy action series. Center the composition on a full-body young heroine in a confident three-quarter back pose, looking over her shoulder, with her face partially obscured by angle and hair. She has long flowing silver-white hair blowing dramatically in the wind, pale skin, and cool violet accents. Her outfit is a sleek black, white, and purple combat uniform: black cropped jacket with white hood and cape-like layered back panels, fitted bodice, short pleated skirt, utility belt and straps, black gloves, thigh strap on one leg, and subtle star-emblem details. In her right hand she holds a large angular sci-fi sword with glowing purple energy lines. The background is a bright blue daytime sky with soft clouds, several white birds, and an elegant white city of tall cathedral-like spires and bridges, creating a grand utopian futuristic kingdom atmosphere. Use strong wind effects in the hair, ribbons, coat tails, and fabric. Add smooth linework and smooth coloring, clean anime rendering, high-detail cel shading, crisp lighting, glossy highlights, and a premium game-promo illustration finish.

Design it as a complete Japanese promotional poster layout. On the upper left, place a large bold vertical headline in Japanese reading "未来を、自分の手で。" with the middle phrase in purple and the rest in black, over a pale decorative emblem. Beneath it, add a short Japanese blurb in smaller text. On the right side, place a tall dark vertical sidebar with white Japanese text reading "信じてる。だから、私が道を切り開く。". On the lower left, include 3 tilted rectangular inset images stacked diagonally: 1 close-up portrait of the heroine's face, 1 action shot of her fighting with the glowing sword, and 1 wide cityscape view. Below those in a dark character info panel, show the character name "ルシア" with the romanized name "Lucia" and a small emblem, followed by 7 profile lines in Japanese: "CV:悠木 碧", "年齢:17歳", "所属:黎明騎士団(不屈の翼)", "武器:双刃剣(レプリカント)", "誕生日:4月12日", "身長:165cm", "好きなもの:静かな場所、星空", and a final dislike line. At the bottom center, place the large series logo text "黎明のリベリオン" with the English subtitle "REIMEI NO REBELLION" beneath it, and below that the release line "2025年、始動。". Color palette: white, black, deep indigo, electric violet, and sky blue. Overall mood: heroic, elegant, aspirational, premium anime game or light novel promotional poster.
entries.description: A high-end Japanese-style anime key visual poster featuring a silver-haired swordswoman, fantasy sci-fi city backdrop, and full promotional text layout for a game, anime, or light novel campaign.

entries.title: Vintage Knight Helmet Etching
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A centered black-and-white vintage ink illustration of a medieval knight's helmet and upper neck guard, shown as a bust on a plain light gray background with lots of negative space. The helmet is angled slightly to the left in three-quarter view, with a rounded domed top, a narrow horizontal visor slit, and a faceplate featuring 6 vertical ventilation slits. Include a riveted gorget with visible metal studs and a draped cloth or cape falling over the right shoulder. Render it in an engraved woodcut or etching style with bold black outlines, dense stippling, scratchy crosshatching, and high contrast shading, like an old heraldic emblem or antique book illustration. Clean isolated composition, no text, no border, no additional objects.

entries.title: Local Edit: Mascot Robot Replacement
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, do a localized edit. Replace the robot character beside the woman with a cute green-and-white mascot robot version, keeping the same pose, position, scarf, lighting, cozy watercolor anime style, and the rest of the scene unchanged. Give the new robot 2 leaf-like ears, 1 sprout stem on top with 3 small white bell-shaped flowers, larger sparkling blue eyes, and 1 green heart emblem on its chest. Also rotate the laptop at the lower left so the back of the screen faces the viewer, and add 1 simple line-art logo of the same mascot robot centered on the laptop lid.

entries.title: Epic Fantasy Warrior and Wolf
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic dark-fantasy full-body portrait of a fierce warrior queen walking forward across a rugged, autumn-toned field at golden hour, accompanied by 1 large wolf at her right side. She has very long windblown deep copper red hair streaming dramatically to the left, with an ornate metallic headpiece on one side. Her face is partly obscured by shadow for a mysterious, faceless look. She wears ultra-detailed biomechanical elven armor in pale silver, ivory, and champagne metal, shaped like a sculpted bodice with filigree, engraved lines, layered shoulder plates, articulated gauntlets, decorated thigh armor, and armored boots. The outfit includes 1 flowing translucent skirt panel in beige and 1 long torn crimson-orange cape or veil trailing behind her, filled with glowing ember-like perforations and scattered sparkling particles. In her right hand she carries 1 tall ceremonial spear-staff with an intricate bladed head and multiple hanging chains and charms. The wolf is highly detailed, grey-white and muscular, wearing matching ornamental armor and harness pieces with metallic accents and red markings. The environment is a windswept mountainous wilderness with blurred rocky hills in the background, glowing dust, embers, and backlit haze. Lighting is warm, low sun, dramatic rim light, volumetric glow, rich contrast, shallow depth of field, hyper-detailed textures, epic fantasy realism, dynamic motion, powerful goddess-like presence, centered composition, vertical 2:3 format.

entries.title: Epic Eastern Fantasy Character Concept
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please create an Eastern fantasy character concept illustration featuring an Eastern fantasy character using a musical instrument or weapon. The overall style blends traditional Chinese Xianxia, mythological iconography, and movie-level CG concept art texture. The image has a strong Eastern fantasy aesthetic, high-level beauty, and an epic feel. The character is the core visual focus, with an ethereal, sacred, elegant, cold, or majestic temperament. Automatically match the most appropriate expression, clothing, hairstyle, accessories, and identity setting based on the character. If the item is a musical instrument, the character should be in a ritualistic and fluid posture such as playing, plucking, blowing, or standing with the instrument, emphasizing musical energy, spiritual flow, and sound waves turning into light patterns, clouds, starlight, or magic circles. If the item is a weapon, the character should be in a posture of holding the weapon, gathering momentum, confronting, casting spells, or the moment before battle, emphasizing the sense of power, pressure, aura, and energy convergence. The composition is mainly centered or off-center, balanced, solemn, and has a poster-level main visual effect; the character's back can have a moon wheel, a halo, divine light, an ancient array, or an icon-style circular structure. The clothing adopts an Eastern fantasy style with light and beautiful materials, including gauze, ribbons, layered hems, metal ornaments, jade ornaments, or crowns. Hair and fabric flow in the wind, creating a strong sense of dynamic beauty. The background is automatically matched to the character's temperament as Eastern fantasy scenes such as starry sky divine realm, cloud sea heaven, moonlit sacred land, bamboo forest fairy mountain, ice and snow secret realm, quiet night altar, ancient ruins, etc., with environment carrying mist, flowing light, particles, mysterious energy, and spatial depth. The color uses a unified and high-level main tone to control the screen. It can automatically choose ice blue, moon white, green, purple, red gold, ink black, silver gray and other color schemes according to the character and props, and use a small amount of light gold or cold light for divine embellishment. Overall requirements: beautiful, dreamy, ethereal, mysterious, detached, sacred, exquisite, with movie-level lighting and shadow, volumetric light, sense of air, ultra-detailed CG illustration texture; avoid vulgarity, avoid cheap ancient style photo sense, avoid internet celebrity faces, avoid cluttered backgrounds, avoid plastic textures.
entries.description: A comprehensive prompt for generating high-end, cinematic Eastern fantasy character CG, featuring detailed descriptions of lighting, attire, and mythical elements.

entries.title: Dark Wuxia Game Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical cinematic poster for the dark wuxia action game Phantom Blade Zero, painted in an ultra-detailed gritty concept-art style with realistic textures, moody volumetric fog, and high contrast lighting. The scene shows 1 lone swordsman standing in the lower center foreground, viewed mostly from behind in a three-quarter pose, wearing a wide straw hat and layered black robes shredded into long wind-whipped strips, with pale loose hair streaming out beneath the hat. He holds 1 drawn sword low in his right hand, the blade catching cold silver light. The environment is a ruined ancient Chinese city of towering wooden pagodas and fortress-like buildings rising into steep cliffs, with collapsing architecture, hanging chains, smoke, drifting ash, and rubble. A bright full moon glows near the top center behind dense storm clouds, backlighting the skyline and the warrior. The color palette is almost monochrome charcoal, black, steel gray, and moonlit white, punctuated by sharp crimson slashes and blood-like streaks cutting diagonally across the composition. At the very top, place 4 huge Chinese calligraphy characters in explosive white brushstroke ink reading 影之刃零, spanning nearly the full width. Directly beneath, centered, add the small elegant serif English subtitle PHANTOM BLADE ZERO. At the bottom center, add 1 line of Chinese tagline text reading 刀光即命运 影尽方归零, with the final character in red, plus 1 smaller line of Chinese promotional text beneath it. Add subtle ornamental divider lines and a tiny red seal-like emblem at the bottom. Composition should feel like an official AAA key art poster: epic, ominous, martial, supernatural, and intensely atmospheric, with dynamic wind, debris, embers, torn fabric, and ink-splatter energy.
entries.description: A moody AAA-style promotional poster of a lone swordsman in a ruined ancient Chinese city, ideal for dark fantasy game key art and cinematic marketing visuals.

entries.title: Retro Pixel Mountain Valley
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed retro pixel art landscape of a bright alpine valley in summer, composed like a classic side-scrolling video game background but shown as a wide scenic vista. In the foreground, a winding tan dirt path curves from the bottom center into the middle distance through dense wildflower meadows, with a small blue stream at the lower right bordered by gray rocks and lush grass. Count 2 large foreground rock clusters, 1 winding path, and 1 visible stream. Fill the meadows with colorful flowers in vivid purple, yellow, red, pink, and white, with especially tall purple flower spikes on the left foreground and dense mixed blossoms on both sides of the path. On the left and right midground, place thick stands of leafy green trees and dark pine trees, framing the open valley center. In the background, show a dramatic mountain range with exactly 7 visible peaks: 1 dominant tall snow-capped peak slightly right of center, 2 medium purple peaks to its left, 2 smaller snowy blue peaks in the far center distance, 1 smaller purple peak to the right, and 1 cropped rocky mountain edge at the far left. Use vibrant greens and purples as the main palette, with cool blue shadows and lavender mountain faces. Above, render a bright blue sky with large creamy white clouds, halftone-dot shading throughout the sky and mountains, subtle vintage comic print texture, visible dithering, and crisp sharp pixel edges. Add exactly 4 small flying bird silhouettes in the sky. The whole image should feel colorful, nostalgic, scenic, and richly layered, with heavy halftone comic shading, retro print grain, no text, no UI, no characters, and no buildings.
entries.description: A vibrant pixel art alpine landscape with halftone comic shading, ideal for retro game backgrounds, scenic posters, or nostalgic environment art.

entries.title: Sengoku vs Sangoku Crossover Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A dramatic ultra-detailed vertical anime key visual poster showing a crossover war between Japan's Sengoku era and China's Three Kingdoms era, split exactly down the center by a glowing vertical beam of light. The left half is themed in crimson, magenta, ember orange, and cherry blossom pink, representing 日本戦国; the right half is themed in jade green, teal, cyan, gold, and stormy blue, representing 中国三国. At the center, large vertical Japanese calligraphy reads 時空を越え、宿命が交錯する。. The composition is dense, cinematic, and symmetrical, like a premium game or movie crossover poster, with dozens of sparks, petals, glowing particles, motion streaks, and layered background architecture.

On the left side, depict 4 distinct Sengoku-themed warriors. At the top left, a stern samurai warlord in ornate black and deep red armor with gold trim, long dark hair tied high and blowing in the wind, shown in a powerful upper-body portrait facing inward; behind him are sakura blossoms, banners, and stacked Japanese castles illuminated with neon-magenta highlights. Mid-left, show 1 battle-hardened older general with wild silver hair, heavy layered armor, and a fierce glare, partially emerging from the fortress cityscape. Lower-left, show 1 aggressive crimson-clad warrior lunging forward with sweeping cloth, horned or antler-like helmet ornamentation, and dynamic red-black armor. At the bottom-left foreground, show 1 dominant swordsman in demonic samurai armor with a crescent-moon helmet crest and glowing red eyes, gripping a katana angled diagonally downward, surrounded by embers and petals. A vertical banner near the upper-left edge displays the Japanese text 日本戦国.

On the right side, depict 4 distinct Three Kingdoms-themed heroes. At the top right, show 1 regal strategist-emperor figure in elaborate blue, black, and gold ceremonial armor with a tall crown-like headdress, shown in upper-body profile facing inward; behind him rises a luminous spectral dragon made of water, cloud, and light. Mid-right, show 1 long-bearded green-robed general with a tall headpiece and lamellar armor, solemn and heroic, framed by neon-lit city structures and swirling magical energy. Slightly below center-right, show 1 elegant strategist-scholar holding an opened feather fan, wearing layered robes and gold ornaments, calm and calculating. At the lower-right edge, show 1 roaring armored warrior with a fierce expression and windblown hair. In the bottom-right foreground, make the dominant figure a green-and-gold armored hero extending a glowing jade-green sword toward the viewer, with flowing robes and luminous energy ribbons curling around the blade. A vertical banner near the upper-right edge displays the Chinese text 中国三国.

Blend historical East Asian war aesthetics with futuristic cyberpunk megacity elements: Japanese pagodas and fortresses on the left, neon skyscrapers and glowing urban lights across both halves, flying fortress silhouettes and distant airborne warships in the sky, magical lightning, smoke, and storm clouds overhead. The sky transitions from sunset violet and rose on the left to stormy turquoise and silver on the right. Use hyper-detailed painterly anime illustration, intricate armor textures, metallic reflections, volumetric lighting, high contrast, epic scale, and intense atmosphere.

At the bottom, add huge stylized title typography: on the left, massive fiery kanji 戦国 with the romanization SENGOKU beneath it; in the middle, a metallic gold VS; on the right, massive jade-glowing kanji 三国 with the romanization SANGOKU beneath it. Below that, add a smaller centered subtitle line reading SENGOKU VS SANGOKU, and beneath it a Japanese tagline: 時空を超え、英雄たちの戦いが始まる。. Poster layout, polished commercial promotional art, extremely detailed, high-impact, collectible poster aesthetic.

entries.title: SSR Kamen Rider Kuuga Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A premium ultra-detailed collectible trading card illustration of Kamen Rider Kuuga in Amazing Mighty Form, designed like a high-rarity SSR card. The composition is a dramatic front-facing action portrait with the armored hero centered and dominating the frame from thighs up, wearing glossy black and deep metallic crimson armor, a gold horned crest on the helmet, large faceted red compound eyes, and a detailed transformation belt with a red core. The hero extends one gloved hand toward the viewer holding a smaller card featuring his own image, creating a recursive card-within-card effect, while the other hand is open in a battle-ready pose. The background is a ruined city street at night filled with sparks, embers, debris, smoke, and multiple enemy monsters leaping and attacking from all sides; exactly 8 background figures are visible: 3 airborne enemies in the upper background, 3 standing or lunging enemies on the right side, and 2 smaller enemies near the lower left and bottom edge. Use intense cinematic lighting, glittering particle effects, holographic foil texture, gold filigree linework, and a luxurious black-and-gold art deco frame. Include ornate card UI text and badges integrated into the border: top center title "MASKED RIDER" above large metallic serif text "KAMEN RIDER KUUGA", a circular emblem in the top left, an iridescent shield badge in the top right with "SSR" and 5 gold stars beneath it, a bottom left label panel reading "CARD TYPE" and "CHARACTER", a bottom center nameplate reading "KAMEN RIDER KUUGA" with Japanese text "仮面ライダークウガ", a barcode below, and the subtitle "AMAZING MIGHTY FORM" at the very bottom. Add a large gold cursive artist-style signature at the lower right reading NickZag. Overall style: hyper-detailed tokusatsu character art, explosive poster energy, premium trading card game rarity, shimmering holographic highlights, crisp focus on the central hero, epic collectible showcase.
entries.description: This prompt generates a premium holographic-style SSR trading card illustration of Kamen Rider Kuuga, ideal for collectible card art, fan posters, and tokusatsu-inspired promotional visuals.

entries.title: Holographic Kamen Rider SSR Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-detailed premium holographic trading card illustration of Kamen Rider 1, designed like an ultra-rare tokusatsu collectible card with a vertical full-frame ornate border. The central figure is a classic masked hero in a dynamic forward-reaching pose, filling most of the composition from thighs up, with one gloved hand thrust toward the viewer and the other hand holding a smaller version of the same card. He wears a dark green armored chest, black suit, silver segmented gloves and forearms, a red scarf streaming dramatically to the right, a red belt with a large circular red buckle, and a metallic insect-like helmet with 2 long silver antennae and 2 oversized faceted crimson compound eyes. Behind him is a chaotic apocalyptic city battle scene at night with ruined buildings, smoke, sparks, streaking explosions, and a star-filled cosmic sky. Include exactly 10 smaller rider figures in the background and corners: 2 flying in the upper right sky, 1 climbing or leaping on the mid-left ruins, 3 mid-background combat figures across the center-right, 2 small figures in the lower right, 1 blue-accented figure in the lower left, and 1 partially visible figure near the far left edge. The art style is gritty, painterly, metallic, and cinematic, with dense glitter particles, rainbow foil reflections, gold filigree linework, and prism-like holographic highlights across the entire image. The card frame should be lavish black, gold, and iridescent foil with collectible-game styling. At the top center place the text "MASKED RIDER" above large serif text "KAMEN RIDER" and a huge gold number "1". In the top left place a circular emblem showing the masked rider face. In the top right place a large badge reading "SSR" with 5 gold stars beneath it. In the bottom left place a panel reading "CARD TYPE" and "CHARACTER". At the bottom center place the text "KAMEN RIDER 1" with "仮面ライダー1号" below it, and a barcode-like strip with the text "RIDER LEGEND 1971". In the bottom right add a large gold cursive autograph reading "NickZag". Make the whole card feel like an ultra-premium chase card, dramatic perspective, extreme detail, sharp contrast, glowing embers, shattered-city energy, and luxurious holographic foil texture.
entries.description: This prompt generates a highly detailed ultra-rare tokusatsu trading card illustration, ideal for collectible card art, fan posters, and premium character showcase imagery.

entries.title: Dark Fantasy RPG Key Visual Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical dark-fantasy anime key visual poster for the RPG 夢喰-BAKU-. Center the composition around 3 human figures layered in depth. In the background, a large intimidating adult man is shown from the chest up, facing forward, with messy wavy dark hair, light stubble, a partially open dark shirt, and a shadowed, ominous presence; his face is mostly obscured by darkness and framing, making him feel mysterious and threatening. In the foreground left, place 1 young man in a dynamic three-quarter pose lunging toward the viewer with his right hand stretched out dramatically, wearing a blue jacket over a white hoodie, with short tousled brown hair and a determined expression. In the foreground right, place 1 young woman standing slightly behind him, with long brown hair, a pale blouse, and a dark skirt or high-waisted bottom with a belt; she clasps her hands near her mouth or chest and looks anxious and vulnerable. Use a moody supernatural atmosphere with swirling black and deep violet smoke, ink-like shadows, spectral textures, and pixel-glitch fragments around the edges. Add broken chains diagonally in the background, several floating rectangular frames or screens, and a faint interior corridor or room behind the characters. Integrate the large Japanese title 夢喰 vertically in the center, rendered in bold white calligraphic kanji with purple splatter, scratches, and glow accents, partially overlapping the characters. At the bottom, include the Japanese tagline 分かるだろ?俺達が必要とされる理由がよ in elegant white text with part of the sentence highlighted in purple. In the top right corner, add a white studio logo reading DCC Project with a lotus-like emblem and large serif letters. Overall style: polished illustrated key art for a psychological horror RPG, ultra-detailed anime painting, high contrast, cinematic lighting, deep blacks, indigo and violet palette, ominous supernatural energy, poster-ready typography, premium promotional visual.

she clasps her hands near her mouth or chest and looks anxious and vulnerable. use a moody supernatural atmosphere with swirling black and deep violet smoke, ink-like shadows, spectral textures, and pixel-glitch fragments around the edges. add broken chains diagonally in the background, several floating rectangular frames or screens, and a faint interior corridor or room behind the characters. integrate the large japanese title 夢喰 vertically in the center, rendered in bold white calligraphic kanji with purple splatter, scratches, and glow accents, partially overlapping the characters. at the bottom, include the japanese tagline 分かるだろ?俺達が必要とされる理由がよ in elegant white text with part of the sentence highlighted in purple. in the top right corner, add a white studio logo reading dcc project with a lotus-like emblem and large serif letters. overall style: polished illustrated key art for a psychological horror rpg, ultra-detailed anime painting, high contrast, cinematic lighting, deep blacks, indigo and violet palette, ominous supernatural energy, poster-ready typography, premium promotional visual. game asset cinematic studio studio

entries.title: Crimson Space Opera Key Visual
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical sci-fi key visual poster for a dark space opera game, featuring a single colossal alien-mechanical spacecraft centered slightly low in the frame, angled diagonally from lower left toward upper right as if surging forward through space. The ship is razor-sharp, asymmetrical, and aggressively organic, built from layered black metal and glowing crimson-red armor plates, with a long spear-like prow, many jagged fins, and about 12 to 16 whip-like tendrils or spines streaming backward from its upper rear like biomechanical hair. Behind it floats a large shadowed planet at center, encircled by 3 luminous red orbital rings that create a halo effect. At upper left, include 1 cratered moon or planet partially cropped by the frame. Scatter multiple dark asteroids and rocky debris across the foreground and edges, especially lower right and lower left, to create depth. The background is a dense starfield with red nebula clouds and streaks of fiery cosmic dust. In the upper right, place a blazing orange-white sun flare breaking into the scene, casting hot rim light across the ship and rings. Use a high-contrast palette of black, deep crimson, ember red, and white highlights, with glossy metallic reflections and a grim, apocalyptic mood. Add vertical Japanese tagline text on the right side in white Mincho-style serif characters: 「あの太陽に飛び込めば 冷めきった私の心も温かくなるのだろうか」. At the bottom center, add the main title in very large distressed white Japanese serif characters with cracked texture and subtle red glow: 「斑鳩の柩」. Beneath it, add 1 line of smaller red katakana subtitle text: 「イカルガのクルスー」, and beneath that 1 line of small Roman letters in red: "IKARUGA NO CRUX". Make it look like premium anime game key art, cinematic poster composition, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, dynamic lighting, epic scale, ominous and beautiful.
entries.description: A dark, cinematic sci-fi game poster showing a red-black biomechanical starship against planets, glowing orbital rings, and Japanese title typography, ideal for key visual or cover art generation.

entries.title: Western Open-World Game Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly realistic video game screenshot in the style of a Western open-world game. Third-person over-the-shoulder view of a rugged cowboy walking away from the camera, wearing a weathered brown jacket, dark pants, a gun holster, and a classic cowboy hat. To his left is a saddled dark horse with white spots. The setting is a dusty desert landscape with dry tall grass, dirt trails, cacti, and towering red rock mesas during a vibrant golden hour sunset. In the hazy background, two distant silhouetted figures stand on the dirt path. The image features a video game HUD overlay: in the bottom left corner, a circular minimap with a player arrow and two red blips; in the bottom right corner, three lines of white text with button prompt icons reading 'DRAW WEAPON [RT]', 'HORSE CARGO [Cross D-pad]', and 'TENNESSEE WALKER [LT]'.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly realistic AAA video game screenshot depicting a boss fight inside a dusty, golden-lit ancient Egyptian temple. In the center background, a massive ANUBIS boss monster with a jackal head, glowing eyes, and ornate gold armor roars while wielding a staff, kicking up swirling sand. In the left foreground, a muscular, bald warrior with red body tattoos faces the boss, holding a curved blade. In the right midground, a young boy aims a bow at the boss. The image features 4 distinct UI components: a top-center red boss health bar labeled 'ANUBIS', a right-aligned quest tracker labeled 'THE JACKAL'S PATH' with the subtext 'Defeat Anubis', a bottom-left player status HUD showing health and rage bars alongside 4 diamond-shaped skill icons with button prompts, and a bottom-right companion HUD showing 2 circular skill icons.

entries.title: First-Person VRChat Meme Crossover Screenshot

entries.prompt: A first-person POV screenshot inside a VRChat lobby featuring a dark checkered floor, a "VR CHAT" welcome sign on the left, a "Mirror" doorway, and an "Avatar Showcase" on the right. In the center stands Ran Mouri from Detective Conan in her blue school uniform, smiling with closed eyes and patting the heads of the two smaller characters. entries.title: 3D Anime Visual Novel Game Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A 3D anime-style illustration of four high school girls in a Japanese classroom bathed in warm afternoon sunlight. In the foreground on the right, a girl with long coral-brown hair in a ponytail with a white bow and green eyes reaches her hand out towards the viewer with a warm smile. In the foreground on the left, a girl with short pink hair with red hairclips and pink eyes stands with her arms crossed, looking slightly annoyed. In the midground, a girl with long dark purple hair stands calmly holding a book, while in the background, a girl with short coral-pink hair and a red bow waves cheerfully. All four girls wear matching school uniforms consisting of grey blazers, brown sweater vests, red ribbons, and blue pleated skirts. The classroom features wooden floors, desks, and a green chalkboard. In the top left corner, there is a circular logo with a pink border containing the stylized text "DOKI DOKI Literature Club!" and a large pink "3D" below it, decorated with a green pencil and a pink heart. The image has a high-quality 3D render aesthetic, resembling video game promotional art with soft lighting and depth of field.

entries.title: Calm Heron Sunrise Lake
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a serene impressionist oil-painting landscape of a misty lake at sunrise, expressing calmness and quiet reflection. Use a wide horizontal canvas, about 16:9. The scene shows exactly 1 tall blue-gray heron standing in shallow water slightly right of center, facing left, with long legs, an orange beak, and a clear dark reflection in the still water. Add exactly 1 prominent flowering willow tree on the far right bank, with drooping branches and pale pink blossoms, plus soft distant tree silhouettes along the horizon. The lake surface should be glassy with gentle ripples, pastel reflections of the sky, and a warm sun low near the center of the horizon. Include exactly 21 water-lily flowers: 19 open blossoms and 2 closed buds, distributed as 4 open blossoms and 2 buds in the lower-left foreground, 3 open blossoms near the center reeds, 5 small open blossoms along the mid-right waterline, and 7 open blossoms among the large lily pads in the lower-right foreground. Surround them with dark green lily pads and tall reeds around the heron. Use a dreamy soft peach, lavender, rose pink, misty blue, teal green, and warm gold palette, visible painterly brushstrokes, soft atmospheric haze, romantic natural lighting, delicate reflections, no text, no people, no buildings, no harsh contrast.
entries.description: Generates a peaceful impressionist lakeside sunrise with a heron, willow blossoms, lily pads, and reflective pastel water for calming nature artwork.

entries.title: Modern Paper Sculpture Style Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please transform this illustration into a modern Paper Sculpture style. Emphasize a rich and dynamic three-dimensional expression, as if thick paper or cardstock has been sculpturally carved, molded, and folded. Represent organic and artistic forms as if paper has been layered and carved out, raised three-dimensionally, or bent. Beautifully depict the sharpness of the paper edges, deep shadows and highlights from layering, and the natural texture and fiber of the paper in detail. Achieve a balance between the weightiness of a sculptural work and the lightness and fragility unique to paper, resulting in a sophisticated beauty characteristic of modern art. Ensure the light hits softly and naturally to emphasize the three-dimensional effect. In particular, keep the paper sculpture effect subtle on the face and skin to maintain a smooth, natural texture and preserve cuteness. For the hair, clothes, and overall silhouette, boldly emphasize the three-dimensional feel and artistic shaping typical of Paper Sculpture. The overall atmosphere should be an impressive and fantastic Paper Sculpture piece that blends a warm, artistic, handmade feel you'd want to touch with modern, refined beauty. Faithfully maintain the composition, character expressions, poses, silhouettes, and key features of the original illustration without any changes.
entries.description: Transforms an illustration into a contemporary paper sculpture style, emphasizing 3D depth, layered cardstock textures, and soft lighting while maintaining original features.

entries.title: Mystical Luminous Outline Style
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please transform this illustration into a mysterious and fantastical luminous style. Using the 【glow color: rainbow】, ensure that only the outlines of the character, clothing lines, accessory details, and hair flow glow intensely with beautiful light. The lines should glow softly from within like gentle neon light, slowly emerging while scattering slight particles of light to softly illuminate the surroundings. Instead of lighting up surfaces, only the lines should be the main glowing elements, keeping other parts (skin, hair, clothing surfaces) extremely subdued. The glowing lines should create high contrast against a dark background, emphasizing the gentle spread of the rainbow light spectrum. The overall atmosphere should be cool and mysterious, creating a breathtakingly beautiful silhouette where only the magical rainbow outlines are visible. Maintain the original composition and features exactly.
entries.description: A detailed instruction to transform an existing illustration into a mystical glowing style where only the outlines emit soft neon light against a dark background.

entries.title: Dunhuang Mural Water Moon Guanyin
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a high-end art piece in the style of Dunhuang murals centered on [Water Moon Guanyin]. The composition uses a circular light halo moon wheel center, with the main character as the sole visual core, expressing a sacred moment of seated relaxation overlooking clear water. The atmosphere should be ethereal, quiet, and complete, with museum-level aesthetics and cultural depth.
Character requirements:
The subject should present an elegant, majestic, and divine temperament with a dignified face, not a common ancient-style beauty. Intricate gold hair crowns, pearl chains, and jewelry are worn. Clothing is luxurious with smooth lines and rhythmic flying celestial qualities.
Gold structure requirements:
Strengthen structural gold usage to form a clear luxurious order. Use gold tracing, liquid gold, and gold leaf on crowns, clothing edges, and embroidery. Sacred elements like halos, lotus petals, and borders should have visible but restrained high-end gold decoration, presenting a 'worn but luxurious' texture.
Color requirements:
Colors include ochre red, cinnabar, stone green, stone blue, and ivory white, supplemented by refined gold. The tone is rich, thick, and elegant.
Decorative elements:
Integrate flying celestials, lotuses, auspicious clouds, and classical border decorations. Keep accompanying figures minimal (e.g., Sudhana) to maintain focus on the main subject.
Texture requirements:
Emphasize old grotto mural and mineral pigment textures, with visible cracks, weathering, and historal patina, while retaining the luster of gold leaf for a high-end artistic feel.
entries.description: A majestic prompt for creating museum-grade art in Dunhuang mural style featuring the Water Moon Guanyin with intricate gold details and mineral textures.

entries.title: Childlike Colored Pencil Drawing
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please make this look like a kindergarten child drew it with colored pencils. Don't make it a clean drawing. Don't make it a good drawing. Don't make it cute. Please make it look like a genuinely poorly drawn picture by a child. It was drawn on white paper with colored pencils. I looked at the original picture and tried to copy it, but I couldn't do it well at all. The lines are wiggly. There are almost no straight lines. I traced them many times, so the lines are thick. The lines cut off in strange places. The shapes aren't proper. The sizes are inconsistent. Big parts are too big, small parts are too small. Eyes, mouth, body, etc., are in slightly weird places. The positions are slightly off. Something is just a bit wrong. The colors are outside the lines. There are uncolored spots. There are heavily colored areas and light areas. There are marks from scrubbing hard with the pencils. Don't make it a proper illustration. Don't clean it up digitally. Don't make the lines neat. Don't fix the shapes. Don't balance it well. It's a bit bad. It's quite bad. But the child worked hard on it. Please make it look like a child is showing it to you saying, 'Look, I did it!' The background is just plain white paper. Make the expression look childlike too.
entries.description: A highly descriptive prompt designed to mimic the imperfect, charming style of a kindergarten child's colored pencil drawing.

entries.title: Martial Arts Choreography Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A clean instructional poster in a 4x4 grid (16 panels) showing a male martial artist demonstrating Pencak Silat choreography. The subject is a fit man with medium-length dark hair and a beard, wearing a red button-up shirt, beige pants, and white sneakers. Style is semi-realistic illustration mixed with hand-drawn sketch lines, soft shadows, and a light textured paper background. Each panel includes subtle motion arrows and small captions. Minimalist, balanced layout. Top title at top: 'Pencak Silat Choreography - 16 Counts - 10 Seconds - Smooth Flowy Chill'.

Panel 1: wide ready stance, knees bent, one hand guarding forward, focused expression.
Panel 2: step forward with outward block, arm extended defensively.
Panel 3: inside block sweeping upward diagonally, torso rotating.
Panel 4: strong straight punch forward, aligned hips.
Panel 5: side step into low stance, both hands pushing outward.
Panel 6: knee lifted high in chamber position, balanced posture.
Panel 7: front kick extended forward, opposite arm guarding.
Panel 8: step backward into defensive cover, arms crossing.
Panel 9: low block, sweeping arm downward in deep stance.
Panel 10: hook punch across body with hip rotation.
Panel 11: turning body with pivoting feet, circular motion.
Panel 12: forward palm strike, stable stance.
Panel 13: low sweeping motion near ground in squat stance.
Panel 14: rising smoothly from low stance, upward motion.
Panel 15: controlled locking pose, one arm raised defensively.
Panel 16: closing salute, feet together, hands pressed at chest, calm posture.

Include hand-drawn arrows (blue and purple accents), clean infographic layout, evenly spaced panels, consistent character design across all frames.

A focused male martial artist performs a smooth, flowing Pencak Silat sequence in a minimalist studio. He is in his late 20s, athletic build, medium height, warm tan skin, with thick wavy dark hair and a short, well-groomed beard. He wears a fitted deep red button-up shirt with sleeves rolled to the forearms, beige slim-fit pants with slight wear at the knees, and clean white sneakers. His expression is calm, controlled, and intent. 
The setting is a softly lit neutral studio with an off-white textured backdrop and a slightly worn wooden floor. Lighting is diffused and cinematic, creating gentle shadows and emphasizing fluid motion.
The choreography is continuous and rhythmic, with no abrupt cuts: 
0-2s: Starts in a grounded ready stance, knees bent, one palm forward in guard, eyes locked ahead 
2-4s: steps forward into an outward block, transitioning into an inside sweeping block upward 
4-6s: rotates hips into a straight punch, then shifts weight into a side step with a pushing motion 
6-8s: lifts knee smoothly and extends into a controlled front kick, maintaining balance 
8-10s: steps back into a guarded cover, drops into a low block, then rises into a hook punch 
10-12s: pivots the body with a clean turn, transitioning into a forward palm strike 
12-14s: lowers into a sweeping motion, then rises fluidly into a locking control pose 
14-15s: finishes upright with a respectful closing salute, hands together at chest level 
Movement style is soft, flowing, controlled, with precise martial intention rather than aggression. Emphasis on balance, breath, and continuity. Camera is a steady medium-wide shot with subtle slow tracking, no cuts.

12-14s: lowers into a sweeping motion, then rises fluidly into a locking control pose 14-15s: finishes upright with a respectful closing salute, hands together at chest level movement style is soft, flowing, controlled, with precise martial intention rather than aggression. emphasis on balance, breath, and continuity. camera is a steady medium-wide shot with subtle slow tracking, no cuts. uncategorized cinematic realistic studio studio

entries.title: Biomechanical Fitness Instructional Chart
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Generate a monochrome grayscale technical illustration, a biomechanically accurate fitness instruction sheet, clean 3D anatomical figures, scientific diagram aesthetics, minimalist style, no artistic exaggeration. 

2x4 grid layout (total of 8 panels), perfectly aligned cells, equal spacing, thin black border, numbered 1 to 8. 

Neutral athletic human body (gender-neutral), proportional anatomy, consistent figure across all panels. 

Dumbbell training sequence (key positions only): 
1. Dumbbell Curl (starting position) 
2. Dumbbell Curl (top contraction) 
3. Shoulder Press (start at shoulder height) 
4. Shoulder Press (overhead lockout) 
5. Lateral Raise (arms down) 
6. Lateral Raise (arms to shoulder height) 
7. Dumbbell Squat (standing start) 
8. Squat (bottom position). 

Top left corner: bold number + movement name (Chinese). 
Center: full-body pose (clear joint positioning). 
Bottom left corner: brief technical description (2-3 lines, correct posture cues). 
Overlay: directional arrows showing the path of motion (up/down/arc). 

Correct joint alignment, neutral spine, proper elbow and knee positioning, realistic weight distribution, no exaggerated movements. 

Highly detailed grayscale shading, soft studio lighting, subtle shadows, clean lines, medical/sports science diagram quality. 

Solid white background. 

No color, no background environment, no extra elements, no stylization, no blur.
entries.description: A complex prompt for creating a monochrome, scientifically accurate 2x4 grid fitness chart showing specific exercises with labels and anatomical figures.

entries.title: Chibi Cat Maid Crayon Art Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A warm, nostalgic anime illustration in a childlike crayon-drawing style on textured beige paper, featuring a super-deformed chibi cat-eared maid girl lying on her stomach and drawing in a large spiral sketchbook. She has oversized cat ears, a frilly white maid headband, twin tails, and multicolored hair in bright pastel rainbow sections of pink, blue, yellow, and orange, with large teal-blue eyes and a calm, focused expression. Her black-and-white maid outfit includes bows, lace, puffy sleeves, fluffy cuffs, and tiny decorative clips. She holds a blue crayon and is drawing a simple crayon character on the open sketchbook page. Around her is a messy tabletop or floor covered with colorful crayon scribbles and loose sheets of paper. Include exactly 6 visible crayons scattered around the scene in different colors, with no crayon box packaging prominently shown. On the left, place a small cardboard box containing a sleepy black cat nestled among crayons, and draw a simple cat-face doodle near it. In the lower left foreground, include 1 small toy-like white robot cat figure with blue accents sitting and watching. In the upper right background, hang exactly 2 children's drawings clipped to a string: one with a pink heart and one with a flower and rainbow. On the upper left, add large handwritten Japanese crayon text reading 「完璧じゃなくて いーんだよ! だって、今日の わたしは がんばったもん!」 in multicolored crayon lettering. Use soft lighting, cozy craft-room atmosphere, gentle grain, and intentionally rough waxy crayon texture throughout the entire image. Make it adorable, heartfelt, and handmade-looking, with visible uneven outlines and layered scribbles, but do not show realistic crayons being actively presented to the viewer.

entries.title: Visionary Eye Mandala
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A perfectly centered sacred-geometry mandala on a clean white background, rendered as an ultra-detailed visionary ink-and-pointillism illustration. The composition is radially symmetrical and circular overall, glowing with warm gold, saffron, orange, coral, magenta, violet, and hints of cyan at the core. In the exact center, place a radiant circular nucleus with a bright cyan-blue dot surrounded by concentric rings of pink, magenta, orange, and gold, like a luminous spiritual sun. Around it, build many densely packed concentric bands of tiny jewel-like eyes, bead forms, dots, and filigree, all arranged with precise rotational symmetry. Form a four-point diamond structure around the center, with 4 large petal-like flame clusters pointing up, down, left, and right, and 4 smaller curled spiral clusters in the diagonal quadrants. At the outer cardinal points, include 4 larger almond-shaped eye motifs embedded in feathery golden forms. Across the mandala, include dozens of miniature multicolored eyes set into rings, suggesting omniscient awareness. Use extremely fine stippling, micro-linework, ornate feathered textures, and shimmering decorative detail, with the inner structure predominantly luminous gold and ivory, transitioning to a diffuse halo of violet and lavender stippled particles at the outer edge. The image should feel mystical, transcendent, intricate, balanced, and meditative, like a celestial mandala or visionary sacred emblem, with crisp high-detail line art and soft radiant color blending.

entries.title: Cinematic Wuxia Heroine on Mountain Balcony
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly realistic cinematic CG portrait of a graceful young Chinese wuxia heroine standing on a traditional wooden balcony overlooking misty blue-gray mountain ranges at dawn. She is shown from about mid-thigh up, centered slightly right of frame, with elegant upright posture and both hands gently clasped at her waist. She wears an ornate black silk hanfu-inspired robe with deep red trim and lining, wide flowing sleeves, and intricate gold embroidery featuring 1 large dragon motif on the chest, multiple cloud patterns, and embroidered details along the skirt and sleeves. Her hair is styled in a refined historical updo with 1 decorative floral hairpin cluster and 2 long dangling ornaments, and she wears delicate bracelets and drop earrings. The setting includes 1 curved wooden bench along the balcony railing, 2 large wooden pillars, 1 carved wooden screen panel, and 1 lacquered side table with a guqin placed on top. Soft warm sunrise light comes from the left, creating gentle highlights on the silk fabric and wood, while the distant mountains remain layered in pale atmospheric haze. Emphasize ultra-detailed fabric texture, polished wood, elegant Chinese classical architecture, serene noble mood, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and garment rendering, and a premium historical-drama aesthetic. Use medium full portrait, black and deep red, gold dragon and clouds, sunrise, and misty mountain balcony.

entries.title: Anime Mascots in Supermarket Carts
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bright, polished anime illustration set inside a Japanese supermarket snack aisle, viewed in a wide-angle perspective down the row of shelves. Five shopping carts are lined up diagonally from front left to back right, each cart overflowing with packaged snacks and groceries, and each cart carrying a cute anthropomorphic or costumed character in an energetic pose. In the front cart, a large fluffy tabby cat boy mascot with brown-and-cream striped fur, big golden eyes, a happy open-mouthed smile, and oversized pink paw pads stands with one paw raised toward the viewer; he wears a white hoodie with a black bunny logo and the text "NYA!", black athletic shorts with yellow side stripes, and a small bell collar. In the second cart, a cheerful shiba inu boy with tan-and-cream fur grins and strikes a dab-like pose, wearing a red sleeveless hoodie or vest over a white shirt and black shorts. In the third cart, an orange fox boy with white muzzle and chest stands confidently with arms crossed, eyes closed in a smug smile, sparkling accents around him, wearing a black tracksuit with orange trim and chunky bead accessories. In the fourth cart, a human figure in a light blue hoodie with long white rabbit ears attached raises both hands in peace signs; the face is deliberately blurred or obscured, with dark shorts and a playful pose. In the fifth cart, a small brown bear mascot in a green T-shirt with a bear face graphic and the text "KUMA" throws both arms up excitedly. The supermarket environment is packed with colorful snack boxes and bags on both sides, with glossy tile floors, ceiling lights, and Japanese sale signage hanging overhead. Include exactly 3 large hanging signs: one top left poster reading "新商品! 新商品!" with a cute character illustration, one central aisle marker sign with a big green "2" and category text "スナック菓子 シリアル" and "カップ麺 パン 飲料", and one top right blue-and-red sale poster reading "今がお得! 大感謝セール". Include exactly 1 vertical shelf sign on the left reading "サクサク食感". Add exactly 5 cart price placards visible from front to back: "本日のおすすめ! ポテトチップス 198円 (税込213円)", "特売品! コーンフレーク 158円 (税込173円)", "お買得! カップラーメン 128円 (税込138円)", "ゆめちゃんセール! おべんとう 108円", and "バナナ 88円". Emphasize a fun promotional atmosphere, lively expressions, crisp line art, soft cel shading, highly detailed packaged goods, warm indoor lighting, and a whimsical parade-like composition.

entries.title: Japanese 36,000 Followers Celebration Post
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bold Japanese social-media milestone celebration graphic in a square 1:1 layout, combining a smartphone screenshot and hand-painted calligraphy-style typography. On the left half, show a realistic screenshot of an X profile page in dark mode and white content area, slightly tilted, with the profile name "タツキ|サムネ顧問" and handle "@gibkun1" visible, a blue verification badge, and the follower count circled in thick red marker. The circled count should read 36,004 with a large red arrow pointing toward it. The screenshot should include a profile icon at upper left, Japanese bio text lines, top navigation tabs, and a tweet preview with 4 small glowing thumbnail images near the bottom, evoking an authentic mobile app capture. Across the right half and partially overlapping the screenshot, place huge brush lettering in Japanese that reads "36,000人達成!!" in vivid red and black ink with dramatic white outline and drop shadow, then below it larger expressive black brush lettering reading "本当にありがとう!!" with thick red underline strokes. Add energetic manga-style emphasis lines, starbursts, black speed lines, yellow spark accents, and rough paint textures around the text. Near the bottom right, include a small chibi-style celebratory character with dark curly brown hair, wearing a black hoodie, both fists raised in excitement. The face is intentionally blurred or obscured. Add a white speech bubble next to the character containing the handwritten Japanese text これからもよろしくお願いします!!. Use a high-contrast celebratory thumbnail aesthetic typical of Japanese YouTube and X announcement posts, with layered sticker-like composition, rough ink brushwork, red-black-white-gold color palette, and a loud, emotionally grateful, viral social-media design.
entries.description: A high-energy Japanese social media celebration graphic for announcing a follower milestone, ideal for X, YouTube thumbnails, or creator achievement posts.

entries.title: Japanese Follower Milestone Thank-You Graphic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean celebratory social-media milestone graphic on a soft white background, styled like a screenshot of an X profile page placed on the left and handwritten thank-you lettering on the right. The left side shows a realistic mobile-style profile card for a Japanese creator account with a dark banner image at the top featuring dramatic white brush-calligraphy Japanese text, a circular profile icon overlapping the banner, the display name "タッキ | サムネ顧問" with a blue verification badge, the handle @gibkun1, and several lines of Japanese bio text in a standard app UI font. Include small profile metadata lines such as birth date and join date, then a stats row where the follower count is the focal point: "36,004 フォロワー" circled in red. Below that, show the profile navigation tabs with exactly 7 labels: ポスト, 返信, ハイライト, 動画, 画像, 記事, いいね. Under the tabs, include one visible post preview with a small avatar, Japanese post text, and a 2 by 2 image grid containing 4 warm glowing abstract thumbnail images in black, gold, and orange tones. On the right side, create large casual handwritten Japanese text in black reading "36,000人 達成しました" with a pale yellow highlight under the number and a red underline beneath the second line, plus 3 small red celebratory accent marks above the number. Add a thick hand-drawn red arrow pointing from the right-side message toward the circled follower count on the profile screenshot. Beneath that, place another handwritten message reading "ありがとう ございます!" with a soft pink underline, and in the lower right add smaller handwritten text reading "これからも 有益な情報を お届けしていきます!" followed by a simple smiling face doodle and 2 small pink sparkle doodles. The overall composition should feel like a polished appreciation post made from a screenshot and marker annotations, with subtle drop shadow around the screenshot card, balanced spacing, crisp Japanese typography in the UI, and expressive brush-pen handwriting for the celebratory notes.
entries.description: This generates a clean social-media celebration image showing an X profile screenshot with annotated handwritten Japanese text, ideal for milestone announcements and follower thank-you posts.

entries.title: Ethereal Buddhist Pure Land scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
The Western Paradise (also known as the Western Pure Land, Sukhavati) is the Buddha-land of Amitabha (Infinite Life Buddha). Its core characteristic is the absence of all suffering and the experience of only joy, in stark contrast to our 'enduring' (Saha) world. Located in the west of our world, ten trillion Buddha-lands away (Amitabha Sutra).

Main Buddha: Amitabha Buddha (Infinite Light, Infinite Life), who constantly preaches the Dharma; flanked by Avalokiteshvara Bodhisattva and Mahasthamaprapta Bodhisattva, collectively known as the 'Three Sages of the West'.

Land Environment: Adorned with Seven Treasures, flawless.
Ground: Gold as the ground, flat, soft, bright, and clean, without mountains, rivers, ravines, thorns, or stones.
Seven Treasure Ponds and Eight Merit Waters: Seven treasure ponds everywhere (gold, silver, lapis lazuli, crystal, tridacna, red pearl, agate). The water possesses eight merits: sweet, cold, soft, light, clear, fragrant, thirst-quenching, and heart-nourishing. Golden sand at the bottom, seven-treasure pathways, and lotuses in the pond as large as wheels, emitting blue, yellow, red, and white light.
Architecture: Seven-treasure pavilions, palaces, and lecture halls, floating in the air, changing size at will, transparent and bright, countless times better than the heavenly realms.
Precious Trees and Heavenly Music: Seven rows of trees, seven rows of railings, seven rows of nets, all made of four treasures. The wind blows through the trees and nets, producing subtle Dharma sounds like hundreds of thousands of instruments playing together, naturally leading listeners to mindfulness of Buddha, Dharma, and Sangha.
Climate and Heavenly Rain: No heat or cold, no wind or rain, always mild and comfortable; Mandarava flowers rain down from the sky six times a day and night, fragrant and colorful.
Marvelous Birds: White cranes, peacocks, parrots, Kalavinkas, etc., all manifested by the Buddha to produce harmonious sounds proclaiming the Dharma.

Sentient Beings: No suffering, only joy, infinite lifespan.
Rebirth: Beings are born from lotus flowers in the seven treasure ponds, not from parents, free from the suffering of birth, aging, sickness, and death.
Appearance: Purple-gold bodies, majestic and solemn, similar to Amitabha Buddha; possessing five supernatural powers: heavenly eye, heavenly ear, telepathy, past-life recall, and spiritual travel, free and unobstructed.
Lifespan: Immeasurable kalpas, nearly eternal, without early death or aging.
Nature: All are superior good people, free from greed, anger, ignorance, jealousy, or conflict; compassionate, equal, wise, and pure, constantly hearing the Dharma.
Life: Clothing and food manifest naturally without labor; in the morning, one can visit ten trillion Buddha-lands to offer to Buddhas and return by mealtime.

Time and Space: Infinite and Eternal.
Time: No day or night, no months or years, eternal happiness; the world does not undergo the changes of formation, existence, decay, and void.
Space: Vast and boundless, never crowded even with beings from all ten directions; a single grain of dust can contain three thousand great worlds.
entries.description: A highly detailed prompt describing the Western Pure Land (Sukhavati) with golden ground, lotus ponds, and divine architecture.
