entries.title: Abstract Chaos Character Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
# Art that reveals a character's face from a chaotic collection of notes and symbols

---

## Style
- Mass of handwritten notes, formulas, symbols, and random lines in black ink on white paper.
- Scribbled chaos scattered across the paper.
- Sporadic emphasis using red ink (lines, fills, marker-like blobs).
- Texture of analog notebook doodles.

---

## Composition
- Random notes and symbols cover the entire area.
- The density of black ink lines and characters concentrates on the position of the "character's face."
- As a result, the silhouette and expression of the given character's face faintly emerge from the chaos.
- The face is not realistic but formed by a collection of chaotic fragments.

---

## Color Palette
- Mainly monochrome (black and white).
- red ink placed sporadically as an accent.
- Low saturation, emphasizing the feel of analog paper and ink.

---

## Expressive Elements
- Mixed strings of semi-readable Japanese, English, and numbers.
- Mathematical symbols, arrows, dots, slashes, crosses, and ink drips.
- The outlines of the face, eyes, and hair emerge from the "negative space" and "shading" of the symbol placement.

---

## Prohibitions
- Direct, realistic portraits.
- Digitally processed, orderly geometric patterns.
- Colorful or oversaturated expressions.
- Logos, watermarks, or artificial CG aesthetics.

---

## Definition of Done (DoD)
- The whole piece works as a "chaotic collection of notes and symbols."
- The provided character's face naturally emerges from the density and arrangement of chaos.
- Colors are monochrome + red accent only.
- Maintains the hand-drawn texture of paper and ink.
entries.description: A highly detailed structured prompt that transforms a character image into abstract art composed of notes and symbols.

entries.title: Childlike Watercolor and Crayon Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the uploaded image as the reference image. Preserve its structure, framing, and main visual information.

Recreate the provided image as a realistic handmade artwork by a clever 10-year-old child.

Keep the original image's main layout, composition, and recognizable content, but transform the entire scene into a 10-year-old child's watercolor marker drawing mixed with crayon strokes and paper collage craft.

The image should be placed on a clean white paper background. Make it look genuinely handmade, with wobbly outlines, simple shapes, uneven coloring, visible watercolor marker texture, waxy crayon strokes, cut-paper edges, slight glue marks, layered paper pieces, imperfect proportions, and charming childlike details.

Do not use the original color palette. Replace it with bright rainbow colors, soft pastel tones, playful candy colors, and cheerful handmade craft colors.

Add whimsical childlike decorations naturally around the scene: castles, fairy-tale towers, candy, lollipops, stars, smiling clouds, rainbows, hearts, flowers, sparkles, planets, stickers, and random doodles.

Also add fantasy and sci-fi paper-collage characters as if the child added them for fun: a brave armored hero, a silly evil villain, a colorful mecha robot, a cute monster, a floating UFO, friendly little aliens, a lovely princess, and a fun spaceship flying through the sky.

All visible text should be redrawn as childlike handwriting, as if written by a 10-year-old using crayons and watercolor markers. The handwriting should be uneven, slightly messy, cute, naive, with inconsistent letter sizes, irregular spacing, playful wobble, and imperfect alignment.

The final image should feel realistic, smart, imaginative, innocent, colorful, and full of childlike creativity - like a charming school art project made with watercolor markers, crayons, scissors, glue, and colorful paper.
entries.description: A prompt that recreates an uploaded image as a charming 10-year-old's art project featuring watercolors, crayons, and paper collage elements.

entries.title: Retro Sci-Fi Casualty Desk Front Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A retro-futurist black-and-white sci-fi newspaper front page designed like a casualty report bulletin, with a distressed paper texture, halftone grain, thin technical border lines, and a slightly worn photocopied print look. The layout is a single printed page in landscape orientation with a bold masthead tab at the top reading CASUALTY DESK. On the left third of the page, a huge condensed all-caps headline in heavy sans-serif type reads TWENTY-FIVE HULLS LOST AS THREE GARRISONS HOLD THEIR LINES, stacked across 5 lines. Beneath it are 2 dense newspaper-style body text blocks in narrow columns of small monospaced or typewriter-like text, with a few bolded ship and faction names embedded in the copy. The article text should feel like military logistics reporting from an interstellar war, mentioning exact times, sectors, casualties, garrisons, probes, toll positions, and damaged ships. The right two-thirds of the page is a detailed monochrome ink illustration: in the upper right sky, 1 enormous wedge-shaped capital ship or dreadnought hovers diagonally from left-lower side toward right-upper side, covered in layered armor panels, antennae, gantries, and dense structural detailing. Below it, occupying the lower right half, is 1 industrial checkpoint or garrison gate spanning a wide road or landing lane, built from brutalist sci-fi frames, vertical pylons, gantry towers, and utility structures, with perspective lines drawing the eye toward the center distance. Add 1 small mid-distance flying craft near the horizon under the gate. In the far right background, include 1 cluster of tall refinery-like towers and industrial buildings. Overlay faint hexagonal grid motifs on the upper right and lower right background, subtle and partially faded into the paper texture. Use only grayscale tones, black ink linework, etched concept-art hatching, and newspaper-print contrast. The overall mood is bleak, militarized, archival, and editorial, like a war correspondent page from a far-future space empire newspaper.
entries.description: This generates a monochrome futuristic war-news front page with a bold casualty headline and detailed starship-industrial illustration, ideal for worldbuilding editorials or sci-fi propaganda design.

entries.title: Scribbly Pencil Mountain Landscape
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A monochrome pencil sketch landscape drawn in a loose scribbly hand on white paper, with visible graphite texture, rough hatching, and expressive crosshatched shading. Show a peaceful rural valley scene with 1 large leafy tree dominating the right foreground, its trunk dark and textured and its canopy made of sketchy clustered marks. A narrow dirt road begins near the bottom center and curves gently into the middle distance toward 1 small farmhouse with a pitched roof placed left of center. Add 1 line of fence posts with wire running alongside the road in the left foreground, low grasses and bushes around the roadside, and scattered shrubs and trees near the house. In the background, draw a range of layered mountains with the tallest peak left of center, softly shaded with diagonal pencil strokes. Include a lightly sketched sky with 2 large clouds and 3 tiny birds in flight. Keep the composition airy, pastoral, and hand-drawn, with natural perspective, unfinished sketch energy, and no color, as if from a casual landscape sketchbook study.

entries.title: Muscle Lobster Spinach Comic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage single-panel comic illustration in a mid-century newspaper-cartoon style, showing an anthropomorphic red lobster standing on a wooden dock by the sea and posing like a bodybuilder. The lobster is the only character and fills most of the frame, facing slightly left with an angry, proud expression, narrowed eyes, long curved antennae, whisker-like mouth feelers, huge exaggerated claws, an enormous hyper-muscular torso, oversized biceps, thick chest, and a sharply defined six-pack and obliques. One claw is raised in a flexing pose near a large speech bubble. The speech bubble in the upper left contains exactly this hand-lettered text in bold black comic lettering: "I YAM WHAT I YAM! and I YAM RIPPED!" with "RIPPED!" emphasized larger and underlined. At the lobster's feet, slightly left of center, place 1 opened can labeled "SPINACH" with green spinach visible inside and the lid peeled back. The dock includes 1 wooden mooring post wrapped with rope on the far left. In the background, show calm blue water, a bright blue sky, and 4 fluffy white clouds spread across the top area. On the far right background across the water, include 1 small cannery or factory building on pilings with a sign reading "SPINACH" and 2 smokestacks, one releasing a puff of gray smoke. Render it with flat comic colors, bold black outlines, slightly aged paper texture, light ink imperfections, and a humorous parody tone reminiscent of 1930s-1950s Popeye-era animation art.
entries.description: This prompt generates a humorous retro comic-style illustration of a hyper-muscular lobster on a dock bragging about being ripped after eating spinach, ideal for parody cartoon art.

entries.title: Cinematic Storyboard: The Mountain Troll
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Storyboard - colored. The troll is walking alone in the mountains, through snow and wind. He gets back home to his cave, all exhausted. The troll spots a tiny flower in a beam of light on a ridge outside the cave. Add a shot where focus is on the flower, then focus shifts to the troll and he says "what is this?" in a deep troll voice. He goes in really close and sniffs. He smiles and picks up the little flower, including the dirt around it. Ensure shots are cinematic and have great composition. We don't need the troll in every shot. Include text and instructions.

entries.title: Anime Rapunzel Tower Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A whimsical anime fairytale illustration of Rapunzel leaning out from a high stone tower window, viewed from outside at a slightly elevated angle. She wears a soft lavender medieval-inspired princess dress with puff sleeves, white lace trim, and a fitted bodice, plus a pink-and-white bunny ear headband. Her extremely long dark brown hair is styled into a single enormous thick braid that spills over the windowsill and drops straight down the full height of the image. A small fluffy white rabbit sits on her right shoulder, adding a cute fantasy touch. The tower is pale beige stone with a rounded balcony-like window ledge, an arched opening, deep purple interior curtains, and green ivy climbing around the walls and window frame. In the background, show a bright sunlit storybook landscape with a vivid blue sky, scattered white clouds, rolling green hills, a winding river, a stone bridge with 3 arches, and a distant European-style town with a castle or cathedral. The mood is triumphant, charming, and magical, like a polished high-end fantasy anime key visual. Detailed painterly rendering, soft natural daylight, clean linework, gentle atmospheric perspective, lush foliage, elegant composition, vertical format.

entries.title: Ink-Wash Warrior Riding a Tiger
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical Chinese ink-wash fantasy painting on warm off-white rice paper, combining monumental calligraphy with a heroic figure scene. On the right side, a lone ancient warrior in ornate dark robes and layered black armor sits astride a large tiger on the edge of a jagged cliff, both shown in three-quarter back view facing left toward the open landscape. The warrior wears a flowing cape and long ribbon streamers whipping in the wind, and raises a straight sword vertically so that it becomes a brilliant pillar of golden-white light piercing upward into dense storm clouds. The tiger is powerfully built, realistic, alert, and richly detailed with bold stripes, white fur accents, and ceremonial cloth and tack with subtle gold ornament. The sky is filled with smoky gray ink clouds, softly blooming washes, and scattered gold flecks around the glowing sword beam. Below and to the left, a misty shanshui landscape opens into distant mountains, river water, tiny tree clusters, and layered atmospheric haze rendered in pale gray ink. On the left half of the composition, include 2 large vertical columns of expressive black brush-calligraphy in Chinese, bold and irregular, occupying most of the height; add 1 narrower vertical line of smaller calligraphy beside them and 4 red seal stamps total, with 2 small seals near the smaller inscription, 1 seal near the upper right edge, and 1 double-stacked red seal at the lower left. Emphasize high contrast between empty paper space and dark ink masses, literati painting aesthetics, sweeping brush energy, epic martial grandeur, and a subtle modern fantasy finish with restrained metallic gold highlights.

entries.title: Black-and-White Wartime Ink Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic black-and-white ink-wash wartime illustration in a vertical composition, combining realistic World War II imagery with abstract splattered brushwork on a mostly white background. Show 4 soldiers total advancing from the left toward the center and distance: 1 large foreground soldier seen from behind on a rocky ledge, wearing a steel helmet, heavy pack, and carrying a rifle with bayonet, plus 3 smaller soldiers in a staggered line behind him moving toward the right. In the sky, show 5 warplanes flying overhead through thick smoke. On the right side, place a steep rocky island or coastal cliff with a ruined fortress or castle on top, with smoke rising around it. Below, depict a rough sea crashing against dark rocks and a narrow shoreline with tiny landing figures near the water. Use explosive black ink splashes, soot clouds, scratches, drips, and painterly debris to merge the soldiers, cliffs, and surf into one expressive composition. High contrast monochrome, misty atmosphere, desaturated grayscale only, cinematic and haunting, with lots of negative space and a fine-art concept-art feel.

entries.title: Epic Narrative Silhouette Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Automatically generate a collector's edition epic narrative poster based on Dream of the Red Chamber. Use a giant, elegant silhouette of Lin Daiyu's profile as the outer outline. Inside the silhouette, let the complete world-building, iconic scenes, character relationships, symbolic icons, key architecture, creatures, props, and atmosphere most relevant to the theme grow naturally. This is not a simple collage but a high-end silhouette-filling narrative synthesis with double-exposure associations, enhanced for cinematic narrative expression and spatial choreography. A fusion of movie poster style and Eastern realist aesthetics, emphasizing realistic physical light and shadow, camera language, spatial depth, and narrative hierarchy. Lighting uses cinematic rim lighting with local warm accents, with restrained and realistic cool-warm contrast, adding volumetric light and light mist to enhance the sense of space. Textures should be realistic (architecture, silk, skin, stone), avoiding pure painterly strokes, retaining soft atmospheric perspective but optimized for cinematic depth of field and focus control. Fine film grain, with edge brushstrokes modified into soft cinematic transitions, large areas of negative space, and a refined, high-end layout. Quiet, grand, restrained, and infused with a strong sense of fatalism typical of Eastern cinematic storytelling. All elements must be strongly bound to the theme for instant recognition, avoiding clutter, hard collages, templated backgrounds, or cheap fantasy assets.
entries.description: A complex structural prompt that uses a character's silhouette as a container for an entire world-building scene, focusing on narrative depth and Eastern realism.

entries.title: 3D Papercut Pirate Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Eye-level view, looking straight at a high-saturation 3D multi-layered paper carving scene. The overall colors are grayish-blue, creamy white, and deep forest green, accented with amber warm light. All elements must be physical paper layered structures, with hard-cut edges and clearly visible thick paper cross-sections. Extremely rich composition, a high-energy pirate group scene set in a chaotic sea adventure. Multiple stylized pirate characters are presented in exaggerated actions, with a young captain wearing a straw hat in the middle layer charging forward, surrounded by crew members with distinct poses. Layered ships, surging waves, and swirling currents run through the foreground, middle, and background, with multiple ships colliding and tilting in different spatial layers, sails torn, and flags flying. Silhouettes of giant opposing characters appear in the background layer to enhance the sense of oppression and spatial hierarchy. The foreground is filled with narrative elements: treasure chests, gold coins, maps, barrels, ropes, lanterns, and a wanted poster with a smiling pirate. entries.title: Anime Martial Arts Energy Clash
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic anime action illustration inside a traditional wooden martial arts hall, captured at a low angle with intense cinematic perspective. In the foreground, a fierce young female martial artist with black hair in a messy high bun tied with red ribbons lunges forward in a deep fighting stance, one fist thrust toward the viewer. She wears a white Chinese-style kung fu top with red trim and tassel frog closures, wide red pants, and black martial arts shoes with red accents. Her expression is focused, aggressive, and determined, with sharp red-tinted eyes. Red energy ribbons and paint-like light trails spiral around her body and punch, scattering sparks and embers. In the upper right, a second young female fighter leaps through the air, partially turned sideways, wearing a dark green qipao-inspired combat dress with ornate gold embroidery, black stockings, and heeled shoes. Her lavender hair is styled in two buns with loose curls and decorative hair ornaments. She casts a martial arts gesture with one hand extended, surrounded by a sweeping arc of luminous blue water-like energy that curves around her body in a near-complete ring. The two elemental forces, red and blue, contrast sharply and imply an imminent clash. The environment is a weathered dojo interior with broken wooden floorboards exploding upward, dust, splinters, and motion debris frozen midair. Warm shafts of light stream through the wooden structure and windows, mixing with glowing particles. Large hanging calligraphy signs are visible, including a central wooden plaque reading 武術会, with additional vertical banners bearing black Chinese characters on aged paper. Highly detailed anime illustration, dynamic foreshortening, extreme motion, layered effects, rich textures, dramatic rim lighting, fiery warm highlights against cool blue energy, polished concept art quality, vertical composition.

entries.title: Mecha Ink Wash Landscape Painting
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A traditional Chinese ink wash landscape painting featuring a giant mecha integrated into the misty mountains. The mecha, resembling Evangelion Unit-01, features a purple and green color scheme with a prominent horn and the number "01" on its shoulder. Its massive form dissolves into expressive, dripping black ink washes, seamlessly blending into the rocky mountain formations. The surrounding landscape includes steep, jagged peaks painted with teal and green washes, cascading waterfalls, ancient pine trees, and small traditional pavilions perched on the cliffs. A flock of birds flies through the dense fog filling the valleys. In the top left corner, vertical traditional Chinese calligraphy reads 初號機 followed by 人之造物 亦為山水, accompanied by a red artist seal stamp. Another red seal is stamped in the bottom right corner. The entire artwork is rendered on textured, aged rice paper, utilizing dynamic brushstrokes and atmospheric perspective typical of classical Shan shui art.

In the foreground on the left, a large black bear is walking past, appearing slightly motion-blurred. In the center of the clearing, there is a perfectly circular, dark, barren patch of dirt on the forest floor. Hovering just above the ground at the far edge of this dark circle is a bright, glowing, spherical orb of light. The image features a grainy night vision aesthetic with visible underbrush, pine tree trunks, and a tree stump in the bottom right corner. A black data bar runs across the bottom edge containing white text: on the far left, an oval logo reading "RECONYX", followed by the timestamp "03:14:22 11-OCT-2023", then "TEMP: 4°C", and on the far right, "TRIGGER: MOTION DUAL TRIGGER".
entries.description: Generates a spooky, infrared trail camera image featuring wildlife, a mysterious glowing orb, and realistic camera data overlays.

entries.title: Cozy Farming Village Pixel Asset Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a clean reusable 2D pixel-art game asset sheet for a cozy farming village tileset, labeled and organized on a plain white background. Use crisp 32-bit style pixel art, orthographic/front-facing RPG perspective, consistent scale, soft outlines, warm saturated colors, and no shadows outside the sprites. Theme: cozy farming village.

Canvas: Landscape asset sheet, 4:3 ratio, white background, neatly spaced rows and columns. Add small green sprout icons before each section label. Use dark pixel-font labels in English.

Layout and required sections:
- HOUSES: exactly 5 small cottage buildings, each front-facing with different roof colors and details: 1 blue-roof cottage, 1 golden-yellow roof cottage, 1 green roof cottage with planter boxes, 1 orange-red roof cottage with flowers, 1 purple roof cottage with flowers.
- SHOP: exactly 1 shop building with a purple roof, striped purple awning, hanging sign reading "SHOP", flower pots, and a small sidewalk sign.
- BARN: exactly 1 red barn with orange roof, large double doors, side hardware, and one hay pile.
- FARM PLOTS: exactly 3 fenced rectangular farm plots: 1 planted vegetable plot with greens, wheat, and root crops; 1 tilled plot with small sprouts; 1 empty tilled soil plot.
- SOIL TILES: exactly 8 square terrain tiles in a 2-row grid: 4 plain tiles on the top row, showing dark soil, medium dirt, light sand, and grass; 4 planted or transition tiles on the bottom row, showing seeded soil variations and a dirt-to-grass transition.
- TREES: exactly 4 leafy fruit/deciduous trees: 1 round dark green tree, 1 larger bright green tree, 1 smaller yellow-green tree, and 1 apple tree with red fruit.
- BUSHES: exactly 3 round bushes: 1 plain green bush, 1 flowering bush with pale blossoms, 1 berry bush with red berries.
- SPECIAL TREE: exactly 1 palm tree with a curved brown trunk and green fronds.
- LOGS & STUMPS: exactly 5 items: 1 long log, 1 cut log, 1 hollow log, 1 large stump, 1 small sprouting stump.
- BEACH PROPS: exactly 5 items: 1 red-and-white beach umbrella, 1 blue striped lounge chair, 1 pink starfish, 1 pink shell, 1 beige shell.
- FLOWERS: exactly 6 small flower sprites: white daisies, yellow flowers, pink flowers, orange-red flowers, purple lavender, and a pink tulip.
- VILLAGE PROPS: exactly 18 village objects in two rows: wooden signpost, lantern post, mailbox, chalkboard sign, wooden crate, barrel, burlap sack, flower pot, wooden bench, stone well, bucket, produce cart, clay pot, flower planter box, round flower planter, market stall, blue-checkered table with flowers, and another lantern post.
- FARM PROPS: exactly 9 farm objects: hay bale, blue water trough, hay cart, short wooden fence segment, milk can, pitchfork, shovel, blue watering can, and long wooden planter box.
- SMALL DETAILS: exactly 12 ground-detail sprites: 4 rocks, 1 tiny sprout, 1 tall reed clump, 1 grass tuft, 1 red mushroom cluster, 1 yellow flower patch, 1 white flower patch, 1 lily pad, and 1 lily pad with pink water lily.
- FENCES: exactly 4 fence sprites: rail fence, vertical plank fence, rope-post fence, and short gate/fence section.

Visual style: cute high-quality pixel art game tileset. Keep every asset isolated, centered in its own space, and ready to cut out for game use. Use consistent outlines, consistent lighting from upper left, and no overlapping sprites. Text labels should use a pixel font with the section names exactly as listed. Avoid extra decorative background elements, watermarks, mockup UI, or perspective distortions.
entries.description: Generates a neatly labeled pixel-art tileset sheet of houses, farm plots, terrain tiles, trees, props, and details for a cozy farming game.

entries.title: Retro Pixel Space Shooter Sprites
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a clean sprite-sheet style asset image for a vertical retro pixel-art space shooter, on a plain white background with no grid and no labels. Show exactly 11 separate pixel-art spaceship and power-up sprites arranged in three rows, all with crisp black outlines, high-contrast shading, metallic panels, tiny vents, glowing cores, and 16-bit arcade detailing. Use a saturated sci-fi palette dominated by deep violet purple, teal/cyan, dark navy, black, gold/orange armor accents, and neon green energy lights.

Layout: top row contains exactly 3 large player/enemy ships: left is a small blue-white-and-gold triangular fighter with three bright cyan engine flames; center is the largest wide boss ship, symmetrical and heavily armored, purple and teal with multiple wing spikes, twin side cannons, gold trim, and a large glowing green hexagonal reactor in the middle; right is a tall vertical purple capital ship with pointed nose, side fins, teal panels, gold details, and a glowing green central reactor. Middle row contains exactly 4 medium enemy ships: a crescent-shaped teal and purple craft with two upward curved horns and a green cockpit glow; a compact rear-view purple winged fighter with side thrusters; a squat central gunship with teal cockpit dome, purple wings, gold barrels, and twin cannons; a broad purple bomber with swept wings, side engine pods, and a large dark central intake. Bottom row contains exactly 4 small collectible or module sprites: two square neon-green reactor power-up tiles with beveled purple/teal/gold frames, followed by two identical small cylindrical engine or booster pods with teal top caps, purple bodies, gold front panels, black exhausts, and tiny side fins.

Style constraints: production-ready pixel art, orthographic/top-down view, transparent-asset feel but rendered on white, sharp square pixels, no anti-aliased painterly look, no text, no watermark, no shadows beyond pixel-art contact shading, consistent scale hierarchy and spacing, like a polished mobile shoot'em-up tileset.
entries.description: A structured prompt for generating a production-ready pixel-art sprite sheet of spaceships and power-ups for a vertical mobile shoot'em-up game.

entries.title: Retro Space Shooter VFX Sprite Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a clean white-background production asset sheet for a vertical retro pixel-art space shooter, showing separate glowing projectile, explosion, pickup, asteroid, and particle-effect sprites in a consistent 2D pixel-art style.

Canvas: Square 1:1 sprite sheet, about 768×768 px, pure white background, no grid, no labels, no borders, sprites evenly spaced in horizontal rows with transparent-looking whitespace around each asset.

Visual style: High-resolution retro pixel art with crisp edges, neon glow, saturated colors, arcade shoot'em-up VFX, black or dark outlines only where needed, additive bloom-like halos, no text.

Color palette: Use three main energy colors: electric cyan, magenta violet, and lime green, plus orange/yellow fire for explosions and gray-brown rocks for asteroids.

Layout and exact asset count: Arrange exactly 103 visible sprites in 8 rows. Row 1: 17 cyan player-shot sprites, including tiny bullets, small teardrop shots, medium diamonds, paired vertical bolts, triple clusters, grouped shard volleys, three narrow exclamation-like bolts, two long laser beams, one large missile-like glowing spear, and two cyan starburst impact flashes. Row 2: 16 purple enemy-shot sprites, including small round bullets, larger orbs, a thin diamond bolt, paired bolts, triple grouped bolts, clustered shards, three vertical capsules, three single vertical bolts, and two purple starburst impacts. Row 3: 16 green enemy-shot sprites matching the purple row types: small diamonds, larger diamonds, a bright spear bolt, paired bolts, triple grouped bolts, clustered shards, three capsules, three single vertical bolts, and two green starburst impacts. Row 4: 15 special energy sprites: three circular neon orbs in cyan, purple, and green; three larger cracked plasma orbs in cyan, purple, and green; three vertical ground-strike laser columns in cyan, purple, and green with splashing bases; one solid cyan vertical beam; and three droplet-over-ring portal effects in cyan, purple, and green. Row 5: 9 explosion and impact sprites: five orange fire explosions decreasing from very large to tiny, followed by four purple electric impact bursts decreasing from medium to tiny plus a small diamond sparkle at the end. Row 6: 10 gameplay objects and small shots: one green health pickup icon with a white plus sign, one green mechanical power-up module, one dark spiked mine, four orange arrow/fireball projectile frames facing right, and three purple homing/particle projectile clusters. Row 7: 10 asteroid/debris sprites: six rocky asteroids decreasing from large to pebble size, followed by four broken debris clusters of scattered rock fragments. Row 8: 10 particle sparkle clusters: two cyan sparkle clusters, two purple sparkle clusters, two green sparkle clusters, two orange sparkle clusters, and two sparse orange trailing sparkle clusters.

Subject details: Make the projectiles readable as individual game sprites, each centered in its own whitespace area. Energy bullets should be symmetrical, vertically oriented where appropriate, and glow softly. Explosions should use layered yellow cores, orange petals, red outlines, and scattered sparks. Asteroids should be irregular dark rock forms with pixel highlights and shadows. Pickups should be bolder and more icon-like than projectiles.

Constraints: Generate only the sprite sheet assets, not a gameplay screenshot. No background scene, no UI, no characters, no ships, no typography, no watermark. Keep every asset isolated and production-ready for cutting into tiles or sprites.
entries.description: Generates a white-background pixel-art asset sheet of projectiles, explosions, pickups, asteroids, and particle effects for building a mobile vertical shoot'em up.

entries.title: Professional 2D Perler Bead Pattern Design
entries.author: YouMind

entries.title: Stylized Baba Yaga Hut

entries.title: Retro Pixel Cat Game Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the cat and the office-desk setting into a retro 16-bit side-scrolling video game mock poster. Keep the reference cat recognizable as the main character, but redraw everything in detailed pixel art. Build a vertical poster composition with 1 large title at the top reading "CAT QUEST", 1 subtitle ribbon reading "ADVENTURE", 1 HUD row beneath it showing 4 elements: a 1UP icon, a heart counter marked "x3", a horizontal status bar, and a stage/score display reading "Q-1 0750". Turn the reference office scene into a 2-level platform stage using the desk, laptop, charts, books, plant, and room decor as game-environment props. Show 2 playable-cat sprite poses total, one on the upper platform and one on the lower platform, both side-view walking/running. Add 2 gray mouse enemies, one on each platform. Add collectible coin effects around the upper platform and a small question-block style item on the lower platform. At the bottom, include 3 stacked menu buttons labeled "EXPLORE", "COLLECT", and "LEVEL UP!", plus 1 footer tagline reading "AN EPIC RETRO PLATFORMING ADVENTURE!". Use a worn printed-game-poster look with distressed edges, warm arcade colors, and a nostalgic console-game cover aesthetic.

entries.title: UR Ice Priestess Fantasy Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A highly detailed fantasy collectible card illustration in a premium Japanese mobile RPG style, vertical trading-card layout with an ornate gold filigree frame, icy blue jewel accents, and a polished dark navy UI. The main artwork shows SERA, a divine northern priestess-warrior standing in the center foreground in a heroic full-body pose, facing forward. She wears elaborate silver-and-white ceremonial armor with engraved metalwork, fur-trimmed pauldrons, layered white fabric panels, translucent icy crystal decorations, and glowing blue gem insets. She has a very long thick blonde braid draped over the front, pale skin, and a regal, stoic expression. In her right hand she holds a long elegant ice-forged sword angled downward. Behind and beside her is a gigantic guardian tiger with white fur, dark stripes, glowing cyan eyes, and massive jagged blue crystal growths along its head, shoulders, and forelegs, posed protectively and aggressively. The background is a frozen celestial palace landscape with towering ice spires, crystalline architecture, snow particles, cold blue light, and branching lightning across a stormy night sky. The palette is dominated by white, silver, sapphire blue, cyan glow, and gold trim, with extreme detail, crisp linework, luminous magical effects, dramatic contrast, and gacha-game rarity card rendering.

Include exact card UI elements integrated into the image: at the top center a black-and-gold title plaque reading "神異 - Divine Anomaly -"; at top left a huge iridescent gold rarity emblem reading "UR" with 8 gold stars directly beneath it. At the lower center, a large black-and-gold nameplate reading "セラ / SERA" and a subtitle beneath it reading "北の都の巫女 / Priestess of the Northern Capital". Above the bottom stats bar, include 4 rectangular information panels in a 2x2 arrangement with circular icons at the left of each panel: panel 1 label "属性 / Attribute" with value "金・氷・雷" and English line "METAL + ICE + THUNDER"; panel 2 label "守護神 / Guardian Deity" with value "雷晶虎 / Thunder Crystal Tiger"; panel 3 label "役割 / Role" with value "殲滅・制圧 / Attack Control"; panel 4 label "スキル / Skill" with value "零界断罪 / Absolute Zero Verdict". At the very bottom, a 5-part stat bar with icon, label, and value for exactly these stats from left to right: "ATK 980", "DEF 870", "SPD 760", "MAG 930", "SUP 620". Keep all typography elegant, embossed, and high-fantasy, with bilingual Japanese and English text, glossy card-game finish, symmetrical composition, and luxurious premium card presentation.

entries.title: Traditional Chinese Ink Illustration Style
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
[Character/Theme] = Master Yi Xuan from Zenless Zone Zero.
A colorful East Asian calligraphic linear figure illustration, based on a white-drawing (baimiao) skeleton where line-drawing dominates the form, with freehand-style light coloring. Ink lines from a calligraphy brush, utilizing mixed-hair brush strokes, centered brushwork, with some flying white (feibai) created by side-brushing to achieve a dry-brush texture. Hair is drawn with fine, gossamer lines. The outlines are open with intermittent double lines, creating a play between void and solid. Large areas of negative space on a white paper background. Transparent watercolor glazing, light ink washing, with partial boneless-style coloring. The color layers are transparent and the color blocks are pure with soft edges. Minimal shading, scattered lighting, weak contrast, and flattened coloring. The character is drawn strictly according to original designs for clothing, hairstyle, and accessories, avoiding generic Hanfu templates to preserve the character's unique logic. Hand structures are accurate with five complete and clear fingers, natural joints, and elegant gestures. Fully colored with unified and clear tones for skin, hair, clothing, and accessories.
entries.description: A detailed artistic prompt for generating traditional East Asian line-art illustrations with ink brush strokes and light watercolor washes, applied to a game character.

entries.title: Black Myth Guan Yu Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Epic dark-fantasy poster of Guan Yu reimagined in the style of a mythic action game hero, full-body low-angle composition, towering and dominant in the center, wearing elaborate ancient Chinese battle armor in aged gold and deep green with dragon and beast motifs, massive engraved shoulder guard shaped like a roaring creature, layered lamellar plates, ornate belt clasp, long black hair streaming violently in the wind, and a weathered green headscarf. He holds a long polearm upright in one hand with a dark shaft and red tassel near the blade, while the other hand presents a huge ornate guandao with an intricately carved golden hilt and a broad curved steel blade angled toward the viewer. A huge glowing full moon forms a halo directly behind his head, with a ring of faint ancient Chinese calligraphy arcing around it. Flowing crimson cape and shredded red cloth ribbons whip across the scene, creating strong diagonal motion. The environment is a smoky infernal battlefield with storm clouds, drifting ash, glowing embers, molten red light near the ground, jagged rocks, and colossal shadowy statues or demonic forms emerging in the background. Color palette of burnished gold, ember orange, blood red, charcoal black, and deep jade green. Hyper-detailed cinematic lighting, dramatic rim light from the moon, high contrast, volumetric smoke, richly textured metal, cloth, and hair, ultra-detailed fantasy concept art, premium video game key art, vertical poster design. Include 4 visible text groups integrated like a movie/game poster: the top arched Chinese text around the moon, a mid-lower title line reading "黑神话", an oversized gold brush-calligraphy main title reading "关公", and a bottom tagline line in smaller Chinese characters with a circular emblem at the center.

entries.title: Dragon Queen in Black and Gold
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A majestic high-fantasy illustration of a regal dragon queen standing on the edge of a cliff, shown in full body and side profile facing left. She has silver-white hair flowing in long layered strands far past her waist, a calm stern expression, and an elaborate crown-like headdress with multiple long horn-shaped golden spines sweeping backward. Her outfit is an ornate fusion of royal gown and armored bodysuit in black, ivory, and antique gold, covered with intricate filigree, vine-like gilded tracery, and elegant cracked-marble style patterns. The costume has 4 major visible garment elements: a fitted black-and-ivory armored torso, a long layered split skirt with flowing panels, a dark sweeping cape with gold trim, and thigh-high fitted leg armor or boots. She holds 1 long ceremonial sword planted vertically at her side, slim and highly decorative. Behind and around her rises the silhouette of 1 enormous black dragon with a long snarling head and vast arcing wings, its body framing her like a guardian shadow; the wings are detailed with subtle gold vein patterns. The background shows a pale, minimalist fantasy landscape with 1 distant gothic castle spire complex below, open plains, faint water or marshland, and far mountains under a soft cream sky. Composition is vertical, elegant, and cinematic, with the character centered slightly right, the dragon head to the upper left, and long ribbons and fabric streaming in the wind. Style is refined anime-inspired fantasy concept art with ultra-detailed linework, restrained colors, luminous ivory negative space, luxurious black-and-gold ornamentation, ethereal atmosphere, sharp silhouette design, and a noble sacred-draconic mood.

entries.title: Hidden Duck in Chibi Venice
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed isometric toy-diorama illustration of a crowded Venetian canal district in a cute chibi style, designed as a hidden-object "find the duck" scene. Show a bustling old Venice street and canal packed with exactly hundreds of tiny stylized people with oversized heads, glossy eyes, and varied outfits, filling nearly every walkway, bridge, balcony, gondola, and café seat. The composition is a vertical overhead three-quarter view looking down a narrow canal running through the center, with a stone footbridge crossing the canal in the upper middle and dense warm-toned historic buildings on both sides. Architecture should feature terracotta roof tiles, stucco walls in faded orange, ochre, cream, and brick red, green shutters, flower boxes, striped awnings, hanging signs, lanterns, and richly detailed shopfronts. Include a tall bell tower on the upper left with a sign reading "PONTE DEI SOSPIRI," a red awning reading "Cafe Venezia" on the right side near the bridge, a large "TRATTORIA" sign on the upper right building, a green sign reading "AL VAPORETTO San Marco - Rialto," a striped awning with "GELATO" on the left, a small "FOTO" sign, a kiosk in the lower left plaza labeled "CARNEVALE DI VENEZIA," a glowing shop on the lower right labeled "MURANO GLASS," and a small "SUPRI" sign near the right canal edge. Fill the canal with exactly 7 gondolas, each with passengers and gondoliers in striped shirts and straw hats, plus red-and-white striped mooring poles in the water. Populate the square and canal edges with market tables, café tables under exactly 2 large parasols, carnival masks, balloons, framed art, pastries, glassware, souvenirs, flowers, and streetlamps. In windows, balconies, and doorways, place more chibi figures watching the scene. Hide exactly 1 small yellow rubber duck in an upper-right window beside the "TRATTORIA" building so it is visible but easy to miss. Add a decorative signboard in the top-right corner that reads "Find the duck!" with a duck icon. Render everything in an ultra-dense handcrafted miniature aesthetic with crisp detail, saturated warm colors, soft cinematic lighting, playful travel-poster charm, and a whimsical vacation puzzle-book feeling.

entries.title: Hidden Duck in Miniature Venice

entries.prompt: A highly detailed isometric miniature diorama illustration of a lively Venetian canal square in warm golden daylight, rendered like an ultra-cute handcrafted travel scene with chibi doll-like tourists, tiny shopfronts, textured stone pavement, flower boxes, striped awnings, and sparkling turquoise water. The composition is densely packed and whimsical, designed as a hidden-object scene titled on a decorative sign in the upper right that reads Find the duck! 🐤. Show a charming Venice setting with a central arched stone bridge crossing a narrow canal, multiple gondolas in the water, and dozens of small travelers and locals in colorful outfits, hats, sunglasses, cameras, and shopping bags. Place a souvenir kiosk with postcards and signs, a flower stall overflowing with bright bouquets, a café terrace with red-and-white checkered tables, a carnival mask shop display, stacked vintage suitcases near the canal, striped mooring poles, laundry hanging between buildings, wrought-iron street lamps, and old pastel buildings in peach, ochre, and cream with green shutters and terracotta roofs. The overall style should feel like a premium collectible toy-city illustration, richly layered, joyful, cozy, and travel-themed, with soft depth of field, crisp miniature textures, and a bustling storybook atmosphere. entries.title: Reentry Shuttle Above Earth
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic hard-sci-fi space illustration of a futuristic space shuttle performing atmospheric reentry above Earth, viewed from a three-quarter front-left angle as it flies from right to left. The vehicle is a sleek white delta-wing orbiter with 2 vertical tail fins, 2 large rear engines, a pointed nose, dark cockpit windows, subtle panel lines, light weathering, and small black technical markings. The fuselage bears the text STARSTREAK. A blazing reentry plasma sheath wraps around the nose, belly, wing edges, and upper rear body, forming a long turbulent orange-white fire trail that fills much of the upper background. The shuttle remains clearly visible inside the incandescent shock layer, with bright rim lighting and scorched warm reflections on the hull. Below, the curved Earth occupies the lower part of the frame with a thin blue atmospheric limb, cloud systems, ocean, and a visible spiral storm. Above is deep black-blue space with faint stars. Ultra-detailed aerospace concept art, dramatic motion, realistic lighting, high contrast, sharp focus, epic orbital perspective, painted illustration style, no text overlays except the ship marking.

entries.title: Chibi Angel in Fantasy Forest
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: High-quality Japanese anime style, fantasy world. A tiny 'chibi angel' (Figure 1) with white wings is flying gracefully through a mysterious forest. The chibi angel is cute and stylized, with soft glowing wings that emit a gentle light. The forest is mystical, dotted with giant trees, twisted trunks, floating light particles, and bioluminescent plants and mushrooms. A light mist drifts through the space, creating a deep, mysterious atmosphere. Sunlight filtering through the trees mixes with magical light to produce a dreamlike world. The camera uses a dynamic composition, chasing the chibi angel to depict it gliding through the air. Expressing motion blur for a sense of speed, wind currents, and the trajectory of flapping wings. Lighting is soft and fantastic, with a color palette based on green, blue, and gold. Light particles and volume lights fill the space. Ultra-high definition, cinematic, deep composition, aerial perspective, excellent artwork. No text, no logos, do not make it overly realistic (maintain anime expression).

entries.title: Fantasy RPG Game Cover with Three Knight Women
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Japanese fantasy action RPG PlayStation 5 game cover poster in a dark ornate high-fantasy style, vertically composed like premium key art. Show three armored warrior women standing heroically in the foreground against a glowing night battlefield and a towering gothic fantasy castle city in the distance, with fireworks, embers, magical light trails, and a star-filled purple-blue sky. The central figure is a blonde elf-like knight with pointed ears, a fur-trimmed collar, silver and gold armor, and a powerful stance, holding an enormous double-headed ceremonial battle axe angled across the lower half of the image; the axe is highly detailed with filigree silver metalwork, turquoise-blue crystal inlays, and an intricate engraved circular blade. On the left stands a second female knight with long dark crimson hair, metallic breastplate armor in steel and burgundy tones, and a sword held downward; behind her looms 1 giant black raven or crow with one glowing blue eye. On the right stands a third female knight with long light brown hair covering her eyes, pointed ears, and glossy magenta-pink armor with revealing fantasy plate design; a quiver of arrows is visible behind her shoulder. Include 2 red flying bird-like creatures or phoenixes in the upper right sky. The mood is epic, intense, and slightly gothic, with dense sparks, glowing particles, rim lighting, and lavish metallic reflections. Add an ornate thin gold border framing the entire cover. At the top left, place a small circular emblem and the text "O-prompt Laboratory". Along the right side, add vertical Japanese tagline text: "絆と力に、運命を斬り拓け". At the bottom center, place the game title in large embossed gold serif letters: "ELYSION", with a subtitle beneath in smaller serif capitals: "REBIRTH". Below that, add the Japanese subtitle text "エリシオン・リバース". At the bottom left, include a realistic Japanese age rating badge reading "CERO C" with small text "15才以上対象". Along the bottom, add the Japanese tagline "美しき騎士たちの、終わりなき戦いが今、始まる。" and beneath it the English line "THE ETERNAL BATTLE OF THE KNIGHTS BEGINS NOW.". Make it look like polished AAA console box art for a nonexistent fantasy game, ultra-detailed, cinematic, richly textured, high contrast, with the composition dominated by the three women and the oversized axe.

entries.prompt: A highly detailed fantasy trading card in a premium collectible card game style, vertical layout with an ornate antique gold frame, dark emerald-green enamel panels, and intricate vine-and-leaf embellishments. The card title at the top reads AELION in large elegant serif capitals, with the subtitle "ELF OF THE GREENWOOD" beneath it. In the central illustration, depict a realistic high-fantasy elf ranger standing in a sun-dappled forest. He carries an ornate recurved bow in one hand and a quiver of arrows on his back, posed alertly as if tracking prey through the trees. The forest background is lush, atmospheric, and cinematic, with shafts of warm light filtering through branches and leaves. The overall palette is green, bronze, gold, and earthy brown, with a moody heroic tone and realistic painterly rendering. On the upper left, include a circular faction crest showing 3 gold leaves. On the upper right, include a small shield emblem with a white tree icon. Along the left edge, place exactly 4 vertically stacked stat icons in circular medallions with large numbers beside them: a sword with 3, a shield with 2, a heart with 3, and a boot with 2. At the bottom left, add a large green gem-like badge with the number 4. At the bottom right, add a circular class or weapon icon showing a bow-and-arrow symbol. In a parchment text box across the lower third, include exactly 2 ability entries with decorative leaf bullets and serif typography. The first ability name is "WOODLAND PRECISION" followed by the rules text: "When Aelion attacks, he deals +1 damage if the target is at 2 or more spaces away." The second ability name is "NATURE'S STEP" followed by the rules text: "Once per turn, Aelion may move up to 2 additional spaces through forest terrain." Centered below the abilities, add an italic flavor quote: The wind in the leaves is my guide, and the forest my silence. At the very bottom, on a dark green nameplate, write the type line "ALLY • ELF • RANGER". Use crisp, legible text, polished card-game UI design, balanced margins, and a finished professional TCG product look similar to a premium fantasy strategy card.

entries.title: Weathered Custom Cub Concept Bike
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed concept illustration of a customized vintage step-through motorcycle inspired by a Honda Super Cub, shown in a clean studio-like three-quarter left side view on a plain light gray background. The bike has a rugged post-apocalyptic street-build aesthetic with a black, white, and muted gray color scheme accented by small pink stickers and decals. Emphasize heavy weathering: chipped paint, scratches, oil stains, grime, rust flecks, ink splatter, worn edges, and layered sticker residue across the entire body. The front has 1 square headlight with an X-shaped light pattern and 2 smaller stacked auxiliary lights beneath it. Use spoked wheels, thick all-terrain tires, visible front suspension, exposed mechanical detail, chain drive, and a sturdy center stand touching the ground. The leg shield and side panels are covered in graphic decals, Japanese-style warning labels, numbers, symbols, and distressed typography, including a bold large kanji mark on the front fairing. Add 2 hard side cargo boxes on the rear, one larger box on the far side and 1 nearer black box with extra stickers, plus 1 hanging vertical tag charm attached near the rear case. Include 1 long black ribbed seat, rear rack framing, exposed wiring, metal brackets, bolts, and compact utility accessories that make it feel hand-modified and functional. Render it like an industrial design sketch mixed with polished anime mech concept art: precise linework, watercolor wash shadows, soft gray ground shadow, high-detail mechanical realism, slightly messy inked edges, and a collectible custom-bike illustration feel.

entries.title: 360-Degree Forest World Panorama Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
12-panel grid (4x3), each panel is an independent FULL equirectangular 360° panorama of the SAME continuous forest world

each panel = complete spherical environment (360° horizontal, 180° vertical)
true equirectangular projection with natural distortion:
stretched edges, curved horizon, vertical compression toward zenith and nadir

STRICT global consistency across panels:
same forest biome, same architectural language, same materials, same lighting logic, same scale, same color palette, no visual drift

cinematic photorealism, live-action quality, physically accurate rendering
natural light behavior, realistic exposure, subtle lens response, filmic dynamic range

ultra-detailed environment, grounded material response (wood, moss, fabric, stone), believable imperfections, micro-detail variation

massive forest environment with large-scale vertical structures integrated into trees
multi-layered platforms, bridges, embedded interiors, organic construction logic

lighting:
motivated light sources only (lanterns, windows, bioluminescence)
soft volumetric fog interacting with light beams
physically correct falloff, no overglow, no artificial bloom
balanced contrast, filmic highlights, deep but readable shadows

atmosphere:
dense air perspective, layered depth, subtle particle presence
natural haze, humidity, soft diffusion

CAMERA (IMPORTANT):
each panel = fixed central capture point of a spherical camera
true 360° capture, no framing, no composition bias, no cropped view
but with subtle real-world camera characteristics:
slight lens softness toward edges, mild exposure adaptation, natural highlight rolloff

each panel represents a different location within the SAME world:
canopy height, mid-bridge level, interior spaces, vertical clearings, forest floor transitions
continuous spatial logic between panels

viewer always positioned at the center of the environment

environment fully resolved in ALL directions:
above (canopy, sky gaps, light sources) and below (structures, roots, depth layers)

COLOR:
deep indigo night base, warm amber practical lights, restrained violet accents
cinematic color grading, natural color separation, no oversaturation

STYLE:
cinematic spherical realism, VR-ready environment, physically coherent world
high-end film production quality, not stylized, not game-like

no labels, no text, no numbers
entries.description: A sophisticated prompt for generating a 12-panel equirectangular panorama of a continuous forest world with cinematic realism and global consistency.

entries.title: Indie Mind City Isometric Tech District
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dense isometric steampunk-cyberpunk city illustration at dusk, designed like a whimsical indie tech district called INDIE MIND CITY. The scene is a single sprawling urban plaza packed with narrow brick buildings, rooftop antennas, cables, pipes, neon signs, market stalls, tiny pedestrians, and playful programmer humor. In the center background, a plaza labeled "PLAZA DEL PROMPT" surrounds a sculptural fountain with pale blue water, with benches and people gathered around it. To the left background, a tall building with a giant sign reading "BARRIO CÓDIGO ABIERTO" is covered in balconies, windows, hanging laundry, air conditioners, plants, and street activity. To the right background, another block bears a large sign "CALLEJÓN DE LOS AGENTES," with stacked storefront signs including "Codex Barbería cortes exactos," "Gemini Lavandería," "Claude's Coffee," and "Dr. Llama." Further right, a heavy industrial factory zone with smokestacks, cranes, ducts, crates, and catwalks displays 3 large signs: "ZONA INDUSTRIAL," "FÁBRICA DE TOKENS," and "LLM." A cloud of floating letters and symbols rises above the chimneys like generated text smoke. In the foreground center, a tall clocktower-like corner building has a vertical neon sign reading "INDIE MIND," a large round clock on the facade, warm lit windows, and a small stone animal sculpture at its base. To the right foreground, a lively market district glows with string lights and a bright neon sign "MERCADO NOCTURNO," with 3 visible stall signs: "Memoria usada barata," "Embeddings frescos del día," and "Se cambian vectores." Nearby are 3 more joke signs: "HARD HAT: prompt injection zone," "HACKATHON: entra y sal con un bug," and a food stand labeled "STACK OVERFLOW NOODLES." To the left foreground, an older mixed-use building is filled with signs and visual jokes, including a huge rooftop billboard with 2 cats on top and the title INDIE MIND CITY, plus a small version label "v1.0.0." On that same block, include these visible signs: "FORGE & CAFE," "git push cafe +$2," "Tienda de MERGE CONFLICTS abierto 24/7," "Se reparan linters," "NO rm -rf aquí," "Ralph was here," "npm install vv," "sudo make me sandwich," "WORKTREE," "SE VENDE GPU USADA," "MUSEO DEL MERGE CONFLICT," "NOTARÍA DE COMMITS FIRMADOS," "PSICÓLOGO PARA SENIOR DEVS 50m 80," "GATO PERDIDO responde a localhost," and a poster board reading "HOY: charla sobre agentic coding entrada libre" and "REUNIÓN DE AA^AI REUNIDOS DE LOS AGI." Near the center-left plaza, add a sandwich-board style sign labeled "PROMPTS USADOS" with 3 lines beneath it, and small plaza signs that read "HELLO WORLD," "Tailscale," "OpenRouter," and "Deepseek." The streets are cobblestone and crowded with exact small story details: 1 yellow tram labeled "LÍNEA MAIN," 1 small blue car, 1 bicycle cart, 1 delivery scooter, outdoor café tables, chess players, pedestrians, crates, potted plants, striped awnings, laundry lines, glowing windows, rooftop cats, and a white llama standing near the agent alley. Use a warm muted palette of dusty teal, rust, amber, tan, and faded neon pink and cyan. Render it as an ultra-detailed editorial illustration with clean isometric perspective, intricate linework, soft atmospheric lighting, tiny readable signage, cozy urban clutter, and humorous handcrafted worldbuilding.

entries.title: Retro RPG Item Grid Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a 10x10 grid containing 100 different fantasy role-playing game (RPG) items in a classic pixel art style (16-bit or 32-bit sprite style, similar to Japanese RPGs from the SNES/GBA era). Each item should occupy a square tile individually with a short, clear label below. The grid should be neatly arranged on a white background. Ensure each item is visually unique and every label is spelled correctly. Use clean pixel edges, a limited palette for each sprite, and subtle dithering for shadows. Use the following row themes: Row 1: Swords and blades; Row 2: Shields and armor; Row 3: Bows, crossbows, and ranged weapons; Row 4: Staves, wands, and magical implements; Row 5: Potions, elixirs, and bottles; Row 6: Scrolls, grimoires, and spellbooks; Row 7: Rings, amulets, and enchanted accessories; Row 8: Helmets, crowns, and headgear; Row 9: Keys, relics, and quest items; Row 10: Gems, runes, and crafting materials. Display each tile as a centered item sprite on a clean background square, presented in the form of classic inventory icons-similar to what you'd see in a fantasy RPG menu. Maintain consistency and coherence in the overall style, reminiscent of beloved retro fantasy RPGs-charming and refined, yet clear even at small sizes.

entries.title: Holographic Kamen Rider Decade SSR Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-detailed premium collectible trading card illustration of Kamen Rider Decade in the center foreground, posed in a ruined futuristic city battlefield under a dramatic cosmic night sky. The armored hero wears a glossy magenta, black, and white suit with a segmented helmet and large luminous green compound eyes, facing the viewer in a powerful stance. One arm is thrust forward toward the camera, holding up a character card between black gloved fingers so the card is clearly visible in forced perspective; the other hand gives a confident thumbs-up. The belt device is prominent at the waist. Surrounding the hero are exactly 8 secondary figures and monsters scattered through the rubble and midair battle scene: 1 blue-and-red armored rider crouching in the bottom left foreground, 1 red-and-gold armored rider on the right midground, 2 small rider figures in the distant center background, 2 flying figures in the upper background, and 2 monstrous enemy creatures on the right side, one mid-right and one bottom-right. The environment is dense with collapsed buildings, broken concrete, sparks, smoke, debris, and cinematic action lighting. Render the whole image as a luxurious holographic SSR card with an ornate prismatic foil border, glittering rainbow refractions, metallic gold filigree framing, and layered collectible-card UI. At the top center, large embossed title text reads KAMEN RIDER DECADE, with smaller text above reading "MASKED RIDER". In the top right is a large metallic badge reading SSR with 5 gold stars beneath it. In the top left and bottom right are 2 circular magenta crest icons. In the lower center is a gold cursive signature reading NickZág. Along the bottom frame are 4 labeled UI sections: left panel "CARD TYPE" over "CHARACTER", center nameplate "KAMEN RIDER DECADE" with Japanese subtitle "仮面ライダーディケイド", a barcode panel beneath, and right panel "RARITY" over "SSR". Add tiny footer text under the barcode reading DECADE COMPLETE 21. Style: ultra-detailed tokusatsu hero art, cinematic photoreal armor textures, dramatic depth, explosive action composition, premium gacha card design, holographic foil print effects, sharp focus on the main hero and card, highly polished game-card promotional artwork.
entries.description: This prompt generates a premium holographic tokusatsu trading card featuring Kamen Rider Decade in a dramatic battle scene, ideal for collectible card art, poster designs, or gacha-style character promos.

entries.title: Fantasy Coastal City Landscape
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A breathtaking, panoramic view of a fantasy coastal city. The scene is dominated by a large stone castle on a hill overlooking the vibrant blue ocean. Below the castle, a bustling town features European half-timbered houses with brown roofs, nestled among lush green trees and palm trees. A clear turquoise inlet flows through the center of the town, lined with stone quays, sandy beaches, and small wooden boats. In the distance, several large sailing ships navigate the deep blue sea. The sky is clear blue with fluffy white clouds on a bright sunny day. The overall aesthetic is highly detailed digital illustration, classic RPG concept art, with vibrant colors and intricate architectural details.
entries.description: Generates a highly detailed, vibrant landscape of a coastal town with a castle, perfect for RPG settings or fantasy world-building.

entries.title: Misty Sunrise Heron Lake
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a serene painterly landscape illustration of a quiet misty lake at sunrise, inspired by the phrase Silence often reveals the most profound truths. Use a wide horizontal canvas with soft oil-painting brushwork and pastel colors. The sun is low near the center horizon, glowing through peach, coral, lavender, and pale blue clouds, with its warm reflection stretching across glassy water. In the mid-right foreground, place one elegant blue-gray heron standing in shallow water among reeds, facing left, with a long neck, dark crown stripe, orange beak, thin legs, and a clear mirrored reflection below it. Surround the bird with lily pads and exactly 17 visible water lilies: 4 blossoms clustered in the lower-left foreground, 6 blossoms spread across the right foreground around the heron, 5 small blossoms across the mid-right water near the reeds, and 2 blossoms near the central lily pads. On the right bank, include a graceful weeping tree with drooping branches covered in pale pink blossoms, partially reflected in the lake. Add distant tree silhouettes and low blue-gray morning mist along the far shore. The mood should be meditative, silent, and poetic, with no people, no buildings, no typography, no frame, and no watermark. Emphasize soft atmospheric depth, gentle ripples, luminous reflections, and a tranquil color palette of peach, coral, lavender, pale blue, pink and white, and teal blue with rosy reflections.
entries.description: A peaceful painterly lake scene with a heron, water lilies, flowering tree, and sunrise reflections for meditative nature artwork.

entries.title: Chronowa Black Cat Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a monochrome-and-red Japanese character reference sheet for CHRONOWA, a cute cool black cat mascot who listens to night sounds, wearing white sunglasses and red headphones.

Canvas: Vertical A4 poster / character sheet, off-white paper background with thin black border, red corner accents, small halftone dots, barcode, waveform graphics, tiny city skyline silhouettes, and a red crescent moon. Palette is strict: black, white, gray, and vivid red only. Style is clean vector mascot design mixed with Japanese graphic-design infographic aesthetics.

Top header: Large Japanese title 「クロノワ」 followed by "/ CHRONOWA". Subtitle underneath: 「夜の音を聴く黒猫」 with a small red audio waveform line. Add a black city skyline at the top right under a red crescent moon.

Main subject: Center the largest full-body front view of the black cat, sitting upright with a curled tail, large pointed ears, thin whiskers, oversized white sunglasses with black lenses and white highlights, and red-and-black headphones resting around the neck. Label this central view 「正面」.

Left column poses: Include exactly 3 smaller pose panels with black label tabs: 1) 「側面」 side view, sitting profile, wearing white sunglasses and red headphones around the neck; 2) 「リスニング」 listening pose, headphones worn over the ears, paws touching headphones, small music note; 3) 「リラックス」 relaxed lying pose, sunglasses on, headphones around neck.

Right column item and mood panels: Include an item box labeled 「アイテム」 with exactly 2 items: 1) white sunglasses labeled 「白いサングラス」, 2) red headphones labeled 「赤いヘッドホン」. Below it, include a mood icon box labeled 「表情・ムードアイコン」 with exactly 6 small black cat icons in a 2-column by 3-row grid, each wearing sunglasses: 1) 「ごきげん」 with music note and raised tail, 2) 「気まぐれ」 sitting with subtle motion marks, 3) 「照れ」 shy blushing / embarrassed pose, 4) 「警戒」 alert pose with motion marks, 5) 「やさしい」 gentle pose with a small red heart, 6) 「生意気」 cocky/annoyed pose with red anger mark.

Bottom information grid: Create exactly 8 bordered information cards with black angled headers and red section numbers. Card 01 「プロフィール」 lists: 種族:黒猫, 性別:不詳, 年齢:不明, 一人称:ボク, 住処:夜の街. Card 02 「性格」 lists exactly 5 bullet points: クール, 気まぐれ, 照れ屋, 実はやさしい, 少し生意気. Card 03 「特徴」 lists exactly 4 bullet points: 白いサングラス, 赤いヘッドホン, 音の色が見える, 街の感情を聴ける. Card 04 「好きなもの」 lists exactly 4 lines: 夜の街 / 音楽 / 屋上 / 赤いもの / 雨上がりの道路, plus a red hand-drawn heart. Card 05 「苦手なもの」 lists exactly 3 lines: 強い日差し / 大きすぎる音 / しつこい相手, with a red sun warning icon. Card 06 「能力」 lists exactly 4 bullet points: 音を聴き分ける, 夜道に詳しい, 気配を消すのが得意, 小さな幸運を運ぶ, plus a tiny cat silhouette and red star. Card 07 「設定」 contains a compact Japanese backstory about red headphones collecting memories and emotions of the city at night, and how the cat sees sound colors through white sunglasses. Card 08 「セリフ」 contains exactly 4 quotes: 「今夜の音、悪くないね」, 「昼は苦手。」, 「世界が明るすぎる」, 「いい夜だね。少しだけ、歩こうか」, with a red paw print.

Footer: Add a barcode at bottom left, the word "CHRONOWA", a red handwritten "meow", a small black skyline silhouette along the bottom, and "LISTEN TO THE NIGHT." at the bottom right.

Visual style: Sharp flat vector shapes, slightly imperfect printed zine texture, clean Japanese UI label tabs, thin technical lines, red accents on tabs and icons, high contrast silhouette cat. Keep text legible, preserve all Japanese labels exactly, and do not add extra characters or extra panels.

entries.title: Jindaiji Temple Approach Background
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly detailed anime-style background illustration of a quiet Japanese temple approach street near Jindaiji Temple approach in Chofu, Tokyo on a clear spring or early summer morning. Show a gently curving stone-paved path leading from the foreground toward a set of shrine-temple steps and a thatched-roof gate on the left, with traditional wooden shop buildings lining the right side. The main shop is a soba restaurant with dark timber beams, tiled roofs, warm paper lanterns, a blue noren curtain, menu boards, and visible Japanese signage including そば処 and 深大寺参道. Include exactly 3 prominent vertical signs: one large wooden temple-approach sign in the left foreground, one pale blue hanging banner on the right shop, and one map/information board at the far right. Add exactly 4 visible shop lanterns around the restaurant frontage. Surround the street with dense leafy green trees, shrubs, potted plants, small white flowers, mossy stones, and a shallow clear water basin or stream at the lower right reflecting sunlight. Use soft dappled light filtering through the tree canopy, realistic perspective, lush layered foliage, intricate roof tiles and wood textures, peaceful nostalgic atmosphere, no people, wide cinematic composition, 16:9 aspect ratio, painterly but crisp Studio Ghibli-inspired Japanese background art.

entries.title: Japanese Pro Wrestling Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a glossy Japanese pro-wrestling magazine cover illustration in a dramatic seinen-anime style. Vertical full-cover composition, packed and high-energy, showing exactly 8 handsome male wrestlers inside a wrestling ring arena under blue-white stadium lights, with blurred audience bokeh in the background and visible red ring ropes crossing behind them. All 8 men are adults with extremely muscular, bodybuilder-level physiques, oiled shiny skin, defined abs, pecs, arms, and shoulders, posed like a special feature lineup for a sports magazine. Arrange them in layered groups: 4 wrestlers across the upper half and 4 across the lower half, with 2 central foreground champions dominating the middle. The central left foreground wrestler has short black hair, a confident serious expression, a clenched right fist, and metallic black-and-gold trunks. The central right foreground wrestler has short spiky blond hair, a stoic expression, one hand on his hip, and metallic bright blue trunks. Around them, place 6 additional wrestlers with varied hair colors and styles including bleached blond, black with long bangs, orange spiky hair, and dark brown spiky hair; all wear colorful pro-wrestling trunks in red, blue, gold, or multicolor patterns, with some wrist tape or wristbands, and all are shirtless. Emphasize glossy highlights, magazine-retouched skin, heroic anatomy, and slightly exaggerated masculine beauty. Use a bold commercial cover design with oversized Japanese masthead text at the top reading 熱闘プロレス in huge red letters with gold edging and white highlights, plus a smaller English subtitle beneath it reading "NETTOU PRO-WRESTLING". Add a top catchphrase in Japanese above the title: "プロレスが一番熱い!". In the upper right corner, include a blue issue box with white text showing 2026年5月号, a large numeral 5, the English month-year "MAY 2026", and small pricing text "定価1,200円". Place bold feature cover lines around the wrestlers in authentic Japanese magazine typography: on the left, large yellow-white text "最強世代 8人集結" with smaller lines "新たな歴史が いま、始まる!"; on the right, large white text "美しき筋肉と闘志" with smaller yellow and white subhead lines; another red label with white text reading "若きエースたちの現在地" and smaller white text beneath it; a lower-left black box headed "SPECIAL INTERVIEW" in English with multiple stacked Japanese interviewee names; a cream circular burst on the lower right reading "両面BIG ピンナップ付き!". Across the lower center, add the main feature title in explosive oversized Japanese lettering: a red ribbon label "保存版" above giant gold and red text イケメンレスラー大特集, with a smaller white tagline below: "その強さ、その美しさ、そのすべてに恋をする!". Add a barcode in the bottom right corner with small numeric text beneath it. Overall look: premium Japanese sports-entertainment magazine cover, polished, flashy, energetic, intense, glamorous, crowded but readable, with accurate Japanese text rendering and authentic editorial hierarchy.

entries.title: Zoomed Fake Pixel Art Grid Analysis
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A tightly zoomed-in comparison image demonstrating fake pixel-art rendering, showing a low-resolution-looking scene enlarged on screen with a thin bright blue square grid overlay across the entire frame. The composition is an abstract close crop of a pixel-art-style environment: sandy tan and ochre blocky forms on the left and center, a dark navy and black stepped diagonal mass on the right, muted olive-green and slate-blue shapes along the upper background, and a few lighter golden highlights. entries.title: Chinese Cursive Calligraphy Scroll
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A traditional Chinese ink calligraphy artwork on aged beige xuan paper, presented as a clean flat scan or photograph of a single hanging scroll page with no frame. The composition is entirely vertical Chinese cursive script, bold expressive grass-script brushwork in deep black ink with dynamic stroke variation, flying-white texture, dry-brush breaks, and elegant rhythm. Write the full poem 怒发冲冠,凭栏处、潇潇雨歇。抬望眼,仰天长啸,壮怀激烈。三十功名尘与土,八千里路云和月。莫等闲,白了少年头,空悲切。\n靖康耻,犹未雪;臣子恨,何时灭!驾长车,踏破贺兰山缺。壮志饥餐胡虏肉,笑谈渴饮匈奴血。待从头,收拾旧山河,朝天阙。 in large vertical columns arranged right to left, about 8 main poem columns across the page, each column flowing freely with slight variations in spacing and tilt. Leave a wide left margin containing a smaller vertical inscription with 3 narrow columns: the title and attribution reading 岳飞 满江红 甲辰書月 某元, written in a more restrained but still cursive hand. Add exactly 3 small red seal stamps: 2 stacked square seals in the lower-left margin beneath the inscription, and 1 small oval seal near the upper-right edge beside the first main column. The paper should have subtle warm tan mottling, soft fibers, faint age marks, and natural uneven tone. Overall mood is heroic, scholarly, and museum-quality, with authentic Song-inspired Chinese calligraphy aesthetics, minimal background, high detail, and faithful brush texture.
entries.description: This prompt generates a museum-style Chinese grass-script calligraphy piece of Yue Fei's poem on aged xuan paper, suitable for classical art, cultural posters, or calligraphy comparisons.
